{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"34e9bf1c-f156-437e-961d-2bd20e960571","content":"এখন আমি zyro project-এর core patterns এবং বিদ্যমান hybrid-stack structure দুটো ভালোভাবে বিশ্লেষণ করেছি। এখন একটি comprehensive, phase-by-phase SaaS roadmap তৈরি করছি।\n\n---\n\n## বাংলাদেশি F-Commerce SaaS — User Dashboard Master Roadmap\n\n### বিশ্লেষণ: কোন Feature আগে করতে হবে?\n\n| Priority | Module | Why First |\n|---|---|---|\n| 🔥 P1 | Order Management | সব কিছুর core — এটা ছাড়া বাকি কিছু কাজ করে না |\n| 🔥 P1 | Fake Order / Fraud Detection | Daily pain point, zyro-তে `FraudScoreService` already আছে |\n| 🔥 P1 | Customer CRM | Order-এর সাথে directly linked |\n| ⚡ P2 | SMS Automation | Platform-এ SMS module already আছে — extend করলেই হয় |\n| ⚡ P2 | Courier Integration | Pathao/Steadfast API connection |\n| ⚡ P2 | Customer Intelligence | CRM data থেকে derived |\n| 🧩 P3 | Facebook Bot / Auto Reply | Meta API dependency |\n| 🧩 P3 | Ads ROI + Pixel Sync | Facebook CAPI — zyro-তে ইতিমধ্যে আছে |\n| 🧩 P3 | Payment + Digital Delivery | SSLCommerz/bKash dependency |\n| 🧩 P4 | Accounting Lite | Data-dependent — orders আগে দরকার |\n\n---\n\n## Phase 1: Core Business Engine (MVP)\n\n### Module 1: Order Management System\n\n**zyro reference:** `OrderController.php`, `WooCommerceOrder` model, `IncompleteOrder` model\n\n**Database Tables:**\n\n```sql\n-- orders\nCREATE TABLE orders (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  order_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL, -- ORD-20260502-0001\n  customer_name VARCHAR(150),\n  customer_phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\n  customer_address TEXT,\n  customer_district VARCHAR(100),\n  customer_thana VARCHAR(100),\n  source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'manual', -- facebook_inbox, manual, landing_page\n  source_ref VARCHAR(255),            -- Facebook thread ID / page ID\n  status VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, returned\n  payment_method VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'cod', -- cod, online, bkash\n  payment_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'due', -- due, partial, paid\n  subtotal DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,\n  shipping_charge DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,\n  discount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,\n  total DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,\n  notes TEXT,\n  fraud_score INT DEFAULT 0,          -- 0-100\n  risk_level VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'low', -- low, medium, high\n  courier_id BIGINT,\n  courier_tracking_id VARCHAR(100),\n  courier_status VARCHAR(50),\n  assigned_to BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), -- employee assign\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- order_items\nCREATE TABLE order_items (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  order_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n  product_id BIGINT,\n  product_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n  sku VARCHAR(100),\n  quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,\n  unit_price DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,\n  total DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,\n  variant_info JSONB -- {color: \"red\", size: \"XL\"}\n);\n\n-- order_status_logs\nCREATE TABLE order_status_logs (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  order_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id),\n  old_status VARCHAR(30),\n  new_status VARCHAR(30),\n  note TEXT,\n  changed_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id),\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Laravel API Routes:**\n```\nGET    /api/orders                    — list (filter: status, date, source, risk_level)\nPOST   /api/orders                    — create\nGET    /api/orders/{id}               — detail\nPUT    /api/orders/{id}               — update\nPUT    /api/orders/{id}/status        — status change (with log)\nDELETE /api/orders/{id}               — soft delete\nGET    /api/orders/export             — CSV export\nPOST   /api/orders/bulk-status        — bulk status update\nGET    /api/orders/stats              — daily/monthly counts\n```\n\n**Frontend Pages (Next.js):**\n```\n/dashboard/orders              — Order list with filters, search, bulk actions\n/dashboard/orders/create       — নতুন অর্ডার form\n/dashboard/orders/[id]         — Order detail + timeline + fraud score\n/dashboard/orders/[id]/invoice — Print-ready invoice\n```\n\n---\n\n### Module 2: Fake Order Detection (Fraud System)\n\n**zyro reference:** `FraudScoreService.php`, `CourierStats` model, `BlacklistController.php`\n\n**Fraud Score Logic (zyro pattern adapted for Laravel):**\n\n```\nScore 0-100:\n+30  — Phone number repeated order (same phone, 3+ orders, high return rate)\n+20  — Courier return history > 40%\n+15  — Order placed from suspicious IP pattern\n+10  — Customer name mismatch across orders\n+10  — Same address, many different phones (reshipping hub pattern)\n+5   — Phone format irregular\n-20  — Previous successful delivery (trust signal)\n```\n\n**Database Tables:**\n\n```sql\n-- customer_fraud_profiles\nCREATE TABLE customer_fraud_profiles (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,            -- SaaS user who owns this data\n  phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\n  total_orders INT DEFAULT 0,\n  delivered_orders INT DEFAULT 0,\n  returned_orders INT DEFAULT 0,\n  cancelled_orders INT DEFAULT 0,\n  fraud_score INT DEFAULT 0,          -- computed\n  risk_level VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'low',\n  is_blacklisted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n  blacklist_reason TEXT,\n  last_order_at TIMESTAMP,\n  courier_return_rate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0, -- % from courier API\n  platform_return_rate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0, -- % from our DB\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  UNIQUE(user_id, phone)\n);\n\n-- blacklist (shared pool across admins per CONTEXT.md policy)\nCREATE TABLE customer_blacklist (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\n  reason TEXT,\n  added_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id),\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**API Routes:**\n```\nPOST   /api/fraud/check-phone         — single phone fraud check (courier API + DB history)\nPOST   /api/fraud/bulk-check          — multiple phones\nGET    /api/fraud/blacklist            — blacklisted customers\nPOST   /api/fraud/blacklist            — add to blacklist\nDELETE /api/fraud/blacklist/{id}       — remove from blacklist\nGET    /api/fraud/stats                — overview (high risk %, blocked orders)\n```\n\n**Fraud Check কিভাবে কাজ করবে:**\n1. Order create করার সময় → auto fraud check trigger\n2. Pathao/Steadfast API → ওই phone-এর return history fetch\n3. নিজস্ব DB → কতবার অর্ডার করেছে, কতটা delivered\n4. Score compute → Order-এ `fraud_score` + `risk_level` save\n5. High risk (70+) → auto flag, admin notify\n\n---\n\n### Module 3: Customer CRM\n\n**zyro reference:** `CustomerController.php`, `Customer` model\n\n**Database:**\n\n```sql\n-- customers (auto-populated from orders)\nCREATE TABLE customers (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\n  name VARCHAR(150),\n  email VARCHAR(150),\n  address TEXT,\n  district VARCHAR(100),\n  total_orders INT DEFAULT 0,\n  total_spent DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,\n  successful_deliveries INT DEFAULT 0,\n  returns INT DEFAULT 0,\n  last_order_at TIMESTAMP,\n  customer_tag VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'normal', -- vip, loyal, risky, blocked\n  notes TEXT,\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  UNIQUE(user_id, phone)\n);\n\n-- customer_contact_logs\nCREATE TABLE customer_contact_logs (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  customer_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers(id),\n  type VARCHAR(30), -- call, sms, whatsapp, note\n  summary TEXT,\n  follow_up_at TIMESTAMP,\n  created_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id),\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Frontend:**\n```\n/dashboard/customers           — list (filter by tag, district, risk)\n/dashboard/customers/[id]      — profile: order history, SMS log, fraud score, notes\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: Automation & Courier Layer\n\n### Module 4: Courier Integration (Pathao + Steadfast + RedX)\n\n**zyro reference:** `CourierController.php`, `UserCourierConfig` model\n\n**Database:**\n\n```sql\n-- courier_accounts (per user credential store)\nCREATE TABLE courier_accounts (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  courier_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- pathao, steadfast, redx, sundarban\n  api_key VARCHAR(255),\n  api_secret VARCHAR(255),\n  store_id VARCHAR(100),\n  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n  config JSONB,\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- courier_bookings\nCREATE TABLE courier_bookings (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  order_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id),\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\n  courier_name VARCHAR(50),\n  tracking_id VARCHAR(100),\n  consignment_id VARCHAR(100),\n  booking_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'booked',\n  delivery_area VARCHAR(150),\n  charge DECIMAL(10,2),\n  booked_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),\n  last_synced_at TIMESTAMP,\n  raw_response JSONB\n);\n```\n\n**Features:**\n- Pathao API → parcel book, track, cancel\n- Steadfast API → consignment create, bulk book, track\n- RedX API → parcel create + track\n- **Area-wise success rate dashboard** (zyro-তে `CourierStats` model ছিল — same pattern)\n- **Best courier suggestion** → algorithm: delivery charge vs. area success rate vs. user preference\n\n**API Routes:**\n```\nGET    /api/couriers                   — available couriers + user config\nPOST   /api/couriers/{name}/book       — book parcel\nGET    /api/couriers/track/{tracking}  — track parcel\nPOST   /api/couriers/bulk-book         — bulk booking (selected orders)\nGET    /api/couriers/performance        — area-wise delivery stats\nGET    /api/couriers/suggest/{order_id} — best courier suggestion for this order\n```\n\n---\n\n### Module 5: SMS Automation\n\n**Existing:** Platform-এ SMS module already আছে (`/api/sms/send` + gateway system)\n\n**নতুন যা লাগবে:**\n\n```sql\n-- sms_automation_rules\nCREATE TABLE sms_automation_rules (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,\n  trigger_event VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- order_confirmed, order_shipped, order_delivered, order_cancelled, payment_due\n  template_id BIGINT,                 -- existing notification_templates table\n  delay_minutes INT DEFAULT 0,        -- X minutes after event\n  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- sms_automation_logs\nCREATE TABLE sms_automation_logs (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  rule_id BIGINT REFERENCES sms_automation_rules(id),\n  order_id BIGINT REFERENCES orders(id),\n  phone VARCHAR(20),\n  status VARCHAR(20), -- sent, failed, skipped\n  sent_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Flow:**\n```\nOrder status পরিবর্তন হলে:\n  → Laravel Event fire: OrderStatusChanged\n  → Event Listener: SmsAutomationListener\n  → Rule check: trigger_event match করে?\n  → Queue job: dispatch SMS (delay support)\n  → Log result\n```\n\n**Variables available in templates:**\n```\n{customer_name}, {order_number}, {total}, {courier}, {tracking_id}, {shop_name}\n```\n\n**Frontend:**\n```\n/dashboard/sms/automation        — rule list, create, toggle active\n/dashboard/sms/automation/create — template + trigger + delay configure\n```\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: Intelligence & Growth\n\n### Module 6: Customer Intelligence Dashboard\n\n**zyro reference:** `DashboardController.php`, fraud reports\n\n**Features:**\n- **Repeat buyer detection** → 3+ successful orders = VIP tag auto-assign\n- **High value customer** → top 20% by spend value\n- **Risky customer list** → fraud score > 50 + return rate > 30%\n- **District-wise heatmap** → কোন এলাকায় সবচেয়ে বেশি order/return\n\n```\n/dashboard/intelligence          — overview widgets\n/dashboard/intelligence/vip      — VIP customers\n/dashboard/intelligence/risky    — risk profile list\n/dashboard/intelligence/heatmap  — geo analysis\n```\n\n---\n\n### Module 7: Product Management\n\n```sql\n-- products\nCREATE TABLE products (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n  sku VARCHAR(100),\n  category_id BIGINT,\n  selling_price DECIMAL(12,2),\n  cost_price DECIMAL(12,2),\n  stock INT DEFAULT 0,\n  track_stock BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n  images JSONB,\n  variants JSONB,  -- [{color: \"red\", size: \"M\", stock: 10, price: 500}]\n  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n---\n\n### Module 8: Facebook Ads ROI Tracker\n\n**zyro reference:** `FacebookCapiController.php` — পুরো CAPI implementation zyro-তে আছে\n\n**Concept:** \n- প্রতিটি order create-এর সময় `utm_source`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_ad_id` capture\n- Facebook Pixel Server-Side Event → `Purchase` event send (zyro-র `FacebookCapiQueue` pattern reuse)\n\n```sql\n-- order_attribution\nCREATE TABLE order_attribution (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  order_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id),\n  utm_source VARCHAR(100),     -- facebook, instagram, tiktok\n  utm_medium VARCHAR(100),     -- cpc, organic\n  utm_campaign VARCHAR(200),\n  utm_ad_id VARCHAR(100),\n  landing_page_url TEXT,\n  pixel_event_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n  pixel_sent_at TIMESTAMP\n);\n```\n\n**ROI Dashboard:**\n```\nCampaign → Clicks → Orders → Revenue → Ad Spend → ROAS\nকোন ad থেকে real order এসেছে vs fake order\n```\n\n---\n\n### Module 9: Accounting Lite\n\n```sql\n-- transactions\nCREATE TABLE transactions (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- income, expense\n  category VARCHAR(100),     -- product_sale, ad_spend, courier_charge, refund, other\n  reference_type VARCHAR(50), -- order, manual\n  reference_id BIGINT,\n  amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,\n  note TEXT,\n  transaction_date DATE NOT NULL,\n  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Reports:**\n- Daily/Weekly/Monthly sales report\n- Expense by category (ad spend + courier + cost of goods)\n- Profit = Revenue − COGS − Shipping − Ad Spend\n\n---\n\n### Module 10: Facebook Comment Auto Reply Bot\n\n**Dependencies:** Meta Graph API, Webhooks\n\n**Architecture:**\n```\nFacebook Page Webhook → /api/webhooks/facebook\n  → Comment detected → keyword match\n  → Auto reply via Graph API comment/message\n  → Lead capture → Customer table-এ add\n```\n\n```sql\n-- fb_bot_rules\nCREATE TABLE fb_bot_rules (\n  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\n  fb_page_id VARCHAR(100),\n  trigger_type VARCHAR(30),     -- comment, keyword_inbox\n  keywords TEXT[],              -- [\"price\", \"দাম\", \"কত\"]\n  reply_type VARCHAR(20),       -- comment_reply, inbox_message, both\n  reply_text TEXT,\n  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE\n);\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Phase Plan\n\n### Phase 1 — এখনই শুরু করা যাবে (4-6 সপ্তাহ)\n\n| # | Feature | Backend | Frontend |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | Product Management | Laravel CRUD API | `/dashboard/products` |\n| 2 | Order Management | Laravel API + Events | `/dashboard/orders` |\n| 3 | Customer CRM | Laravel API | `/dashboard/customers` |\n| 4 | Fraud/Phone Check | Laravel + Courier API | Order create-এ embedded |\n| 5 | Customer Blacklist | Laravel API | `/dashboard/customers/blacklist` |\n\n### Phase 2 — (4-6 সপ্তাহ)\n\n| # | Feature | Backend | Frontend |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| 6 | Courier Integration | Pathao + Steadfast API wrapper | `/dashboard/courier` |\n| 7 | SMS Automation Rules | Laravel Events + Queue | `/dashboard/sms/automation` |\n| 8 | Order Invoice Print | PDF generation (Laravel) | `/dashboard/orders/[id]/invoice` |\n| 9 | Customer Intelligence | Computed from existing data | `/dashboard/intelligence` |\n| 10 | Basic Accounting | Transactions API | `/dashboard/accounting` |\n\n### Phase 3 — (6-8 সপ্তাহ)\n\n| # | Feature |\n|---|---|\n| 11 | Facebook Ads ROI (UTM + Pixel CAPI) |\n| 12 | Landing Page Builder (zyro-র template system adapt) |\n| 13 | Facebook Comment/Inbox Bot |\n| 14 | Subscription/Payment (SSLCommerz/bKash) |\n| 15 | Multi-store / Team Member support |\n\n---\n\n## User Dashboard Navigation Structure\n\n```\n/dashboard\n  ├── Home (Overview widgets)\n  ├── Orders\n  │   ├── All Orders\n  │   ├── Create Order\n  │   ├── Fraud Check\n  │   └── Blacklist\n  ├── Products\n  │   ├── Product List\n  │   ├── Categories\n  │   └── Stock Management\n  ├── Customers\n  │   ├── Customer List\n  │   ├── VIP Customers\n  │   └── Risky / Blocked\n  ├── Courier\n  │   ├── Book Parcel\n  │   ├── Track Orders\n  │   └── Performance Report\n  ├── SMS\n  │   ├── Send SMS (existing)\n  │   ├── SMS History (existing)\n  │   └── Automation Rules (new)\n  ├── Analytics\n  │   ├── Sales Report\n  │   ├── Customer Intelligence\n  │   ├── Ads ROI (Phase 3)\n  │   └── Courier Performance\n  ├── Accounting\n  │   ├── Daily Report\n  │   ├── Expenses\n  │   └── Profit Dashboard\n  └── Settings\n      ├── Shop Profile\n      ├── Courier Accounts\n      ├── Facebook Pages (Phase 3)\n      └── Subscription\n```\n\n---\n\nএখন আপনি বলুন — **Phase 1 কোন module দিয়ে শুরু করতে চান?**\n\nআমার সাজেশন: **Order Management + Product Management** একসাথে শুরু করা, কারণ:\n1. Order create করতে হলে product দরকার\n2. Fraud check order create-এর flow-এ embedded\n3. Customer CRM auto-populate হবে orders থেকে\n\nবলুন শুরু করি কিনা, এবং কোন module প্রথমে implement করবেন?","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":"Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the existing codebase. The user wants me to:\n1. Research and plan a comprehensive SaaS product roadmap for Bangladeshi online business owners\n2. Take reference from the zyro project\n\nThis is primarily a planning/design task. The user wants a detailed, research-backed plan for their User Dashboard with all 10 features listed.\n\nLet me now create a comprehensive plan document. Since the user is asking me to \"বিষধ ভাবে গবেষনা লব্ধ উপায় বের কর\" (find detailed research-based ways), I should provide a thorough analysis and roadmap.\n\n\nI'm reviewing what the zyro project already has in place—fraud detection, order management with fake order detection, customer relationship tools, SMS automation, courier integrations with local providers like Pathao and RedX, a landing page builder, Facebook CAPI integration, and product management capabilities. Now I need to design the hybrid stack properly with Laravel handling the API layer, Next.js powering the dashboard interface, and a solid database schema, then phase the features strategically based on impact and complexity while adapting the zyro patterns to fit this new product.\n\nI'm breaking this into three phases: the MVP focuses on order management, customer CRM with fraud detection, and SMS automation for immediate ROI; phase two adds courier integration with comparison tools, customer intelligence dashboards, and Facebook ads ROI tracking; phase three handles the more complex features like Facebook comment bots and subscription management. I'll structure the full plan with database schemas and UI layouts for each module."},"id":"7cdb258d-b904-44f8-a113-343b3aa194e1","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:38:57.422Z","parentId":"e8aa2dc7-7b59-426d-8034-346404fb4de4"}

Let me create:\n\n1. A shared menu config utility (so all pages share the same menu)\n2. All the dashboard pages as shells\n3. The context file\n\nLet me plan all pages needed:\n\n**Dashboard Pages (shells):**\n- `/dashboard/page.tsx` - Update existing with new menu\n- `/dashboard/orders/page.tsx` - All Orders\n- `/dashboard/orders/create/page.tsx` - Create Order\n- `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check/page.tsx` - Fraud Check\n- `/dashboard/orders/blacklist/page.tsx` - Blacklist\n\n\n- `/dashboard/orders/[id]/page.tsx` - Order Detail\n- `/dashboard/products/page.tsx` - Product List\n- `/dashboard/products/categories/page.tsx` - Categories\n- `/dashboard/products/stock/page.tsx` - Stock Management\n- `/dashboard/customers/page.tsx` - Customer List\n- `/dashboard/customers/vip/page.tsx` - VIP Customers\n- `/dashboard/customers/risky/page.tsx` - Risky/Blocked\n- `/dashboard/customers/[id]/page.tsx` - Customer Profile\n- `/dashboard/courier/page.tsx` - Courier Overview / Book Parcel\n- `/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx` - Track Orders\n- `/dashboard/courier/performance/page.tsx` - Performance Report\n- `/dashboard/sms/automation/page.tsx` - Automation Rules (new)\n- `/dashboard/analytics/page.tsx` - Analytics Overview\n- `/dashboard/analytics/sales/page.tsx` - Sales Report\n- `/dashboard/analytics/intelligence/page.tsx` - Customer Intelligence\n- `/dashboard/analytics/courier/page.tsx` - Courier Performance\n- `/dashboard/accounting/page.tsx` - Accounting Overview\n- `/dashboard/accounting/expenses/page.tsx` - Expenses\n- `/dashboard/accounting/profit/page.tsx` - Profit Dashboard\n- `/dashboard/settings/page.tsx` - Settings\n- `/dashboard/settings/shop/page.tsx` - Shop Profile\n- `/dashboard/settings/courier`\n\nThat's a lot of pages to build out. I should create a shared menu configuration and a reusable dashboard shell component that wraps the CatvShell, then use that across all pages to avoid duplicating the auth and menu logic everywhere.\n\nI'm weighing whether to use a layout.tsx for the dashboard route group or a shared component that each page imports. The layout approach is cleaner for Next.js, but since the existing pages use CatvShell directly, I'll go with a UserShell wrapper component that handles auth checks, theme and locale state, and the full navigation menu. Each page can then just import it and pass the active menu key and title.\n\nI need to consolidate all the auth, theme, and locale logic into this UserShell component, then create around 25 page shells with bilingual \"Coming Soon\" banners showing module descriptions. Let me start by building the UserShell component and updating the dashboard page, then work through the rest of the pages systematically. Now I'm mapping out the complete navigation structure across all the remaining sections—courier performance tracking, SMS management with send/history/automation, analytics dashboards for sales and intelligence, accounting modules for daily records and expenses, and settings for shop configuration, courier accounts, and subscription management. I'll start building the UserShell component and then create all the corresponding pages, setting up the context file in the project directory. I need to be careful about the existing SMS pages since they have their own menu structure—I should keep them working as-is for now and migrate them later when implementing SMS automation. The cleanest approach is to create the UserShell component with the full new menu for the new pages, then handle the old pages separately once we're ready to update them.\n\nFor the new shell structure, each page will display a header, a \"Coming Soon\" state with a description, and module information. Now I'm writing the UserShell component that handles authentication checks, theme and locale management, menu configuration, and accepts props like activeKey, defaultExpandedKey, pageTitle, pageSubtitle, and children.\n\nWriting the UserShell component...\n\nFor the page shells, I'm creating a PagePlaceholder component to keep things simple and functional, then building out all the pages. The \"Coming Soon\" pages need to display the page header, a coming soon message, and relevant module details.\n\nI'm going to structure this with a UserShell wrapper that handles authentication and navigation logic, accepting an activeKey and children, then make individual page shells straightforward. Since CatvShell already supports title and subtitle props in the header, I can use the module name as the title for now.\n\nSetting up the file structure... Building the UserShell component now with full menu structure and bilingual labels for all navigation items. Continuing through the menu structure with SMS history and automation options, then moving into analytics sections for sales, customer intelligence, and courier performance, followed by accounting modules for daily reports, expenses, and profit tracking, and finally settings configuration.\n\nNow I'm building the UserShell component to wrap pages with optional title and subtitle overrides."},"id":"ec2911e1-da56-475e-bc12-e9eeecd9fe06","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:45:10.659Z","parentId":"c5fb2648-c54d-47e7-a254-16542b49361f"}

createOrder: \\\"নতুন অর্ডার\\\",\\n    fraudCheck: \\\"ফ্রড চেক\\\",\\n    blacklist: \\\"ব্লকলিস্ট\\\",\\n\\n    products: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    productList: \\\"পণ্য তালিকা\\\",\\n    categories:  accounting: \\\"হিসাব\\\",\\n    dailyReport: \\\"দৈনিক রিপোর্ট\\\",\\n    expenses: \\\"খরচ\\\",\\n    profit: \\\"মুনাফা\\\",\\n\\n    settings: \\\"সেটিংস\\\",\\n    shopProfile: \\\"শপ প্রোফাইল\\\",\\n    courierAccounts: \\\"কুরিয়ার একাউন্ট\\\",\\n    subscription: \\\"সাবস্ক্রিপশন\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    sidebarTitle: \\\"Business Dashboard\\\",\\n    languageLabel: \\\"Language\\\",\\n    themeLabel: \\\"Theme\\\",\\n    loginRequired: \\\"Please login first to access the dashboard.\\\",\\n    accessDenied: \\\"This page is available for regular users only.\\\",\\n    goHome: \\\"Go Home\\\",\\n\\n    dashboard: \\\"Dashboard\\\",\\n\\n    orders: \\\"Orders\\\",\\n    allOrders: \\\"All Orders\\\",\\n    createOrder: \\\"New Order\\\",\\n    fraudCheck: \\\"Fraud Check\\\",\\n    blacklist: \\\"Blacklist\\\",\\n\\n    products: \\\"Products\\\",\\n    productList: \\\"Product List\\\",\\n    categories: \\\"Categories\\\",\\n    stock: \\\"Stock Management\\\",\\n\\n    customers: \\\"Customers\\\",\\n    customerList: \\\"Customer List\\\",\\n    vipCustomers: \\\"VIP Customers\\\",\\n    riskyCustomers: \\\"Risky / Blocked\\\",\\n\\n    courier: \\\"Courier\\\",\\n    bookParcel: \\\"Book Parcel\\\",\\n    trackOrders: \\\"Track Orders\\\",\\n    courierPerf: \\\"Performance\\\",\\n\\n    sms: \\\"SMS\\\",\\n    smsSend: \\\"Send SMS\\\",\\n    smsHistory: \\\"SMS History\\\",\\n    smsAutomation: \\\"Automation\\\",\\n\\n    analytics: \\\"Analytics\\\",\\n    salesReport: \\\"Sales Report\\\",\\n    intelligence: \\\"Customer Intelligence\\\",\\n    adsRoi: \\\"Ads ROI\\\",\\n    courierReport: \\\"Courier Report\\\",\\n\\n    accounting: \\\"Accounting\\\",\\n    dailyReport: \\\"Daily Report\\\",\\n    expenses: \\\"Expenses\\\",\\n    profit: \\\"Profit\\\",\\n\\n    settings: \\\"Settings\\\",\\n    shopProfile: \\\"Shop Profile\\\",\\n    courierAccounts: \\\"Courier Accounts\\\",\\n    subscription: \\\"Subscription\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ─── Build menu from labels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction buildMenu(t: typeof menuText.bn): ShellMenuItem[] {\\n  return [\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"dashboard\\\",\\n      label: t.dashboard,\\n      href: \\\"/dashboard\\\",\\n      icon: \\\"🏠\\\",\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"orders\\\",\\n      label: t.orders,\\n      icon: \\\"📦\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"all-orders\\\", label: t.allOrders, href: \\\"/dashboard/orders\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"create-order\\\", label: t.createOrder, href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/create\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"fraud-check\\\", label: t.fraudCheck, href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"blacklist\\\", label: t.blacklist, href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/blacklist\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"products\\\",\\n      label: t.products,\\n      icon: \\\"🛍️\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"product-list\\\", label: t.productList, href: \\\"/dashboard/products\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"categories\\\", label: t.categories, href: \\\"/dashboard/products/categories\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"stock\\\", label: t.stock, href: \\\"/dashboard/products/stock\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"customers\\\",\\n      label: t.customers,\\n      icon: \\\"👥\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"customer-list\\\", label: t.customerList, href: \\\"/dashboard/customers\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"vip-customers\\\", label: t.vipCustomers, href: \\\"/dashboard/customers/vip\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"risky-customers\\\", label: t.riskyCustomers, href: \\\"/dashboard/customers/risky\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"courier\\\",\\n      label: t.courier,\\n      icon: \\\"🚚\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"book-parcel\\\", label: t.bookParcel, href: \\\"/dashboard/courier\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"track-orders\\\", label: t.trackOrders, href: \\\"/dashboard/courier/track\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"courier-perf\\\", label: t.courierPerf, href: \\\"/dashboard/courier/performance\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"sms\\\",\\n      label: t.sms,\\n      icon: \\\"✉️\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"sms-send\\\", label: t.smsSend, href: \\\"/dashboard/sms/send\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"sms-history\\\", label: t.smsHistory, href: \\\"/dashboard/sms/history\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"sms-automation\\\", label: t.smsAutomation, href: \\\"/dashboard/sms/automation\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"analytics\\\",\\n      label: t.analytics,\\n      icon: \\\"📊\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"sales-report\\\", label: t.salesReport, href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/sales\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"intelligence\\\", label: t.intelligence, href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/intelligence\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"ads-roi\\\", label: t.adsRoi, href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/ads-roi\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"courier-report\\\", label: t.courierReport, href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/courier\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"accounting\\\",\\n      label: t.accounting,\\n      icon: \\\"🧾\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"daily-report\\\", label: t.dailyReport, href: \\\"/dashboard/accounting\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"expenses\\\", label: t.expenses, href: \\\"/dashboard/accounting/expenses\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"profit\\\", label: t.profit, href: \\\"/dashboard/accounting/profit\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n    {\\n      key: \\\"settings\\\",\\n      label: t.settings,\\n      icon: \\\"⚙️\\\",\\n      children: [\\n        { key: \\\"shop-profile\\\", label: t.shopProfile, href: \\\"/dashboard/settings/shop\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"courier-accounts\\\", label: t.courierAccounts, href: \\\"/dashboard/settings/courier\\\" },\\n        { key: \\\"subscription\\\", label: t.subscription, href: \\\"/dashboard/settings/subscription\\\" },\\n      ],\\n    },\\n  ];\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Props ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\ntype UserShellProps = {\\n  /** Active sidebar menu key — e.g. \\\"all-orders\\\", \\\"book-parcel\\\", \\\"dashboard\\\" */\\n  activeKey: string;\\n  /** Parent key to expand by default — e.g. \\\"orders\\\", \\\"courier\\\" */\\n  defaultExpandedKey?: string;\\n  /** Optional page title override (falls back to sidebarTitle) */\\n  pageTitle?: { bn: string; en: string };\\n  /** Optional page subtitle override */\\n  pageSubtitle?: { bn: string; en: string };\\n  children: React.ReactNode;\\n};\\n\\n// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport default function UserShell({\\n  activeKey,\\n  defaultExpandedKey,\\n  pageTitle,\\n  pageSubtitle,\\n  children,\\n}: UserShellProps) {\\n  const router = useRouter();\\n  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<ThemeMode>(getStoredTheme);\\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<AuthUser | null>(null);\\n  const [state, setState] = useState<\\\"loading\\\" | \\\"unauthenticated\\\" | \\\"forbidden\\\" | \\\"ready\\\">(\\\"loading\\\");\\n\\n  // theme\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    document.documentElement.dataset.theme = theme;\\n    localStorage.setItem(THEME_STORAGE_KEY, theme);\\n  }, [theme]);\\n\\n  // locale\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    document.documentElement.lang = locale;\\n    localStorage.setItem(LOCALE_STORAGE_KEY, locale);\\n  }, [locale]);\\n\\n  // auth check\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const token = getStoredToken();\\n    const storedUser = getStoredUser();\\n\\n    if (!token || !storedUser) {\\n      setState(\\\"unauthenticated\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (normalizeRole(storedUser) !== \\\"user\\\") {\\n      setState(\\\"forbidden\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    setUser(storedUser);\\n    setState(\\\"ready\\\");\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  // background profile sync\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const token = getStoredToken();\\n    if (!token) return;\\n\\n    const syncUser = async () => {\\n      try {\\n        const res = await fetch(\\\"/api/me\\\", {\\n          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        });\\n        if (!res.ok) return;\\n        const data = await res.json();\\n        if (!data.user) return;\\n        const normalized: AuthUser = { ...data.user, role: data.user.role ?? \\\"user\\\" };\\n        setStoredUser(normalized);\\n        setUser(normalized);\\n      } catch {\\n        // silent\\n      }\\n    };\\n\\n    void syncUser();\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  const t = useMemo(() => menuText[locale], [locale]);\\n  const menu = useMemo(() => buildMenu(t), [t]);\\n\\n  const title = pageTitle ? pageTitle[locale] : t.sidebarTitle;\\n  const subtitle = pageSubtitle ? pageSubtitle[locale] : \\\"\\\";\\n\\n  // email verification\\n  const handleInitiateEmailVerification = async () => {\\n    const token = getStoredToken();\\n    if (!token || !user) return;\\n\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(\\\"/api/email/send-verification\\\", {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n\\n      if (!res.ok) {\\n        const err = await res.json();\\n        alert(err.message || \\\"Failed to send verification email\\\");\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      if (data.token) {\\n        sessionStorage.setItem(\\\"email_verification_token\\\", data.token);\\n        sessionStorage.setItem(\\\"email_verification_email\\\", data.email);\\n        router.push(\\\"/verify-email\\\");\\n      } else if (data.message === \\\"Your email is already verified.\\\") {\\n        const updatedUser: AuthUser = {\\n          ...user,\\n          email_verified_at: new Date().toISOString(),\\n        };\\n        setStoredUser(updatedUser);\\n        setUser(updatedUser);\\n      }\\n    } catch {\\n      alert(\\\"An error occurred while sending the verification email\\\");\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  // ─── Not authenticated / forbidden ────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  if (state !== \\\"ready\\\") {\\n    return (\\n      <main className=\\\"mx-auto min-h-screen w-full max-w-4xl px-4 py-8\\\">\\n        <section className=\\\"rounded-3xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 text-center\\\">\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-xl font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)] sm:text-2xl\\\">{t.sidebarTitle}</h1>\\n          <p className=\\\"mt-3 text-sm text-[var(--muted)] sm:text-base\\\">\\n            {state === \\\"forbidden\\\" ? t.accessDenied : t.loginRequired}\\n          </p>\\n          <a\\n            href=\\\"/\\\"\\n            className=\\\"mt-5 inline-flex rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white\\\"\\n          >\\n            {t.goHome}\\n          </a>\\n        </section>\\n      </main>\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  return (\\n    <CatvShell\\n      title={title}\\n      subtitle={subtitle}\\n      locale={locale}\\n      theme={theme}\\n      localeLabel={t.languageLabel}\\n      themeLabel={t.themeLabel}\\n      sidebarTitle={t.sidebarTitle}\\n      userName={user?.name}\\n      userMeta={user?.email}\\n      menu={menu}\\n      activeKey={activeKey}\\n      defaultExpandedKey={defaultExpandedKey ?? null}\\n      onToggleLocale={() => setLocale(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"en\\\" : \\\"bn\\\")}\\n      onToggleTheme={() => setTheme(theme === \\\"dark\\\" ? \\\"light\\\" : \\\"dark\\\")}\\n    >\\n      {!user?.email_verified_at && (\\n        <div className=\\\"p-4 sm:p-5\\\">\\n          <EmailVerificationBanner\\n            userEmail={user?.email || \\\"\\\"}\\n            onInitiateVerification={handleInitiateEmailVerification}\\n            locale={locale}\\n          />\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n      {children}\\n    </CatvShell>\\n  );\\n}\\n\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"44d6649c-f167-43db-bca0-8b6168d338d9","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:46:08.439Z","parentId":"c8bc171b-25ce-48e8-9f30-40938e42dd3f"}

  smsSend: \"SMS পাঠান\",\n    smsHistory: \"SMS হিস্টোরি\",\n    smsAutomation: \"অটোমেশন\",\n\n    analytics: \"অ্যানালিটিক্স\",\n    salesReport: \"সেলস রিপোর্ট\",\n    intelligence: \"কাস্টমার ইন্টেলিজেন্স\",\n    adsRoi: \"Ads ROI\",\n    courierReport: \"কুরিয়ার রিপোর্ট\",\n\n    accounting: \"হিসাব\",\n    dailyReport: \"দৈনিক রিপোর্ট\",\n    expenses: \"খরচ\",\n    profit: \"মুনাফা\",\n\n    settings: \"সেটিংস\",\n    shopProfile: \"শপ প্রোফাইল\",\n    courierAccounts: \"কুরিয়ার একাউন্ট\",\n    subscription: \"সাবস্ক্রিপশন\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    sidebarTitle: \"Business Dashboard\",\n    languageLabel: \"Language\",\n    themeLabel: \"Theme\",\n    loginRequired: \"Please login first to access the dashboard.\",\n    accessDenied: \"This page is available for regular users only.\",\n    goHome: \"Go Home\",\n\n    dashboard: \"Dashboard\",\n\n    orders: \"Orders\",\n    allOrders: \"All Orders\",\n    createOrder: \"New Order\",\n    fraudCheck: \"Fraud Check\",\n    blacklist: \"Blacklist\",\n\n    products: \"Products\",\n    productList: \"Product List\",\n    categories: \"Categories\",\n    stock: \"Stock Management\",\n\n    customers: \"Customers\",\n    customerList: \"Customer List\",\n    vipCustomers: \"VIP Customers\",\n    riskyCustomers: \"Risky / Blocked\",\n\n    courier: \"Courier\",\n    bookParcel: \"Book Parcel\",\n    trackOrders: \"Track Orders\",\n    courierPerf: \"Performance\",\n\n    sms: \"SMS\",\n    smsSend: \"Send SMS\",\n    smsHistory: \"SMS History\",\n    smsAutomation: \"Automation\",\n\n    analytics: \"Analytics\",\n    salesReport: \"Sales Report\",\n    intelligence: \"Customer Intelligence\",\n    adsRoi: \"Ads ROI\",\n    courierReport: \"Courier Report\",\n\n    accounting: \"Accounting\",\n    dailyReport: \"Daily Report\",\n    expenses: \"Expenses\",\n    profit: \"Profit\",\n\n    settings: \"Settings\",\n    shopProfile: \"Shop Profile\",\n    courierAccounts: \"Courier Accounts\",\n    subscription: \"Subscription\",\n  },\n};\n\n// ─── Build menu from labels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction buildMenu(t: typeof menuText.bn): ShellMenuItem[] {\n  return [\n    {\n      key: \"dashboard\",\n      label: t.dashboard,\n      href: \"/dashboard\",\n      icon: \"🏠\",\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"orders\",\n      label: t.orders,\n      icon: \"📦\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"all-orders\", label: t.allOrders, href: \"/dashboard/orders\" },\n        { key: \"create-order\", label: t.createOrder, href: \"/dashboard/orders/create\" },\n        { key: \"fraud-check\", label: t.fraudCheck, href: \"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\" },\n        { key: \"blacklist\", label: t.blacklist, href: \"/dashboard/orders/blacklist\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"products\",\n      label: t.products,\n      icon: \"🛍️\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"product-list\", label: t.productList, href: \"/dashboard/products\" },\n        { key: \"categories\", label: t.categories, href: \"/dashboard/products/categories\" },\n        { key: \"stock\", label: t.stock, href: \"/dashboard/products/stock\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"customers\",\n      label: t.customers,\n      icon: \"👥\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"customer-list\", label: t.customerList, href: \"/dashboard/customers\" },\n        { key: \"vip-customers\", label: t.vipCustomers, href: \"/dashboard/customers/vip\" },\n        { key: \"risky-customers\", label: t.riskyCustomers, href: \"/dashboard/customers/risky\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"courier\",\n      label: t.courier,\n      icon: \"🚚\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"book-parcel\", label: t.bookParcel, href: \"/dashboard/courier\" },\n        { key: \"track-orders\", label: t.trackOrders, href: \"/dashboard/courier/track\" },\n        { key: \"courier-perf\", label: t.courierPerf, href: \"/dashboard/courier/performance\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"sms\",\n      label: t.sms,\n      icon: \"✉️\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"sms-send\", label: t.smsSend, href: \"/dashboard/sms/send\" },\n        { key: \"sms-history\", label: t.smsHistory, href: \"/dashboard/sms/history\" },\n        { key: \"sms-automation\", label: t.smsAutomation, href: \"/dashboard/sms/automation\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"analytics\",\n      label: t.analytics,\n      icon: \"📊\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"sales-report\", label: t.salesReport, href: \"/dashboard/analytics/sales\" },\n        { key: \"intelligence\", label: t.intelligence, href: \"/dashboard/analytics/intelligence\" },\n        { key: \"ads-roi\", label: t.adsRoi, href: \"/dashboard/analytics/ads-roi\" },\n        { key: \"courier-report\", label: t.courierReport, href: \"/dashboard/analytics/courier\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"accounting\",\n      label: t.accounting,\n      icon: \"🧾\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"daily-report\", label: t.dailyReport, href: \"/dashboard/accounting\" },\n        { key: \"expenses\", label: t.expenses, href: \"/dashboard/accounting/expenses\" },\n        { key: \"profit\", label: t.profit, href: \"/dashboard/accounting/profit\" },\n      ],\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"settings\",\n      label: t.settings,\n      icon: \"⚙️\",\n      children: [\n        { key: \"shop-profile\", label: t.shopProfile, href: \"/dashboard/settings/shop\" },\n        { key: \"courier-accounts\", label: t.courierAccounts, href: \"/dashboard/settings/courier\" },\n        { key: \"subscription\", label: t.subscription, href: \"/dashboard/settings/subscription\" },\n      ],\n    },\n  ];\n}\n\n// ─── Props ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ntype UserShellProps = {\n  /** Active sidebar menu key — e.g. \"all-orders\", \"book-parcel\", \"dashboard\" */\n  activeKey: string;\n  /** Parent key to expand by default — e.g. \"orders\", \"courier\" */\n  defaultExpandedKey?: string;\n  /** Optional page title override (falls back to sidebarTitle) */\n  pageTitle?: { bn: string; en: string };\n  /** Optional page subtitle override */\n  pageSubtitle?: { bn: string; en: string };\n  children: React.ReactNode;\n};\n\n// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nexport default function UserShell({\n  activeKey,\n  defaultExpandedKey,\n  pageTitle,\n  pageSubtitle,\n  children,\n}: UserShellProps) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<ThemeMode>(getStoredTheme);\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<AuthUser | null>(null);\n  const [state, setState] = useState<\"loading\" | \"unauthenticated\" | \"forbidden\" | \"ready\">(\"loading\");\n\n  // theme\n  useEffect(() => {\n    document.documentElement.dataset.theme = theme;\n    localStorage.setItem(THEME_STORAGE_KEY, theme);\n  }, [theme]);\n\n  // locale\n  useEffect(() => {\n    document.documentElement.lang = locale;\n    localStorage.setItem(LOCALE_STORAGE_KEY, locale);\n  }, [locale]);\n\n  // auth check\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const token = getStoredToken();\n    const storedUser = getStoredUser();\n\n    if (!token || !storedUser) {\n      setState(\"unauthenticated\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (normalizeRole(storedUser) !== \"user\") {\n      setState(\"forbidden\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setUser(storedUser);\n    setState(\"ready\");\n  }, []);\n\n  // background profile sync\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const token = getStoredToken();\n    if (!token) return;\n\n    const syncUser = async () => {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\"/api/me\", {\n          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        });\n        if (!res.ok) return;\n        const data = await res.json();\n        if (!data.user) return;\n        const normalized: AuthUser = { ...data.user, role: data.user.role ?? \"user\" };\n        setStoredUser(normalized);\n        setUser(normalized);\n      } catch {\n        // silent\n      }\n    };\n\n    void syncUser();\n  }, []);\n\n  const t = useMemo(() => menuText[locale], [locale]);\n  const menu = useMemo(() => buildMenu(t), [t]);\n\n  const title = pageTitle ? pageTitle[locale] : t.sidebarTitle;\n  const subtitle = pageSubtitle ? pageSubtitle[locale] : \"\";\n\n  // email verification\n  const handleInitiateEmailVerification = async () => {\n    const token = getStoredToken();\n    if (!token || !user) return;\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/email/send-verification\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        const err = await res.json();\n        alert(err.message || \"Failed to send verification email\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.token) {\n        sessionStorage.setItem(\"email_verification_token\", data.token);\n        sessionStorage.setItem(\"email_verification_email\", data.email);\n        router.push(\"/verify-email\");\n      } else if (data.message === \"Your email is already verified.\") {\n        const updatedUser: AuthUser = {\n          ...user,\n          email_verified_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n        };\n        setStoredUser(updatedUser);\n        setUser(updatedUser);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      alert(\"An error occurred while sending the verification email\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ─── Not authenticated / forbidden ────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  if (state !== \"ready\") {\n    return (\n      <main className=\"mx-auto min-h-screen w-full max-w-4xl px-4 py-8\">\n        <section className=\"rounded-3xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-xl font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)] sm:text-2xl\">{t.sidebarTitle}</h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-3 text-sm text-[var(--muted)] sm:text-base\">\n            {state === \"forbidden\" ? t.accessDenied : t.loginRequired}\n          </p>\n          <a\n            href=\"/\"\n            className=\"mt-5 inline-flex rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white\"\n          >\n            {t.goHome}\n          </a>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <CatvShell\n      title={title}\n      subtitle={subtitle}\n      locale={locale}\n      theme={theme}\n      localeLabel={t.languageLabel}\n      themeLabel={t.themeLabel}\n      sidebarTitle={t.sidebarTitle}\n      userName={user?.name}\n      userMeta={user?.email}\n      menu={menu}\n      activeKey={activeKey}\n      defaultExpandedKey={defaultExpandedKey ?? null}\n      onToggleLocale={() => setLocale(locale === \"bn\" ? \"en\" : \"bn\")}\n      onToggleTheme={() => setTheme(theme === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\")}\n    >\n      {!user?.email_verified_at && (\n        <div className=\"p-4 sm:p-5\">\n          <EmailVerificationBanner\n            userEmail={user?.email || \"\"}\n            onInitiateVerification={handleInitiateEmailVerification}\n            locale={locale}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n      {children}\n    </CatvShell>\n  );\n}\n"}},"id":"6114ac68-62a8-4078-8309-66f09d14a6e9","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:46:08.521Z","parentId":"8834f361-f593-42bc-9924-dd171ad53cd1"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"96e75ef3-993b-4ce1-a58a-4a7e019934db","content":"Now create a reusable `ModulePlaceholder` component for coming-soon pages: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01SKon6HyeZGtUzTgVJ3qgeC","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\ntype ModulePlaceholderProps = {\\n  icon: string;\\n  titleBn: string;\\n  titleEn: string;\\n  descBn: string;\\n  descEn: string;\\n  phase: \\\"Phase 1\\\" | \\\"Phase 2\\\" | \\\"Phase 3\\\";\\n  locale: \\\"bn\\\" | \\\"en\\\";\\n};\\n\\nconst phaseColors: Record<string, string> = {\\n  \\\"Phase 1\\\": \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30\\\",\\n  \\\"Phase 2\\\": \\\"bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30\\\",\\n  \\\"Phase 3\\\": \\\"bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-400 border-purple-500/30\\\",\\n};\\n\\nexport default function ModulePlaceholder({\\n  icon,\\n  titleBn,\\n  titleEn,\\n  descBn,\\n  descEn,\\n  phase,\\n  locale,\\n}: ModulePlaceholderProps) {\\n  const title = locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? titleBn : titleEn;\\n  const desc = locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? descBn : descEn;\\n  const comingSoon = locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"শীঘ্রই আসছে\\\" : \\\"Coming Soon\\\";\\n  const buildingText =\\n    locale === \\\"bn\\\"\\n      ? \\\"এই মডিউলটি তৈরি হচ্ছে। শীঘ্রই ব্যবহারযোগ্য হবে।\\\"\\n      : \\\"This module is under development and will be available soon.\\\";\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"flex min-h-[60vh] flex-col items-center justify-center px-4 py-16 text-center\\\">\\n      <div className=\\\"text-6xl\\\">{icon}</div>\\n      <h2 className=\\\"mt-5 text-2xl font-bold text-[var(--foreground)] sm:text-3xl\\\">{title}</h2>\\n      <p className=\\\"mt-3 max-w-md text-sm text-[var(--muted)] sm:text-base\\\">{desc}</p>\\n\\n      <div className={`mt-6 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold ${phaseColors[phase]}`}>\\n        <span className=\\\"size-1.5 rounded-full bg-current\\\" />\\n        {phase} — {comingSoon}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      <p className=\\\"mt-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{buildingText}</p>\\n    </div>\\n  );\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/components/module-placeholder.tsx\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"519787c5-cd28-4c80-a48a-f628be104b5b","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:46:24.766Z","parentId":"add9dffe-242d-4190-ad39-744cce63ea45"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01SKon6HyeZGtUzTgVJ3qgeC","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"\"use client\";\n\ntype ModulePlaceholderProps = {\n  icon: string;\n  titleBn: string;\n  titleEn: string;\n  descBn: string;\n  descEn: string;\n  phase: \"Phase 1\" | \"Phase 2\" | \"Phase 3\";\n  locale: \"bn\" | \"en\";\n};\n\nconst phaseColors: Record<string, string> = {\n  \"Phase 1\": \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30\",\n  \"Phase 2\": \"bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30\",\n  \"Phase 3\": \"bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-400 border-purple-500/30\",\n};\n\nexport default function ModulePlaceholder({\n  icon,\n  titleBn,\n  titleEn,\n  descBn,\n  descEn,\n  phase,\n  locale,\n}: ModulePlaceholderProps) {\n  const title = locale === \"bn\" ? titleBn : titleEn;\n  const desc = locale === \"bn\" ? descBn : descEn;\n  const comingSoon = locale === \"bn\" ? \"শীঘ্রই আসছে\" : \"Coming Soon\";\n  const buildingText =\n    locale === \"bn\"\n      ? \"এই মডিউলটি তৈরি হচ্ছে। শীঘ্রই ব্যবহারযোগ্য হবে।\"\n      : \"This module is under development and will be available soon.\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex min-h-[60vh] flex-col items-center justify-center px-4 py-16 text-center\">\n      <div className=\"text-6xl\">{icon}</div>\n      <h2 className=\"mt-5 text-2xl font-bold text-[var(--foreground)] sm:text-3xl\">{title}</h2>\n      <p className=\"mt-3 max-w-md text-sm text-[var(--muted)] sm:text-base\">{desc}</p>\n\n      <div className={`mt-6 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold ${phaseColors[phase]}`}>\n        <span className=\"size-1.5 rounded-full bg-current\" />\n        {phase} — {comingSoon}\n      </div>\n\n      <p className=\"mt-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{buildingText}</p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/components/module-placeholder.tsx"}},"id":"2d224b58-3390-42a0-81b2-883d1e5a6840","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:46:26.052Z","parentId":"d78079c1-542d-4075-8891-96ff3eb51867"}

\\\"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\\\", icon: \\\"🔍\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"পার্সেল বুক করুন\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/courier\\\", icon: \\\"🚚\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"SMS পাঠান\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/sales\\\", icon: \\\"📊\\\" },\\n    ],\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Business Dashboard\\\",\\n    pageSubtitle: \\\"Your complete business overview in one place.\\\",\\n    welcome: \\\"Welcome\\\",\\n    todayAt: \\\"Today's Summary\\\",\\n    cards: [\\n      { label: \\\"Total Orders\\\", value: \\\"—\\\", hint: \\\"all time\\\", color: \\\"Sales Report\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/analytics/sales\\\", icon: \\\"📊\\\" },\\n    ],\\n  },\\n};\\n\\nexport default function UserDashboardPage() {\\n  const [locale, setLocale] = pageSubtitle: \"Your complete business overview in one place.\",\n    welcome: \"Welcome\",\n    todayAt: \"Today's Summary\",\n    cards: [\n      { label: \"Total Orders\", value: \"—\", hint: \"all time\", color: \"bg-[#0f7c7b]\" },\n      { label: \"Delivered\", value: \"—\", hint: \"completed this month\", color: \"bg-[#2f7ec1]\" },\n      { label: \"Pending\", value: \"—\", hint: \"in progress\", color: \"bg-[#ff7a59]\" },\n      { label: \"High Risk\", value: \"—\", hint: \"suspicious orders\", color: \"bg-[#c0392b]\" },\n      { label: \"Customers\", value: \"—\", hint: \"total \"/dashboard/customers\", icon: \"👥\" },\n      { label: \"Sales Report\", href: \"/dashboard/analytics/sales\", icon: \"📊\" },\n    ],\n  },\n};\n\nexport default function UserDashboardPage() {\n  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const [userName, setUserName] = useState<string>(\"\");\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const stored = getStoredUser();\n    if (stored?.name) setUserName(stored.name);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Keep locale in sync (UserShell also manages it but we need it for content)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleStorage = () => setLocale(getStoredLocale());\n    window.addEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorage);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorage);\n  }, []);\n\n  const t = useMemo(() => text[locale], [locale]);\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell\n      activeKey=\"dashboard\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: text.bn.pageTitle, en: text.en.pageTitle }}\n      pageSubtitle={{ bn: text.bn.pageSubtitle, en: text.en.pageSubtitle }}\n    >\n      {/* Welcome */}\n      <section className=\"catv-panel p-4 sm:p-5\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold sm:text-xl\">\n          {t.welcome}{userName ? `, ${userName}` : \"\"} 👋\n        </h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{t.pageSubtitle}</p>\n      </section>\n\n      {/* Stat Cards */}\n      <section className=\"mt-4\">\n        <h3 className=\"mb-3 px-1 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--muted)]\">{t.todayAt}</h3>\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3\">\n          {t.cards.map((card) => (\n            <article\n              key={card.label}\n              className={`${card.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white shadow-md`}\n            >\n              <p className=\"text-xs font-semibold text-white/90\">{card.label}</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-2 text-2xl font-bold\">{card.value}</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-white/80\">{card.hint}</p>\n            </article>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      {/* Quick Shortcuts */}\n      <section className=\"catv-panel mt-4 p-4 sm:p-5\">\n {"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"28371733-d214-4c9b-9622-c4e213ac5cd6","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_014JdeCGJSPh4aSuXjRhSVnz","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"# F-Commerce SaaS — Module Context\\n\\nLast updated: 2026-05-02\\nStatus: Navigation shell complete, modules pending implementation.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. Product Vision\\n\\nএকটি **All-in-One বিজনেস টুল** যা বাংলাদেশের ফেসবুক/সোশাল মিডিয়া বিক্রেতাদের জন্য তৈরি।\\n\\n**Target audience:** ফেসবুক, TikTok, Instagram-এ পণ্য বিক্রি করা বাংলাদেশি ব্যবসায়ী।\\n\\n**Core problem solved:**\\n- ম্যানুয়াল অর্ডার ম্যানেজমেন্ট থেকে ডিজিটাল automation\\n- 30–50% ফেক/অনুপস্থিত অর্ডার সমস্যা\\n- কুরিয়ার বুকিং-এর অগোছালো workflow\\n- কাস্টমার হিস্টোরি না থাকা\\n- হিসাব না থাকা\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. Architecture Decision\\n\\n| Layer | Technology |\\n|---|---|\\n| Backend | Laravel 13 (existing) |\\n| Frontend | Next.js 16 (existing) |\\n| Database | PostgreSQL (existing) |\\n| Auth | Sanctum token-based (existing) |\\n| Queue/Events | Laravel Events + Queue for SMS automation |\\n| Courier APIs | Pathao, Steadfast, RedX (Phase 2) |\\n| Payment | SSLCommerz / bKash (Phase 3) |\\n| Facebook | Meta Graph API, CAPI (Phase 3) |\\n\\n**Reference projects:**\\n- `zyro/` → Fraud logic, Courier stats, Order validation, CAPI — concept adapted (NOT copy-paste)\\n- `catv/` → Shell/layout pattern (already adopted via `catv-shell.tsx`)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Frontend Shell Architecture\\n\\n### Shared components created\\n\\n| File | Purpose |\\n|---|---|\\n| `src/components/user-shell.tsx` | **Master shell** for all user dashboard pages. Handles: auth check, theme, locale, full menu, email verification banner. |\\n| `src/components/module-placeholder.tsx` | \\\"Coming Soon\\\" placeholder for unimplemented pages. Shows phase badge. |\\n| `src/components/catv-shell.tsx` | Low-level layout shell (sidebar, topbar, responsive collapse). Do NOT modify menu logic here — use `user-shell.tsx` instead. |\\n\\n### How to create a new dashboard page\\n\\n```tsx\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\nimport { useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nexport default function Page() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell\\n      activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\"        // matches key in user-shell.tsx menu\\n      defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"   // parent menu key to expand\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \\\"সকল অর্ডার\\\", en: \\\"All Orders\\\" }}\\n    >\\n      {/* page content */}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Menu key reference\\n\\n| activeKey | defaultExpandedKey | Route |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `dashboard` | — | `/dashboard` |\\n| `all-orders` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders` |\\n| `create-order` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/create` |\\n| `fraud-check` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check` |\\n| `blacklist` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/blacklist` |\\n| `product-list` | `products` | `/dashboard/products` |\\n| `categories` | `products` | `/dashboard/products/categories` |\\n| `stock` | `products` | `/dashboard/products/stock` |\\n| `customer-list` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers` |\\n| `vip-customers` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers/vip` |\\n| `risky-customers` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers/risky` |\\n| `book-parcel` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier` |\\n| `track-orders` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier/track` |\\n| `courier-perf` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier/performance` |\\n| `sms-send` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/send` |\\n| `sms-history` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/history` |\\n| `sms-automation` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/automation` |\\n| `sales-report` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/sales` |\\n| `intelligence` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/intelligence` |\\n| `ads-roi` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/ads-roi` |\\n| `courier-report` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/courier` |\\n| `daily-report` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting` |\\n| `expenses` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting/expenses` |\\n| `profit` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting/profit` |\\n| `shop-profile` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/shop` |\\n| `courier-accounts` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/courier` |\\n| `subscription` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/subscription` |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. Module Implementation Plan\\n\\n### Phase 1 — Core Business Engine (implement first)\\n\\n#### 4.1 Order Management\\n**Status:** Shell ready at `/dashboard/orders`\\n\\n**DB Tables needed:**\\n- `orders` — main order table\\n- `order_items` — line items\\n- `order_status_logs` — audit trail\\n\\n**Key fields (orders):**\\n```\\nid, user_id, order_number, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_address,\\ncustomer_district, customer_thana, source (manual/facebook_inbox/landing_page),\\nstatus (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled/returned),\\npayment_method (cod/online/bkash), payment_status (due/partial/paid),\\nsubtotal, shipping_charge, discount, total, notes,\\nfraud_score (0-100), risk_level (low/medium/high),\\ncourier_id, courier_tracking_id, courier_status,\\nassigned_to, created_at, updated_at\\n```\\n\\n**Laravel API routes to create:**\\n```\\nGET    /api/orders\\nPOST   /api/orders\\nGET    /api/orders/{id}\\nPUT    /api/orders/{id}\\nPUT    /api/orders/{id}/status\\nDELETE /api/orders/{id}\\nGET    /api/orders/export\\nPOST   /api/orders/bulk-status\\nGET    /api/orders/stats\\n```\\n\\n**Controller:** `app/Http/Controllers/Api/OrderController.php`\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### 4.2 Fake Order / Fraud Detection\\n**Status:** Shell ready at `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check`\\n\\n**Fraud score algorithm (adapted from zyro FraudScoreService):**\\n```\\n+30  Phone has 3+ orders with >40% return rate\\n+20  Courier return history > 40% (from courier API)\\n+15  Repeated cancelled orders\\n+10  Customer name inconsistency across orders\\n+5   Phone format irregular\\n-20  Previous successful delivery (trust signal)\\n\\nRisk levels:\\n  0–30  → low (green)\\n  31–60 → medium (yellow)\\n  61+   → high (red)\\n```\\n\\n**DB Tables:**\\n- `customer_fraud_profiles` — computed fraud data per phone\\n- `customer_blacklist` — manually blocked phones\\n\\n**API routes:**\\n```\\nPOST /api/fraud/check-phone\\nPOST /api/fraud/bulk-check\\nGET  /api/fraud/blacklist\\nPOST /api/fraud/blacklist\\nDELETE /api/fraud/blacklist/{id}\\n```\\n\\n**Controller:** `app/Http/Controllers/Api/FraudController.php`\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### 4.3 Product Management\\n**Status:** Shell ready at `/dashboard/products`\\n\\n**DB Table (products):**\\n```\\nid, user_id, name, sku, category_id, selling_price, cost_price,\\nstock, track_stock (bool), images (jsonb), variants (jsonb), status\\n```\\n\\n**API routes:**\\n```\\nGET    /api/products\\nPOST   /api/products\\nGET    /api/products/{id}\\nPUT    /api/products/{id}\\nDELETE /api/products/{id}\\nGET    /api/categories\\nPOST   /api/categories\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### 4.4 Customer CRM\\n**Status:** Shell ready at `/dashboard/customers`\\n\\n**DB Tables:**\\n- `customers` — auto-populated from orders (upsert on phone)\\n- `customer_contact_logs` — call notes, follow-up\\n\\n**Auto-tagging logic:**\\n```\\n3+ successful deliveries → \\\"loyal\\\"\\nTotal spend top 20% → \\\"vip\\\"\\nfraud_score > 50 → \\\"risky\\\"\\nmanually blocked → \\\"blocked\\\"\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Phase 2 — Automation & Courier (implement second)\\n\\n#### 4.5 Courier Integration\\n**Couriers to support:** Pathao, Steadfast, RedX\\n\\n**DB Tables:**\\n- `courier_accounts` — per-user API credentials\\n- `courier_bookings` — booking records + tracking sync\\n\\n**Courier API wrappers (Laravel Services):**\\n```\\napp/Services/Courier/PathaoCourierService.php\\napp/Services/Courier/SteadfastCourierService.php\\napp/Services/Courier/RedxCourierService.php\\napp/Services/Courier/CourierFactory.php   ← dispatch to right service\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### 4.6 SMS Automation\\n**Extends existing:** `/api/sms/send` gateway already works.\\n\\n**New DB Tables:**\\n- `sms_automation_rules` — trigger_event, template_id, delay_minutes\\n- `sms_automation_logs` — audit trail\\n\\n**Trigger events:**\\n```\\norder_confirmed, order_shipped, order_delivered,\\norder_cancelled, payment_due, failed_delivery_retry\\n```\\n\\n**Laravel Event flow:**\\n```\\nOrder status change → OrderStatusChanged event →\\n  SmsAutomationListener → match rules →\\n  dispatch(SendAutomationSmsJob::class)->delay($minutes)\\n```\\n\\n**Template variables:**\\n```\\n{customer_name}, {order_number}, {total}, {courier},\\n{tracking_id}, {shop_name}, {delivery_date}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### 4.7 Accounting\\n**Auto-populated from orders:**\\n- Order created (COD) → income entry (pending)\\n- Order delivered → income confirmed\\n- Courier charge → expense entry\\n\\n**Manual entries:** ad spend, product cost, other expenses\\n\\n**DB Table (transactions):**\\n```\\nid, user_id, type (income/expense), category,\\nreference_type, reference_id, amount, note, transaction_date\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Phase 3 — Intelligence & Growth (implement third)\\n\\n#### 4.8 Customer Intelligence Dashboard\\n- Computed from existing orders + fraud data\\n- District-wise heatmap (order count by district)\\n- VIP/loyal/risky customer auto-classification\\n\\n#### 4.9 Facebook Ads ROI Tracker\\n- UTM parameter capture on order create\\n- Facebook CAPI Purchase event (zyro CAPI pattern adapted)\\n- Campaign → Order → Revenue mapping\\n\\n**Reference:** `zyro/controllers/FacebookCapiController.php`\\n\\n#### 4.10 Facebook Comment / Inbox Bot\\n- Meta Graph API webhooks\\n- Keyword detection → auto-reply or inbox message\\n- Lead capture → customers table\\n\\n#### 4.11 Subscription & Payment\\n- SSLCommerz / bKash integration\\n- Plan-based feature gating\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. Data Scoping Rules (mandatory per CONTEXT.md §25)\\n\\nAll new controllers must answer: **\\\"Shared across admins or per-user isolated?\\\"**\\n\\n| Resource | Scoping Rule |\\n|---|---|\\n| Orders | Per-user (`where('user_id', auth()->id())`) — each seller owns their orders |\\n| Products | Per-user |\\n| Customers | Per-user |\\n| Courier accounts | Per-user |\\n| Fraud profiles | Per-user (each seller builds their own history) |\\n| Blacklist | Per-user |\\n| SMS automation rules | Per-user |\\n| Transactions | Per-user |\\n\\n**Note:** Admin-shared resources (notification templates, email configs, SMS gateways) already use `adminScopeUserIds()` per CONTEXT.md §25. New seller-facing resources are per-user by design.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. Backend Controller Checklist (for each new module)\\n\\nWhen creating a new controller:\\n\\n1. Place in `app/Http/Controllers/Api/`\\n2. Register route under `auth:sanctum` middleware (NOT `is_admin` — these are user routes)\\n3. All queries scoped with `->where('user_id', auth()->id())`\\n4. Standard response format: `{ success: true, data: [...], meta: { total, page } }`\\n5. Validation in `app/Http/Requests/` (Form Requests)\\n6. Run `php artisan route:list` to verify middleware\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. Frontend Implementation Checklist (for each module)\\n\\nWhen implementing a module page:\\n\\n1. Replace `ModulePlaceholder` with real UI\\n2. Use `UserShell` wrapper (keep `activeKey` + `defaultExpandedKey`)\\n3. Follow design system: `var(--background)`, `var(--surface)`, `var(--accent)`, `var(--border)`, `var(--muted)`\\n4. Mobile-first — test at 375px, 768px, 1280px\\n5. Bilingual — all text must have `bn` and `en` versions\\n6. Dark/light theme compatible\\n7. Run `npm run build` after changes\\n8. Restart: `supervisorctl restart hybrid-stack-frontend`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 8. Order Status Flow\\n\\n```\\n[manual/facebook/landing_page]\\n         ↓\\n      pending\\n         ↓\\n    confirmed   ← SMS automation trigger: order_confirmed\\n         ↓\\n    processing\\n         ↓\\n      shipped   ← Courier booked, tracking ID saved → SMS: order_shipped\\n         ↓\\n    delivered   ← Courier confirms → SMS: order_delivered → income confirmed\\n         ↓ (alternate)\\n    cancelled   ← SMS: order_cancelled\\n    returned    ← Return rate counter updated on fraud_profile\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 9. Fraud Score Integration with Order Create\\n\\nWhen a new order is created:\\n1. Auto-call fraud check on `customer_phone`\\n2. Look up `customer_fraud_profiles` for existing history\\n3. If courier accounts configured → call courier API for delivery history\\n4. Compute score → save `fraud_score` + `risk_level` on order\\n5. If `risk_level = high` → show warning on order detail, do NOT auto-confirm\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 10. SMS Existing vs. New Routes\\n\\n| Route | Status | Notes |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `GET /api/sms/gateways` | ✅ Existing | Lists assigned gateways |\\n| `POST /api/sms/send` | ✅ Existing | Manual SMS send |\\n| `GET /api/sms/history` | ✅ Existing | SMS send history |\\n| `GET /api/sms/automation/rules` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | List rules |\\n| `POST /api/sms/automation/rules` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Create rule |\\n| `PUT /api/sms/automation/rules/{id}` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Update/toggle rule |\\n| `DELETE /api/sms/automation/rules/{id}` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Delete rule |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 11. File Structure Reference\\n\\n```\\nfrontend/src/\\n  app/dashboard/\\n    page.tsx                    ← Home (stat cards + shortcuts)\\n    orders/\\n      page.tsx                  ← All Orders list\\n      create/page.tsx           ← Create Order form\\n      fraud-check/page.tsx      ← Phone fraud checker\\n      blacklist/page.tsx        ← Blacklisted phones\\n      [id]/page.tsx             ← Order detail + timeline\\n    products/\\n      page.tsx                  ← Product list\\n      categories/page.tsx       ← Category management\\n      stock/page.tsx            ← Stock levels\\n    customers/\\n      page.tsx                  ← Customer list\\n      vip/page.tsx              ← VIP customers\\n      risky/page.tsx            ← Risky/blocked\\n      [id]/page.tsx             ← Customer profile\\n    courier/\\n      page.tsx                  ← Book parcel\\n      track/page.tsx            ← Track orders\\n      performance/page.tsx      ← Courier performance\\n    sms/\\n      send/page.tsx             ← ✅ Existing (manual SMS)\\n      history/page.tsx          ← ✅ Existing (SMS history)\\n      automation/page.tsx       ← SMS automation rules\\n    analytics/\\n      sales/page.tsx            ← Sales report\\n      intelligence/page.tsx     ← Customer intelligence\\n      ads-roi/page.tsx          ← Ads ROI tracker\\n      courier/page.tsx          ← Courier analytics\\n    accounting/\\n      page.tsx                  ← Daily report\\n      expenses/page.tsx         ← Expense tracker\\n      profit/page.tsx           ← Profit dashboard\\n    settings/\\n      shop/page.tsx             ← Shop profile\\n      courier/page.tsx          ← Courier API accounts\\n      subscription/page.tsx     ← Subscription plan\\n\\n  components/\\n    user-shell.tsx              ← Master shell for all user pages\\n    module-placeholder.tsx      ← \\\"Coming Soon\\\" placeholder\\n    catv-shell.tsx              ← Low-level layout (do not add menu logic here)\\n    email-verification-banner.tsx\\n\\nbackend/app/\\n  Http/Controllers/Api/\\n    OrderController.php         ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    OrderItemController.php     ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    ProductController.php       ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    CategoryController.php      ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    CustomerController.php      ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    FraudController.php         ← (to create — Phase 1)\\n    CourierController.php       ← (to create — Phase 2)\\n    SmsAutomationController.php ← (to create — Phase 2)\\n    TransactionController.php   ← (to create — Phase 2)\\n    [existing controllers...]\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 12. Next Step Decision\\n\\nবর্তমান সিদ্ধান্ত: Phase 1 দিয়ে শুরু করব।\\n\\n**প্রস্তাবিত প্রথম module implementation order:**\\n\\n1. **Product Management** (backend + frontend) — orders-এর আগে products দরকার\\n2. **Order Management** (backend + frontend) — core business flow\\n3. **Fraud Check** (backend + frontend) — order create-এ embedded\\n4. **Customer CRM** (backend + frontend) — orders থেকে auto-populate\\n\\nএই 4টি Phase 1 module complete হলে একটি functional MVP পাওয়া যাবে।\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"e491a4d9-21a0-4ace-8cd4-75d144dcd07d","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:54:05.936Z","parentId":"ffb4d8f2-5196-4c75-92a2-6d4c58dea8c7"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_014JdeCGJSPh4aSuXjRhSVnz","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"# F-Commerce SaaS — Module Context\n\nLast updated: 2026-05-02\nStatus: Navigation shell complete, modules pending implementation.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Product Vision\n\nএকটি **All-in-One বিজনেস টুল** যা বাংলাদেশের ফেসবুক/সোশাল মিডিয়া বিক্রেতাদের জন্য তৈরি।\n\n**Target audience:** ফেসবুক, TikTok, Instagram-এ পণ্য বিক্রি করা বাংলাদেশি ব্যবসায়ী।\n\n**Core problem solved:**\n- ম্যানুয়াল অর্ডার ম্যানেজমেন্ট থেকে ডিজিটাল automation\n- 30–50% ফেক/অনুপস্থিত অর্ডার সমস্যা\n- কুরিয়ার বুকিং-এর অগোছালো workflow\n- কাস্টমার হিস্টোরি না থাকা\n- হিসাব না থাকা\n\n---\n\n## 2. Architecture Decision\n\n| Layer | Technology |\n|---|---|\n| Backend | Laravel 13 (existing) |\n| Frontend | Next.js 16 (existing) |\n| Database | PostgreSQL (existing) |\n| Auth | Sanctum token-based (existing) |\n| Queue/Events | Laravel Events + Queue for SMS automation |\n| Courier APIs | Pathao, Steadfast, RedX (Phase 2) |\n| Payment | SSLCommerz / bKash (Phase 3) |\n| Facebook | Meta Graph API, CAPI (Phase 3) |\n\n**Reference projects:**\n- `zyro/` → Fraud logic, Courier stats, Order validation, CAPI — concept adapted (NOT copy-paste)\n- `catv/` → Shell/layout pattern (already adopted via `catv-shell.tsx`)\n\n---\n\n## 3. Frontend Shell Architecture\n\n### Shared components created\n\n| File | Purpose |\n|---|---|\n| `src/components/user-shell.tsx` | **Master shell** for all user dashboard pages. Handles: auth check, theme, locale, full menu, email verification banner. |\n| `src/components/module-placeholder.tsx` | \"Coming Soon\" placeholder for unimplemented pages. Shows phase badge. |\n| `src/components/catv-shell.tsx` | Low-level layout shell (sidebar, topbar, responsive collapse). Do NOT modify menu logic here — use `user-shell.tsx` instead. |\n\n### How to create a new dashboard page\n\n```tsx\n\"use client\";\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nexport default function Page() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell\n      activeKey=\"all-orders\"        // matches key in user-shell.tsx menu\n      defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"   // parent menu key to expand\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \"সকল অর্ডার\", en: \"All Orders\" }}\n    >\n      {/* page content */}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\n```\n\n### Menu key reference\n\n| activeKey | defaultExpandedKey | Route |\n|---|---|---|\n| `dashboard` | — | `/dashboard` |\n| `all-orders` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders` |\n| `create-order` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/create` |\n| `fraud-check` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check` |\n| `blacklist` | `orders` | `/dashboard/orders/blacklist` |\n| `product-list` | `products` | `/dashboard/products` |\n| `categories` | `products` | `/dashboard/products/categories` |\n| `stock` | `products` | `/dashboard/products/stock` |\n| `customer-list` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers` |\n| `vip-customers` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers/vip` |\n| `risky-customers` | `customers` | `/dashboard/customers/risky` |\n| `book-parcel` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier` |\n| `track-orders` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier/track` |\n| `courier-perf` | `courier` | `/dashboard/courier/performance` |\n| `sms-send` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/send` |\n| `sms-history` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/history` |\n| `sms-automation` | `sms` | `/dashboard/sms/automation` |\n| `sales-report` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/sales` |\n| `intelligence` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/intelligence` |\n| `ads-roi` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/ads-roi` |\n| `courier-report` | `analytics` | `/dashboard/analytics/courier` |\n| `daily-report` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting` |\n| `expenses` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting/expenses` |\n| `profit` | `accounting` | `/dashboard/accounting/profit` |\n| `shop-profile` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/shop` |\n| `courier-accounts` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/courier` |\n| `subscription` | `settings` | `/dashboard/settings/subscription` |\n\n---\n\n## 4.   ← dispatch to right service\n```\n\n---\n\n#### 4.6 SMS Automation\n**Extends existing:** `/api/sms/send` gateway already works.\n\n**New DB Tables:**\n- `sms_automation_rules` — trigger_event,
