pattern adapted)\n- Campaign → Order → Revenue mapping\n\n**Reference:** `zyro/controllers/FacebookCapiController.php`\n\n#### 4.10 Facebook Comment / Inbox Bot\n- Meta Graph API webhooks\n- Keyword detection → auto-reply or inbox message\n- Lead capture → customers table\n\n#### 4.11 Subscription & Payment\n- SSLCommerz / bKash integration\n- Plan-based feature gating\n\n---\n\n## 5. Data Scoping Rules (mandatory per CONTEXT.md §25)\n\nAll new controllers must answer: **\"Shared across admins or per-user isolated?\"**\n\n| Resource | Scoping Rule |\n|---|---|\n| Orders | Per-user (`where('user_id', auth()->id())`) — each seller owns their orders |\n| Products | Per-user |\n| Customers | Per-user |\n| Courier accounts | Per-user |\n| Fraud profiles | Per-user (each seller builds their own history) |\n| Blacklist | Per-user |\n| SMS automation rules | Per-user |\n| Transactions | Per-user |\n\n**Note:** Admin-shared resources (notification templates, email configs, SMS gateways) already use `adminScopeUserIds()` per CONTEXT.md §25. New seller-facing resources are per-user by design.\n\n---\n\n## 6. Backend Controller Checklist (for each new module)\n\nWhen creating a new controller:\n\n1. Place in `app/Http/Controllers/Api/`\n2. Register route under `auth:sanctum` middleware (NOT `is_admin` — these are user routes)\n3. All queries scoped with `->where('user_id', auth()->id())`\n4. Standard response format: `{ success: true, data: [...], meta: { total, page } }`\n5. Validation in `app/Http/Requests/` (Form Requests)\n6. Run `php artisan route:list` to verify middleware\n\n---\n\n## 7. Frontend Implementation Checklist (for each module)\n\nWhen implementing a module page:\n\n1. Replace `ModulePlaceholder` with real UI\n2. Use `UserShell` wrapper (keep `activeKey` + `defaultExpandedKey`)\n3. Follow design system: `var(--background)`, `var(--surface)`, `var(--accent)`, `var(--border)`, `var(--muted)`\n4. Mobile-first — test at 375px, 768px, 1280px\n5. Bilingual — all text must have `bn` and `en` versions\n6. Dark/light theme compatible\n7. Run `npm run build` after changes\n8. Restart: `supervisorctl restart hybrid-stack-frontend`\n\n---\n\n## 8. Order Status Flow\n\n```\n[manual/facebook/landing_page]\n         ↓\n      pending\n         ↓\n    confirmed   ← SMS automation trigger: order_confirmed\n         ↓\n    processing\n         ↓\n      shipped   ← Courier booked, tracking ID saved → SMS: order_shipped\n         ↓\n    delivered   ← Courier confirms → SMS: order_delivered → income confirmed\n         ↓ (alternate)\n    cancelled   ← SMS: order_cancelled\n    returned    ← Return rate counter updated on fraud_profile\n```\n\n---\n\n## 9. Fraud Score Integration with Order Create\n\nWhen a new order is created:\n1. Auto-call fraud check on `customer_phone`\n2. Look up `customer_fraud_profiles` for existing history\n3. If courier accounts configured → call courier API for delivery history\n4. Compute score → save `fraud_score` + `risk_level` on order\n5. If `risk_level = high` → show warning on order detail, do NOT auto-confirm\n\n---\n\n## 10. SMS Existing vs. New Routes\n\n| Route | Status | Notes |\n|---|---|---|\n| `GET /api/sms/gateways` | ✅ Existing | Lists assigned gateways |\n| `POST /api/sms/send` | ✅ Existing | Manual SMS send |\n| `GET /api/sms/history` | ✅ Existing | SMS send history |\n| `GET /api/sms/automation/rules` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | List rules |\n| `POST /api/sms/automation/rules` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Create rule |\n| `PUT /api/sms/automation/rules/{id}` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Update/toggle rule |\n| `DELETE /api/sms/automation/rules/{id}` | 🔲 New (Phase 2) | Delete rule |\n\n---\n\n## 11. File Structure Reference\n\n```\nfrontend/src/\n  app/dashboard/\n    page.tsx                    ← Home (stat cards + shortcuts)\n    orders/\n      page.tsx                  ← All Orders list\n      create/page.tsx           ← Create Order form\n      fraud-check/page.tsx      ← Phone fraud checker\n      blacklist/page.tsx        ← Blacklisted phones\n      [id]/page.tsx             ← Order detail + timeline\n    products/\n      page.tsx                  ← Product list\n      categories/page.tsx       ← Category management\n      stock/page.tsx            ← Stock levels\n    customers/\n      page.tsx                  ← Customer list\n      vip/page.tsx              ← VIP customers\n      risky/page.tsx            ← Risky/blocked\n      [id]/page.tsx             ← Customer profile\n    courier/\n      page.tsx                  ← Book parcel\n      track/page.tsx            ← Track orders\n      performance/page.tsx      ← Courier performance\n    sms/\n      send/page.tsx             ← ✅ Existing (manual SMS)\n      history/page.tsx          ← ✅ Existing (SMS history)\n      automation/page.tsx       ← SMS automation rules\n    analytics/\n      sales/page.tsx            ← Sales report\n      intelligence/page.tsx     ← Customer intelligence\n      ads-roi/page.tsx          ← Ads ROI tracker\n      courier/page.tsx          ← Courier analytics\n    accounting/\n      page.tsx                  ← Daily report\n      expenses/page.tsx         ← Expense tracker\n      profit/page.tsx           ← Profit dashboard\n    settings/\n      shop/page.tsx             ← Shop profile\n      courier/page.tsx          ← Courier API accounts\n      subscription/page.tsx     ← Subscription plan\n\n  components/\n    user-shell.tsx              ← Master shell for all user pages\n    module-placeholder.tsx      ← \"Coming Soon\" placeholder\n    catv-shell.tsx              ← Low-level layout (do not add menu logic here)\n    email-verification-banner.tsx\n\nbackend/app/\n  Http/Controllers/Api/\n    OrderController.php         ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    OrderItemController.php     ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    ProductController.php       ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    CategoryController.php      ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    CustomerController.php      ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    FraudController.php         ← (to create — Phase 1)\n    CourierController.php       ← (to create — Phase 2)\n    SmsAutomationController.php ← (to create — Phase 2)\n    TransactionController.php   ← (to create — Phase 2)\n    [existing controllers...]\n```\n\n---\n\n## 12. Next Step Decision\n\nবর্তমান সিদ্ধান্ত: Phase 1 দিয়ে শুরু করব।\n\n**প্রস্তাবিত প্রথম module implementation order:**\n\n1. **Product Management** (backend + frontend) — orders-এর আগে products দরকার\n2. **Order Management** (backend + frontend) — core business flow\n3. **Fraud Check** (backend + frontend) — order create-এ embedded\n4. **Customer CRM** (backend + frontend) — orders থেকে auto-populate\n\nএই 4টি Phase 1 module complete হলে একটি functional MVP পাওয়া যাবে।\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md"}},"id":"b29ff71b-abaa-4fe3-9f3b-f52a35a88319","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:54:06.018Z","parentId":"4fd705dd-df10-4011-b7a3-16223e6c936a"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"afcb15b0-b230-4f8b-a59a-a694f3410487","content":"সব কাজ সম্পন্ন। এখানে একটি সারসংক্ষেপ:\n\n---\n\n## যা তৈরি করা হলো\n\n### নতুন Component (2টি)\n- [src/components/user-shell.tsx](frontend/src/components/user-shell.tsx) — **Master shell** সব user dashboard page-এর জন্য। Auth check, theme, locale, সম্পূর্ণ navigation menu — সব একজায়গায়। নতুন page বানাতে শুধু এটা import করলেই হবে।\n- [src/components/module-placeholder.tsx](frontend/src/components/module-placeholder.tsx) — \"আসছে শীঘ্রই\" placeholder, phase badge সহ।\n\n### Navigation Structure (26টি page shell)\n\n| সেকশন | Pages |\n|---|---|\n| 🏠 Dashboard | Home (stat cards + shortcuts) |\n| 📦 Orders | All Orders, Create, Fraud Check, Blacklist, Detail |\n| 🛍️ Products | List, Categories, Stock |\n| 👥 Customers | List, VIP, Risky, Profile |\n| 🚚 Courier | Book Parcel, Track, Performance |\n| ✉️ SMS | Send (existing), History (existing), Automation (new) |\n| 📊 Analytics | Sales Report, Intelligence, Ads ROI, Courier |\n| 🧾 Accounting | Daily Report, Expenses, Profit |\n| ⚙️ Settings | Shop Profile, Courier Accounts, Subscription |\n\n### Context File\n[SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md](SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md) — সব architectural decision, DB schema, API routes, fraud score algorithm, data scoping rules, এবং implementation checklist।\n\n---\n\n**পরবর্তী পদক্ষেপ:** Phase 1 শুরু করব — আপনি বলুন Product Management নাকি Order Management দিয়ে শুরু করবেন?","toolRequests":[]},"id":"af5def20-126f-4401-a0de-4ddb4633b060","timestamp":"2026-05-02T17:55:25.615Z","parentId":"e32e26b6-07be-4c9b-8623-7a2df348c9e2"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"9ef69560-a920-4a67-a541-375197e5798c","content":"Now create the controllers:  ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01PVZFhTGqHVGD533ERit7vG","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\ProductCategory;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Str;\\n\\nclass ProductCategoryController extends Controller\\n{\\n    public function index(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $categories = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->orderBy('sort_order')\\n            ->orderBy('name')\\n            ->withCount('products')\\n            ->get();\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $categories]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'name'        => 'required|string|max:150',\\n            'description' => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n            'sort_order'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'is_active'   => 'nullable|boolean',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $data['user_id']    = auth()->id();\\n        $data['slug']       = $this->uniqueSlug($data['name']);\\n        $data['is_active']  = $data['is_active'] ?? true;\\n        $data['sort_order'] = $data['sort_order'] ?? 0;\\n\\n        $category = ProductCategory::create($data);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $category], 201);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $category = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'name'        => 'sometimes|required|string|max:150',\\n            'description' => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n            'sort_order'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'is_active'   => 'nullable|boolean',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        if (isset($data['name'])) {\\n            $data['slug'] = $this->uniqueSlug($data['name'], $id);\\n        }\\n\\n        $category->update($data);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $category]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $category = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        // Move products to uncategorized instead of blocking delete\\n        $category->products()->update(['category_id' => null]);\\n        $category->delete();\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Category deleted.']);\\n    }\\n\\n    private function uniqueSlug(string $name, ?int $excludeId = null): string\\n    {\\n        $base = Str::slug($name);\\n        $slug = $base;\\n        $i    = 1;\\n\\n        while (\\n            ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n                ->where('slug', $slug)\\n                ->when($excludeId, fn($q) => $q->where('id', '!=', $excludeId))\\n                ->exists()\\n        ) {\\n            $slug = $base . '-' . $i++;\\n        }\\n\\n        return $slug;\\n    }\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/ProductCategoryController.php\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"49d78e8a-4f32-4533-bf60-e0f61c7a187f","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:00:34.234Z","parentId":"091a06b7-df2f-4e53-8646-83d95e838514"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01PVZFhTGqHVGD533ERit7vG","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\ProductCategory;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Str;\n\nclass ProductCategoryController extends Controller\n{\n    public function index(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $categories = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->orderBy('sort_order')\n            ->orderBy('name')\n            ->withCount('products')\n            ->get();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $categories]);\n    }\n\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'name'        => 'required|string|max:150',\n            'description' => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n            'sort_order'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\n            'is_active'   => 'nullable|boolean',\n        ]);\n\n        $data['user_id']    = auth()->id();\n        $data['slug']       = $this->uniqueSlug($data['name']);\n        $data['is_active']  = $data['is_active'] ?? true;\n        $data['sort_order'] = $data['sort_order'] ?? 0;\n\n        $category = ProductCategory::create($data);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $category], 201);\n    }\n\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $category = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'name'        => 'sometimes|required|string|max:150',\n            'description' => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n            'sort_order'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\n            'is_active'   => 'nullable|boolean',\n        ]);\n\n        if (isset($data['name'])) {\n            $data['slug'] = $this->uniqueSlug($data['name'], $id);\n        }\n\n        $category->update($data);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $category]);\n    }\n\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $category = ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        // Move products to uncategorized instead of blocking delete\n        $category->products()->update(['category_id' => null]);\n        $category->delete();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Category deleted.']);\n    }\n\n    private function uniqueSlug(string $name, ?int $excludeId = null): string\n    {\n        $base = Str::slug($name);\n        $slug = $base;\n        $i    = 1;\n\n        while (\n            ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n                ->where('slug', $slug)\n                ->when($excludeId, fn($q) => $q->where('id', '!=', $excludeId))\n                ->exists()\n        ) {\n            $slug = $base . '-' . $i++;\n        }\n\n        return $slug;\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/ProductCategoryController.php"}},"id":"347da576-761b-4821-9d59-d932160c3ae9","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:00:34.287Z","parentId":"3c6c726e-77ed-4122-acd5-669a6ee78f1a"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"7b7372b9-c359-403b-ae6a-0b5332d4c12d","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01GcaMb6jP15szqBTzCxCKGA","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Product;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\ProductImage;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\n\\nclass ProductController extends Controller\\n{\\n    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $query = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->with(['category:id,name', 'images'])\\n            ->withTrashed(false);\\n\\n        // Filters\\n        if ($request->filled('status')) {\\n            $query->where('status', $request->status);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('category_id')) {\\n            $query->where('category_id', $request->category_id);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\\n            $query->where(fn($q) => $q->where('name', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('sku', 'ilike', $s));\\n        }\\n        if ($request->boolean('low_stock')) {\\n            $query->where('track_stock', true)->whereColumn('stock', '<=', 'low_stock_alert');\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $products = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->paginate($perPage);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $products->items(),\\n            'meta'    => [\\n                'total'        => $products->total(),\\n                'current_page' => $products->currentPage(),\\n                'last_page'    => $products->lastPage(),\\n                'per_page'     => $products->perPage(),\\n            ],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'name'             => 'required|string|max:255',\\n            'category_id'      => 'nullable|integer|exists:product_categories,id',\\n            'sku'              => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'description'      => 'nullable|string',\\n            'selling_price'    => 'required|numeric|min:0',\\n            'cost_price'       => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'stock'            => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'low_stock_alert'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'track_stock'      => 'nullable|boolean',\\n            'unit'             => 'nullable|string|max:50',\\n            'status'           => 'nullable|in:active,inactive,archived',\\n            'variants'         => 'nullable|array',\\n            'thumbnail'        => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n            'images'           => 'nullable|array',\\n            'images.*'         => 'string|max:500',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $data['user_id']     = auth()->id();\\n        $data['cost_price']  = $data['cost_price'] ?? 0;\\n        $data['track_stock'] = $data['track_stock'] ?? false;\\n        $data['status']      = $data['status'] ?? 'active';\\n\\n        // Validate category belongs to this user\\n        if (!empty($data['category_id'])) {\\n            $this->validateCategoryOwnership($data['category_id']);\\n        }\\n\\n        $images = $data['images'] ?? [];\\n        unset($data['images']);\\n\\n        $product = Product::create($data);\\n\\n        // Save extra images\\n        foreach ($images as $i => $url) {\\n            ProductImage::create([\\n                'product_id' => $product->id,\\n                'url'        => $url,\\n                'is_primary' => $i === 0 && empty($data['thumbnail']),\\n                'sort_order' => $i,\\n            ]);\\n        }\\n\\n        $product->load(['category:id,name', 'images']);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product], 201);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->with(['category:id,name', 'images'])\\n            ->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'name'            => 'sometimes|required|string|max:255',\\n            'category_id'     => 'nullable|integer|exists:product_categories,id',\\n            'sku'             => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'description'     => 'nullable|string',\\n            'selling_price'   => 'sometimes|required|numeric|min:0',\\n            'cost_price'      => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'stock'           => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'low_stock_alert' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\\n            'track_stock'     => 'nullable|boolean',\\n            'unit'            => 'nullable|string|max:50',\\n            'status'          => 'nullable|in:active,inactive,archived',\\n            'variants'        => 'nullable|array',\\n            'thumbnail'       => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        if (!empty($data['category_id'])) {\\n            $this->validateCategoryOwnership($data['category_id']);\\n        }\\n\\n        $product->update($data);\\n        $product->load(['category:id,name', 'images']);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n        $product->delete(); // soft delete\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Product deleted.']);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        $total    = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->count();\\n        $active   = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->where('status', 'active')->count();\\n        $inactive = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->where('status', 'inactive')->count();\\n        $lowStock = Product::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->where('track_stock', true)\\n            ->whereColumn('stock', '<=', 'low_stock_alert')\\n            ->count();\\n        $outOfStock = Product::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->where('track_stock', true)\\n            ->where('stock', 0)\\n            ->count();\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data' => compact('total', 'active', 'inactive', 'lowStock', 'outOfStock'),\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function adjustStock(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'adjustment' => 'required|integer', // positive = add, negative = subtract\\n            'reason'     => 'nullable|string|max:255',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $newStock = max(0, $product->stock + $data['adjustment']);\\n        $product->update(['stock' => $newStock]);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success'   => true,\\n            'data'      => ['stock' => $newStock],\\n            'message'   => 'Stock adjusted.',\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    private function validateCategoryOwnership(int $categoryId): void\\n    {\\n        \\\\App\\\\Models\\\\ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->findOrFail($categoryId);\\n    }\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/ProductController.php\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"d9dccf63-6989-4969-9c52-feb9455e6e14","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:01:00.094Z","parentId":"25ef4ab3-50a6-4669-bf9f-35ca98f9deda"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01GcaMb6jP15szqBTzCxCKGA","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\Product;\nuse App\\Models\\ProductImage;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\n\nclass ProductController extends Controller\n{\n    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->with(['category:id,name', 'images'])\n            ->withTrashed(false);\n\n        // Filters\n        if ($request->filled('status')) {\n            $query->where('status', $request->status);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('category_id')) {\n            $query->where('category_id', $request->category_id);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(fn($q) => $q->where('name', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('sku', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n        if ($request->boolean('low_stock')) {\n            $query->where('track_stock', true)->whereColumn('stock', '<=', 'low_stock_alert');\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $products = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $products->items(),\n            'meta'    => [\n                'total'        => $products->total(),\n                'current_page' => $products->currentPage(),\n                'last_page'    => $products->lastPage(),\n                'per_page'     => $products->perPage(),\n            ],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'name'             => 'required|string|max:255',\n            'category_id'      => 'nullable|integer|exists:product_categories,id',\n            'sku'              => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'description'      => 'nullable|string',\n            'selling_price'    => 'required|numeric|min:0',\n            'cost_price'       => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'stock'            => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\n            'low_stock_alert'  => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\n            'track_stock'      => 'nullable|boolean',\n            'unit'             => 'nullable|string|max:50',\n            'status'           => 'nullable|in:active,inactive,archived',\n            'variants'         => 'nullable|array',\n            'thumbnail'        => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n            'images'           => 'nullable|array',\n            'images.*'         => 'string|max:500',\n        ]);\n\n        $data['user_id']     = auth()->id();\n        $data['cost_price']  = $data['cost_price'] ?? 0;\n        $data['track_stock'] = $data['track_stock'] ?? false;\n        $data['status']      = $data['status'] ?? 'active';\n\n        // Validate category belongs to this user\n        if (!empty($data['category_id'])) {\n            $this->validateCategoryOwnership($data['category_id']);\n        }\n\n        $images = $data['images'] ?? [];\n        unset($data['images']);\n\n        $product = Product::create($data);\n\n        // Save extra images\n        foreach ($images as $i => $url) {\n            ProductImage::create([\n                'product_id' => $product->id,\n                'url'        => $url,\n                'is_primary' => $i === 0 && empty($data['thumbnail']),\n                'sort_order' => $i,\n            ]);\n        }\n\n        $product->load(['category:id,name', 'images']);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product], 201);\n    }\n\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->with(['category:id,name', 'images'])\n            ->findOrFail($id);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product]);\n    }\n\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'name'            => 'sometimes|required|string|max:255',\n            'category_id'     => 'nullable|integer|exists:product_categories,id',\n            'sku'             => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'description'     => 'nullable|string',\n            'selling_price'   => 'sometimes|required|numeric|min:0',\n            'cost_price'      => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'stock'           => 'nullable|integer|min:0',\n            'low_stock_alert' => 'images']);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $product]);\n    }\n\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n        $product->delete(); // soft delete\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Product deleted.']);\n    }\n\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n\n        $total    = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->count();\n        $active   = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->where('status', 'active')->count();\n        $inactive = Product::where('user_id', $userId)->where('status', 'inactive')->count();\n        $lowStock = Product::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('track_stock', true)\n            ->whereColumn('stock', '<=', 'low_stock_alert')\n            ->count();\n        $outOfStock = Product::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('track_stock', true)\n            ->where('stock', 0)\n            ->count();\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data' => compact('total', 'active', 'inactive', 'lowStock', 'outOfStock'),\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    public function adjustStock(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $product = Product::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'adjustment' => 'required|integer', // positive = add, negative = subtract\n            'reason'     => 'nullable|string|max:255',\n        ]);\n\n        $newStock = max(0, $product->stock + $data['adjustment']);\n        $product->update(['stock' => $newStock]);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success'   => true,\n            'data'      => ['stock' => $newStock],\n            'message'   => 'Stock adjusted.',\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    private function validateCategoryOwnership(int $categoryId): void\n    {\n        \\App\\Models\\ProductCategory::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->findOrFail($categoryId);\n 'source', 'source_ref', 'status', 'payment_method', 'payment_status',\n        'subtotal', 'shipping_charge', 'discount', 'total', 'notes',\n        'fraud_score', 'risk_level',\n        'courier_name', 'courier_tracking_id', 'courier_status', 'courier_charge',\n        'assigned_to',\n    ];\n\n    protected $casts = [\n        'subtotal'       => 'decimal:2',\n        'shipping_charge' => 'decimal:2',\n        'discount'       => 'decimal:2',\n        'total'          => 'decimal:2',\n        'courier_charge' => 'decimal:2',\n        'fraud_score'    => 'integer',\n    ];\n\n    public function user(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);\n    }\n\n    public function assignedUser(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'assigned_to');\n    }\n\n    public function items(): HasMany\n    {\n        return $this->hasMany(OrderItem::class);\n    }\n\n    public function statusLogs(): HasMany\n    {\n        return $this->hasMany(OrderStatusLog::class)->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');\n    }\n\n    /** Generate next order number like ORD-20260502-0001 */\n    public static function generateOrderNumber(int $userId): string\n    {\n        $prefix = 'ORD-' . now()->format('Ymd') . '-';\n        $last   = static::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('order_number', 'like', $prefix . '%')\n            ->orderByDesc('id')\n            ->value('order_number');\n\n        $seq = $last ? ((int) substr($last, -4)) + 1 : 1;\n        return $prefix . str_pad($seq, 4, '0', STR_PAD_LEFT);\n    }\n}\n","oldString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\n\nclass Order extends Model\n{\n    //\n}\n"},{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Models/OrderItem.php","newString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Relations\\BelongsTo;\n\nclass OrderItem extends Model\n{\n    protected $fillable = [\n        'order_id', 'product_id', 'product_name', 'sku',\n        'quantity', 'unit_price', 'total', 'variant_info',\n    ];\n\n    protected $casts = [\n        'unit_price'   => 'decimal:2',\n        'total'        => 'decimal:2',\n        'variant_info' => 'array',\n    ];\n\n    public function order(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class);\n    }\n\n    public function product(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(Product::class);\n    }\n}\n","oldString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\n\nclass Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Relations\\BelongsTo;\n\nclass OrderStatusLog extends Model\n{\n    protected $fillable = ['order_id', 'old_status', 'new_status', 'note', 'changed_by'];\n\n    public function order(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class);\n    }\n\n    public function changedByUser(): BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'changed_by');\n    }\n}\n","oldString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\n\nclass OrderStatusLog extends {"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"46e7ce18-b5ad-47a4-87c5-e62d7d1c960b","content":"Now create the OrderController:   ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_016zUfuwQFphLYTmPczy6svx","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Order;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\OrderItem;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\OrderStatusLog;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Facades\\\\DB;\\n\\nclass OrderController extends Controller\\n{\\n    private const VALID_STATUSES = [\\n        'pending', 'confirmed', 'processing', 'shipped',\\n        'delivered', 'cancelled', 'returned',\\n    ];\\n\\n    // ── List ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->with(['items:id,order_id,product_name,quantity,unit_price,total']);\\n\\n        if ($request->filled('status')) {\\n            $query->where('status', $request->status);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('risk_level')) {\\n            $query->where('risk_level', $request->risk_level);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('payment_status')) {\\n            $query->where('payment_status', $request->payment_status);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('source')) {\\n            $query->where('source', $request->source);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('date_from')) {\\n            $query->whereDate('created_at', '>=', $request->date_from);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('date_to')) {\\n            $query->whereDate('created_at', '<=', $request->date_to);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\\n            $query->where(function ($q) use ($s) {\\n                $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)\\n                  ->orWhere('customer_name', 'ilike', $s)\\n                  ->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s);\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $orders  = $query->orderByDesc('created_at')->paginate($perPage);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\\n            'meta'    => [\\n                'total'        => $orders->total(),\\n                'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(),\\n                'last_page'    => $orders->lastPage(),\\n                'per_page'     => $orders->perPage(),\\n            ],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        $counts = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->selectRaw(\\\"\\n                COUNT(*) AS total,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending')   AS pending,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'confirmed') AS confirmed,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'processing') AS processing,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'shipped')   AS shipped,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'delivered') AS delivered,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled') AS cancelled,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'returned')  AS returned,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_level = 'high')  AS high_risk,\\n                COALESCE(SUM(total) FILTER (WHERE status = 'delivered'), 0) AS total_revenue\\n            \\\")\\n            ->first();\\n\\n        $today = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->whereDate('created_at', today())\\n            ->count();\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => array_merge($counts->toArray(), ['today' => $today]),\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Create ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'customer_name'     => 'nullable|string|max:150',\\n            'customer_phone'    => 'required|string|max:20',\\n            'customer_address'  => 'nullable|string',\\n            'customer_district' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'customer_thana'    => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'source'            => 'nullable|in:manual,facebook_inbox,landing_page',\\n            'source_ref'        => 'nullable|string|max:255',\\n            'payment_method'    => 'nullable|in:cod,online,bkash',\\n            'payment_status'    => 'nullable|in:due,partial,paid',\\n            'shipping_charge'   => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'discount'          => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'notes'             => 'nullable|string',\\n            'items'             => 'required|array|min:1',\\n            'items.*.product_name' => 'required|string|max:255',\\n            'items.*.product_id'   => 'nullable|integer|exists:products,id',\\n            'items.*.sku'          => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'items.*.quantity'     => 'required|integer|min:1',\\n            'items.*.unit_price'   => 'required|numeric|min:0',\\n            'items.*.variant_info' => 'nullable|array',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data) {\\n            $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n            // Compute totals\\n            $subtotal = collect($data['items'])->sum(\\n                fn($item) => $item['quantity'] * $item['unit_price']\\n            );\\n            $shippingCharge = (float) ($data['shipping_charge'] ?? 0);\\n            $discount       = (float) ($data['discount'] ?? 0);\\n            $total          = max(0, $subtotal + $shippingCharge - $discount);\\n\\n            $order = Order::create([\\n                'user_id'           => $userId,\\n                'order_number'      => Order::generateOrderNumber($userId),\\n                'customer_name'     => $data['customer_name'] ?? null,\\n                'customer_phone'    => $data['customer_phone'],\\n                'customer_address'  => $data['customer_address'] ?? null,\\n                'customer_district' => $data['customer_district'] ?? null,\\n                'customer_thana'    => $data['customer_thana'] ?? null,\\n                'source'            => $data['source'] ?? 'manual',\\n                'source_ref'        => $data['source_ref'] ?? null,\\n                'status'            => 'pending',\\n                'payment_method'    => $data['payment_method'] ?? 'cod',\\n                'payment_status'    => $data['payment_status'] ?? 'due',\\n                'subtotal'          => $subtotal,\\n                'shipping_charge'   => $shippingCharge,\\n                'discount'          => $discount,\\n                'total'             => $total,\\n                'notes'             => $data['notes'] ?? null,\\n                'fraud_score'       => 0,\\n                'risk_level'        => 'low',\\n            ]);\\n\\n            foreach ($data['items'] as $item) {\\n                OrderItem::create([\\n                    'order_id'     => $order->id,\\n                    'product_id'   => $item['product_id'] ?? null,\\n                    'product_name' => $item['product_name'],\\n                    'sku'          => $item['sku'] ?? null,\\n                    'quantity'     => $item['quantity'],\\n                    'unit_price'   => $item['unit_price'],\\n                    'total'        => $item['quantity'] * $item['unit_price'],\\n                    'variant_info' => $item['variant_info'] ?? null,\\n                ]);\\n            }\\n\\n            // Initial status log\\n            OrderStatusLog::create([\\n                'order_id'   => $order->id,\\n                'old_status' => null,\\n                'new_status' => 'pending',\\n                'note'       => 'Order created.',\\n                'changed_by' => $userId,\\n            ]);\\n\\n            $order->load(['items', 'statusLogs']);\\n\\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order], 201);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Show ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->with(['items', 'statusLogs.changedByUser:id,name'])\\n            ->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Update ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'customer_name'       => 'nullable|string|max:150',\\n            'customer_phone'      => 'sometimes|required|string|max:20',\\n            'customer_address'    => 'nullable|string',\\n            'customer_district'   => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'customer_thana'      => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'payment_method'      => 'nullable|in:cod,online,bkash',\\n            'payment_status'      => 'nullable|in:due,partial,paid',\\n            'shipping_charge'     => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'discount'            => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'notes'               => 'nullable|string',\\n            'courier_name'        => 'nullable|string|max:50',\\n            'courier_tracking_id' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'courier_status'      => 'nullable|string|max:50',\\n            'courier_charge'      => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        // Recalculate total if amounts changed\\n        if (isset($data['shipping_charge']) || isset($data['discount'])) {\\n            $shipping = $data['shipping_charge'] ?? $order->shipping_charge;\\n            $discount = $data['discount'] ?? $order->discount;\\n            $data['total'] = max(0, $order->subtotal + $shipping - $discount);\\n        }\\n\\n        $order->update($data);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Status Change ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function updateStatus(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $oldStatus = $order->status;\\n        $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\\n\\n        OrderStatusLog::create([\\n            'order_id'   => $order->id,\\n            'old_status' => $oldStatus,\\n            'new_status' => $data['status'],\\n            'note'       => $data['note'] ?? null,\\n            'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\\n        ]);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Bulk Status ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function bulkStatus(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'ids'    => 'required|array|min:1',\\n            'ids.*'  => 'integer',\\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->whereIn('id', $data['ids'])\\n            ->get();\\n\\n        foreach ($orders as $order) {\\n            $old = $order->status;\\n            $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\\n            OrderStatusLog::create([\\n                'order_id'   => $order->id,\\n                'old_status' => $old,\\n                'new_status' => $data['status'],\\n                'note'       => $data['note'] ?? 'Bulk update.',\\n                'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\\n            ]);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'message' => $orders->count() . ' orders updated.',\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Delete ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n        $order->delete();\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Order deleted.']);\\n    }\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/OrderController.php\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"6cf5b2cb-cac6-46d6-8046-d33b57973a23","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:04:13.802Z","parentId":"f4726f1f-0e7d-4c07-9e11-b1b212964d47"}

function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'customer_name'       => 'nullable|string|max:150',\n            'customer_phone'      => 'sometimes|required|string|max:20',\n            'customer_address'    => 'nullable|string',\n            'customer_district'   => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'customer_thana'      => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'payment_method'      => 'nullable|in:cod,online,bkash',\n            'payment_status'      => 'nullable|in:due,partial,paid',\n            'shipping_charge'     => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'discount'            => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'notes'               => 'nullable|string',\n            'courier_name'        => 'nullable|string|max:50',\n            'courier_tracking_id' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'courier_status'      => 'nullable|string|max:50',\n            'courier_charge'      => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n        ]);\n\n        // Recalculate total if amounts changed\n        if (isset($data['shipping_charge']) || isset($data['discount'])) {\n            $shipping = $data['shipping_charge'] ?? $order->shipping_charge;\n            $discount = $data['discount'] ?? $order->discount;\n            $data['total'] = max(0, $order->subtotal + $shipping - $discount);\n        }\n\n        $order->update($data);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Status Change ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function updateStatus(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n        ]);\n\n        $oldStatus = $order->status;\n        $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\n\n        OrderStatusLog::create([\n            'order_id'   => $order->id,\n            'old_status' => $oldStatus,\n            'new_status' => $data['status'],\n            'note'       => $data['note'] ?? null,\n            'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\n        ]);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Bulk Status ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function bulkStatus(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'ids'    => 'required|array|min:1',\n            'ids.*'  => 'integer',\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n        ]);\n\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereIn('id', $data['ids'])\n            ->get();\n\n        foreach ($orders as $order) {\n            $old = $order->status;\n            $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\n            OrderStatusLog::create([\n                'order_id'   => $order->id,\n                'old_status' => $old,\n                'new_status' => $data['status'],\n                'note'       => $data['note'] ?? 'Bulk update.',\n                'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\n            ]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'message' => $orders->count() . ' orders updated.',\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Delete ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n        $order->delete();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Order deleted.']);\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/OrderController.php"}},"id":"16a1f0e1-0edb-4d1d-8bb3-767c9e602006","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:04:13.861Z","parentId":"5d81d899-4eb1-4422-bf7f-7c8f772e4823"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_016zUfuwQFphLYTmPczy6svx","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\Order;\nuse App\\Models\\OrderItem;\nuse App\\Models\\OrderStatusLog;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\DB;\n\nclass OrderController extends Controller\n{\n    private const VALID_STATUSES = [\n        'pending', 'confirmed', 'processing', 'shipped',\n        'delivered', 'cancelled', 'returned',\n    ];\n\n    // ── List ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->with(['items:id,order_id,product_name,quantity,unit_price,total']);\n\n        if ($request->filled('status')) {\n            $query->where('status', $request->status);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('risk_level')) {\n            $query->where('risk_level', $request->risk_level);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('payment_status')) {\n            $query->where('payment_status', $request->payment_status);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('source')) {\n            $query->where('source', $request->source);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('date_from')) {\n            $query->whereDate('created_at', '>=', $request->date_from);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('date_to')) {\n            $query->whereDate('created_at', '<=', $request->date_to);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(function ($q) use ($s) {\n                $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)\n                  ->orWhere('customer_name', 'ilike', $s)\n                  ->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s);\n            });\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $orders  = $query->orderByDesc('created_at')->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\n            'meta'    => [\n                'total'        => $orders->total(),\n                'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(),\n                'last_page'    => $orders->lastPage(),\n                'per_page'     => $orders->perPage(),\n            ],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n\n        $counts = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->selectRaw(\"\n                COUNT(*) AS total,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending')   AS pending,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'confirmed') AS confirmed,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'processing') AS processing,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'shipped')   AS shipped,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'delivered') AS delivered,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled') AS cancelled,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'returned')  AS returned,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_level = 'high')  AS high_risk,\n                COALESCE(SUM(total) FILTER (WHERE status = 'delivered'), 0) AS total_revenue\n            \")\n            ->first();\n\n        $today = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->whereDate('created_at', today())\n            ->count();\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => array_merge($counts->toArray(), ['today' => $today]),\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Create ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'customer_name'     => 'nullable|string|max:150',\n            'customer_phone'    => 'required|string|max:20',\n            'customer_address'  => 'nullable|string',\n            'customer_district' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'customer_thana'    => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'source'            => 'nullable|in:manual,facebook_inbox,landing_page',\n            'source_ref'        => 'nullable|string|max:255',\n            'payment_method'    => 'nullable|in:cod,online,bkash',\n            'payment_status'    => 'nullable|in:due,partial,paid',\n            'shipping_charge'   => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'discount'          => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'notes'             => 'nullable|string',\n            'items'             => 'required|array|min:1',\n            'items.*.product_name' => 'required|string|max:255',\n            'items.*.product_id'   => 'nullable|integer|exists:products,id',\n            'items.*.sku'          => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'items.*.quantity'     => 'required|integer|min:1',\n            'items.*.unit_price'   => 'required|numeric|min:0',\n            'items.*.variant_info' => 'nullable|array',\n        ]);\n\n        return DB::transaction(function () use ($data) {\n            $userId = auth()->id();\n\n            // Compute totals\n            $subtotal = collect($data['items'])->sum(\n                fn($item) => $item['quantity'] * $item['unit_price']\n            );\n            $shippingCharge = (float) ($data['shipping_charge'] ?? 0);\n            $discount       = (float) ($data['discount'] ?? 0);\n            $total          = max(0, $subtotal + $shippingCharge - $discount);\n\n            $order = Order::create([\n                'user_id'           => $userId,\n                'order_number'      => Order::generateOrderNumber($userId),\n                'customer_name'     => $data['customer_name'] ?? null,\n                'customer_phone'    => $data['customer_phone'],\n                'customer_address'  => $data['customer_address'] ?? null,\n                'customer_district' => $data['customer_district'] ?? null,\n                'customer_thana'    => $data['customer_thana'] ?? null,\n                'source'            => $data['source'] ?? 'manual',\n                'source_ref'        => $data['source_ref'] ?? null,\n                'status'            => 'pending',\n                'payment_method'    => $data['payment_method'] ?? 'cod',\n                'payment_status'    => $data['payment_status'] ?? 'due',\n                'subtotal'          => $subtotal,\n                'shipping_charge'   => $shippingCharge,\n                'discount'          => $discount,\n                'total'             => $total,\n                'notes'             => $data['notes'] ?? null,\n                'fraud_score'       => 0,\n                'risk_level'        => 'low',\n            ]);\n\n            foreach ($data['items'] as $item) {\n                OrderItem::create([\n                    'order_id'     => $order->id,\n                    'product_id'   => $item['product_id'] ?? null,\n                    'product_name' => $item['product_name'],\n                    'sku'          => $item['sku'] ?? null,\n                    'quantity'     => $item['quantity'],\n                    'unit_price'   => $item['unit_price'],\n                    'total'        => $item['quantity'] * $item['unit_price'],\n                    'variant_info' => $item['variant_info'] ?? null,\n                ]);\n            }\n\n            // Initial status log\n            OrderStatusLog::create([\n                'order_id'   => $order->id,\n                'old_status' => null,\n                'new_status' => 'pending',\n                'note'       => 'Order created.',\n                'changed_by' => $userId,\n            ]);\n\n            $order->load(['items', 'statusLogs']);\n\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order], 201);\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ── Show ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->with(['items', 'statusLogs.changedByUser:id,name'])\n            ->findOrFail($id);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Update ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'customer_name'       => 'nullable|string|max:150',\n            'customer_phone'      => 'sometimes|required|string|max:20',\n            'customer_address'    => 'nullable|string',\n            'customer_district'   => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'customer_thana'      => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'payment_method'      => 'nullable|in:cod,online,bkash',\n            'payment_status'      => 'nullable|in:due,partial,paid',\n            'shipping_charge'     => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'discount'            => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'notes'               => 'nullable|string',\n            'courier_name'        => 'nullable|string|max:50',\n            'courier_tracking_id' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'courier_status'      => 'nullable|string|max:50',\n            'courier_charge'      => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n        ]);\n\n        // Recalculate total if amounts changed\n        if (isset($data['shipping_charge']) || isset($data['discount'])) {\n            $shipping = $data['shipping_charge'] ?? $order->shipping_charge;\n            $discount = $data['discount'] ?? $order->discount;\n            $data['total'] = max(0, $order->subtotal + $shipping - $discount);\n        }\n\n        $order->update($data);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Status Change ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function updateStatus(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n        ]);\n\n        $oldStatus = $order->status;\n        $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\n\n        OrderStatusLog::create([\n            'order_id'   => $order->id,\n            'old_status' => $oldStatus,\n            'new_status' => $data['status'],\n            'note'       => $data['note'] ?? null,\n            'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\n        ]);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Bulk Status ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function bulkStatus(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'ids'    => 'required|array|min:1',\n            'ids.*'  => 'integer',\n            'status' => 'required|in:' . implode(',', self::VALID_STATUSES),\n            'note'   => 'nullable|string|max:500',\n        ]);\n\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereIn('id', $data['ids'])\n            ->get();\n\n        foreach ($orders as $order) {\n            $old = $order->status;\n            $order->update(['status' => $data['status']]);\n            OrderStatusLog::create([\n                'order_id'   => $order->id,\n                'old_status' => $old,\n                'new_status' => $data['status'],\n                'note'       => $data['note'] ?? 'Bulk update.',\n                'changed_by' => auth()->id(),\n            ]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'message' => $orders->count() . ' orders updated.',\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Delete ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function destroy(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n        $order->delete();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Order deleted.']);\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/OrderController.php"}},"id":"4191e1f1-2de3-43fe-9f06-51cb6858976f","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:05:43.437Z","parentId":"3c56c7ab-ec98-4326-9301-11d160b1c50f"}
