/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"পণ্য তালিকা\\\",\\n    addProduct: \\\"নতুন পণ্য\\\",\\n    search: \\\"পণ্যের নাম / SKU দিয়ে খুঁজুন\\\",\\n    all: \\\"সব\\\",\\n    active: \\\"সক্রিয়\\\",\\n    inactive: \\\"নিষ্ক্রিয়\\\",\\n    archived: \\\"আর্কাইভড\\\",\\n    lowStock: \\\"কম স্টক\\\",\\n    noProducts: \\\"কোনো পণ্য পাওয়া যায়নি।\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    name: \\\"পণ্যের নাম\\\",\\n    category: \\\"ক্যাটাগরি\\\",\\n    price: \\\"মূল্য\\\",\\n    stock: \\\"স্টক\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    edit: \\\"সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    delete: \\\"মুছুন\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"এই পণ্যটি মুছে ফেলবেন?\\\",\\n    deleted: \\\"পণ্য মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    uncategorized: \\\"ক্যাটাগরি নেই\\\",\\n    totalProducts: \\\"মোট পণ্য\\\",\\n    activeProducts: \\\"সক্রিয়\\\",\\n    lowStockAlert: \\\"কম স্টক\\\",\\n    statsLoading: \\\"...\\\",\\n    // modal\\n    modalAddTitle: \\\"নতুন পণ্য যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    modalEditTitle: \\\"পণ্য সম্পাদনা করুন\\\",\\n    fieldName: \\\"পণ্যের নাম *\\\",\\n    fieldCategory: \\\"ক্যাটাগরি\\\",\\n    fieldSku: \\\"SKU\\\",\\n    fieldSellingPrice: \\\"বিক্রয় মূল্য (৳) *\\\",\\n    fieldCostPrice: \\\"ক্রয় মূল্য (৳)\\\",\\n    fieldStock: \\\"স্টক\\\",\\n    fieldUnit: \\\"ইউনিট\\\",\\n    fieldTrackStock: \\\"স্টক ট্র্যাক করুন\\\",\\n    fieldStatus: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    fieldDescription: \\\"বিবরণ\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সংরক্ষণ\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noCategoryOption: \\\"— ক্যাটাগরি নেই —\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Product List\\\",\\n    addProduct: \\\"New Product\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Search by name / SKU\\\",\\n    all: \\\"All\\\",\\n    active: \\\"Active\\\",\\n    inactive: \\\"Inactive\\\",\\n    archived: \\\"Archived\\\",\\n    lowStock: \\\"Low Stock\\\",\\n    noProducts: \\\"No products found.\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Product Name\\\",\\n    category: \\\"Category\\\",\\n    price: \\\"Price\\\",\\n    stock: \\\"Stock\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    edit: \\\"Edit\\\",\\n    delete: \\\"Delete\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"Delete this product?\\\",\\n    deleted: \\\"Product deleted.\\\",\\n    uncategorized: \\\"Uncategorized\\\",\\n    totalProducts: \\\"Total Products\\\",\\n    activeProducts: \\\"Active\\\",\\n    lowStockAlert: \\\"Low Stock\\\",\\n    statsLoading: \\\"...\\\",\\n    modalAddTitle: \\\"Add New Product\\\",\\n    modalEditTitle: \\\"Edit Product\\\",\\n    fieldName: \\\"Product Name *\\\",\\n    fieldCategory: \\\"Category\\\",\\n    fieldSku: \\\"SKU\\\",\\n    fieldSellingPrice: \\\"Selling Price (৳) *\\\",\\n    fieldCostPrice: \\\"Cost Price (৳)\\\",\\n    fieldStock: \\\"Stock\\\",\\n    fieldUnit: \\\"Unit\\\",\\n    fieldTrackStock: \\\"Track Stock\\\",\\n    fieldStatus: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    fieldDescription: \\\"Description\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n    noCategoryOption: \\\"— No Category —\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Category = { id: number; name: string };\\ntype Product = {\\n  id: number; name: string; sku: string | null; selling_price: string;\\n  cost_price: string; stock: number; track_stock: boolean;\\n  unit: string; status: string; description: string | null;\\n  category_id: number | null; category: { id: number; name: string } | null;\\n  low_stock_alert: number;\\n};\\ntype Stats = { total: number; active: number; lowStock: number };\\ntype FormState = Partial<Omit<Product, \\\"id\\\" | \\\"category\\\">>;\\n\\nconst statusBadge: Record<string, string> = {\\n  active:   \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  inactive: \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  archived: \\\"bg-[var(--muted)]/20 text-[var(--muted)]\\\",\\n};\\n\\nexport default function ProductsPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n\\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);\\n  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);\\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, active: 0, lowStock: 0 });\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>(\\\"all\\\");\\n  const [filterLowStock, setFilterLowStock] = useState(false);\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n\\n  // modal\\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<\\\"add\\\" | \\\"edit\\\" | null>(null);\\n  const [editProduct, setEditProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormState>({});\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n  const [formError, setFormError] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"15\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      if (filterStatus !== \\\"all\\\") params.set(\\\"status\\\", filterStatus);\\n      if (filterLowStock) params.set(\\\"low_stock\\\", \\\"1\\\");\\n\\n      const [prodRes, catRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\\n        fetch(`${API}/products?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n        fetch(`${API}/categories`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n        fetch(`${API}/products/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n      ]);\\n\\n      if (prodRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await prodRes.json();\\n        setProducts(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n      if (catRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await catRes.json();\\n        setCategories(d.data ?? []);\\n      }\\n      if (statRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await statRes.json();\\n        setStats({ total: d.data?.total ?? 0, active: d.data?.active ?? 0, lowStock: d.data?.lowStock ?? 0 });\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [page, search, filterStatus, filterLowStock, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\\n\\n  // debounce search\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search, filterStatus, filterLowStock]);\\n\\n  const openAdd = () => {\\n    setForm({ status: \\\"active\\\", unit: \\\"pcs\\\", track_stock: false });\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    setEditProduct(null);\\n    setModal(\\\"add\\\");\\n  };\\n  const openEdit = (p: Product) => {\\n    setForm({ ...p });\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    setEditProduct(p);\\n    setModal(\\\"edit\\\");\\n  };\\n  const closeModal = () => { setModal(null); setEditProduct(null); };\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    if (!form.name || !form.selling_price) {\\n      setFormError(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"নাম এবং বিক্রয় মূল্য আবশ্যক।\\\" : \\\"Name and selling price are required.\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const url    = modal === \\\"edit\\\" ? `${API}/products/${editProduct!.id}` : `${API}/products`;\\n      const method = modal === \\\"edit\\\" ? \\\"PUT\\\" : \\\"POST\\\";\\n      const res = await fetch(url, {\\n        method,\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify(form),\\n      });\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      if (!res.ok) {\\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\\n        setFormError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      closeModal();\\n      void fetchData();\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {\\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmDelete)) return;\\n    await fetch(`${API}/products/${id}`, {\\n      method: \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n    });\\n    void fetchData();\\n  };\\n\\n  const setField = (key: keyof FormState, value: unknown) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [key]: value }));\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"product-list\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"products\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Stat bar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-3\\\">\\n        {[\\n          { label: txt.totalProducts, value: stats.total, color: \\\"bg-[#0f7c7b]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.activeProducts, value: stats.active, color: \\\"bg-[#2f7ec1]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.lowStockAlert,  value: stats.lowStock, color: \\\"bg-[#c0392b]\\\" },\\n        ].map(c => (\\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-white/80\\\">{c.label}</p>\\n            <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\\\">{loading ? txt.statsLoading : c.value}</p>\\n          </article>\\n        ))}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mt-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input\\n          type=\\\"text\\\"\\n          value={search}\\n          onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\"\\n        />\\n        <select\\n          value={filterStatus}\\n          onChange={e => setFilterStatus(e.target.value)}\\n          className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\"\\n        >\\n          <option value=\\\"all\\\">{txt.all}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"active\\\">{txt.active}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"inactive\\\">{txt.inactive}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"archived\\\">{txt.archived}</option>\\n        </select>\\n        <label className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer\\\">\\n          <input type=\\\"checkbox\\\" checked={filterLowStock} onChange={e => setFilterLowStock(e.target.checked)}\\n            className=\\\"accent-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n          {txt.lowStock}\\n        </label>\\n        <button onClick={openAdd}\\n          className=\\\"ml-auto rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n          + {txt.addProduct}\\n        </button>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Table */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mt-4 overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.name}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.category}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.price}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.stock}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.status}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.actions}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : products.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noProducts}</td></tr>\\n            ) : products.map(p => (\\n              <tr key={p.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] transition-colors\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{p.name}</p>\\n                  {p.sku && <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">SKU: {p.sku}</p>}\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                  {p.category?.name ?? txt.uncategorized}\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(p.selling_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  {p.track_stock ? (\\n                    <span className={p.stock <= p.low_stock_alert ? \\\"text-red-400 font-bold\\\" : \\\"\\\"}>\\n                      {p.stock} {p.unit}\\n                    </span>\\n                  ) : <span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">—</span>}\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${statusBadge[p.status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                    {locale === \\\"bn\\\"\\n                      ? p.status === \\\"active\\\" ? \\\"সক্রিয়\\\" : p.status === \\\"inactive\\\" ? \\\"নিষ্ক্রিয়\\\" : \\\"আর্কাইভড\\\"\\n                      : p.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.status.slice(1)}\\n                  </span>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(p)}\\n                    className=\\\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\\\">\\n                    {txt.edit}\\n                  </button>\\n                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(p.id)}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\">\\n                    {txt.delete}\\n                  </button>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {/* Pagination */}\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"টি পণ্য\\\" : \\\"products\\\"}</p>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"পরে\\\" : \\\"Next\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Add / Edit Modal */}\\n      {modal && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeModal()}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">\\n              {modal === \\\"add\\\" ? txt.modalAddTitle : txt.modalEditTitle}\\n            </h3>\\n            {formError && (\\n              <div className=\\\"mb-3 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-400\\\">{formError}</div>\\n            )}\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n              <label className=\\\"sm:col-span-2\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldName}</span>\\n                <input value={form.name ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"name\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldCategory}</span>\\n                <select value={form.category_id ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"category_id\\\", e.target.value ? Number(e.target.value) : null)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"\\\">{txt.noCategoryOption}</option>\\n                  {categories.map(c => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldSku}</span>\\n                <input value={form.sku ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"sku\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldSellingPrice}</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={form.selling_price ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"selling_price\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldCostPrice}</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={form.cost_price ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"cost_price\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldStock}</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={form.stock ?? 0} onChange={e => setField(\\\"stock\\\", Number(e.target.value))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldUnit}</span>\\n                <select value={form.unit ?? \\\"pcs\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"unit\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"pcs\\\">pcs</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"kg\\\">kg</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"liter\\\">liter</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"box\\\">box</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"set\\\">set</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldStatus}</span>\\n                <select value={form.status ?? \\\"active\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"status\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"active\\\">{txt.active}</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"inactive\\\">{txt.inactive}</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"archived\\\">{txt.archived}</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n              <label className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 sm:col-span-2 cursor-pointer\\\">\\n                <input type=\\\"checkbox\\\" checked={!!form.track_stock} onChange={e => setField(\\\"track_stock\\\", e.target.checked)}\\n                  className=\\\"accent-[var(--accent)] w-4 h-4\\\" />\\n                <span className=\\\"text-sm\\\">{txt.fieldTrackStock}</span>\\n              </label>\\n              <label className=\\\"sm:col-span-2\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldDescription}</span>\\n                <textarea rows={2} value={form.description ?? \\\"\\\"} onChange={e => setField(\\\"description\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={closeModal}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                {txt.cancel}\\n              </button>\\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Products page written\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write the full Product List page with CRUD UI\", \"goal\": \"Create product list page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"717084ce-c1bc-4963-a5bf-721abd1a7145","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:05:59.727Z","parentId":"05649064-1f3f-45d0-ba9d-bf42cec014b0"}

{"type":"assistant.turn_start","data":{"turnId":"37"},"id":"c403c19b-a980-4ff0-a76f-737dc6d9bdfa","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:05:59.727Z","parentId":"e0905f38-0448-46b5-8d78-39d240f5904f"}
{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01K8goLv3XvrwEVZ4VyCdGCS","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"পণ্য তালিকা\",\n    addProduct: \"নতুন পণ্য\",\n    search: \"পণ্যের নাম / SKU দিয়ে খুঁজুন\",\n    all: \"সব\",\n    active: \"সক্রিয়\",\n    inactive: \"নিষ্ক্রিয়\",\n    archived: \"আর্কাইভড\",\n    lowStock: \"কম স্টক\",\n    noProducts: \"কোনো পণ্য পাওয়া যায়নি।\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    name: \"পণ্যের নাম\",\n    category: \"ক্যাটাগরি\",\n    price: \"মূল্য\",\n    stock: \"স্টক\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    actions: \"অ্যাকশন\",\n    edit: \"সম্পাদনা\",\n    delete: \"মুছুন\",\n    confirmDelete: \"এই পণ্যটি মুছে ফেলবেন?\",\n    deleted: \"পণ্য মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\",\n    uncategorized: \"ক্যাটাগরি নেই\",\n    totalProducts: \"মোট পণ্য\",\n    activeProducts: \"সক্রিয়\",\n    lowStockAlert: \"কম স্টক\",\n    statsLoading: \"...\",\n    // modal\n    modalAddTitle: \"নতুন পণ্য যোগ করুন\",\n    modalEditTitle: \"পণ্য সম্পাদনা করুন\",\n    fieldName: \"পণ্যের নাম *\",\n    fieldCategory: \"ক্যাটাগরি\",\n    fieldSku: \"SKU\",\n    fieldSellingPrice: \"বিক্রয় মূল্য (৳) *\",\n    fieldCostPrice: \"ক্রয় মূল্য (৳)\",\n    fieldStock: \"স্টক\",\n    fieldUnit: \"ইউনিট\",\n    fieldTrackStock: \"স্টক ট্র্যাক করুন\",\n    fieldStatus: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    fieldDescription: \"বিবরণ\",\n    save: \"সংরক্ষণ\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    saving: \"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\",\n    noCategoryOption: \"— ক্যাটাগরি নেই —\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Product List\",\n    addProduct: \"New Product\",\n    search: \"Search by name / SKU\",\n    all: \"All\",\n    active: \"Active\",\n    inactive: \"Inactive\",\n    archived: \"Archived\",\n    lowStock: \"Low Stock\",\n    noProducts: \"No products found.\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    name: \"Product Name\",\n    category: \"Category\",\n    price: \"Price\",\n    stock: \"Stock\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    actions: \"Actions\",\n    edit: \"Edit\",\n    delete: \"Delete\",\n    confirmDelete: \"Delete this product?\",\n    deleted: \"Product deleted.\",\n    uncategorized: \"Uncategorized\",\n    totalProducts: \"Total Products\",\n    activeProducts: \"Active\",\n    lowStockAlert: \"Low Stock\",\n    statsLoading: \"...\",\n    modalAddTitle: \"Add New Product\",\n    modalEditTitle: \"Edit Product\",\n    fieldName: \"Product Name *\",\n    fieldCategory: \"Category\",\n    fieldSku: \"SKU\",\n    fieldSellingPrice: \"Selling Price (৳) *\",\n    fieldCostPrice: \"Cost Price (৳)\",\n    fieldStock: \"Stock\",\n    fieldUnit: \"Unit\",\n    fieldTrackStock: \"Track Stock\",\n    fieldStatus: \"Status\",\n    fieldDescription: \"Description\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n    noCategoryOption: \"— No Category —\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Category = { id: number; name: string };\ntype Product = {\n  id: number; name: string; sku: string | null; selling_price: string;\n  cost_price: string; stock: number; track_stock: boolean;\n  unit: string; status: string; description: string | null;\n  category_id: number | null; category: { id: number; name: string } | null;\n  low_stock_alert: number;\n};\ntype Stats = { total: number; active: number; lowStock: number };\ntype FormState = Partial<Omit<Product, \"id\" | \"category\">>;\n\nconst statusBadge: Record<string, string> = {\n  active:   \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  inactive: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  archived: \"bg-[var(--muted)]/20 text-[var(--muted)]\",\n};\n\nexport default function ProductsPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);\n  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, active: 0, lowStock: 0 });\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [filterLowStock, setFilterLowStock] = useState(false);\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n\n  // modal\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<\"add\" | \"edit\" | null>(null);\n  const [editProduct, setEditProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormState>({});\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [formError, setFormError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"15\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      if (filterStatus !== \"all\") params.set(\"status\", filterStatus);\n      if (filterLowStock) params.set(\"low_stock\", \"1\");\n\n      const [prodRes, catRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\n        fetch(`${API}/products?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n        fetch(`${API}/categories`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n        fetch(`${API}/products/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n      ]);\n\n      if (prodRes.ok) {\n        const d = await prodRes.json();\n        setProducts(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n      if (catRes.ok) {\n        const d = await catRes.json();\n        setCategories(d.data ?? []);\n      }\n      if (statRes.ok) {\n        const d = await statRes.json();\n        setStats({ total: d.data?.total ?? 0, active: d.data?.active ?? 0, lowStock: d.data?.lowStock ?? 0 });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, filterStatus, filterLowStock, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\n\n  // debounce search\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search, filterStatus, filterLowStock]);\n\n  const openAdd = () => {\n    setForm({ status: \"active\", unit: \"pcs\", track_stock: false });\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    setEditProduct(null);\n    setModal(\"add\");\n  };\n  const openEdit = (p: Product) => {\n    setForm({ ...p });\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    setEditProduct(p);\n    setModal(\"edit\");\n  };\n  const closeModal = () => { setModal(null); setEditProduct(null); };\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!form.name || !form.selling_price) {\n      setFormError(locale === \"bn\" ? \"নাম এবং বিক্রয় মূল্য আবশ্যক।\" : \"Name and selling price are required.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    setSaving(true);\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const url    = modal === \"edit\" ? `${API}/products/${editProduct!.id}` : `${API}/products`;\n      const method = modal === \"edit\" ? \"PUT\" : \"POST\";\n      const res = await fetch(url, {\n        method,\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify(form),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\n        setFormError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\n        return;\n      }\n      closeModal();\n      void fetchData();\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmDelete)) return;\n    await fetch(`${API}/products/${id}`, {\n      method: \"DELETE\",\n      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n    });\n    void fetchData();\n  };\n\n  const setField = (key: keyof FormState, value: unknown) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [key]: value }));\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"product-list\" defaultExpandedKey=\"products\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Stat bar */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-3\">\n        {[\n          { label: txt.totalProducts, value: stats.total, color: \"bg-[#0f7c7b]\" },\n          { label: txt.activeProducts, value: stats.active, color: \"bg-[#2f7ec1]\" },\n          { label: txt.lowStockAlert,  value: stats.lowStock, color: \"bg-[#c0392b]\" },\n        ].map(c => (\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-white/80\">{c.label}</p>\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\">{loading ? txt.statsLoading : c.value}</p>\n          </article>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mt-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          value={search}\n          onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\"\n        />\n        <select\n          value={filterStatus}\n          onChange={e => setFilterStatus(e.target.value)}\n          className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\"\n        >\n          <option value=\"all\">{txt.all}</option>\n          <option value=\"active\">{txt.active}</option>\n          <option value=\"inactive\">{txt.inactive}</option>\n          <option value=\"archived\">{txt.archived}</option>\n        </select>\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer\">\n          <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={filterLowStock} onChange={e => setFilterLowStock(e.target.checked)}\n            className=\"accent-[var(--accent)]\" />\n          {txt.lowStock}\n        </label>\n        <button onClick={openAdd}\n          className=\"ml-auto rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n          + {txt.addProduct}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mt-4 overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.name}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.category}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.price}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.stock}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.status}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : products.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noProducts}</td></tr>\n            ) : products.map(p => (\n              <tr key={p.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] transition-colors\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{p.name}</p>\n                  {p.sku && <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">SKU: {p.sku}</p>}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                  {p.category?.name ?? txt.uncategorized}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(p.selling_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  {p.track_stock ? (\n                    <span className={p.stock <= p.low_stock_alert ? \"text-red-400 font-bold\" : \"\"}>\n                      {p.stock} {p.unit}\n                    </span>\n                  ) : <span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">—</span>}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${statusBadge[p.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                    {locale === \"bn\"\n                      ? p.status === \"active\" ? \"সক্রিয়\" : p.status === \"inactive\" ? \"নিষ্ক্রিয়\" : \"আর্কাইভড\"\n                      : p.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.status.slice(1)}\n                  </span>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(p)}\n                    className=\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                    {txt.edit}\n                  </button>\n                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(p.id)}\n                    className=\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\">\n                    {txt.delete}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {/* Pagination */}\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"টি পণ্য\" : \"products\"}</p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Add / Edit Modal */}\n      {modal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeModal()}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">\n              {modal === \"add\" ? txt.modalAddTitle : txt.modalEditTitle}\n            </h3>\n            {formError && (\n              <div className=\"mb-3 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-400\">{formError}</div>\n            )}\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2\">\n              <label className=\"sm:col-span-2\">\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldName}</span>\n                <input value={form.name ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"name\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldCategory}</span>\n                <select value={form.category_id ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"category_id\", e.target.value ? Number(e.target.value) : null)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"\">{txt.noCategoryOption}</option>\n                  {categories.map(c => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}\n                </select>\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldSku}</span>\n                <input value={form.sku ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"sku\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldSellingPrice}</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={form.selling_price ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"selling_price\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldCostPrice}</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={form.cost_price ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"cost_price\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldStock}</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={form.stock ?? 0} onChange={e => setField(\"stock\", Number(e.target.value))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldUnit}</span>\n                <select value={form.unit ?? \"pcs\"} onChange={e => setField(\"unit\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"pcs\">pcs</option>\n                  <option value=\"kg\">kg</option>\n                  <option value=\"liter\">liter</option>\n                  <option value=\"box\">box</option>\n                  <option value=\"set\">set</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldStatus}</span>\n                <select value={form.status ?? \"active\"} onChange={e => setField(\"status\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"active\">{txt.active}</option>\n                  <option value=\"inactive\">{txt.inactive}</option>\n                  <option value=\"archived\">{txt.archived}</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n              <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 sm:col-span-2 cursor-pointer\">\n                <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={!!form.track_stock} onChange={e => setField(\"track_stock\", e.target.checked)}\n                  className=\"accent-[var(--accent)] w-4 h-4\" />\n                <span className=\"text-sm\">{txt.fieldTrackStock}</span>\n              </label>\n              <label className=\"sm:col-span-2\">\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldDescription}</span>\n                <textarea rows={2} value={form.description ?? \"\"} onChange={e => setField(\"description\", e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={closeModal}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                {txt.cancel}\n              </button>\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Products page written\"","explanation":"Write the full Product List page with CRUD UI","goal":"Create product list page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"3e263b4e-e1e1-4ce8-889e-12737b509e9a","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:05:59.816Z","parentId":"c403c19b-a980-4ff0-a76f-737dc6d9bdfa"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"32b6ba32-6dc4-427f-b7c8-ceff162ed839","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_013RCmV9e1baUHsrk5w89Ak9","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/categories/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"পণ্য ক্যাটাগরি\\\",\\n    addCategory: \\\"নতুন ক্যাটাগরি\\\",\\n    noCategories: \\\"কোনো ক্যাটাগরি নেই।\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    name: \\\"নাম\\\",\\n    slug: \\\"স্লাগ\\\",\\n    products: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    edit: \\\"সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    delete: \\\"মুছুন\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"এই ক্যাটাগরি মুছে ফেলবেন? পণ্যগুলো 'আন ক্যাটাগরাইজড' হবে।\\\",\\n    modalAdd: \\\"নতুন ক্যাটাগরি\\\",\\n    modalEdit: \\\"ক্যাটাগরি সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    fieldName: \\\"নাম *\\\",\\n    fieldDesc: \\\"বিবরণ\\\",\\n    fieldSortOrder: \\\"সাজানোর ক্রম\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সংরক্ষণ\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Product Categories\\\",\\n    addCategory: \\\"New Category\\\",\\n    noCategories: \\\"No categories yet.\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Name\\\",\\n    slug: \\\"Slug\\\",\\n    products: \\\"Products\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    edit: \\\"Edit\\\",\\n    delete: \\\"Delete\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"Delete this category? Products will become uncategorized.\\\",\\n    modalAdd: \\\"New Category\\\",\\n    modalEdit: \\\"Edit Category\\\",\\n    fieldName: \\\"Name *\\\",\\n    fieldDesc: \\\"Description\\\",\\n    fieldSortOrder: \\\"Sort Order\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Category = { id: number; name: string; slug: string; description: string | null; sort_order: number; product_count: number };\\ntype FormState = { name: string; description: string; sort_order: number };\\n\\nexport default function CategoriesPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n\\n  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<\\\"add\\\" | \\\"edit\\\" | null>(null);\\n  const [editId, setEditId] = useState<number | null>(null);\\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormState>({ name: \\\"\\\", description: \\\"\\\", sort_order: 0 });\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n  const [formError, setFormError] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const fetchCategories = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/categories`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setCategories(d.data ?? []);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchCategories(); }, [fetchCategories]);\\n\\n  const openAdd = () => {\\n    setForm({ name: \\\"\\\", description: \\\"\\\", sort_order: 0 });\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    setEditId(null);\\n    setModal(\\\"add\\\");\\n  };\\n  const openEdit = (c: Category) => {\\n    setForm({ name: c.name, description: c.description ?? \\\"\\\", sort_order: c.sort_order });\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    setEditId(c.id);\\n    setModal(\\\"edit\\\");\\n  };\\n  const closeModal = () => { setModal(null); setEditId(null); };\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    if (!form.name.trim()) {\\n      setFormError(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"নাম আবশ্যক।\\\" : \\\"Name is required.\\\");\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    setFormError(\\\"\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const url    = modal === \\\"edit\\\" ? `${API}/categories/${editId}` : `${API}/categories`;\\n      const method = modal === \\\"edit\\\" ? \\\"PUT\\\" : \\\"POST\\\";\\n      const res = await fetch(url, {\\n        method,\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify(form),\\n      });\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      if (!res.ok) {\\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\\n        setFormError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      closeModal();\\n      void fetchCategories();\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {\\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmDelete)) return;\\n    await fetch(`${API}/categories/${id}`, {\\n      method: \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n    });\\n    void fetchCategories();\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"product-categories\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"products\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"flex justify-end mb-4\\\">\\n        <button onClick={openAdd}\\n          className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n          + {txt.addCategory}\\n        </button>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.name}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.slug}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">{txt.products}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.actions}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : categories.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noCategories}</td></tr>\\n            ) : categories.map(c => (\\n              <tr key={c.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] transition-colors\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 font-medium\\\">{c.name}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)] text-xs font-mono\\\">{c.slug}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">{c.product_count}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(c)}\\n                    className=\\\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\\\">\\n                    {txt.edit}\\n                  </button>\\n                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(c.id)}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\">\\n                    {txt.delete}\\n                  </button>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {modal && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeModal()}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{modal === \\\"add\\\" ? txt.modalAdd : txt.modalEdit}</h3>\\n            {formError && <div className=\\\"mb-3 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-400\\\">{formError}</div>}\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldName}</span>\\n                <input value={form.name} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldDesc}</span>\\n                <textarea rows={2} value={form.description} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fieldSortOrder}</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" value={form.sort_order} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, sort_order: Number(e.target.value) }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={closeModal} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving} className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Categories page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write the Product Categories page\", \"goal\": \"Create categories page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"d3f3e44d-0f27-4d24-8b35-217eae339f8c","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:06:36.584Z","parentId":"ff0c94d8-789e-4993-aef1-875d335dfec6"}

Products will become uncategorized.\",\n    modalAdd: \"New Category\",\n    modalEdit: \"Edit Category\",\n    fieldName: \"Name *\",\n    fieldDesc: \"Description\",\n    fieldSortOrder: \"Sort Order\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Category = { id: number; name: string; slug: string; description: string | null; sort_order: number; product_count: number };\ntype FormState = { name: string; description: string; sort_order: number };\n\nexport default function CategoriesPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n\n  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<\"add\" | \"edit\" | null>(null);\n  const [editId, setEditId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormState>({ name: \"\", description: \"\", sort_order: 0 });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [formError, setFormError] = useState(\"\");\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const fetchCategories = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/categories`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setCategories(d.data ?? []);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchCategories(); }, [fetchCategories]);\n\n  const openAdd = () => {\n    setForm({ name: \"\", description: \"\", sort_order: 0 });\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    setEditId(null);\n    setModal(\"add\");\n  };\n  const openEdit = (c: Category) => {\n    setForm({ name: c.name, description: c.description ?? \"\", sort_order: c.sort_order });\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    setEditId(c.id);\n    setModal(\"edit\");\n  };\n  const closeModal = () => { setModal(null); setEditId(null); };\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!form.name.trim()) {\n      setFormError(locale === \"bn\" ? \"নাম আবশ্যক।\" : \"Name is required.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    setSaving(true);\n    setFormError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const url    = modal === \"edit\" ? `${API}/categories/${editId}` : `${API}/categories`;\n      const method = modal === \"edit\" ? \"PUT\" : \"POST\";\n      const res = await fetch(url, {\n        method,\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify(form),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\n        setFormError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\n        return;\n      }\n      closeModal();\n      void fetchCategories();\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmDelete)) return;\n    await fetch(`${API}/categories/${id}`, {\n      method: \"DELETE\",\n      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n    });\n    void fetchCategories();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"product-categories\" defaultExpandedKey=\"products\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      <div className=\"flex justify-end mb-4\">\n        <button onClick={openAdd}\n          className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n          + {txt.addCategory}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.name}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.slug}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">{txt.products}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : categories.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noCategories}</td></tr>\n            ) : categories.map(c => (\n              <tr key={c.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] transition-colors\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-medium\">{c.name}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)] text-xs font-mono\">{c.slug}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">{c.product_count}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <button onClick={() => openEdit(c)}\n                    className=\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                    {txt.edit}\n                  </button>\n                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(c.id)}\n                    className=\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\">\n                    {txt.delete}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {modal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeModal()}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{modal === \"add\" ? txt.modalAdd : txt.modalEdit}</h3>\n            {formError && <div className=\"mb-3 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-400\">{formError}</div>}\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldName}</span>\n                <input value={form.name} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldDesc}</span>\n                <textarea rows={2} value={form.description} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fieldSortOrder}</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" value={form.sort_order} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, sort_order: Number(e.target.value) }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={closeModal} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving} className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Categories page done\"","explanation":"Write the Product Categories page","goal":"Create categories page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"cc6d825e-e10e-451e-9b49-9f3aede13268","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:06:36.643Z","parentId":"61895c07-61ed-4e6a-a962-35274db44366"}

{"type":"tool.execution_complete","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01QLfcQ7mw8B5ufxs1f9nxQ6","success":true},"id":"5529635f-2120-4f89-a8d3-e1126abdba59","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:06:44.792Z","parentId":"47e448fa-5019-4e5e-93ed-9a6d55edf096"}
{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"9430c6a5-2bed-40cc-8c8f-4a6e424ed6e3","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01HkxfDAFLNLdVgcootS9A36","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/stock/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"স্টক ম্যানেজমেন্ট\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noProducts: \\\"স্টক ট্র্যাকযোগ্য কোনো পণ্য নেই।\\\",\\n    name: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    currentStock: \\\"বর্তমান স্টক\\\",\\n    lowAlert: \\\"সতর্কতা সীমা\\\",\\n    adjust: \\\"পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    reason: \\\"কারণ\\\",\\n    adjustTitle: \\\"স্টক পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    adjustLabel: \\\"পরিবর্তনের পরিমাণ (+ বা -)\\\",\\n    reasonLabel: \\\"কারণ\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সংরক্ষণ\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Stock Management\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noProducts: \\\"No stock-tracked products.\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Product\\\",\\n    currentStock: \\\"Current Stock\\\",\\n    lowAlert: \\\"Low Alert\\\",\\n    adjust: \\\"Adjust\\\",\\n    reason: \\\"Reason\\\",\\n    adjustTitle: \\\"Adjust Stock\\\",\\n    adjustLabel: \\\"Adjustment (+ or -)\\\",\\n    reasonLabel: \\\"Reason\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Product = {\\n  id: number; name: string; sku: string | null;\\n  stock: number; low_stock_alert: number; unit: string;\\n};\\n\\nexport default function StockPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n\\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [adjusting, setAdjusting] = useState<Product | null>(null);\\n  const [amount, setAmount] = useState<number>(0);\\n  const [reason, setReason] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const fetchStock = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      // Fetch all products with track_stock, get multiple pages if needed\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/products?per_page=100`, {\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        const tracked = (d.data as Product[]).filter(() => true); // track_stock comes from backend filter\\n        setProducts(tracked);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchStock(); }, [fetchStock]);\\n\\n  const openAdjust = (p: Product) => { setAdjusting(p); setAmount(0); setReason(\\\"\\\"); };\\n  const closeAdjust = () => setAdjusting(null);\\n\\n  const handleAdjust = async () => {\\n    if (!adjusting || amount === 0) return;\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    try {\\n      await fetch(`${API}/products/${adjusting.id}/adjust-stock`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ amount, reason }),\\n      });\\n      closeAdjust();\\n      void fetchStock();\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"stock-management\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"products\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.name}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">{txt.currentStock}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.lowAlert}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.adjust}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : products.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noProducts}</td></tr>\\n            ) : products.map(p => {\\n              const isLow = p.stock <= p.low_stock_alert;\\n              return (\\n                <tr key={p.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                  <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                    <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{p.name}</p>\\n                    {p.sku && <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">SKU: {p.sku}</p>}\\n                  </td>\\n                  <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">\\n                    <span className={`text-lg font-bold ${isLow ? \\\"text-red-400\\\" : \\\"text-emerald-400\\\"}`}>\\n                      {p.stock}\\n                    </span>\\n                    <span className=\\\"ml-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{p.unit}</span>\\n                    {isLow && (\\n                      <span className=\\\"ml-2 rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-red-400\\\">\\n                        {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"কম স্টক\\\" : \\\"Low\\\"}\\n                      </span>\\n                    )}\\n                  </td>\\n                  <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                    {p.low_stock_alert} {p.unit}\\n                  </td>\\n                  <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                    <button onClick={() => openAdjust(p)}\\n                      className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)]/10\\\">\\n                      {txt.adjust}\\n                    </button>\\n                  </td>\\n                </tr>\\n              );\\n            })}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Adjust Modal */}\\n      {adjusting && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeAdjust()}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.adjustTitle}</h3>\\n            <p className=\\\"mb-4 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{adjusting.name}</p>\\n            <div className=\\\"mb-3\\\">\\n              <p className=\\\"text-center text-3xl font-bold\\\">{adjusting.stock} <span className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{adjusting.unit}</span></p>\\n              <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-center text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"বর্তমান স্টক\\\" : \\\"Current Stock\\\"}</p>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.adjustLabel}</span>\\n                <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n                  <button onClick={() => setAmount(a => a - 1)}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">−</button>\\n                  <input type=\\\"number\\\" value={amount} onChange={e => setAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\\n                    className=\\\"flex-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-center text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                  <button onClick={() => setAmount(a => a + 1)}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">+</button>\\n                </div>\\n                {amount !== 0 && (\\n                  <p className={`mt-1 text-center text-xs ${amount > 0 ? \\\"text-emerald-400\\\" : \\\"text-red-400\\\"}`}>\\n                    → {adjusting.stock + amount} {adjusting.unit}\\n                  </p>\\n                )}\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.reasonLabel}</span>\\n                <input value={reason} onChange={e => setReason(e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={closeAdjust} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                {txt.cancel}\\n              </button>\\n              <button onClick={handleAdjust} disabled={saving || amount === 0}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Stock page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write the Stock Management page\", \"goal\": \"Create stock management page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"840ea62f-1246-4bbd-b2b3-ec105b37468f","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:07:20.010Z","parentId":"5529635f-2120-4f89-a8d3-e1126abdba59"}
