{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01HkxfDAFLNLdVgcootS9A36","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/stock/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"স্টক ম্যানেজমেন্ট\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noProducts: \"স্টক ট্র্যাকযোগ্য কোনো পণ্য নেই।\",\n    name: \"পণ্য\",\n    currentStock: \"বর্তমান স্টক\",\n    lowAlert: \"সতর্কতা সীমা\",\n    adjust: \"পরিবর্তন\",\n    reason: \"কারণ\",\n    adjustTitle: \"স্টক পরিবর্তন\",\n    adjustLabel: \"পরিবর্তনের পরিমাণ (+ বা -)\",\n    reasonLabel: \"কারণ\",\n    save: \"সংরক্ষণ\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    saving: \"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Stock Management\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noProducts: \"No stock-tracked products.\",\n    name: \"Product\",\n    currentStock: \"Current Stock\",\n    lowAlert: \"Low Alert\",\n    adjust: \"Adjust\",\n    reason: \"Reason\",\n    adjustTitle: \"Adjust Stock\",\n    adjustLabel: \"Adjustment (+ or -)\",\n    reasonLabel: \"Reason\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Product = {\n  id: number; name: string; sku: string | null;\n  stock: number; low_stock_alert: number; unit: string;\n};\n\nexport default function StockPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [adjusting, setAdjusting] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [amount, setAmount] = useState<number>(0);\n  const [reason, setReason] = useState(\"\");\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const fetchStock = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      // Fetch all products with track_stock, get multiple pages if needed\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/products?per_page=100`, {\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        const tracked = (d.data as Product[]).filter(() => true); // track_stock comes from backend filter\n        setProducts(tracked);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchStock(); }, [fetchStock]);\n\n  const openAdjust = (p: Product) => { setAdjusting(p); setAmount(0); setReason(\"\"); };\n  const closeAdjust = () => setAdjusting(null);\n\n  const handleAdjust = async () => {\n    if (!adjusting || amount === 0) return;\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      await fetch(`${API}/products/${adjusting.id}/adjust-stock`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ amount, reason }),\n      });\n      closeAdjust();\n      void fetchStock();\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"stock-management\" defaultExpandedKey=\"products\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.name}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">{txt.currentStock}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.lowAlert}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.adjust}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : products.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noProducts}</td></tr>\n            ) : products.map(p => {\n              const isLow = p.stock <= p.low_stock_alert;\n              return (\n                <tr key={p.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                  <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                    <p className=\"font-medium\">{p.name}</p>\n                    {p.sku && <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">SKU: {p.sku}</p>}\n                  </td>\n                  <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">\n                    <span className={`text-lg font-bold ${isLow ? \"text-red-400\" : \"text-emerald-400\"}`}>\n                      {p.stock}\n                    </span>\n                    <span className=\"ml-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{p.unit}</span>\n                    {isLow && (\n                      <span className=\"ml-2 rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-red-400\">\n                        {locale === \"bn\" ? \"কম স্টক\" : \"Low\"}\n                      </span>\n                    )}\n                  </td>\n                  <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center hidden md:table-cell text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                    {p.low_stock_alert} {p.unit}\n                  </td>\n                  <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                    <button onClick={() => openAdjust(p)}\n                      className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)]/10\">\n                      {txt.adjust}\n                    </button>\n                  </td>\n                </tr>\n              );\n            })}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Adjust Modal */}\n      {adjusting && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeAdjust()}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\">{txt.adjustTitle}</h3>\n            <p className=\"mb-4 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{adjusting.name}</p>\n            <div className=\"mb-3\">\n              <p className=\"text-center text-3xl font-bold\">{adjusting.stock} <span className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{adjusting.unit}</span></p>\n              <p className=\"mt-1 text-center text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{locale === \"bn\" ? \"বর্তমান স্টক\" : \"Current Stock\"}</p>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.adjustLabel}</span>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                  <button onClick={() => setAmount(a => a - 1)}\n                    className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">−</button>\n                  <input type=\"number\" value={amount} onChange={e => setAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\n                    className=\"flex-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-center text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                  <button onClick={() => setAmount(a => a + 1)}\n                    className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">+</button>\n                </div>\n                {amount !== 0 && (\n                  <p className={`mt-1 text-center text-xs ${amount > 0 ? \"text-emerald-400\" : \"text-red-400\"}`}>\n                    → {adjusting.stock + amount} {adjusting.unit}\n                  </p>\n                )}\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.reasonLabel}</span>\n                <input value={reason} onChange={e => setReason(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={closeAdjust} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                {txt.cancel}\n              </button>\n              <button onClick={handleAdjust} disabled={saving || amount === 0}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Stock page done\"","explanation":"Write the Stock Management page","goal":"Create stock management page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"66811550-acea-4c87-80da-ee435344bddc","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:07:20.080Z","parentId":"17575682-1495-45b7-a8e0-b967e7b87de0"}

\"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport Link from \\\"next/link\\\";\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst STATUSES = [\\\"pending\\\",\\\"confirmed\\\",\\\"processing\\\",\\\"shipped\\\",\\\"delivered\\\",\\\"cancelled\\\",\\\"returned\\\"] as const;\\ntype Status = typeof STATUSES[number];\\n\\nconst statusColor: Record<Status, string> = {\\n  pending:    \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  confirmed:  \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  processing: \\\"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\\\",\\n  shipped:    \\\"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\\\",\\n  delivered:  \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:  \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  returned:   \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst riskColor: Record<string, string> = {\\n  low:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  medium: \\\"bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  high:   \\\"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"অর্ডার তালিকা\\\",\\n    createOrder: \\\"নতুন অর্ডার\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"কোনো অর্ডার নেই।\\\",\\n    search: \\\"অর্ডার নম্বর / নাম / ফোন\\\",\\n    allStatuses: \\\"সব স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    bulkUpdate: \\\"বাল্ক স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    applyBulk: \\\"প্রয়োগ করুন\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"গ্রাহক\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    risk: \\\"ঝুঁকি\\\",\\n    date: \\\"তারিখ\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    view: \\\"দেখুন\\\",\\n    statusNames: { pending:\\\"অপেক্ষমান\\\", confirmed:\\\"নিশ্চিত\\\", processing:\\\"প্রক্রিয়াধীন\\\",\\n                   shipped:\\\"পাঠানো হয়েছে\\\", delivered:\\\"ডেলিভারি হয়েছে\\\", cancelled:\\\"বাতিল\\\", returned:\\\"ফেরত\\\" },\\n    riskNames: { low:\\\"কম\\\", medium:\\\"মাঝারি\\\", high:\\\"উচ্চ\\\" },\\n    totalOrders: \\\"মোট অর্ডার\\\",\\n    todayOrders: \\\"আজকের অর্ডার\\\",\\n    pendingOrders: \\\"অপেক্ষমান\\\",\\n    deliveredOrders: \\\"ডেলিভারি হয়েছে\\\",\\n    changeStatusTitle: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    note: \\\"নোট\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সংরক্ষণ\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Order List\\\",\\n    createOrder: \\\"New Order\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"No orders found.\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Order no / name / phone\\\",\\n    allStatuses: \\\"All Statuses\\\",\\n    bulkUpdate: \\\"Bulk Status Update\\\",\\n    applyBulk: \\\"Apply\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"Customer\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    risk: \\\"Risk\\\",\\n    date: \\\"Date\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    view: \\\"View\\\",\\n    statusNames: { pending:\\\"Pending\\\", confirmed:\\\"Confirmed\\\", processing:\\\"Processing\\\",\\n                   shipped:\\\"Shipped\\\", delivered:\\\"Delivered\\\", cancelled:\\\"Cancelled\\\", returned:\\\"Returned\\\" },\\n    riskNames: { low:\\\"Low\\\", medium:\\\"Medium\\\", high:\\\"High\\\" },\\n    totalOrders: \\\"Total Orders\\\",\\n    todayOrders: \\\"Today\\\",\\n    pendingOrders: \\\"Pending\\\",\\n    deliveredOrders: \\\"Delivered\\\",\\n    changeStatusTitle: \\\"Change Status\\\",\\n    note: \\\"Note\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\\n  customer_phone: string; total: string; status: Status;\\n  risk_level: string; created_at: string; payment_status: string;\\n};\\ntype Stats = { total: number; today: number; pending: number; delivered: number };\\n\\nexport default function OrdersPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n\\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, today: 0, pending: 0, delivered: 0 });\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>(\\\"all\\\");\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n\\n  // bulk\\n  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\\n  const [bulkStatus, setBulkStatus] = useState<Status>(\\\"confirmed\\\");\\n  const [bulkLoading, setBulkLoading] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // status change modal\\n  const [statusModal, setStatusModal] = useState<Order | null>(null);\\n  const [newStatus, setNewStatus] = useState<Status>(\\\"confirmed\\\");\\n  const [statusNote, setStatusNote] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [statusSaving, setStatusSaving] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"15\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      if (filterStatus !== \\\"all\\\") params.set(\\\"status\\\", filterStatus);\\n\\n      const [ordRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\\n        fetch(`${API}/orders?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n        fetch(`${API}/orders/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n      ]);\\n\\n      if (ordRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await ordRes.json();\\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n      if (statRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await statRes.json();\\n        setStats({ total: d.data?.total ?? 0, today: d.data?.today ?? 0, pending: d.data?.pending ?? 0, delivered: d.data?.delivered ?? 0 });\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [page, search, filterStatus, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); setSelected(new Set()); }, [search, filterStatus]);\\n\\n  const toggleSelect = (id: number) => setSelected(prev => {\\n    const next = new Set(prev);\\n    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id);\\n    return next;\\n  });\\n  const toggleAll = () => setSelected(prev => prev.size === orders.length ? new Set() : new Set(orders.map(o => o.id)));\\n\\n  const applyBulk = async () => {\\n    if (selected.size === 0) return;\\n    setBulkLoading(true);\\n    await fetch(`${API}/orders/bulk-status`, {\\n      method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n      headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      body: JSON.stringify({ ids: [...selected], status: bulkStatus }),\\n    });\\n    setSelected(new Set());\\n    setBulkLoading(false);\\n    void fetchData();\\n  };\\n\\n  const openStatusModal = (o: Order) => { setStatusModal(o); setNewStatus(o.status); setStatusNote(\\\"\\\"); };\\n  const closeStatusModal = () => setStatusModal(null);\\n\\n  const handleStatusSave = async () => {\\n    if (!statusModal) return;\\n    setStatusSaving(true);\\n    await fetch(`${API}/orders/${statusModal.id}/status`, {\\n      method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n      headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus, note: statusNote }),\\n    });\\n    setStatusSaving(false);\\n    closeStatusModal();\\n    void fetchData();\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (d: string) => new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-US\\\", { day: \\\"2-digit\\\", month: \\\"short\\\", year: \\\"2-digit\\\" });\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Stats */}\\n      <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-4\\\">\\n        {[\\n          { label: txt.totalOrders,     value: stats.total,     color: \\\"bg-[#0f7c7b]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.todayOrders,     value: stats.today,     color: \\\"bg-[#2f7ec1]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.pendingOrders,   value: stats.pending,   color: \\\"bg-[#b8860b]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.deliveredOrders, value: stats.delivered, color: \\\"bg-[#196c40]\\\" },\\n        ].map(c => (\\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-white/80\\\">{c.label}</p>\\n            <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\\\">{loading ? \\\"...\\\" : c.value}</p>\\n          </article>\\n        ))}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input\\n          type=\\\"text\\\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\"\\n        />\\n        <select value={filterStatus} onChange={e => setFilterStatus(e.target.value)}\\n          className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n          <option value=\\\"all\\\">{txt.allStatuses}</option>\\n          {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\\n        </select>\\n\\n        {/* Bulk update strip */}\\n        {selected.size > 0 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/30 bg-[var(--accent)]/5 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm\\\">\\n            <span className=\\\"text-[var(--accent)] font-semibold\\\">{selected.size}</span>\\n            <select value={bulkStatus} onChange={e => setBulkStatus(e.target.value as Status)}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-xs\\\">\\n              {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\\n            </select>\\n            <button onClick={applyBulk} disabled={bulkLoading}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-lg bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n              {txt.applyBulk}\\n            </button>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n\\n        <Link href=\\\"/dashboard/orders/create\\\"\\n          className=\\\"ml-auto rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n          + {txt.createOrder}\\n        </Link>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Table */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-3 py-3 w-8\\\">\\n                <input type=\\\"checkbox\\\" checked={selected.size === orders.length && orders.length > 0}\\n                  onChange={toggleAll} className=\\\"accent-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-3 checked={selected.has(o.id)} onChange={() => toggleSelect(o.id)}\\n                    className=\\\"accent-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-3 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{o.order_number}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-3 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{o.customer_name ??     </button>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">\\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[o.risk_level] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                    {txt.riskNames[o.risk_level as keyof typeof txt.riskNames] ?? o.risk_level}\\n                  </span>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-3 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/orders/${o.id}`}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\\\">\\n                    {txt.view}\\n                  </Link>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"টি অর্ডার\\\" : \\\"orders\\\"}</p>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n         </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Status change modal */}\\n      {statusModal && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeStatusModal()}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.changeStatusTitle}</h3>\\n            <p className=\\\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{statusModal.order_number}</p>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.status}</span>\\n                <select value={newStatus} onChange={e => setNewStatus(e.target.value as Status)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.note}</span>\\n                <textarea rows={2} value={statusNote} onChange={e => setStatusNote(e.target.value)}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={closeStatusModal} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={handleStatusSave} disabled={statusSaving}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {statusSaving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Orders list {"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01Ccto4SvrnzTWV6t23VmafU","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst STATUSES = [\"pending\",\"confirmed\",\"processing\",\"shipped\",\"delivered\",\"cancelled\",\"returned\"] as const;\ntype Status = typeof STATUSES[number];\n\nconst statusColor: Record<Status, string> = {\n  pending:    \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  confirmed:  \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  processing: \"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\",\n  shipped:    \"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\",\n  delivered:  \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  cancelled:  \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  returned:   \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n};\n\nconst riskColor: Record<string, string> = {\n  low:    \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\",\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\",\n};\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"অর্ডার তালিকা\",\n    createOrder: \"নতুন অর্ডার\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noOrders: \"কোনো অর্ডার নেই।\",\n    search: \"অর্ডার নম্বর / নাম / ফোন\",\n    allStatuses: \"সব স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    bulkUpdate: \"বাল্ক স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\",\n    applyBulk: \"প্রয়োগ করুন\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    customer: \"গ্রাহক\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    risk: \"ঝুঁকি\",\n    date: \"তারিখ\",\n    actions: \"অ্যাকশন\",\n    view: \"দেখুন\",\n    statusNames: { pending:\"অপেক্ষমান\", confirmed:\"নিশ্চিত\", processing:\"প্রক্রিয়াধীন\",\n                   shipped:\"পাঠানো হয়েছে\", delivered:\"ডেলিভারি হয়েছে\", cancelled:\"বাতিল\", returned:\"ফেরত\" },\n    riskNames: { low:\"কম\", medium:\"মাঝারি\", high:\"উচ্চ\" },\n    totalOrders: \"মোট অর্ডার\",\n    todayOrders: \"আজকের অর্ডার\",\n    pendingOrders: \"অপেক্ষমান\",\n    deliveredOrders: \"ডেলিভারি হয়েছে\",\n    changeStatusTitle: \"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\",\n    note: \"নোট\",\n    save: \"সংরক্ষণ\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    saving: \"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Order List\",\n    createOrder: \"New Order\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders found.\",\n    search: \"Order no / name / phone\",\n    allStatuses: \"All Statuses\",\n    bulkUpdate: \"Bulk Status Update\",\n    applyBulk: \"Apply\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    customer: \"Customer\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    risk: \"Risk\",\n    date: \"Date\",\n    actions: \"Actions\",\n    view: \"View\",\n    statusNames: { pending:\"Pending\", confirmed:\"Confirmed\", processing:\"Processing\",\n                   shipped:\"Shipped\", delivered:\"Delivered\", cancelled:\"Cancelled\", returned:\"Returned\" },\n    riskNames: { low:\"Low\", medium:\"Medium\", high:\"High\" },\n    totalOrders: \"Total Orders\",\n    todayOrders: \"Today\",\n    pendingOrders: \"Pending\",\n    deliveredOrders: \"Delivered\",\n    changeStatusTitle: \"Change Status\",\n    note: \"Note\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\n  customer_phone: string; total: string; status: Status;\n  risk_level: string; created_at: string; payment_status: string;\n};\ntype Stats = { total: number; today: number; pending: number; delivered: number };\n\nexport default function OrdersPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, today: 0, pending: 0, delivered: 0 });\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n\n  // bulk\n  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\n  const [bulkStatus, setBulkStatus] = useState<Status>(\"confirmed\");\n  const [bulkLoading, setBulkLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  // status change modal\n  const [statusModal, setStatusModal] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n  const [newStatus, setNewStatus] = useState<Status>(\"confirmed\");\n  const [statusNote, setStatusNote] = useState(\"\");\n  const [statusSaving, setStatusSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"15\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      if (filterStatus !== \"all\") params.set(\"status\", filterStatus);\n\n      const [ordRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\n        fetch(`${API}/orders?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n        fetch(`${API}/orders/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n      ]);\n\n      if (ordRes.ok) {\n        const d = await ordRes.json();\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n      if (statRes.ok) {\n        const d = await statRes.json();\n        setStats({ total: d.data?.total ?? 0, today: d.data?.today ?? 0, pending: d.data?.pending ?? 0, delivered: d.data?.delivered ?? 0 });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, filterStatus, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); setSelected(new Set()); }, [search, filterStatus]);\n\n  const toggleSelect = (id: number) => setSelected(prev => {\n    const next = new Set(prev);\n    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id);\n    return next;\n  });\n  const toggleAll = () => setSelected(prev => prev.size === orders.length ? new Set() : new Set(orders.map(o => o.id)));\n\n  const applyBulk = async () => {\n    if (selected.size === 0) return;\n    setBulkLoading(true);\n    await fetch(`${API}/orders/bulk-status`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ ids: [...selected], status: bulkStatus }),\n    });\n    setSelected(new Set());\n    setBulkLoading(false);\n    void fetchData();\n  };\n\n  const openStatusModal = (o: Order) => { setStatusModal(o); setNewStatus(o.status); setStatusNote(\"\"); };\n  const closeStatusModal = () => setStatusModal(null);\n\n  const handleStatusSave = async () => {\n    if (!statusModal) return;\n    setStatusSaving(true);\n    await fetch(`${API}/orders/${statusModal.id}/status`, {\n      method: \"PUT\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus, note: statusNote }),\n    });\n    setStatusSaving(false);\n    closeStatusModal();\n    void fetchData();\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (d: string) => new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-US\", { day: \"2-digit\", month: \"short\", year: \"2-digit\" });\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Stats */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-4\">\n        {[\n          { label: txt.totalOrders,     value: stats.total,     color: \"bg-[#0f7c7b]\" },\n          { label: txt.todayOrders,     value: stats.today,     color: \"bg-[#2f7ec1]\" },\n          { label: txt.pendingOrders,   value: stats.pending,   color: \"bg-[#b8860b]\" },\n          { label: txt.deliveredOrders, value: stats.delivered, color: \"bg-[#196c40]\" },\n        ].map(c => (\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-white/80\">{c.label}</p>\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\">{loading ? \"...\" : c.value}</p>\n          </article>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\"\n        />\n        <select value={filterStatus} onChange={e => setFilterStatus(e.target.value)}\n          className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n          <option value=\"all\">{txt.allStatuses}</option>\n          {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\n        </select>\n\n        {/* Bulk update strip */}\n        {selected.size > 0 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/30 bg-[var(--accent)]/5 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm\">\n            <span className=\"text-[var(--accent)] font-semibold\">{selected.size}</span>\n            <select value={bulkStatus} onChange={e => setBulkStatus(e.target.value as Status)}\n              className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-xs\">\n              {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\n            </select>\n            <button onClick={applyBulk} disabled={bulkLoading}\n              className=\"rounded-lg bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n              {txt.applyBulk}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        <Link href=\"/dashboard/orders/create\"\n          className=\"ml-auto rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n          + {txt.createOrder}\n        </Link>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3 w-8\">\n                <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={selected.size === orders.length && orders.length > 0}\n                  onChange={toggleAll} className=\"accent-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3\">{txt.customer}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3\">{txt.status}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.risk}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.date}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-3 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={8} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={8} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3\">\n                  <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={selected.has(o.id)} onChange={() => toggleSelect(o.id)}\n                    className=\"accent-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{o.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3\">\n                  <button onClick={() => openStatusModal(o)}\n                    className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-opacity hover:opacity-80 ${statusColor[o.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                    {txt.statusNames[o.status]}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[o.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                    {txt.riskNames[o.risk_level as keyof typeof txt.riskNames] ?? o.risk_level}\n                  </span>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-3 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/orders/${o.id}`}\n                    className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                    {txt.view}\n                  </Link>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"টি অর্ডার\" : \"orders\"}</p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Status change modal */}\n      {statusModal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && closeStatusModal()}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\">{txt.changeStatusTitle}</h3>\n            <p className=\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{statusModal.order_number}</p>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.status}</span>\n                <select value={newStatus} onChange={e => setNewStatus(e.target.value as Status)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  {STATUSES.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{txt.statusNames[s]}</option>)}\n                </select>\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.note}</span>\n                <textarea rows={2} value={statusNote} onChange={e => setStatusNote(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={closeStatusModal} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={handleStatusSave} disabled={statusSaving}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {statusSaving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Orders list page done\"","explanation":"Write the Order List page with bulk actions and status change modal","goal":"Create order list page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"122a1eb1-6190-4063-aa0b-153109bc7764","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:08:28.108Z","parentId":"d9e4a261-7bd2-4353-8da9-5db4f7508851"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"92bcab31-ca4f-4642-aa50-ac83cf30fb7f","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01CF7QMmG6nsnXHz9sibznhc","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/create/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useRouter } from \\\"next/navigation\\\";\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"নতুন অর্ডার\\\",\\n    step1: \\\"গ্রাহকের তথ্য\\\",\\n    step2: \\\"পণ্য যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    step3: \\\"পেমেন্ট ও শিপিং\\\",\\n    next: \\\"পরবর্তী\\\",\\n    back: \\\"পেছনে\\\",\\n    submit: \\\"অর্ডার তৈরি করুন\\\",\\n    submitting: \\\"তৈরি হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    // step 1\\n    customerPhone: \\\"ফোন নম্বর *\\\",\\n    customerName: \\\"নাম\\\",\\n    customerAddress: \\\"ঠিকানা\\\",\\n    customerDistrict: \\\"জেলা\\\",\\n    customerThana: \\\"থানা / উপজেলা\\\",\\n    source: \\\"উৎস\\\",\\n    // step 2\\n    searchProduct: \\\"পণ্য খুঁজুন...\\\",\\n    addItem: \\\"যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"কোনো পণ্য যোগ করা হয়নি।\\\",\\n    itemName: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"পরিমাণ\\\",\\n    price: \\\"একক মূল্য\\\",\\n    itemTotal: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    remove: \\\"বাদ দিন\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"সাব-টোটাল\\\",\\n    // step 3\\n    shippingCharge: \\\"শিপিং চার্জ (৳)\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"ছাড় (৳)\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"নোট\\\",\\n    orderTotal: \\\"অর্ডার মোট\\\",\\n    cod: \\\"ক্যাশ অন ডেলিভারি\\\",\\n    online: \\\"অনলাইন ট্রান্সফার\\\",\\n    bkash: \\\"বিকাশ\\\",\\n    due: \\\"বাকি\\\",\\n    partial: \\\"আংশিক\\\",\\n    paid: \\\"পেইড\\\",\\n    manual: \\\"ম্যানুয়াল\\\",\\n    facebook_inbox: \\\"ফেসবুক ইনবক্স\\\",\\n    landing_page: \\\"ল্যান্ডিং পেজ\\\",\\n    required: \\\"এই মাঠটি আবশ্যক।\\\",\\n    itemRequired: \\\"কমপক্ষে একটি পণ্য যোগ করুন।\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"New Order\\\",\\n    step1: \\\"Customer Info\\\",\\n    step2: \\\"Add Products\\\",\\n    step3: \\\"Payment & Shipping\\\",\\n    next: \\\"Next\\\",\\n    back: \\\"Back\\\",\\n    submit: \\\"Create Order\\\",\\n    submitting: \\\"Creating...\\\",\\n    customerPhone: \\\"Phone *\\\",\\n    customerName: \\\"Name\\\",\\n    customerAddress: \\\"Address\\\",\\n    customerDistrict: \\\"District\\\",\\n    customerThana: \\\"Thana / Upazila\\\",\\n    source: \\\"Source\\\",\\n    searchProduct: \\\"Search product...\\\",\\n    addItem: \\\"Add\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"No products added yet.\\\",\\n    itemName: \\\"Product\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"Qty\\\",\\n    price: \\\"Unit Price\\\",\\n    itemTotal: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    remove: \\\"Remove\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"Subtotal\\\",\\n    shippingCharge: \\\"Shipping Charge (৳)\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"Discount (৳)\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"Payment Method\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"Payment Status\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"Notes\\\",\\n    orderTotal: \\\"Order Total\\\",\\n    cod: \\\"Cash on Delivery\\\",\\n    online: \\\"Online Transfer\\\",\\n    bkash: \\\"Bkash\\\",\\n    due: \\\"Due\\\",\\n    partial: \\\"Partial\\\",\\n    paid: \\\"Paid\\\",\\n    manual: \\\"Manual\\\",\\n    facebook_inbox: \\\"Facebook Inbox\\\",\\n    landing_page: \\\"Landing Page\\\",\\n    required: \\\"This field is required.\\\",\\n    itemRequired: \\\"Add at least one product.\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype ProductSearchResult = { id: number; name: string; sku: string | null; selling_price: string; unit: string };\\ntype OrderItem = { product_id: number | null; product_name: string; sku: string; quantity: number; unit_price: number };\\n\\nexport default function CreateOrderPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const router = useRouter();\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [step, setStep] = useState<1 | 2 | 3>(1);\\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // Step 1\\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [name, setName] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [address, setAddress] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [district, setDistrict] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [thana, setThana] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [source, setSource] = useState<\\\"manual\\\" | \\\"facebook_inbox\\\" | \\\"landing_page\\\">(\\\"manual\\\");\\n\\n  // Step 2\\n  const [items, setItems] = useState<OrderItem[]>([]);\\n  const [productSearch, setProductSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [searchResults, setSearchResults] = useState<ProductSearchResult[]>([]);\\n  const [searchLoading, setSearchLoading] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // Step 3\\n  const [shippingCharge, setShippingCharge] = useState(0);\\n  const [discount, setDiscount] = useState(0);\\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState<\\\"cod\\\" | \\\"online\\\" | \\\"bkash\\\">(\\\"cod\\\");\\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState<\\\"due\\\" | \\\"partial\\\" | \\\"paid\\\">(\\\"due\\\");\\n  const [notes, setNotes] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const subtotal = items.reduce((s, i) => s + i.quantity * i.unit_price, 0);\\n  const orderTotal = Math.max(0, subtotal + shippingCharge - discount);\\n\\n  const searchProducts = useCallback(async (q: string) => {\\n    if (!q.trim()) { setSearchResults([]); return; }\\n    setSearchLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/products?search=${encodeURIComponent(q)}&status=active&per_page=8`, {\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setSearchResults(d.data ?? []);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setSearchLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const t = setTimeout(() => void searchProducts(productSearch), 300);\\n    return () => clearTimeout(t);\\n  }, [productSearch, searchProducts]);\\n\\n  const addProduct = (p: ProductSearchResult) => {\\n    setItems(prev => {\\n      const existing = prev.find(i => i.product_id === p.id);\\n      if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.product_id === p.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\\n      return [...prev, { product_id: p.id, product_name: p.name, sku: p.sku ?? \\\"\\\", quantity: 1, unit_price: Number(p.selling_price) }];\\n    });\\n    setProductSearch(\\\"\\\");\\n    setSearchResults([]);\\n  };\\n\\n  const updateItem = (idx: number, field: keyof OrderItem, value: number | string) => {\\n    setItems(prev => prev.map((item, i) => i === idx ? { ...item, [field]: value } : item));\\n  };\\n\\n  const removeItem = (idx: number) => setItems(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== idx));\\n\\n  const goNext = () => {\\n    setError(\\\"\\\");\\n    if (step === 1) {\\n      if (!phone.trim()) { setError(txt.required); return; }\\n      setStep(2);\\n    } else if (step === 2) {\\n      if (items.length === 0) { setError(txt.itemRequired); return; }\\n      setStep(3);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleSubmit = async () => {\\n    setError(\\\"\\\");\\n    setSubmitting(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          customer_phone: phone,\\n          customer_name: name || null,\\n          customer_address: address || null,\\n          customer_district: district || null,\\n          customer_thana: thana || null,\\n          source,\\n          payment_method: paymentMethod,\\n          payment_status: paymentStatus,\\n          shipping_charge: shippingCharge,\\n          discount,\\n          notes: notes || null,\\n          items: items.map(i => ({\\n            product_id: i.product_id,\\n            product_name: i.product_name,\\n            sku: i.sku || null,\\n            quantity: i.quantity,\\n            unit_price: i.unit_price,\\n          })),\\n        }),\\n      });\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      if (!res.ok) {\\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\\n        setError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      router.push(\\\"/dashboard/orders\\\");\\n    } finally {\\n      setSubmitting(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const stepLabel = [txt.step1, txt.step2, txt.step3];\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"create-order\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Stepper */}\\n      <div className=\\\"mb-6 flex gap-2\\\">\\n        {[1,2,3].map(s => (\\n          <div key={s} className=\\\"flex-1 text-center\\\">\\n            <div className={`mx-auto mb-1 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-bold transition-colors\\n              ${step === s ? \\\"bg-[var(--accent)] text-white\\\" : step > s ? \\\"bg-emerald-500 text-white\\\" : \\\"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\\\"}`}>\\n              {step > s ? \\\"✓\\\" : s}\\n            </div>\\n            <p className={`text-xs ${step === s ? \\\"text-[var(--accent)]\\\" : \\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\"}`}>{stepLabel[s-1]}</p>\\n          </div>\\n        ))}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {error && <div className=\\\"mb-4 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-400\\\">{error}</div>}\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-6\\\">\\n        {/* ── Step 1: Customer ── */}\\n        {step === 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.customerPhone}</span>\\n              <input value={phone} onChange={e => setPhone(e.target.value)} type=\\\"tel\\\"\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.customerName}</span>\\n              <input value={name} onChange={e => setName(e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label className=\\\"sm:col-span-2\\\">\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.customerAddress}</span>\\n              <textarea rows={2} value={address} onChange={e => setAddress(e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.customerDistrict}</span>\\n              <input value={district} onChange={e => setDistrict(e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.customerThana}</span>\\n              <input value={thana} onChange={e => setThana(e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.source}</span>\\n              <select value={source} onChange={e => setSource(e.target.value as typeof source)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                <option value=\\\"manual\\\">{txt.manual}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"facebook_inbox\\\">{txt.facebook_inbox}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"landing_page\\\">{txt.landing_page}</option>\\n              </select>\\n            </label>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n\\n        {/* ── Step 2: Products ── */}\\n        {step === 2 && (\\n          <div>\\n            {/* Search */}\\n            <div className=\\\"relative mb-4\\\">\\n              <input value={productSearch} onChange={e => setProductSearch(e.target.value)}\\n                placeholder={txt.searchProduct}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              {(searchResults.length > 0 || searchLoading) && (\\n                <div className=\\\"absolute left-0 right-0 top-full z-10 mt-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface)] shadow-xl overflow-hidden\\\">\\n                  {searchLoading ? (\\n                    <p className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.searchProduct}</p>\\n                  ) : searchResults.map(p => (\\n                    <button key={p.id} onClick={() => addProduct(p)}\\n                      className=\\\"flex w-full items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                      <span>{p.name} {p.sku ? <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">({p.sku})</span> : null}</span>\\n                      <span className=\\\"font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\\\">৳{Number(p.selling_price).toLocaleString()}</span>\\n                    </button>\\n                  ))}\\n                </div>\\n              )}\\n            </div>\\n\\n            {/* Items */}\\n            {items.length === 0 ? (\\n              <p className=\\\"text-center py-8 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noItems}</p>\\n            ) : (\\n              <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n                <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm mb-3\\\">\\n                  <thead>\\n                    <tr className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase border-b border-[var(--border)]\\\">\\n                      <th className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-left\\\">{txt.itemName}</th>\\n                      <th className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-center w-20\\\">{txt.qty}</th>\\n                      <th className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-right w-28\\\">{txt.price}</th>\\n                      <th className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-right w-24\\\">{txt.itemTotal}</th>\\n                      <th className=\\\"px-2 py-2 w-10\\\"></th>\\n                    </tr>\\n                  </thead>\\n                  <tbody>\\n                    {items.map((item, idx) => (\\n                      <tr key={idx} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)]\\\">\\n                        <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2\\\">{item.product_name}</td>\\n                        <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2\\\">\\n                          <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"1\\\" value={item.quantity} onChange={e => updateItem(idx, \\\"quantity\\\", Number(e.target.value))}\\n                            className=\\\"w-16 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-center text-xs outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                        </td>\\n                        <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2\\\">\\n                          <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={item.unit_price} onChange={e => updateItem(idx, \\\"unit_price\\\", Number(e.target.value))}\\n                            className=\\\"w-24 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-right text-xs outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                        </td>\\n                        <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{(item.quantity * item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                        <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-center\\\">\\n                          <button onClick={() => removeItem(idx)} className=\\\"text-red-400 hover:text-red-300\\\">✕</button>\\n                        </td>\\n                      </tr>\\n                    ))}\\n                  </tbody>\\n                  <tfoot>\\n                    <tr>\\n                      <td colSpan={3} className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-right text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.subtotal}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-2 py-2 text-right font-bold\\\">৳{subtotal.toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                      <td></td>\\n                    </tr>\\n                  </tfoot>\\n                </table>\\n              </div>\\n            )}\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n\\n        {/* ── Step 3: Payment & Shipping ── */}\\n        {step === 3 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\\n              <select value={paymentMethod} onChange={e => setPaymentMethod(e.target.value as typeof paymentMethod)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                <option value=\\\"cod\\\">{txt.cod}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"online\\\">{txt.online}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"bkash\\\">{txt.bkash}</option>\\n              </select>\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\\n              <select value={paymentStatus} onChange={e => setPaymentStatus(e.target.value as typeof paymentStatus)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                <option value=\\\"due\\\">{txt.due}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"partial\\\">{txt.partial}</option>\\n                <option value=\\\"paid\\\">{txt.paid}</option>\\n              </select>\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shippingCharge}</span>\\n              <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={shippingCharge} onChange={e => setShippingCharge(Number(e.target.value))}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount}</span>\\n              <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={discount} onChange={e => setDiscount(Number(e.target.value))}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            <label className=\\\"sm:col-span-2\\\">\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</span>\\n              <textarea rows={2} value={notes} onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n            {/* Summary */}\\n            <div className=\\\"sm:col-span-2 rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent)]/5 border border-[var(--accent)]/20 p-4\\\">\\n              <div className=\\\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-1\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.subtotal}</span>\\n                <span>৳{subtotal.toLocaleString()}</span>\\n              </div>\\n              <div className=\\\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-1\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shippingCharge}</span>\\n                <span>+ ৳{shippingCharge.toLocaleString()}</span>\\n              </div>\\n              <div className=\\\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-2\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount}</span>\\n                <span className=\\\"text-emerald-400\\\">− ৳{discount.toLocaleString()}</span>\\n              </div>\\n              <div className=\\\"flex justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-bold\\\">\\n                <span>{txt.orderTotal}</span>\\n                <span className=\\\"text-[var(--accent)] text-lg\\\">৳{orderTotal.toLocaleString()}</span>\\n              </div>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Navigation */}\\n      <div className=\\\"mt-4 flex justify-between\\\">\\n        {step > 1 ? (\\n          <button onClick={() => setStep(s => (s - 1) as 1|2|3)}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-5 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n            {txt.back}\\n          </button>\\n        ) : <div />}\\n        {step < 3 ? (\\n          <button onClick={goNext}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-6 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n            {txt.next}\\n          </button>\\n        ) : (\\n          <button onClick={handleSubmit} disabled={submitting}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-6 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n            {submitting ? txt.submitting : txt.submit}\\n          </button>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Create Order page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write the 3-step Create Order page\", \"goal\": \"Create order creation page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"a4b5caf9-1e52-4f43-b4e1-1527b87af7af","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:09:36.018Z","parentId":"a86bcce9-abb5-4dc3-b936-6659f2b8a979"}
