{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01CF7QMmG6nsnXHz9sibznhc","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/create/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"নতুন অর্ডার\",\n    step1: \"গ্রাহকের তথ্য\",\n    step2: \"পণ্য যোগ করুন\",\n    step3: \"পেমেন্ট ও শিপিং\",\n    next: \"পরবর্তী\",\n    back: \"পেছনে\",\n    submit: \"অর্ডার তৈরি করুন\",\n    submitting: \"তৈরি হচ্ছে...\",\n    // step 1\n    customerPhone: \"ফোন নম্বর *\",\n    customerName: \"নাম\",\n    customerAddress: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    customerDistrict: \"জেলা\",\n    customerThana: \"থানা / উপজেলা\",\n    source: \"উৎস\",\n    // step 2\n    searchProduct: \"পণ্য খুঁজুন...\",\n    addItem: \"যোগ করুন\",\n    noItems: \"কোনো পণ্য যোগ করা হয়নি।\",\n    itemName: \"পণ্য\",\n    qty: \"পরিমাণ\",\n    price: \"একক মূল্য\",\n    itemTotal: \"মোট\",\n    remove: \"বাদ দিন\",\n    subtotal: \"সাব-টোটাল\",\n    // step 3\n    shippingCharge: \"শিপিং চার্জ (৳)\",\n    discount: \"ছাড় (৳)\",\n    paymentMethod: \"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\",\n    paymentStatus: \"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    notes: \"নোট\",\n    orderTotal: \"অর্ডার মোট\",\n    cod: \"ক্যাশ অন ডেলিভারি\",\n    online: \"অনলাইন ট্রান্সফার\",\n    bkash: \"বিকাশ\",\n    due: \"বাকি\",\n    partial: \"আংশিক\",\n    paid: \"পেইড\",\n    manual: \"ম্যানুয়াল\",\n    facebook_inbox: \"ফেসবুক ইনবক্স\",\n    landing_page: \"ল্যান্ডিং পেজ\",\n    required: \"এই মাঠটি আবশ্যক।\",\n    itemRequired: \"কমপক্ষে একটি পণ্য যোগ করুন।\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"New Order\",\n    step1: \"Customer Info\",\n    step2: \"Add Products\",\n    step3: \"Payment & Shipping\",\n    next: \"Next\",\n    back: \"Back\",\n    submit: \"Create Order\",\n    submitting: \"Creating...\",\n    customerPhone: \"Phone *\",\n    customerName: \"Name\",\n    customerAddress: \"Address\",\n    customerDistrict: \"District\",\n    customerThana: \"Thana / Upazila\",\n    source: \"Source\",\n    searchProduct: \"Search product...\",\n    addItem: \"Add\",\n    noItems: \"No products added yet.\",\n    itemName: \"Product\",\n    qty: \"Qty\",\n    price: \"Unit Price\",\n    itemTotal: \"Total\",\n    remove: \"Remove\",\n    subtotal: \"Subtotal\",\n    shippingCharge: \"Shipping Charge (৳)\",\n    discount: \"Discount (৳)\",\n    paymentMethod: \"Payment Method\",\n    paymentStatus: \"Payment Status\",\n    notes: \"Notes\",\n    orderTotal: \"Order Total\",\n    cod: \"Cash on Delivery\",\n    online: \"Online Transfer\",\n    bkash: \"Bkash\",\n    due: \"Due\",\n    partial: \"Partial\",\n    paid: \"Paid\",\n    manual: \"Manual\",\n    facebook_inbox: \"Facebook Inbox\",\n    landing_page: \"Landing Page\",\n    required: \"This field is required.\",\n    itemRequired: \"Add at least one product.\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype ProductSearchResult = { id: number; name: string; sku: string | null; selling_price: string; unit: string };\ntype OrderItem = { product_id: number | null; product_name: string; sku: string; quantity: number; unit_price: number };\n\nexport default function CreateOrderPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [step, setStep] = useState<1 | 2 | 3>(1);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Step 1\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState(\"\");\n  const [name, setName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [address, setAddress] = useState(\"\");\n  const [district, setDistrict] = useState(\"\");\n  const [thana, setThana] = useState(\"\");\n  const [source, setSource] = useState<\"manual\" | \"facebook_inbox\" | \"landing_page\">(\"manual\");\n\n  // Step 2\n  const [items, setItems] = useState<OrderItem[]>([]);\n  const [productSearch, setProductSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [searchResults, setSearchResults] = useState<ProductSearchResult[]>([]);\n  const [searchLoading, setSearchLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  // Step 3\n  const [shippingCharge, setShippingCharge] = useState(0);\n  const [discount, setDiscount] = useState(0);\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState<\"cod\" | \"online\" | \"bkash\">(\"cod\");\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState<\"due\" | \"partial\" | \"paid\">(\"due\");\n  const [notes, setNotes] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const subtotal = items.reduce((s, i) => s + i.quantity * i.unit_price, 0);\n  const orderTotal = Math.max(0, subtotal + shippingCharge - discount);\n\n  const searchProducts = useCallback(async (q: string) => {\n    if (!q.trim()) { setSearchResults([]); return; }\n    setSearchLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/products?search=${encodeURIComponent(q)}&status=active&per_page=8`, {\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setSearchResults(d.data ?? []);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setSearchLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const t = setTimeout(() => void searchProducts(productSearch), 300);\n    return () => clearTimeout(t);\n  }, [productSearch, searchProducts]);\n\n  const addProduct = (p: ProductSearchResult) => {\n    setItems(prev => {\n      const existing = prev.find(i => i.product_id === p.id);\n      if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.product_id === p.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n      return [...prev, { product_id: p.id, product_name: p.name, sku: p.sku ?? \"\", quantity: 1, unit_price: Number(p.selling_price) }];\n    });\n    setProductSearch(\"\");\n    setSearchResults([]);\n  };\n\n  const updateItem = (idx: number, field: keyof OrderItem, value: number | string) => {\n    setItems(prev => prev.map((item, i) => i === idx ? { ...item, [field]: value } : item));\n  };\n\n  const removeItem = (idx: number) => setItems(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== idx));\n\n  const goNext = () => {\n    setError(\"\");\n    if (step === 1) {\n      if (!phone.trim()) { setError(txt.required); return; }\n      setStep(2);\n    } else if (step === 2) {\n      if (items.length === 0) { setError(txt.itemRequired); return; }\n      setStep(3);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async () => {\n    setError(\"\");\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          customer_phone: phone,\n          customer_name: name || null,\n          customer_address: address || null,\n          customer_district: district || null,\n          customer_thana: thana || null,\n          source,\n          payment_method: paymentMethod,\n          payment_status: paymentStatus,\n          shipping_charge: shippingCharge,\n          discount,\n          notes: notes || null,\n          items: items.map(i => ({\n            product_id: i.product_id,\n            product_name: i.product_name,\n            sku: i.sku || null,\n            quantity: i.quantity,\n            unit_price: i.unit_price,\n          })),\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        const msg = data.message ?? Object.values(data.errors ?? {})[0];\n        setError(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : String(msg));\n        return;\n      }\n      router.push(\"/dashboard/orders\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const stepLabel = [txt.step1, txt.step2, txt.step3];\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"create-order\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Stepper */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6 flex gap-2\">\n        {[1,2,3].map(s => (\n          <div key={s} className=\"flex-1 text-center\">\n            <div className={`mx-auto mb-1 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-bold transition-colors\n              ${step === s ? \"bg-[var(--accent)] text-white\" : step > s ? \"bg-emerald-500 text-white\" : \"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\"}`}>\n              {step > s ? \"✓\" : s}\n            </div>\n            <p className={`text-xs ${step === s ? \"text-[var(--accent)]\" : \"text-[var(--muted)]\"}`}>{stepLabel[s-1]}</p>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {error && <div className=\"mb-4 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-400\">{error}</div>}\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel p-6\">\n        {/* ── Step 1: Customer ── */}\n        {step === 1 && (\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2\">\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.customerPhone}</span>\n              <input value={phone} onChange={e => setPhone(e.target.value)} type=\"tel\"\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.customerName}</span>\n              <input value={name} onChange={e => setName(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label className=\"sm:col-span-2\">\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.customerAddress}</span>\n              <textarea rows={2} value={address} onChange={e => setAddress(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.customerDistrict}</span>\n              <input value={district} onChange={e => setDistrict(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.customerThana}</span>\n              <input value={thana} onChange={e => setThana(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.source}</span>\n              <select value={source} onChange={e => setSource(e.target.value as typeof source)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                <option value=\"manual\">{txt.manual}</option>\n                <option value=\"facebook_inbox\">{txt.facebook_inbox}</option>\n                <option value=\"landing_page\">{txt.landing_page}</option>\n              </select>\n            </label>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* ── Step 2: Products ── */}\n        {step === 2 && (\n          <div>\n            {/* Search */}\n            <div className=\"relative mb-4\">\n              <input value={productSearch} onChange={e => setProductSearch(e.target.value)}\n                placeholder={txt.searchProduct}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              {(searchResults.length > 0 || searchLoading) && (\n                <div className=\"absolute left-0 right-0 top-full z-10 mt-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface)] shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n                  {searchLoading ? (\n                    <p className=\"px-3 py-2 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.searchProduct}</p>\n                  ) : searchResults.map(p => (\n                    <button key={p.id} onClick={() => addProduct(p)}\n                      className=\"flex w-full items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                      <span>{p.name} {p.sku ? <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">({p.sku})</span> : null}</span>\n                      <span className=\"font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\">৳{Number(p.selling_price).toLocaleString()}</span>\n                    </button>\n                  ))}\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n\n            {/* Items */}\n            {items.length === 0 ? (\n              <p className=\"text-center py-8 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noItems}</p>\n            ) : (\n              <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n                <table className=\"w-full text-sm mb-3\">\n                  <thead>\n                    <tr className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase border-b border-[var(--border)]\">\n                      <th className=\"px-2 py-2 text-left\">{txt.itemName}</th>\n                      <th className=\"px-2 py-2 text-center w-20\">{txt.qty}</th>\n                      <th className=\"px-2 py-2 text-right w-28\">{txt.price}</th>\n                      <th className=\"px-2 py-2 text-right w-24\">{txt.itemTotal}</th>\n                      <th className=\"px-2 py-2 w-10\"></th>\n                    </tr>\n                  </thead>\n                  <tbody>\n                    {items.map((item, idx) => (\n                      <tr key={idx} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)]\">\n                        <td className=\"px-2 py-2\">{item.product_name}</td>\n                        <td className=\"px-2 py-2\">\n                          <input type=\"number\" min=\"1\" value={item.quantity} onChange={e => updateItem(idx, \"quantity\", Number(e.target.value))}\n                            className=\"w-16 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-center text-xs outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                        </td>\n                        <td className=\"px-2 py-2\">\n                          <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={item.unit_price} onChange={e => updateItem(idx, \"unit_price\", Number(e.target.value))}\n                            className=\"w-24 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-2 py-1 text-right text-xs outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                        </td>\n                        <td className=\"px-2 py-2 text-right font-semibold\">৳{(item.quantity * item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                        <td className=\"px-2 py-2 text-center\">\n                          <button onClick={() => removeItem(idx)} className=\"text-red-400 hover:text-red-300\">✕</button>\n                        </td>\n                      </tr>\n                    ))}\n                  </tbody>\n                  <tfoot>\n                    <tr>\n                      <td colSpan={3} className=\"px-2 py-2 text-right text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.subtotal}</td>\n                      <td className=\"px-2 py-2 text-right font-bold\">৳{subtotal.toLocaleString()}</td>\n                      <td></td>\n                    </tr>\n                  </tfoot>\n                </table>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* ── Step 3: Payment & Shipping ── */}\n        {step === 3 && (\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2\">\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\n              <select value={paymentMethod} onChange={e => setPaymentMethod(e.target.value as typeof paymentMethod)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                <option value=\"cod\">{txt.cod}</option>\n                <option value=\"online\">{txt.online}</option>\n                <option value=\"bkash\">{txt.bkash}</option>\n              </select>\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\n              <select value={paymentStatus} onChange={e => setPaymentStatus(e.target.value as typeof paymentStatus)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                <option value=\"due\">{txt.due}</option>\n                <option value=\"partial\">{txt.partial}</option>\n                <option value=\"paid\">{txt.paid}</option>\n              </select>\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shippingCharge}</span>\n              <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={shippingCharge} onChange={e => setShippingCharge(Number(e.target.value))}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount}</span>\n              <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={discount} onChange={e => setDiscount(Number(e.target.value))}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n            <label className=\"sm:col-span-2\">\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</span>\n              <textarea rows={2} value={notes} onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n            </label>\n            {/* Summary */}\n            <div className=\"sm:col-span-2 rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent)]/5 border border-[var(--accent)]/20 p-4\">\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-1\">\n                <span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.subtotal}</span>\n                <span>৳{subtotal.toLocaleString()}</span>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-1\">\n                <span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shippingCharge}</span>\n                <span>+ ৳{shippingCharge.toLocaleString()}</span>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between text-sm mb-2\">\n                <span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount}</span>\n                <span className=\"text-emerald-400\">− ৳{discount.toLocaleString()}</span>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-bold\">\n                <span>{txt.orderTotal}</span>\n                <span className=\"text-[var(--accent)] text-lg\">৳{orderTotal.toLocaleString()}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Navigation */}\n      <div className=\"mt-4 flex justify-between\">\n        {step > 1 ? (\n          <button onClick={() => setStep(s => (s - 1) as 1|2|3)}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-5 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n            {txt.back}\n          </button>\n        ) : <div />}\n        {step < 3 ? (\n          <button onClick={goNext}\n            className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-6 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n            {txt.next}\n          </button>\n        ) : (\n          <button onClick={handleSubmit} disabled={submitting}\n            className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-6 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n            {submitting ? txt.submitting : txt.submit}\n          </button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Create Order page done\"","explanation":"Write the 3-step Create Order page","goal":"Create order creation page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"58da002c-2225-4c68-96be-2b58fba483fc","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:09:36.093Z","parentId":"03bc3b2a-c3ec-4abf-872d-a321783b269c"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"476aac37-53eb-40fd-859d-f3078020c481","content":"Phase 1 সম্পূর্ণ। Commit `7a16e3c` pushed।\n\n**যা করা হয়েছে:**\n\n**Backend (19 API routes):**\n- `ProductCategory`, `Product`, `ProductImage` — models + migrations ✅\n- `Order`, `OrderItem`, `OrderStatusLog` — models + migrations ✅\n- `ProductCategoryController` — CRUD + auto-slug\n- `ProductController` — CRUD + stats + adjustStock\n- `OrderController` — CRUD + `updateStatus` + `bulkStatus` + stats\n\n**Frontend (5 full-UI pages, বাংলা + ইংরেজি):**\n- [/dashboard/products](frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/page.tsx) — পণ্য তালিকা + Add/Edit modal + filters + pagination\n- [/dashboard/products/categories](frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/categories/page.tsx) — ক্যাটাগরি CRUD\n- [/dashboard/products/stock](frontend/src/app/dashboard/products/stock/page.tsx) — স্টক tracker + adjust modal\n- [/dashboard/orders](frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/page.tsx) — অর্ডার তালিকা + bulk status + status change modal\n- [/dashboard/orders/create](frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/create/page.tsx) — 3-step অর্ডার wizard (customer → products → payment)\n\n**পরবর্তী:** Customer Management, Courier Integration, বা SMS Module — কোনটা দিয়ে শুরু করবেন?","toolRequests":[]},"id":"161afd99-592f-4bfe-a905-13e1fc77edf0","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:10:54.312Z","parentId":"397a6312-4942-471e-82a9-051f275055fa"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"763e67c7-072e-4692-8bab-aa98ae604edf","content":"কোনো Customer model নেই। Backend থেকে শুরু করি: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01Ce3nrxFi4TxTfTNTbuAuRn","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cd /var/www/hybrid-stack/backend && php artisan make:migration create_customers_table && php artisan make:model Customer\", \"explanation\": \"Create customers migration and model\", \"goal\": \"Scaffold customer backend\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"No Customer model exists yet. I need to:\n\n1. Create a `customers` table migration - this will store customers per user (seller). Customers are derived from orders (phone-based). We can either:\n   - Auto-create/update customers from orders\n   - Or have a separate customers table that can be manually managed + auto-populated\n\nLet me think about the schema:\n- `customers` table:\n  - id\n  - user_id (the seller)\n  - name\n  - phone (unique per user_id)\n  - address, district, thana\n  - email (optional)\n  - notes\n  - total_orders (computed)\n  - total_spent (computed)\n  - fraud_score (from orders)\n  - risk_level (low/medium/high)\n  - tags (jsonb) - for VIP, etc.\n  - is_blocked (boolean)\n  - last_order_at\n  - created_at, updated_at\n\nFor the Customer Management module, I'll go with auto-creating/updating customers from orders by phone number, while also allowing manual additions. The customer profile will display their order history. I need to set up the migration, model, and controller with index, show, and update actions.\n\nNow I'm adding a sync mechanism that upserts the customer record whenever an order is created. The customers table will include user_id, name, phone, email, address, district, thana, notes, risk_level, is_blocked, tags, total_orders, total_spent, and last_order_at. The controller will handle index with filters, show with order history, update, and stats endpoints, plus a syncFromOrders endpoint to rebuild customer records from scratch.\n\nFor the frontend, I'm building a customer list page with a table showing name, phone, order count, total spent, risk badge, and last order date, then a detail page that displays the full order history. I'll also add VIP and risky customer filter pages to segment high-value and high-risk customers respectively."},"id":"efcb7bd6-34c2-4bd6-829e-c86432eea109","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:15:57.017Z","parentId":"c25b071b-aa3c-440f-b868-8b5a13ed2fb4"}

150)->nullable();\\n            $table->string('email', 150)->nullable();\\n            $table->text('address')->nullable();\\n            $table->string('district', 100)->nullable();\\n            $table->string('thana', 100)->nullable();\\n            $table->text('notes')->nullable();\\n            $table->jsonb('tags')->default('[]');         // ['vip','wholesale'...]\\n            $table->string('risk_level', 20)->default('low'); // low/medium/high\\n            $table->decimal('fraud_score', 5, 2)->default(0);\\n            $table->boolean('is_blocked')->default(false);\\n            $table->unsignedInteger('total_orders')->default(0);\\n            $table->decimal('total_spent', 14, 2)->default(0);\\n            $table->timestamp('last_order_at')->nullable();\\n            $table->timestamps();\\n            $table->unique(['user_id', 'phone']); // one customer per phone per seller\\n 'fraud_score', 'is_blocked',\\n        'total_orders', 'total_spent', 'last_order_at',\\n    ];\\n\\n    protected $casts = [\\n        'tags'          => 'array',\\n        'fraud_score'   => 'float',\\n        'is_blocked'    => 'boolean',\\n        'total_orders'  => 'integer',\\n        'total_spent'   => 'float',\\n        'last_order_at' => 'datetime',\\n    ];\\n\\n    public orders(): \\\\Illuminate\\\\Database\\\\Eloquent\\\\Relations\\\\HasMany\\n    {\\n        return $this->hasMany(Order::class, 'customer_phone', 'phone')\\n            ->where('user_id', $this->user_id);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Upsert a customer record from an order, updating aggregates.\\n     */\\n    public static function syncFromOrder(\\\\App\\\\Models\\\\Order $order): self\\n    {\\n        $customer = self::firstOrNew([\\n            'user_id' => $order->user_id,\\n            'phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\\n        ]);\\n\\n        if (!$customer->exists) {\\n            $customer->name    = $order->customer_name;\\n            $customer->address = $order->customer_address;\\n            $customer->district = $order->customer_district;\\n            $customer->thana   = $order->customer_thana;\\n            $customer->tags    = [];\\n        } else {\\n            // Update name/address only if previously empty\\n            if (empty($customer->name) && $order->customer_name)\\n                $customer->name = $order->customer_name;\\n            if (empty($customer->address) && $order->customer_address)\\n                $customer->address = $order->customer_address;\\n        }\\n\\n        // Recompute aggregates from all orders\\n        $agg = \\\\App\\\\Models\\\\Order::where('user_id', $order->user_id)\\n            ->where('customer_phone', $order->customer_phone)\\n            ->selectRaw('COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total),0) as spent, MAX(created_at) as last_at')\\n            ->first();\\n\\n        $customer->total_orders  = $agg->cnt ?? 0;\\n        $customer->total_spent   = $agg->spent ?? 0;\\n        $customer->last_order_at = $agg->last_at;\\n        $customer->save();\\n\\n        return $customer;\\n    }\\n}\"}]}","type":"function"}]},"id":"568c46fb-92be-46cd-8f3e-bc19acf4dec3","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:16:23.858Z","parentId":"9fcd03ba-4411-45d9-b2d9-293716882afa"}

$customer->exists) {\\n            $customer->name     = $order->customer_name;\\n            $customer->address  = $order->customer_address;\\n            $customer->district = $order->customer_district;\\n            $customer->thana    = $order->customer_thana;\\n            $customer->tags     = [];\\n        } else {\\n            if (empty($customer->name) && $order->customer_name)\\n                $customer->name = $order->customer_name;\\n            if (empty($customer->address) && $order->customer_address)\\n                $customer->address = $order->customer_address;\\n        }\\n\\n        $agg = Order::where('user_id', $order->user_id)\\n            ->where('customer_phone', $order->customer_phone)\\n            ->selectRaw('COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total),0) as spent, MAX(created_at) as last_at')\\n            ->first();\\n\\n        $customer->total_orders  = $agg->cnt ?? 0;\\n        $customer->total_spent   = $agg->spent ?? 0;\\n        $customer->last_order_at = $agg->last_at;\\n        $customer->save();\\n\\n        return $customer;\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"oldString\":\"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Models;\\n\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Database\\\\Eloquent\\\\Model;\\n\\nclass Customer extends Model\\n{\\n    //\\n}\\n\"}]}","type":"function"}]},"id":"76322df4-295c-4b27-866f-75731cd2c3b6","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:16:40.429Z","parentId":"5f667104-f9fd-422d-90ba-34642c8e3e08"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01StxAFgMrrMaMF3HzpDKzM5","toolName":"multi_replace_string_in_file","arguments":{"explanation":"Fill model","replacements":[{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Models/Customer.php","newString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\n\nclass Customer extends Model\n{\n    protected $fillable = [\n        'user_id', 'phone', 'name', 'email', 'address',\n        'district', 'thana', 'notes', 'tags',\n        'risk_level', 'fraud_score', 'is_blocked',\n        'total_orders', 'total_spent', 'last_order_at',\n    ];\n\n    protected $casts = [\n        'tags'          => 'array',\n        'fraud_score'   => 'float',\n        'is_blocked'    => 'boolean',\n        'total_orders'  => 'integer',\n        'total_spent'   => 'float',\n        'last_order_at' => 'datetime',\n    ];\n\n    public function user(): \\Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Relations\\BelongsTo\n    {\n        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);\n    }\n\n    public function orders(): \\Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Relations\\HasMany\n    {\n        return $this->hasMany(Order::class, 'customer_phone', 'phone')\n            ->where('orders.user_id', $this->user_id);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Upsert a customer record from an order, updating aggregates.\n     */\n    public static function syncFromOrder(Order $order): self\n    {\n        $customer = self::firstOrNew([\n            'user_id' => $order->user_id,\n            'phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\n        ]);\n\n        if (! $customer->exists) {\n            $customer->name     = $order->customer_name;\n            $customer->address  = $order->customer_address;\n            $customer->district = $order->customer_district;\n            $customer->thana    = $order->customer_thana;\n            $customer->tags     = [];\n        } else {\n            if (empty($customer->name) && $order->customer_name)\n                $customer->name = $order->customer_name;\n            if (empty($customer->address) && $order->customer_address)\n                $customer->address = $order->customer_address;\n        }\n\n        $agg = Order::where('user_id', $order->user_id)\n            ->where('customer_phone', $order->customer_phone)\n            ->selectRaw('COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total),0) as spent, MAX(created_at) as last_at')\n            ->first();\n\n        $customer->total_orders  = $agg->cnt ?? 0;\n        $customer->total_spent   = $agg->spent ?? 0;\n        $customer->last_order_at = $agg->last_at;\n        $customer->save();\n\n        return $customer;\n    }\n}\n","oldString":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Models;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\Model;\n\nclass Customer extends Model\n{\n    //\n}\n"}]}},"id":"74eff8a2-5a8d-4e0a-89ae-6d2061a1a979","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:16:40.476Z","parentId":"7937a92a-4176-4c78-bad3-349b971d277e"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"ce0b0005-1bec-4026-aed2-bd3aa9558396","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01CzcshgqK4hNacNgmGawUsk","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CustomerController.php\", \"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Customer;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Order;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\n\\nclass CustomerController extends Controller\\n{\\n    // ── List ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $query = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id());\\n\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('name', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('phone', 'ilike', $s));\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('risk_level')) {\\n            $query->where('risk_level', $request->risk_level);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->boolean('vip')) {\\n            $query->whereJsonContains('tags', 'vip');\\n        }\\n        if ($request->boolean('blocked')) {\\n            $query->where('is_blocked', true);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('min_orders')) {\\n            $query->where('total_orders', '>=', (int) $request->min_orders);\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage   = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $customers = $query->orderByDesc('total_orders')->paginate($perPage);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $customers->items(),\\n            'meta'    => [\\n                'total'        => $customers->total(),\\n                'current_page' => $customers->currentPage(),\\n                'last_page'    => $customers->lastPage(),\\n                'per_page'     => $customers->perPage(),\\n            ],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        $counts = Customer::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->selectRaw(\\\"\\n                COUNT(*) AS total,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_blocked = true)           AS blocked,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_level = 'high')         AS high_risk,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tags @> '[\\\\\\\"vip\\\\\\\"]'::jsonb)  AS vip,\\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE total_orders >= 3)           AS repeat_customers\\n            \\\")\\n            ->first();\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $counts]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Show (with order history) ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->where('customer_phone', $customer->phone)\\n            ->with('items:id,order_id,product_name,quantity,unit_price,total')\\n            ->orderByDesc('created_at')\\n            ->take(50)\\n            ->get();\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => array_merge($customer->toArray(), ['orders' => $orders]),\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Update ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'name'       => 'nullable|string|max:150',\\n            'email'      => 'nullable|email|max:150',\\n            'address'    => 'nullable|string',\\n            'district'   => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'thana'      => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'notes'      => 'nullable|string',\\n            'tags'       => 'nullable|array',\\n            'tags.*'     => 'string|max:50',\\n            'risk_level' => 'nullable|in:low,medium,high',\\n            'is_blocked' => 'nullable|boolean',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $customer->update($data);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $customer]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Toggle block ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function toggleBlock(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\\n        $customer->update(['is_blocked' => ! $customer->is_blocked]);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $customer]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Rebuild from orders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function syncAll(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        // Get distinct phones from orders for this user\\n        $phones = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->select('customer_phone')\\n            ->distinct()\\n            ->pluck('customer_phone');\\n\\n        $count = 0;\\n        foreach ($phones as $phone) {\\n            $fakeOrder = new Order(['user_id' => $userId, 'customer_phone' => $phone]);\\n            Customer::syncFromOrder($fakeOrder);\\n            $count++;\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => \\\"$count customers synced.\\\"]);\\n    }\\n}\\n\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"16b0c8c2-fb78-4172-ba39-eac6bc0b9319","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:17:27.287Z","parentId":"aa9fe73f-1c1c-4096-a912-ae411e785e39"}

'%';\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('name', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('phone', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('risk_level')) {\n            $query->where('risk_level', $request->risk_level);\n        }\n        if ($request->boolean('vip')) {\n            $query->whereJsonContains('tags', 'vip');\n        }\n        if ($request->boolean('blocked')) {\n            $query->where('is_blocked', true);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('min_orders')) {\n            $query->where('total_orders', '>=', (int) $request->min_orders);\n        }\n\n        $perPage   = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $customers = $query->orderByDesc('total_orders')->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $customers->items(),\n            'meta'    => [\n                'total'        => $customers->total(),\n                'current_page' => $customers->currentPage(),\n                'last_page'    => $customers->lastPage(),\n                'per_page'     => $customers->perPage(),\n            ],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function stats(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n\n        $counts = Customer::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->selectRaw(\"\n                COUNT(*) AS total,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_blocked = true)           AS blocked,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_level = 'high')         AS high_risk,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tags @> '[\\\"vip\\\"]'::jsonb)  AS vip,\n                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE total_orders >= 3)           AS repeat_customers\n            \")\n            ->first();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $counts]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Show (with order history) ─────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function show(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->where('customer_phone', $customer->phone)\n            ->with('items:id,order_id,product_name,quantity,unit_price,total')\n            ->orderByDesc('created_at')\n            ->take(50)\n            ->get();\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => array_merge($customer->toArray(), ['orders' => $orders]),\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Update ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function update(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'name'       => 'nullable|string|max:150',\n            'email'      => 'nullable|email|max:150',\n            'address'    => 'nullable|string',\n            'district'   => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'thana'      => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'notes'      => 'nullable|string',\n            'tags'       => 'nullable|array',\n            'tags.*'     => 'string|max:50',\n            'risk_level' => 'nullable|in:low,medium,high',\n            'is_blocked' => 'nullable|boolean',\n        ]);\n\n        $customer->update($data);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $customer]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Toggle block ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function toggleBlock(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $customer = Customer::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($id);\n        $customer->update(['is_blocked' => ! $customer->is_blocked]);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $customer]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Rebuild from orders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function syncAll(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n\n        // Get distinct phones from orders for this user\n        $phones = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->select('customer_phone')\n            ->distinct()\n            ->pluck('customer_phone');\n\n        $count = 0;\n        foreach ($phones as $phone) {\n            $fakeOrder = new Order(['user_id' => $userId, 'customer_phone' => $phone]);\n            Customer::syncFromOrder($fakeOrder);\n            $count++;\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => \"$count customers synced.\"]);\n    }\n}\n"}},"id":"38d92b12-37ea-4732-98e9-c9d84a5a04b3","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:17:27.349Z","parentId":"f7644d42-9ef4-4ebf-80c7-27b14a55869b"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"75ead635-b69b-4669-9ab0-556c86614b77","content":"Fix the `syncAll` method — it needs a real order record to seed the name: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01R2iuSeJKV3BaQjH2mb7KWx","name":"replace_string_in_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CustomerController.php\", \"newString\": \"    // ── Rebuild from orders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function syncAll(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        // Latest order per distinct phone — used to seed name/address\\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->orderByDesc('id')\\n            ->get()\\n            ->unique('customer_phone');\\n\\n        $count = 0;\\n        foreach ($orders as $order) {\\n            Customer::syncFromOrder($order);\\n            $count++;\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => \\\"$count customers synced.\\\"]);\\n    }\", \"oldString\": \"    // ── Rebuild from orders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function syncAll(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        // Get distinct phones from orders for this user\\n        $phones = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->select('customer_phone')\\n            ->distinct()\\n            ->pluck('customer_phone');\\n\\n        $count = 0;\\n        foreach ($phones as $phone) {\\n            $fakeOrder = new Order(['user_id' => $userId, 'customer_phone' => $phone]);\\n            Customer::syncFromOrder($fakeOrder);\\n            $count++;\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => \\\"$count customers synced.\\\"]);\\n    }\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"The `syncAll` has a bug - it creates a fake Order object and passes it to `syncFromOrder`. But `syncFromOrder` uses `Order::where('user_id', $order->user_id)->where('customer_phone', $order->customer_phone)` to compute aggregates - so a fake order without an id should work since it just queries. But the issue is `$customer->save()` at the end - if the customer doesn't exist yet, `firstOrNew` won't have name etc from order. Let me reconsider.\n\nActually the syncAll method should iterate through distinct phones and for each, do a proper sync by loading one of the actual orders. \n\nNow I'm refactoring the method to fetch real orders for each phone and use those instead."},"id":"03624b5e-3da9-46e6-b769-b4ac73c179ba","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:17:41.245Z","parentId":"a679380b-9dec-4f7e-a6df-2b149994b484"}

text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  high:   \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"কাস্টমার তালিকা\\\",\\n    syncBtn: \\\"অর্ডার থেকে Sync করুন\\\",\\n    syncing: \\\"Sync হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    search: \\\"নাম / ফোন দিয়ে খুঁজুন\\\",\\n    allRisk: \\\"সব ঝুঁকি\\\",\\n    low: \\\"কম\\\", medium: \\\"মাঝারি\\\", high: \\\"উচ্চ\\\",\\n    vipOnly: \\\"শুধু VIP\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noCustomers: \\\"কোনো কাস্টমার নেই।\\\",\\n    name: \\\"নাম ও ফোন\\\",\\n    orders: \\\"অর্ডার\\\",\\n    spent: \\\"মোট ক্রয়\\\",\\n    lastOrder: \\\"শেষ অর্ডার\\\",\\n    risk: \\\"ঝুঁকি\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    view: \\\"দেখুন\\\",\\n    block: \\\"ব্লক\\\",\\n    unblock: \\\"আনব্লক\\\",\\n    totalCustomers: \\\"মোট কাস্টমার\\\",\\n    vipCount: \\\"VIP\\\",\\n    highRisk: \\\"উচ্চ ঝুঁকি\\\",\\n    repeat: \\\"নিয়মিত (৩+)\\\",\\n    tags: { vip: \\\"VIP\\\", wholesale: \\\"পাইকার\\\", blocked: \\\"ব্লক\\\" },\\n    never: \\\"কখনো না\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Customer List\\\",\\n    syncBtn: \\\"Sync from Orders\\\",\\n    syncing: \\\"Syncing...\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Search by name / phone\\\",\\n    allRisk: \\\"All Risk\\\",\\n    low: \\\"Low\\\", medium: \\\"Medium\\\", high: \\\"High\\\",\\n    vipOnly: \\\"VIP only\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noCustomers: \\\"No customers found.\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Name & Phone\\\",\\n    orders: \\\"Orders\\\",\\n    spent: \\\"Total Spent\\\",\\n    lastOrder: \\\"Last Order\\\",\\n    risk: \\\"Risk\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    view: \\\"View\\\",\\n    block: \\\"Block\\\",\\n    unblock: \\\"Unblock\\\",\\n    totalCustomers: \\\"Total Customers\\\",\\n    vipCount: \\\"VIP\\\",\\n    highRisk: \\\"High Risk\\\",\\n    repeat: \\\"Repeat (3+)\\\",\\n    tags: { vip: \\\"VIP\\\", wholesale: \\\"Wholesale\\\", blocked: \\\"Blocked\\\" },\\n    never: \\\"Never\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Customer = {\\n  id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; email: string | null;\\n  total_orders: number; total_spent: number; last_order_at: string | null;\\n  risk_level: string; is_blocked: boolean; tags: string[];\\n};\\ntype Stats = { total: number; vip: number; high_risk: number; repeat_customers: number };\\n\\nexport default function CustomersPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, vip: 0, high_risk: 0, repeat_customers: 0 });\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [filterRisk, setFilterRisk] = useState(\\\"all\\\");\\n  const [filterVip, setFilterVip] = useState(false);\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"20\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      if (filterRisk !== \\\"all\\\") params.set(\\\"risk_level\\\", filterRisk);\\n      if (filterVip) params.set(\\\"vip\\\", \\\"1\\\");\\n\\n      const [cusRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n        fetch(`${API}/customers/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n      ]);\\n      if (cusRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await cusRes.json();\\n        setCustomers(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n      if (statRes.ok) {\\n        const d = await statRes.json();\\n        setStats(d.data ?? stats);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [page, search, filterRisk, filterVip, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search, filterRisk, filterVip]);\\n\\n  const handleSync = async () => {\\n    setSyncing(true);\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/sync-all`, { method: \\\"POST\\\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n    setSyncing(false);\\n    void fetchData();\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleToggleBlock = async (c: Customer) => {\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${c.id}/toggle-block`, { method: \\\"POST\\\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n    void fetchData();\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-US\\\", { day: \\\"2-digit\\\", month: \\\"short\\\", year: \\\"2-digit\\\" })\\n    : txt.never;\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"customer-list\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"customers\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Stats */}\\n      <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-4\\\">\\n        {[\\n          { label: txt.totalCustomers, value: stats.total,             color: \\\"bg-[#0f7c7b]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.vipCount,       value: stats.vip,               color: \\\"bg-[#7b3fbd]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.highRisk,       value: stats.high_risk,         color: \\\"bg-[#c0392b]\\\" },\\n          { label: txt.repeat,         value: stats.repeat_customers,  color: \\\"bg-[#2f7ec1]\\\" },\\n        ].map(c => (\\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-white/80\\\">{c.label}</p>\\n            <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\\\">{loading ? \\\"...\\\" : c.value}</p>\\n          </article>\\n        ))}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input type=\\\"text\\\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n        <select value={filterRisk} onChange={e => setFilterRisk(e.target.value)}\\n          className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n          <option value=\\\"all\\\">{txt.allRisk}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"low\\\">{txt.low}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"medium\\\">{txt.medium}</option>\\n          <option value=\\\"high\\\">{txt.high}</option>\\n        </select>\\n        <label className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer\\\">\\n          <input type=\\\"checkbox\\\" checked={filterVip} onChange={e => setFilterVip(e.target.checked)}\\n            className=\\\"accent-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n          {txt.vipOnly}\\n        </label>\\n        <button onClick={handleSync} disabled={syncing}\\n          className=\\\"ml-auto rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/40 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)]/10 disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n          {syncing ? txt.syncing : txt.syncBtn}\\n        </button>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Table */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.name}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">{txt.orders}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.spent}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.lastOrder}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.risk}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.actions}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : customers.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noCustomers}</td></tr>\\n            ) : customers.map(c => (\\n              <tr key={c.id} className={`border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] ${c.is_blocked ? \\\"opacity-50\\\" : \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{c.name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</p>\\n                  <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{c.phone}</p>\\n                  <div className=\\\"mt-1 flex flex-wrap gap-1\\\">\\n                    {c.tags.map(tag => (\\n                      <span key={tag} className={`rounded-full px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold\\n                        ${tag === \\\"vip\\\" ? \\\"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\\\" : \\\"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\\\"}`}>\\n                        {txt.tags[tag as keyof typeof txt.tags] ?? tag}\\n                      </span>\\n                    ))}\\n                    {c.is_blocked && (\\n                      <span className=\\\"rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-red-400\\\">\\n                        {txt.tags.blocked}\\n                      </span>\\n                    )}\\n                  </div>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center font-semibold\\\">{c.total_orders}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(c.total_spent).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{fmtDate(c.last_order_at)}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[c.risk_level] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                    {txt[c.risk_level as \\\"low\\\" | \\\"medium\\\" | \\\"high\\\"] ?? c.risk_level}\\n                  </span>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/customers/${c.id}`}\\n                    className=\\\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\\\">\\n                    {txt.view}\\n                  </Link>\\n                  <button onClick={() => handleToggleBlock(c)}\\n                    className={`rounded-lg border px-2 py-1 text-xs\\n                      ${c.is_blocked ? \\\"border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10\\\" : \\\"border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\"}`}>\\n                    {c.is_blocked ? txt.unblock : txt.block}\\n                  </button>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"জন কাস্টমার\\\" : \\\"customers\\\"}</p>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? {"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01MNtbQxoj14JoGujGzZLSUK","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst riskColor: Record<string, string> = {\n  low:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n};\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"কাস্টমার তালিকা\",\n    syncBtn: \"অর্ডার থেকে Sync করুন\",\n    syncing: \"Sync হচ্ছে...\",\n    search: \"নাম / ফোন দিয়ে খুঁজুন\",\n    allRisk: \"সব ঝুঁকি\",\n    low: \"কম\", medium: \"মাঝারি\", high: \"উচ্চ\",\n    vipOnly: \"শুধু VIP\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noCustomers: \"কোনো কাস্টমার নেই।\",\n    name: \"নাম ও ফোন\",\n    orders: \"অর্ডার\",\n    spent: \"মোট ক্রয়\",\n    lastOrder: \"শেষ অর্ডার\",\n    risk: \"ঝুঁকি\",\n    actions: \"অ্যাকশন\",\n    view: \"দেখুন\",\n    block: \"ব্লক\",\n    unblock: \"আনব্লক\",\n    totalCustomers: \"মোট কাস্টমার\",\n    vipCount: \"VIP\",\n    highRisk: \"উচ্চ ঝুঁকি\",\n    repeat: \"নিয়মিত (৩+)\",\n    tags: { vip: \"VIP\", wholesale: \"পাইকার\", blocked: \"ব্লক\" },\n    never: \"কখনো না\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Customer List\",\n    syncBtn: \"Sync from Orders\",\n    syncing: \"Syncing...\",\n    search: \"Search by name / phone\",\n    allRisk: \"All Risk\",\n    low: \"Low\", medium: \"Medium\", high: \"High\",\n    vipOnly: \"VIP only\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noCustomers: \"No customers found.\",\n    name: \"Name & Phone\",\n    orders: \"Orders\",\n    spent: \"Total Spent\",\n    lastOrder: \"Last Order\",\n    risk: \"Risk\",\n    actions: \"Actions\",\n    view: \"View\",\n    block: \"Block\",\n    unblock: \"Unblock\",\n    totalCustomers: \"Total Customers\",\n    vipCount: \"VIP\",\n    highRisk: \"High Risk\",\n    repeat: \"Repeat (3+)\",\n    tags: { vip: \"VIP\", wholesale: \"Wholesale\", blocked: \"Blocked\" },\n    never: \"Never\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Customer = {\n  id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; email: string | null;\n  total_orders: number; total_spent: number; last_order_at: string | null;\n  risk_level: string; is_blocked: boolean; tags: string[];\n};\ntype Stats = { total: number; vip: number; high_risk: number; repeat_customers: number };\n\nexport default function CustomersPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total: 0, vip: 0, high_risk: 0, repeat_customers: 0 });\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [filterRisk, setFilterRisk] = useState(\"all\");\n  const [filterVip, setFilterVip] = useState(false);\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"20\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      if (filterRisk !== \"all\") params.set(\"risk_level\", filterRisk);\n      if (filterVip) params.set(\"vip\", \"1\");\n\n      const [cusRes, statRes] = await Promise.all([\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n        fetch(`${API}/customers/stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n      ]);\n      if (cusRes.ok) {\n        const d = await cusRes.json();\n        setCustomers(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n      if (statRes.ok) {\n        const d = await statRes.json();\n        setStats(d.data ?? stats);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, filterRisk, filterVip, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search, filterRisk, filterVip]);\n\n  const handleSync = async () => {\n    setSyncing(true);\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/sync-all`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n    setSyncing(false);\n    void fetchData();\n  };\n\n  const handleToggleBlock = async (c: Customer) => {\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${c.id}/toggle-block`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n    void fetchData();\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-US\", { day: \"2-digit\", month: \"short\", year: \"2-digit\" })\n    : txt.never;\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"customer-list\" defaultExpandedKey=\"customers\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Stats */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-4\">\n        {[\n          { label: txt.totalCustomers, value: stats.total,             color: \"bg-[#0f7c7b]\" },\n          { label: txt.vipCount,       value: stats.vip,               color: \"bg-[#7b3fbd]\" },\n          { label: txt.highRisk,       value: stats.high_risk,         color: \"bg-[#c0392b]\" },\n          { label: txt.repeat,         value: stats.repeat_customers,  color: \"bg-[#2f7ec1]\" },\n        ].map(c => (\n          <article key={c.label} className={`${c.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white`}>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-white/80\">{c.label}</p>\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-2xl font-bold\">{loading ? \"...\" : c.value}</p>\n          </article>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n        <select value={filterRisk} onChange={e => setFilterRisk(e.target.value)}\n          className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n          <option value=\"all\">{txt.allRisk}</option>\n          <option value=\"low\">{txt.low}</option>\n          <option value=\"medium\">{txt.medium}</option>\n          <option value=\"high\">{txt.high}</option>\n        </select>\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer\">\n          <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={filterVip} onChange={e => setFilterVip(e.target.checked)}\n            className=\"accent-[var(--accent)]\" />\n          {txt.vipOnly}\n        </label>\n        <button onClick={handleSync} disabled={syncing}\n          className=\"ml-auto rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)]/40 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)]/10 disabled:opacity-60\">\n          {syncing ? txt.syncing : txt.syncBtn}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.name}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">{txt.orders}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.spent}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.lastOrder}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.risk}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : customers.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noCustomers}</td></tr>\n            ) : customers.map(c => (\n              <tr key={c.id} className={`border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] ${c.is_blocked ? \"opacity-50\" : \"\"}`}>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{c.name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{c.phone}</p>\n                  <div className=\"mt-1 flex flex-wrap gap-1\">\n                    {c.tags.map(tag => (\n                      <span key={tag} className={`rounded-full px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold\n                        ${tag === \"vip\" ? \"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\" : \"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\"}`}>\n                        {txt.tags[tag as keyof typeof txt.tags] ?? tag}\n                      </span>\n                    ))}\n                    {c.is_blocked && (\n                      <span className=\"rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-red-400\">\n                        {txt.tags.blocked}\n                      </span>\n                    )}\n                  </div>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center font-semibold\">{c.total_orders}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(c.total_spent).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(c.last_order_at)}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[c.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                    {txt[c.risk_level as \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\"] ?? c.risk_level}\n                  </span>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/customers/${c.id}`}\n                    className=\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                    {txt.view}\n                  </Link>\n                  <button onClick={() => handleToggleBlock(c)}\n                    className={`rounded-lg border px-2 py-1 text-xs\n                      ${c.is_blocked ? \"border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10\" : \"border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\"}`}>\n                    {c.is_blocked ? txt.unblock : txt.block}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"জন কাস্টমার\" : \"customers\"}</p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Customers list page done\"","explanation":"Write Customer List page","goal":"Create customer list page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"48b878d3-64b3-4626-a924-d6b67d3a7a79","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:19:11.754Z","parentId":"cbeae01c-f157-4f10-a3e9-6b0bab66b225"}
