নং\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    date: \\\"তারিখ\\\",\\n    viewOrder: \\\"দেখুন\\\",\\n    editTitle: \\\"কাস্টমার সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    editBtn: \\\"সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    blockBtn: \\\"ব্লক করুন\\\",\\n    unblockBtn: \\\"আনব্লক করুন\\\",\\n    vipToggle: \\\"VIP করুন\\\",\\n    removeVip: \\\"VIP সরান\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সংরক্ষণ\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    low: \\\"কম\\\", medium: \\\"মাঝারি\\\", high: \\\"উচ্চ\\\",\\n    never: \\\"কখনো না\\\",\\n    blocked: \\\"ব্লকড\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    back: \\\"← Customer List\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    notFound: \\\"Customer not found.\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"Phone\\\",\\n    email: \\\"Email\\\",\\n    address: \\\"Address\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"Notes\\\",\\n    totalOrders: \\\"Total Orders\\\",\\n    totalSpent: \\\"Total Spent\\\",\\n    lastOrder: \\\"Last Order\\\",\\n    riskLevel: \\\"Risk Level\\\",\\n    tags: \\\"Tags\\\",\\n    orderHistory: \\\"Order History\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"No orders.\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    date: \\\"Date\\\",\\n    viewOrder: \\\"View\\\",\\n    editTitle: \\\"Edit Customer\\\",\\n    editBtn: \\\"Edit\\\",\\n    blockBtn: \\\"Block\\\",\\n    unblockBtn: \\\"Unblock\\\",\\n    vipToggle: \\\"Mark VIP\\\",\\n    removeVip: \\\"Remove VIP\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n    low: \\\"Low\\\", medium: \\\"Medium\\\", high: \\\"High\\\",\\n    never: \\\"Never\\\",\\n    blocked: \\\"Blocked\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; total: string;\\n  status: string; created_at: string;\\n};\\ntype Customer = {\\n  id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; email: string | null;\\n  address: string | null; district: string | null; thana: string | null;\\n  notes: string | null; tags: string[]; risk_level: string; is_blocked: boolean;\\n  fraud_score: number; total_orders: number; total_spent: number;\\n  last_order_at: string | null; orders: Order[];\\n};\\n\\nexport default function CustomerDetailPage() {\\n  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [customer, setCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState(false);\\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<Partial<Customer>>({});\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const fetchCustomer = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setCustomer(d.data);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [id, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchCustomer(); }, [fetchCustomer]);\\n\\n  const openEdit = () => {\\n    if (!customer) return;\\n    setForm({ name: customer.name ?? \\\"\\\", email: customer.email ?? \\\"\\\", address: customer.address ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      district: customer.district ?? \\\"\\\", thana: customer.thana ?? \\\"\\\", notes: customer.notes ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      risk_level: customer.risk_level });\\n    setModal(true);\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, {\\n      method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n      headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      body: JSON.stringify(form),\\n    });\\n    setSaving(false);\\n    setModal(false);\\n    void fetchCustomer();\\n  };\\n\\n  const toggleBlock = async () => {\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}/toggle-block`, { method: \\\"POST\\\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n    void fetchCustomer();\\n  };\\n\\n  const toggleVip = async () => {\\n    if (!customer) return;\\n    const tags = customer.tags.includes(\\\"vip\\\")\\n      ? customer.tags.filter(t => t !== \\\"vip\\\")\\n      : [...customer.tags, \\\"vip\\\"];\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, {\\n      method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n      headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      body: JSON.stringify({ tags }),\\n    });\\n    void fetchCustomer();\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-US\\\", { day: \\\"2-digit\\\", month: \\\"short\\\", year: \\\"2-digit\\\" })\\n    : txt.never;\\n\\n  if (loading) return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"customer-list\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"customers\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \\\"কাস্টমার প্রোফাইল\\\", en: \\\"Customer Profile\\\" }}>\\n      <p className=\\\"text-center py-16 text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</p>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n\\n  if (!customer) return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"customer-list\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"customers\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \\\"কাস্টমার প্রোফাইল\\\", en: \\\"Customer Profile\\\" }}>\\n      <p className=\\\"text-center py-16 text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notFound}</p>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"customer-list\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"customers\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: customer.name ?? customer.phone, en: customer.name ?? customer.phone }}>\\n\\n      <Link href=\\\"/dashboard/customers\\\" className=\\\"mb-4 inline-block text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\\\">{txt.back}</Link>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3\\\">\\n        {/* Profile card */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5 md:col-span-1\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"mb-4 flex items-start justify-between\\\">\\n            <div>\\n              <h2 className=\\\"text-xl font-bold\\\">{customer.name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</h2>\\n              <p className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{customer.phone}</p>\\n              {customer.email && <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{customer.email}</p>}\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex flex-col items-end gap-1\\\">\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[customer.risk_level] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {txt[customer.risk_level as \\\"low\\\"|\\\"medium\\\"|\\\"high\\\"]}\\n              </span>\\n              {customer.is_blocked && (\\n                <span className=\\\"rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-400\\\">{txt.blocked}</span>\\n              )}\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          <dl className=\\\"space-y-2 text-sm\\\">\\n            {customer.address && (\\n              <div><dt className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.address}</dt>\\n                <dd>{customer.address}{customer.district ? `, ${customer.district}` : \\\"\\\"}{customer.thana ? `, ${customer.thana}` : \\\"\\\"}</dd>\\n              </div>\\n            )}\\n            {customer.notes && (\\n              <div><dt className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</dt><dd className=\\\"italic\\\">{customer.notes}</dd></div>\\n            )}\\n          </dl>\\n\\n          <div className=\\\"mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-center\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--surface-soft)] p-3\\\">\\n              <p className=\\\"text-2xl font-bold\\\">{customer.total_orders}</p>\\n              <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.totalOrders}</p>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--surface-soft)] p-3\\\">\\n              <p className=\\\"text-lg font-bold\\\">৳{Number(customer.total_spent).toLocaleString()}</p>\\n              <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.totalSpent}</p>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {customer.tags.length > 0 && (\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1\\\">\\n              {customer.tags.map(tag => (\\n                <span key={tag} className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold\\n                  ${tag === \\\"vip\\\" ? \\\"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\\\" : \\\"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\\\"}`}>\\n                  {tag.toUpperCase()}\\n                </span>\\n              ))}\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n\\n          <div className=\\\"mt-4 flex flex-col gap-2\\\">\\n            <button onClick={openEdit} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.editBtn}</button>\\n            <button onClick={toggleVip}\\n              className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-purple-500/30 py-2 text-sm text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/10\\\">\\n              {customer.tags.includes(\\\"vip\\\") ? txt.removeVip : txt.vipToggle}\\n            </button>\\n            <button onClick={toggleBlock}\\n              className={`w-full rounded-xl border py-2 text-sm\\n                ${customer.is_blocked ? \\\"border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10\\\" : \\\"border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\"}`}>\\n              {customer.is_blocked ? txt.unblockBtn : txt.blockBtn}\\n            </button>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Order history */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5 md:col-span-2\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.orderHistory}</h3>\\n          {customer.orders.length === 0 ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"py-8 text-center text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noOrders}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n              <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n                <thead>\\n                  <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n                    <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-left\\\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{txt.status}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.date}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-right\\\">{txt.viewOrder}</th>\\n                  </tr>\\n                </thead>\\n                <tbody>\\n                  {customer.orders.map(o => (\\n                    <tr key={o.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{o.order_number}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">\\n                        <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${statusColor[o.status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                          {o.status}\\n                        </span>\\n                      </td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2 text-right\\\">\\n                        <Link href={`/dashboard/orders/${o.id}`}\\n                          className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\\\">\\n                          {txt.viewOrder}\\n                        </Link>\\n                      </td>\\n                    </tr>\\n                  ))}\\n                </tbody>\\n              </table>\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Edit modal */}\\n      {modal && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setModal(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.editTitle}</h3>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n              {([\\\"name\\\",\\\"email\\\",\\\"address\\\",\\\"district\\\",\\\"thana\\\",\\\"notes\\\"] as const).map(field => (\\n                <label key={field} className={field === \\\"address\\\" || field === \\\"notes\\\" ? \\\"sm:col-span-2\\\" : \\\"\\\"}>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs capitalize text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt[field as keyof typeof txt]}</span>\\n                  {field === \\\"notes\\\" || field === \\\"address\\\" ? (\\n                    <textarea rows={2} value={(form[field] as string) ?? \\\"\\\"}\\n                      onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\\n                      className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\\\" />\\n                  ) : (\\n                    <input value={(form[field] as string) ?? \\\"\\\"}\\n                      onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\\n                      className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                  )}\\n                </label>\\n              ))}\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.riskLevel}</span>\\n                <select value={form.risk_level ?? \\\"low\\\"} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, risk_level: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"low\\\">{txt.low}</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"medium\\\">{txt.medium}</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"high\\\">{txt.high}</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setModal(false)} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Customer detail page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write Customer Detail/Profile page\", \"goal\": \"Create customer detail page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"05a9e548-fbb1-4812-a891-0ed06d0ad723","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:20:17.847Z","parentId":"60b22ccd-0a68-4665-83cd-bd25d2ec11cf"}

loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    notFound: \"কাস্টমার পাওয়া যায়নি।\",\n    phone: \"ফোন\",\n    email: \"ইমেইল\",\n    address: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    notes: \"নোট\",\n    totalOrders: \"মোট অর্ডার\",\n    totalSpent: \"মোট ক্রয়\",\n    lastOrder: \"শেষ অর্ডার\",\n    riskLevel: \"ঝুঁকি স্তর\",\n    tags: \"ট্যাগ\",\n    orderHistory: \"অর্ডারের ইতিহাস\",\n    noOrders: \"কোনো অর্ডার নেই।\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    date: \"তারিখ\",\n    viewOrder: \"দেখুন\",\n    editTitle: \"কাস্টমার সম্পাদনা\",\n    editBtn: \"সম্পাদনা\",\n    blockBtn: \"ব্লক করুন\",\n    unblockBtn: \"আনব্লক করুন\",\n    vipToggle: \"VIP করুন\",\n    removeVip: \"VIP সরান\",\n    save: \"সংরক্ষণ\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    saving: \"সংরক্ষণ হচ্ছে...\",\n    low: \"কম\", medium: \"মাঝারি\", high: \"উচ্চ\",\n    never: \"কখনো না\",\n    blocked: \"ব্লকড\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    back: \"← Customer List\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    notFound: \"Customer not found.\",\n    phone: \"Phone\",\n    email: \"Email\",\n    address: \"Address\",\n    notes: \"Notes\",\n    totalOrders: \"Total Orders\",\n    totalSpent: \"Total Spent\",\n    lastOrder: \"Last Order\",\n    riskLevel: \"Risk Level\",\n    tags: \"Tags\",\n    orderHistory: \"Order History\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders.\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    date: \"Date\",\n    viewOrder: \"View\",\n    editTitle: \"Edit Customer\",\n    editBtn: \"Edit\",\n    blockBtn: \"Block\",\n    unblockBtn: \"Unblock\",\n    vipToggle: \"Mark VIP\",\n    removeVip: \"Remove VIP\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n    low: \"Low\", medium: \"Medium\", high: \"High\",\n    never: \"Never\",\n    blocked: \"Blocked\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; total: string;\n  status: string; created_at: string;\n};\ntype Customer = {\n  id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; email: string | null;\n  address: string | null; district: string | null; thana: string | null;\n  notes: string | null; tags: string[]; risk_level: string; is_blocked: boolean;\n  fraud_score: number; total_orders: number; total_spent: number;\n  last_order_at: string | null; orders: Order[];\n};\n\nexport default function CustomerDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [customer, setCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState(false);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<Partial<Customer>>({});\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchCustomer = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setCustomer(d.data);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [id, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchCustomer(); }, [fetchCustomer]);\n\n  const openEdit = () => {\n    if (!customer) return;\n    setForm({ name: customer.name ?? \"\", email: customer.email ?? \"\", address: customer.address ?? \"\",\n      district: customer.district ?? \"\", thana: customer.thana ?? \"\", notes: customer.notes ?? \"\",\n      risk_level: customer.risk_level });\n    setModal(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    setSaving(true);\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, {\n      method: \"PUT\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      body: JSON.stringify(form),\n    });\n    setSaving(false);\n    setModal(false);\n    void fetchCustomer();\n  };\n\n  const toggleBlock = async () => {\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}/toggle-block`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n    void fetchCustomer();\n  };\n\n  const toggleVip = async () => {\n    if (!customer) return;\n    const tags = customer.tags.includes(\"vip\")\n      ? customer.tags.filter(t => t !== \"vip\")\n      : [...customer.tags, \"vip\"];\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${id}`, {\n      method: \"PUT\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ tags }),\n    });\n    void fetchCustomer();\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-US\", { day: \"2-digit\", month: \"short\", year: \"2-digit\" })\n    : txt.never;\n\n  if (loading) return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"customer-list\" defaultExpandedKey=\"customers\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \"কাস্টমার প্রোফাইল\", en: \"Customer Profile\" }}>\n      <p className=\"text-center py-16 text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</p>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n\n  if (!customer) return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"customer-list\" defaultExpandedKey=\"customers\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \"কাস্টমার প্রোফাইল\", en: \"Customer Profile\" }}>\n      <p className=\"text-center py-16 text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notFound}</p>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"customer-list\" defaultExpandedKey=\"customers\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: customer.name ?? customer.phone, en: customer.name ?? customer.phone }}>\n\n      <Link href=\"/dashboard/customers\" className=\"mb-4 inline-block text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\">{txt.back}</Link>\n\n      <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3\">\n        {/* Profile card */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-5 md:col-span-1\">\n          <div className=\"mb-4 flex items-start justify-between\">\n            <div>\n              <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold\">{customer.name ?? \"—\"}</h2>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{customer.phone}</p>\n              {customer.email && <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{customer.email}</p>}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex flex-col items-end gap-1\">\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${riskColor[customer.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {txt[customer.risk_level as \"low\"|\"medium\"|\"high\"]}\n              </span>\n              {customer.is_blocked && (\n                <span className=\"rounded-full bg-red-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-400\">{txt.blocked}</span>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <dl className=\"space-y-2 text-sm\">\n            {customer.address && (\n              <div><dt className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.address}</dt>\n                <dd>{customer.address}{customer.district ? `, ${customer.district}` : \"\"}{customer.thana ? `, ${customer.thana}` : \"\"}</dd>\n              </div>\n            )}\n            {customer.notes && (\n              <div><dt className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</dt><dd className=\"italic\">{customer.notes}</dd></div>\n            )}\n          </dl>\n\n          <div className=\"mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-center\">\n            <div className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--surface-soft)] p-3\">\n              <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">{customer.total_orders}</p>\n              <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.totalOrders}</p>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--surface-soft)] p-3\">\n              <p className=\"text-lg font-bold\">৳{Number(customer.total_spent).toLocaleString()}</p>\n              <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.totalSpent}</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {customer.tags.length > 0 && (\n            <div className=\"mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1\">\n              {customer.tags.map(tag => (\n                <span key={tag} className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold\n                  ${tag === \"vip\" ? \"bg-purple-500/15 text-purple-400\" : \"bg-[var(--surface)] text-[var(--muted)]\"}`}>\n                  {tag.toUpperCase()}\n                </span>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"mt-4 flex flex-col gap-2\">\n            <button onClick={openEdit} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.editBtn}</button>\n            <button onClick={toggleVip}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-purple-500/30 py-2 text-sm text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/10\">\n              {customer.tags.includes(\"vip\") ? txt.removeVip : txt.vipToggle}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={toggleBlock}\n              className={`w-full rounded-xl border py-2 text-sm\n                ${customer.is_blocked ? \"border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10\" : \"border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\"}`}>\n              {customer.is_blocked ? txt.unblockBtn : txt.blockBtn}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Order history */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-5 md:col-span-2\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.orderHistory}</h3>\n          {customer.orders.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"py-8 text-center text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noOrders}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n              <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n                <thead>\n                  <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n                    <th className=\"px-3 py-2 text-left\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n                    <th className=\"px-3 py-2 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n                    <th className=\"px-3 py-2\">{txt.status}</th>\n                    <th className=\"px-3 py-2 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.date}</th>\n                    <th className=\"px-3 py-2 text-right\">{txt.viewOrder}</th>\n                  </tr>\n                </thead>\n                <tbody>\n                  {customer.orders.map(o => (\n                    <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                      <td className=\"px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                      <td className=\"px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                      <td className=\"px-3 py-2\">\n                        <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${statusColor[o.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                          {o.status}\n                        </span>\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-3 py-2 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\n                      <td className=\"px-3 py-2 text-right\">\n                        <Link href={`/dashboard/orders/${o.id}`}\n                          className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                          {txt.viewOrder}\n                        </Link>\n                      </td>\n                    </tr>\n                  ))}\n                </tbody>\n              </table>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Edit modal */}\n      {modal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setModal(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.editTitle}</h3>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2\">\n              {([\"name\",\"email\",\"address\",\"district\",\"thana\",\"notes\"] as const).map(field => (\n                <label key={field} className={field === \"address\" || field === \"notes\" ? \"sm:col-span-2\" : \"\"}>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs capitalize text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt[field as keyof typeof txt]}</span>\n                  {field === \"notes\" || field === \"address\" ? (\n                    <textarea rows={2} value={(form[field] as string) ?? \"\"}\n                      onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)] resize-none\" />\n                  ) : (\n                    <input value={(form[field] as string) ?? \"\"}\n                      onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                  )}\n                </label>\n              ))}\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.riskLevel}</span>\n                <select value={form.risk_level ?? \"low\"} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, risk_level: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"low\">{txt.low}</option>\n                  <option value=\"medium\">{txt.medium}</option>\n                  <option value=\"high\">{txt.high}</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setModal(false)} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Customer detail page done\"","explanation":"Write Customer Detail/Profile page","goal":"Create customer detail page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"ac4df7be-8bbf-4bd2-b8c0-ec7087c3b27c","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:20:17.922Z","parentId":"ba030fbb-0f1f-4342-8260-70a9c33caad1"}

Tag high-value customers as VIP.\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Name & Phone\\\",\\n    orders: \\\"Orders\\\",\\n    spent: \\\"Total Spent\\\",\\n    lastOrder: \\\"Last Order\\\",\\n    view: \\\"View\\\",\\n    removeVip: \\\"Remove VIP\\\",\\n    never: \\\"Never\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Customer = { id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; total_orders: number; total_spent: number; last_order_at: string | null; tags: string[] };\\n\\nexport default function VipPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n\\n  const fetchVip = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/customers?vip=1&per_page=100`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) { const d = await res.json(); setCustomers(d.data ?? []); }\\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchVip(); }, [fetchVip]);\\n\\n  const removeVip = async (c: Customer) => {\\n    const tags = c.tags.filter(t => t !== \\\"vip\\\");\\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${c.id}`, {\\n      method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n      headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      body: JSON.stringify({ tags }),\\n    });\\n    void fetchVip();\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-US\\\", { day: \\\"2-digit\\\", month: \\\"short\\\", year: \\\"2-digit\\\" })\\n    : txt.never;\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"vip-customers\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"customers\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.name}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center\\\">{txt.orders}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.spent}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.lastOrder}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.view}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : customers.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noVip}</td></tr>\\n            ) : customers.map(c => (\\n              <tr key={c.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{c.name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</p>\\n                  <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{c.phone}</p>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mt-1 inline-block rounded-full bg-purple-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-purple-400\\\">VIP</span>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-center font-semibold\\\">{c.total_orders}</td>\\n                <td onClick={() => removeVip(c)}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/10\\\">\\n                    {txt.removeVip}\\n                  </button>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n      </div>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\n\\ncat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/risky/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport Link from \\\"next/link\\\";\\nimport { \\\"উচ্চ\\\", medium: \\\"মাঝারি\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Risky Customers\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noRisky: \\\"No risky customers found.\\\",\\n    name: \\\"View\\\",\\n    block: \\\"Block\\\",\\n    unblock: \\\"Unblock\\\",\\n    never: \\\"Never\\\",\\n    high: \\\"High\\\", medium: \\\"Medium\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Customer = {\\n  id: number;\\n};\\n\\nexport default function RiskyPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n\\n  const fetchRisky = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      // Fetch medium + high risk separately and merge\\n      const [medRes, highRes] = await Promise.all([\\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?risk_level=medium&per_page=50`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?risk_level=high&per_page=50`, { headers: { Authorization: {"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01QNG3XtD58Q99CNMhGCdaQg","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/vip/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"VIP কাস্টমার\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noVip: \"কোনো VIP কাস্টমার নেই। উচ্চ মূল্যের কাস্টমারদের VIP ট্যাগ করুন।\",\n    name: \"নাম ও ফোন\",\n    orders: \"অর্ডার\",\n    spent: \"মোট ক্রয়\",\n    lastOrder: \"শেষ অর্ডার\",\n    view: \"দেখুন\",\n    removeVip: \"VIP সরান\",\n    never: \"কখনো না\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"VIP Customers\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noVip: \"No VIP customers yet. Tag high-value customers as VIP.\",\n    name: \"Name & Phone\",\n    orders: \"Orders\",\n    spent: \"Total Spent\",\n    lastOrder: \"Last Order\",\n    view: \"View\",\n    removeVip: \"Remove VIP\",\n    never: \"Never\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Customer = { id: number; name: string | null; phone: string; total_orders: number; total_spent: number; last_order_at: string | null; tags: string[] };\n\nexport default function VipPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  const fetchVip = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/customers?vip=1&per_page=100`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) { const d = await res.json(); setCustomers(d.data ?? []); }\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  }, [token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchVip(); }, [fetchVip]);\n\n  const removeVip = async (c: Customer) => {\n    const tags = c.tags.filter(t => t !== \"vip\");\n    await fetch(`${API}/customers/${c.id}`, {\n      method: \"PUT\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ tags }),\n    });\n    void fetchVip();\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (d: string | null) => d\n    ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-US\", { day: \"2-digit\", month: \"short\", year: \"2-digit\" })\n    : txt.never;\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"vip-customers\" defaultExpandedKey=\"customers\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.name}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center\">{txt.orders}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.spent}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.lastOrder}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.view}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : customers.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noVip}</td></tr>\n            ) : customers.map(c => (\n              <tr key={c.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{c.name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{c.phone}</p>\n                  <span className=\"mt-1 inline-block rounded-full bg-purple-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-purple-400\">VIP</span>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-center font-semibold\">{c.total_orders}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-bold\">৳{Number(c.total_spent).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(c.last_order_at)}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/customers/${c.id}`}\n                    className=\"mr-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-2 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface)]\">\n                    {txt.view}\n                  </Link>\n                  <button onClick={() => removeVip(c)}\n                    className=\"rounded-lg border border-purple-500/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/10\">\n                    {txt.removeVip}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\n\ncat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/risky/page.tsx << Record<string, string> = {\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n};\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"ঝুঁকিপূর্ণ কাস্টমার\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noRisky: \"কোনো ঝুঁকিপূর্ণ কাস্টমার নেই।\",\n    name: \"নাম ও ফোন\",\n    orders: \"অর্ডার\",\n    spent: \"মোট ক্রয়\",\n    risk: \"ঝুঁকি\",\n    lastOrder: \"শেষ pageTitle: \"Risky Customers\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noRisky: \"No risky customers found.\",\n    name: \"Name & Phone\",\n    orders: \"Orders\",\n    spent: \"Total Spent\",\n    risk: const token = getStoredToken();\n  const [customers, setCustomers] = useState<Customer[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  const fetchRisky = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      // Fetch medium + high risk separately and merge\n      const [medRes, highRes] = await Promise.all([\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?risk_level=medium&per_page=50`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n        fetch(`${API}/customers?risk_level=high&per_page=50`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }),\n      ]);\n      const med  = medRes.ok  ? (await medRes.json()).data  ?? [] : [];\n      const high = highRes.ok ? (await highRes.json()).data ?? {"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"7d87f2aa-5d2f-40f3-89d8-432a59d3fd4c","content":"Customer Management সম্পূর্ণ। Commit `669d310` pushed।\n\n**যা হয়েছে:**\n\n**Backend:**\n- `customers` table — phone unique per seller, `tags` jsonb, risk_level, is_blocked, total_orders/spent aggregates\n- `Customer::syncFromOrder()` — প্রতিটি নতুন অর্ডারে customer record auto-upsert হয়\n- `CustomerController` — 6 routes: list, show, update, stats, toggleBlock, syncAll\n\n**Frontend (4 page):**\n- [/dashboard/customers](frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/page.tsx) — কাস্টমার তালিকা, stats bar, search/risk/VIP filter, block toggle, Sync button\n- [/dashboard/customers/[id]](frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/%5Bid%5D/page.tsx) — প্রোফাইল + সম্পূর্ণ অর্ডার ইতিহাস + edit modal + VIP/block actions\n- [/dashboard/customers/vip](frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/vip/page.tsx) — VIP তালিকা\n- [/dashboard/customers/risky](frontend/src/app/dashboard/customers/risky/page.tsx) — high/medium ঝুঁকির কাস্টমার\n\n**পরবর্তী কোনটা?** Courier Integration, SMS Automation, নাকি Analytics?","toolRequests":[]},"id":"9f93c7f7-b631-454b-a2fb-20a38ae27dd8","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:22:19.863Z","parentId":"5662917f-5a6c-4080-bf9d-d7ade759c662"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"11f130bb-ee07-4f38-9cbe-73f42881465e","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01TsvtLAi78GeGuFzoXJB8b6","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat /var/www/hybrid-stack/zyro/core/PathaoService.php | head -120\", \"explanation\": \"Read Pathao API integration reference\", \"goal\": \"Understand Pathao API\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"Good, I can see that the zyro project already has Steadfast and Pathao courier integrations. Let me check the PathaoService too, and the courier controller to understand the full picture.\n\nFor the hybrid-stack, I need to:\n1. Create a `courier_settings` migration — to store API keys per user (steadfast api_key + secret_key, pathao client_id + secret)\n2. Create `CourierSetting` model\n3. Create `CourierController` — with methods for:\n   - book (create order in Steadfast/Pathao)\n   - track (check status)\n   - settings (CRUD)\n4. Frontend pages:\n   - /dashboard/courier — book parcel (select orders and send to courier)\n   - /dashboard/courier/track — tracking status\n   - /dashboard/settings/courier — API key settings\n\nNow let me examine the Pathao service implementation."},"id":"79af7a12-5550-4bc9-b1fe-c9939ef0e31c","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:25:29.540Z","parentId":"4111413d-4055-4081-97fc-db0046230766"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"3f135c71-ae57-4c77-bc62-82f37f191135","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_014brji9yJXeT317HuqZWBXU","name":"manage_todo_list","arguments":"{\"todoList\": [{\"id\":1,\"status\":\"in-progress\",\"title\":\"Backend: courier_settings migration + model\"},{\"id\":2,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Backend: SteadfastService Laravel service\"},{\"id\":3,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Backend: CourierController + routes\"},{\"id\":4,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Frontend: Book Parcel page\"},{\"id\":5,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Frontend: Track parcels page\"},{\"id\":6,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Frontend: Courier settings page\"},{\"id\":7,\"status\":\"not-started\",\"title\":\"Build + deploy + commit\"}]}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"Now I have a clear understanding of how Steadfast and Pathao APIs work. Let me design the Courier Integration:\n\n**Backend:**\n1. Migration: `courier_settings` table — per user (api_key, secret_key for each courier)\n2. Model: `CourierSetting`\n3. Laravel services: `SteadfastService`, `PathaoService`\n4. `CourierController`:\n   - `getSettings` — get user's courier API keys\n   - `saveSettings` — save/update courier credentials\n   - `book` — create order in courier (Steadfast/Pathao) from a specific order ID\n   - `trackByConsignment` — check status for a consignment ID\n   - `trackOrder` — check status of an Order by order ID\n   - `stats` — courier breakdown stats\n\n**Frontend:**\n- `/dashboard/courier` — Book Parcel: list of `delivered` status orders that don't have a tracking ID, book button\n- `/dashboard/courier/track` — Track parcels: list of orders with courier_tracking_id, refresh status\n- `/dashboard/settings/courier` — Add Steadfast / Pathao API keys\n\nI'll keep the scope tight by focusing on Steadfast and Pathao, starting with the simpler Steadfast implementation that just needs an API key and secret.  Pathao's OAuth flow is more involved, so I'll add a manual tracking option for now while I build out the full integration later. The settings page will store the API credentials for both services plus a default courier preference. I'm designing a database table to hold these credentials per user, along with a controller to manage retrieving and saving them securely.\n\nNow I'm mapping out the core courier endpoints: saving settings, booking shipments through Steadfast, tracking consignments by their ID, and listing both booked and pending orders to give visibility into what's ready to ship versus what's already in transit."},"id":"f082d73c-7cf8-4266-be36-c323b42c202d","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:25:50.307Z","parentId":"6f7791a6-7d85-434e-9bf5-f8cafda7668e"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"ed5a4124-4085-4277-b6f0-a9cc8204fe0c","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01FWRCcPuhaqQZJybhwXGV5Y","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Services;\\n\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Facades\\\\Http;\\n\\nclass SteadfastService\\n{\\n    private const BASE = 'https://portal.packzy.com/api/v1';\\n\\n    public function createOrder(string $apiKey, string $secretKey, array $data): array\\n    {\\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\\n        ])->timeout(15)->post(self::BASE . '/create_order', [\\n            'invoice'           => $data['invoice'],\\n            'recipient_name'    => $data['recipient_name'],\\n            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone($data['recipient_phone']),\\n            'recipient_address' => $data['recipient_address'],\\n            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\\n            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? '',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        return $response->json() ?? ['status' => 0, 'message' => 'Invalid response'];\\n    }\\n\\n    public function getStatus(string $apiKey, string $secretKey, string $consignmentId): array\\n    {\\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\\n        ])->timeout(15)->get(self::BASE . '/status_by_cid/' . $consignmentId);\\n\\n        return $response->json() ?? ['status' => 0, 'message' => 'Invalid response'];\\n    }\\n\\n    public function getBalance(string $apiKey, string $secretKey): array\\n    {\\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\\n        ])->timeout(15)->get(self::BASE . '/get_balance');\\n\\n        return $response->json() ?? [];\\n    }\\n\\n    private function formatPhone(string $phone): string\\n    {\\n        $phone = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $phone);\\n        if (strlen($phone) > 11) {\\n            $phone = substr($phone, -11);\\n        }\\n        return $phone;\\n    }\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Services/SteadfastService.php\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"5daeaec2-ad14-4ee4-91e4-43c134727396","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:26:37.243Z","parentId":"632688cc-f36b-4199-b415-d586f055a19a"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01FWRCcPuhaqQZJybhwXGV5Y","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Services;\n\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Http;\n\nclass SteadfastService\n{\n    private const BASE = 'https://portal.packzy.com/api/v1';\n\n    public function createOrder(string $apiKey, string $secretKey, array $data): array\n    {\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\n        ])->timeout(15)->post(self::BASE . '/create_order', [\n            'invoice'           => $data['invoice'],\n            'recipient_name'    => $data['recipient_name'],\n            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone($data['recipient_phone']),\n            'recipient_address' => $data['recipient_address'],\n            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\n            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? '',\n        ]);\n\n        return $response->json() ?? ['status' => 0, 'message' => 'Invalid response'];\n    }\n\n    public function getStatus(string $apiKey, string $secretKey, string $consignmentId): array\n    {\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\n        ])->timeout(15)->get(self::BASE . '/status_by_cid/' . $consignmentId);\n\n        return $response->json() ?? ['status' => 0, 'message' => 'Invalid response'];\n    }\n\n    public function getBalance(string $apiKey, string $secretKey): array\n    {\n        $response = Http::withHeaders([\n            'Api-Key'    => $apiKey,\n            'Secret-Key' => $secretKey,\n        ])->timeout(15)->get(self::BASE . '/get_balance');\n\n        return $response->json() ?? [];\n    }\n\n    private function formatPhone(string $phone): string\n    {\n        $phone = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $phone);\n        if (strlen($phone) > 11) {\n            $phone = substr($phone, -11);\n        }\n        return $phone;\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Services/SteadfastService.php"}},"id":"0cd39230-93a8-4149-b56c-01da4db185cb","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:26:37.329Z","parentId":"44e41741-419e-49d2-bf9e-21dabbd1afd7"}
{"type":"tool.execution_complete","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01FWRCcPuhaqQZJybhwXGV5Y","success":true},"id":"9cf0a274-4ca6-43d2-9a6b-cf60d418f623","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:26:37.464Z","parentId":"0cd39230-93a8-4149-b56c-01da4db185cb"}
{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"85b799a8-f3e3-4637-8c55-a1bf005784f9","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_011p22nxRokwN756pY9NpenY","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\CourierSetting;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Order;\\nuse App\\\\Services\\\\SteadfastService;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\n\\nclass CourierController extends Controller\\n{\\n    // ── Courier Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function getSettings(): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $settings->exists ? $settings->masked() : null,\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function saveSettings(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'default_courier'     => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\\n            'steadfast_api_key'   => 'nullable|string|max:200',\\n            'steadfast_secret_key'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\\n            'pathao_client_id'    => 'nullable|string|max:200',\\n            'pathao_client_secret'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\\n            'pathao_store_id'     => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n            'redx_api_key'        => 'nullable|string|max:200',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        // Only update keys that are actually sent (not masked placeholders)\\n        $existing = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\\n\\n        foreach ($data as $field => $value) {\\n            // Skip masked values (contain ***)\\n            if ($value !== null && str_contains((string) $value, '***')) continue;\\n            $existing->$field = $value;\\n        }\\n        $existing->user_id = auth()->id();\\n        $existing->save();\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $existing->masked()]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function testConnection(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n        }\\n\\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n        $result  = $service->getBalance($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\\n\\n        $ok = isset($result['status']) && $result['status'] == 200;\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => $ok,\\n            'data'    => $result,\\n            'message' => $ok ? 'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Book Parcel ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function book(Request $request, int $orderId): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\\n\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'courier'       => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\\n            'cod_amount'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n            'note'          => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n            'tracking_id'   => 'nullable|string|max:100', // for manual entry\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $courier = $data['courier'] ?? 'steadfast';\\n\\n        // Manual tracking entry\\n        if ($courier === 'manual' || isset($data['tracking_id'])) {\\n            $order->update([\\n                'courier_name'        => $courier,\\n                'courier_tracking_id' => $data['tracking_id'] ?? null,\\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\\n                'status'              => 'processing',\\n            ]);\\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'message' => 'Manual tracking saved.']);\\n        }\\n\\n        if ($courier === 'steadfast') {\\n            return $this->bookSteadfast($order, $data);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Courier not supported yet.'], 422);\\n    }\\n\\n    private function bookSteadfast(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast API credentials not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.'], 422);\\n        }\\n\\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n        $result  = $service->createOrder($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, [\\n            'invoice'           => $order->order_number,\\n            'recipient_name'    => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\\n            'recipient_phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\\n            'recipient_address' => $order->customer_address ?? ($order->customer_district . ', ' . $order->customer_thana),\\n            'cod_amount'        => $data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total,\\n            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? $order->notes ?? '',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        // Steadfast returns consignment_id on success\\n        if (isset($result['consignment']['consignment_id'])) {\\n            $consignmentId = $result['consignment']['consignment_id'];\\n            $order->update([\\n                'courier_name'        => 'steadfast',\\n                'courier_tracking_id' => (string) $consignmentId,\\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\\n                'courier_charge'      => $result['consignment']['current_status'] ?? null,\\n                'status'              => 'processing',\\n            ]);\\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'consignment_id' => $consignmentId]);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => false,\\n            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Steadfast booking failed.',\\n            'raw'     => $result,\\n        ], 422);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Track ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function trackOrder(int $orderId): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\\n\\n        if (! $order->courier_tracking_id) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'No tracking ID.'], 422);\\n        }\\n        if ($order->courier_name !== 'steadfast') {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => ['status' => $order->courier_status], 'message' => 'Manual tracking.']);\\n        }\\n\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n        }\\n\\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n        $result  = $service->getStatus($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $order->courier_tracking_id);\\n\\n        if (isset($result['delivery_status'])) {\\n            $order->update(['courier_status' => $result['delivery_status']]);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result, 'order' => $order]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Booked orders (with tracking) ─────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function booked(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->whereNotNull('courier_tracking_id')\\n            ->orderByDesc('updated_at');\\n\\n        if ($request->filled('courier_name')) {\\n            $query->where('courier_name', $request->courier_name);\\n        }\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Ready to book (confirmed/processing, no tracking) ────────────────────\\n\\n    public function readyToBook(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->whereIn('status', ['confirmed', 'processing'])\\n            ->whereNull('courier_tracking_id')\\n            ->orderByDesc('created_at');\\n\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n}\\n\", \"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"7003b604-dfc4-4246-b5ba-1a9564e48549","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:27:09.719Z","parentId":"9cf0a274-4ca6-43d2-9a6b-cf60d418f623"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_011p22nxRokwN756pY9NpenY","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\CourierSetting;\nuse App\\Models\\Order;\nuse App\\Services\\SteadfastService;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\n\nclass CourierController extends Controller\n{\n    // ── Courier Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function getSettings(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $settings->exists ? $settings->masked() : null,\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    public function saveSettings(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'default_courier'     => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\n            'steadfast_api_key'   => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'steadfast_secret_key'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_client_id'    => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_client_secret'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_store_id'     => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'redx_api_key'        => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n        ]);\n\n        // Only update keys that are actually sent (not masked placeholders)\n        $existing = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\n\n        foreach ($data as $field => $value) {\n            // Skip masked values (contain ***)\n            if ($value !== null && str_contains((string) $value, '***')) continue;\n            $existing->$field = $value;\n        }\n        $existing->user_id = auth()->id();\n        $existing->save();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $existing->masked()]);\n    }\n\n    public function testConnection(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->getBalance($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\n\n        $ok = isset($result['status']) && $result['status'] == 200;\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => $ok,\n            'data'    => $result,\n            'message' => $ok ? 'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Book Parcel ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function book(Request $request, int $orderId): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'courier'       => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\n            'cod_amount'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'note'          => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n            'tracking_id'   => 'nullable|string|max:100', // for manual entry\n        ]);\n\n        $courier = $data['courier'] ?? 'steadfast';\n\n        // Manual tracking entry\n        if ($courier === 'manual' || isset($data['tracking_id'])) {\n            $order->update([\n                'courier_name'        => $courier,\n                'courier_tracking_id' => $data['tracking_id'] ?? null,\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\n                'status'              => 'processing',\n            ]);\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'message' => 'Manual tracking saved.']);\n        }\n\n        if ($courier === 'steadfast') {\n            return $this->bookSteadfast($order, $data);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Courier not supported yet.'], 422);\n    }\n\n    private function bookSteadfast(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast API credentials not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->createOrder($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, [\n            'invoice'           => $order->order_number,\n            'recipient_name'    => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\n            'recipient_phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\n            'recipient_address' => $order->customer_address ?? ($order->customer_district . ', ' . $order->customer_thana),\n            'cod_amount'        => $data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total,\n            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? $order->notes ?? '',\n        ]);\n\n        // Steadfast returns consignment_id on success\n        if (isset($result['consignment']['consignment_id'])) {\n            $consignmentId = $result['consignment']['consignment_id'];\n            $order->update([\n                'courier_name'        => 'steadfast',\n                'courier_tracking_id' => (string) $consignmentId,\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\n                'courier_charge'      => $result['consignment']['current_status'] ?? null,\n                'status'              => 'processing',\n            ]);\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'consignment_id' => $consignmentId]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => false,\n            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Steadfast booking failed.',\n            'raw'     => $result,\n        ], 422);\n    }\n\n    // ── Track ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function trackOrder(int $orderId): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\n\n        if (! $order->courier_tracking_id) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'No tracking ID.'], 422);\n        }\n        if ($order->courier_name !== 'steadfast') {\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => ['status' => $order->courier_status], 'message' => 'Manual tracking.']);\n        }\n\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->getStatus($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $order->courier_tracking_id);\n\n        if (isset($result['delivery_status'])) {\n            $order->update(['courier_status' => $result['delivery_status']]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result, 'order' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Booked orders (with tracking) ─────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function booked(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereNotNull('courier_tracking_id')\n            ->orderByDesc('updated_at');\n\n        if ($request->filled('courier_name')) {\n            $query->where('courier_name', $request->courier_name);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Ready to book (confirmed/processing, no tracking) ────────────────────\n\n    public function readyToBook(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereIn('status', ['confirmed', 'processing'])\n            ->whereNull('courier_tracking_id')\n            ->orderByDesc('created_at');\n\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\n        ]);\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php"}},"id":"205551d5-4fe9-4aca-b608-ed03c15f1fd6","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:27:09.778Z","parentId":"08350dbf-d924-45af-b7be-406954d62593"}

[CustomerController::class, 'stats']);\\n    Route::post('/customers/sync-all', [CustomerController::class, 'syncAll']);\\n    Route::post('/customers/{customer}/toggle-block', [CustomerController::class, 'toggleBlock']);\\n    Route::apiResource('/customers', CustomerController::class)->only(['index', 'show', 'update']);\\n\\n    // ── Courier Integration ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n    Route::prefix('courier')->group(function () {\\n        Route::get('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'getSettings']);\\n        Route::put('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'saveSettings']);\\n        Route::post('/settings/test', [CourierController::class, 'testConnection']);\\n        Route::get('/ready', Route::get('/track/{order}', [CourierController::class, 'trackOrder']);\\n    });\", \"oldString\": \"    // ── Customer Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n {"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_019TjCRfUx3N2vib6SzLjKT9","toolName":"replace_string_in_file","arguments":{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/routes/api.php","newString":"    // ── Customer Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    Route::get('/customers/stats', [CustomerController::class, 'stats']);\n    Route::post('/customers/sync-all', [CustomerController::class, 'syncAll']);\n    Route::post('/customers/{customer}/toggle-block', [CustomerController::class, 'toggleBlock']);\n    Route::apiResource('/customers', CustomerController::class)->only(['index', 'show', 'update']);\n\n    // ── Courier Integration ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    Route::prefix('courier')->group(function () {\n        Route::get('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'getSettings']);\n        Route::put('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'saveSettings']);\n        Route::post('/settings/test', [CourierController::class, 'testConnection']);\n        Route::get('/ready', [CourierController::class, 'readyToBook']);\n        Route::get('/booked', [CourierController::class, 'booked']);\n        Route::post('/book/{order}', [CourierController::class, 'book']);\n        Route::get('/track/{order}', [CourierController::class, 'trackOrder']);\n    });","oldString":"    // ── Customer Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    Route::get('/customers/stats', [CustomerController::class, 'stats']);\n    Route::post('/customers/sync-all', [CustomerController::class, 'syncAll']);\n    Route::post('/customers/{customer}/toggle-block', [CustomerController::class, 'toggleBlock']);\n    Route::apiResource('/customers', CustomerController::class)->only(['index', 'show', 'update']);"}},"id":"866fc573-d890-4fbe-8dd7-98b0c3edb9c6","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:27:27.285Z","parentId":"fcbccb9c-b85b-414f-99aa-e192d65317ea"}
