{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_011p22nxRokwN756pY9NpenY","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\CourierSetting;\nuse App\\Models\\Order;\nuse App\\Services\\SteadfastService;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\n\nclass CourierController extends Controller\n{\n    // ── Courier Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function getSettings(): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $settings->exists ? $settings->masked() : null,\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    public function saveSettings(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'default_courier'     => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\n            'steadfast_api_key'   => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'steadfast_secret_key'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_client_id'    => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_client_secret'=> 'nullable|string|max:200',\n            'pathao_store_id'     => 'nullable|string|max:100',\n            'redx_api_key'        => 'nullable|string|max:200',\n        ]);\n\n        // Only update keys that are actually sent (not masked placeholders)\n        $existing = CourierSetting::firstOrNew(['user_id' => auth()->id()]);\n\n        foreach ($data as $field => $value) {\n            // Skip masked values (contain ***)\n            if ($value !== null && str_contains((string) $value, '***')) continue;\n            $existing->$field = $value;\n        }\n        $existing->user_id = auth()->id();\n        $existing->save();\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $existing->masked()]);\n    }\n\n    public function testConnection(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->getBalance($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\n\n        $ok = isset($result['status']) && $result['status'] == 200;\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => $ok,\n            'data'    => $result,\n            'message' => $ok ? 'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Book Parcel ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function book(Request $request, int $orderId): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\n\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'courier'       => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\n            'cod_amount'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n            'note'          => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n            'tracking_id'   => 'nullable|string|max:100', // for manual entry\n        ]);\n\n        $courier = $data['courier'] ?? 'steadfast';\n\n        // Manual tracking entry\n        if ($courier === 'manual' || isset($data['tracking_id'])) {\n            $order->update([\n                'courier_name'        => $courier,\n                'courier_tracking_id' => $data['tracking_id'] ?? null,\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\n                'status'              => 'processing',\n            ]);\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'message' => 'Manual tracking saved.']);\n        }\n\n        if ($courier === 'steadfast') {\n            return $this->bookSteadfast($order, $data);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Courier not supported yet.'], 422);\n    }\n\n    private function bookSteadfast(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast API credentials not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->createOrder($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, [\n            'invoice'           => $order->order_number,\n            'recipient_name'    => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\n            'recipient_phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\n            'recipient_address' => $order->customer_address ?? ($order->customer_district . ', ' . $order->customer_thana),\n            'cod_amount'        => $data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total,\n            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? $order->notes ?? '',\n        ]);\n\n        // Steadfast returns consignment_id on success\n        if (isset($result['consignment']['consignment_id'])) {\n            $consignmentId = $result['consignment']['consignment_id'];\n            $order->update([\n                'courier_name'        => 'steadfast',\n                'courier_tracking_id' => (string) $consignmentId,\n                'courier_status'      => 'booked',\n                'courier_charge'      => $result['consignment']['current_status'] ?? null,\n                'status'              => 'processing',\n            ]);\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'consignment_id' => $consignmentId]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => false,\n            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Steadfast booking failed.',\n            'raw'     => $result,\n        ], 422);\n    }\n\n    // ── Track ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function trackOrder(int $orderId): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\n\n        if (! $order->courier_tracking_id) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'No tracking ID.'], 422);\n        }\n        if ($order->courier_name !== 'steadfast') {\n            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => ['status' => $order->courier_status], 'message' => 'Manual tracking.']);\n        }\n\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $service = new SteadfastService();\n        $result  = $service->getStatus($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $order->courier_tracking_id);\n\n        if (isset($result['delivery_status'])) {\n            $order->update(['courier_status' => $result['delivery_status']]);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result, 'order' => $order]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Booked orders (with tracking) ─────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function booked(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereNotNull('courier_tracking_id')\n            ->orderByDesc('updated_at');\n\n        if ($request->filled('courier_name')) {\n            $query->where('courier_name', $request->courier_name);\n        }\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Ready to book (confirmed/processing, no tracking) ────────────────────\n\n    public function readyToBook(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $query = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->whereIn('status', ['confirmed', 'processing'])\n            ->whereNull('courier_tracking_id')\n            ->orderByDesc('created_at');\n\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $s = '%' . $request->search . '%';\n            $query->where(fn ($q) => $q->where('order_number', 'ilike', $s)->orWhere('customer_phone', 'ilike', $s));\n        }\n\n        $perPage = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $orders  = $query->paginate($perPage);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $orders->items(),\n            'meta'    => ['total' => $orders->total(), 'current_page' => $orders->currentPage(), 'last_page' => $orders->lastPage()],\n        ]);\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php"}},"id":"8b18ff2f-7982-4c85-be59-ae3b5bf0229f","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:28:24.626Z","parentId":"ff98f527-f676-4840-897b-717e1b8f6a4d"}
{"type":"tool.execution_complete","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_011p22nxRokwN756pY9NpenY","success":false},"id":"b2ae88bf-4468-4d1a-b75e-da50270184f6","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:28:24.698Z","parentId":"8b18ff2f-7982-4c85-be59-ae3b5bf0229f"}
{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"09f4635d-2a2c-4b20-b056-7cfb604b8685","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01HEhxFWgoiNspLwCYNR1qJU","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"পার্সেল বুক করুন\\\",\\n    search: \\\"অর্ডার নম্বর / ফোন\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"বুক করার মতো কোনো অর্ডার নেই। (confirmed / processing স্ট্যাটাস দরকার)\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"গ্রাহক\\\",\\n    address: \\\"ঠিকানা\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"কুরিয়ার\\\",\\n    book: \\\"বুক করুন\\\",\\n    booking: \\\"বুকিং হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    booked: \\\"বুকড ✓\\\",\\n    codAmount: \\\"COD পরিমাণ (৳)\\\",\\n    note: \\\"নোট\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"নিশ্চিত করুন\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    modalTitle: \\\"পার্সেল বুক করুন\\\",\\n    manualTracking: \\\"ম্যানুয়াল ট্র্যাকিং\\\",\\n    steadfast: \\\"Steadfast\\\",\\n    manual: \\\"ম্যানুয়াল\\\",\\n    noCredentials: \\\"Steadfast API Key সেট করা নেই। Settings → Courier-এ যান।\\\",\\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `বুকড! Consignment: ${id}`,\\n    errorMsg: \\\"বুকিং ব্যর্থ হয়েছে।\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Book Parcel\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Order no / phone\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"No orders ready to book. (Need confirmed / processing status)\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"Customer\\\",\\n    address: \\\"Address\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"Courier\\\",\\n    book: \\\"Book\\\",\\n    booking: \\\"Booking...\\\",\\n    booked: \\\"Booked ✓\\\",\\n    codAmount: \\\"COD Amount (৳)\\\",\\n    note: \\\"Note\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"Tracking ID\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"Confirm\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"Processing...\\\",\\n    modalTitle: \\\"Book Parcel\\\",\\n    manualTracking: \\\"Manual Tracking\\\",\\n    steadfast: \\\"Steadfast\\\",\\n    manual: \\\"Manual\\\",\\n    noCredentials: \\\"Steadfast API Key not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.\\\",\\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `Booked! Consignment: ${id}`,\\n    errorMsg: \\\"Booking failed.\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\\n  customer_phone: string; customer_address: string | null;\\n  customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\\n  total: string; status: string;\\n};\\n\\ntype BookForm = { courier: \\\"steadfast\\\" | \\\"manual\\\"; cod_amount: string; note: string; tracking_id: string };\\n\\nexport default function BookParcelPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n\\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<Order | null>(null);\\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<BookForm>({ courier: \\\"steadfast\\\", cod_amount: \\\"\\\", note: \\\"\\\", tracking_id: \\\"\\\" });\\n  const [booking, setBooking] = useState(false);\\n  const [bookResult, setBookResult] = useState<{ success: boolean; msg: string } | null>(null);\\n  const [bookedIds, setBookedIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\\n\\n  const fetchReady = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"20\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/ready?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [page, search, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchReady(); }, [fetchReady]);\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\\n\\n  const openModal = (o: Order) => {\\n    setModal(o);\\n    setForm({ courier: \\\"steadfast\\\", cod_amount: String(Math.round(Number(o.total))), note: \\\"\\\", tracking_id: \\\"\\\" });\\n    setBookResult(null);\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleBook = async () => {\\n    if (!modal) return;\\n    setBooking(true);\\n    setBookResult(null);\\n    try {\\n      const body: Record<string, unknown> = {\\n        courier: form.courier,\\n        cod_amount: Number(form.cod_amount),\\n        note: form.note,\\n      };\\n      if (form.courier === \\\"manual\\\") body.tracking_id = form.tracking_id;\\n\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/book/${modal.id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify(body),\\n      });\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const id = data.consignment_id ? String(data.consignment_id) : (form.tracking_id || \\\"saved\\\");\\n        setBookResult({ success: true, msg: txt.successMsg(id) });\\n        setBookedIds(prev => new Set([...prev, modal.id]));\\n        setTimeout(() => { setModal(null); void fetchReady(); }, 1500);\\n      } else {\\n        setBookResult({ success: false, msg: data.message ?? txt.errorMsg });\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setBooking(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"book-parcel\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"courier\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input type=\\\"text\\\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n        <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"টি অর্ডার রেডি\\\" : \\\"orders ready\\\"}</p>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.customer}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.address}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.book}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\\\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{o.order_number}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{o.customer_name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</p>\\n                  <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                  {[o.customer_address, o.customer_district, o.customer_thana].filter(Boolean).join(\\\", \\\") || \\\"—\\\"}\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  {bookedIds.has(o.id) ? (\\n                    <span className=\\\"rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-400\\\">{txt.booked}</span>\\n                  ) : (\\n                    <button onClick={() => openModal(o)}\\n                      className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n                      {txt.book}\\n                    </button>\\n                  )}\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"পরে\\\" : \\\"Next\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Book modal */}\\n      {modal && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setModal(null)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.modalTitle}</h3>\\n            <p className=\\\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{modal.order_number} — {modal.customer_name ?? modal.customer_phone}</p>\\n\\n            {bookResult && (\\n              <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm ${bookResult.success ? \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\\\"}`}>\\n                {bookResult.msg}\\n              </div>\\n            )}\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courier}</span>\\n                <select value={form.courier} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, courier: e.target.value as \\\"steadfast\\\"|\\\"manual\\\" }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"steadfast\\\">{txt.steadfast}</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"manual\\\">{txt.manual}</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              {form.courier === \\\"manual\\\" ? (\\n                <label>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.trackingId}</span>\\n                  <input value={form.tracking_id} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tracking_id: e.target.value }))}\\n                    className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              ) : (\\n                <label>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.codAmount}</span>\\n                  <input type=\\\"number\\\" value={form.cod_amount} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, cod_amount: e.target.value }))}\\n                    className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              )}\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.note}</span>\\n                <input value={form.note} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setModal(null)} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={handleBook} disabled={booking}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {booking ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Book parcel page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write Book Parcel page\", \"goal\": \"Create book parcel page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"77c57320-0bbb-4f11-8241-1c379bf4d9ff","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:28:34.419Z","parentId":"b2ae88bf-4468-4d1a-b75e-da50270184f6"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01HEhxFWgoiNspLwCYNR1qJU","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"পার্সেল বুক করুন\",\n    search: \"অর্ডার নম্বর / ফোন\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noOrders: \"বুক করার মতো কোনো অর্ডার নেই। (confirmed / processing স্ট্যাটাস দরকার)\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    customer: \"গ্রাহক\",\n    address: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    courier: \"কুরিয়ার\",\n    book: \"বুক করুন\",\n    booking: \"বুকিং হচ্ছে...\",\n    booked: \"বুকড ✓\",\n    codAmount: \"COD পরিমাণ (৳)\",\n    note: \"নোট\",\n    trackingId: \"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    confirm: \"নিশ্চিত করুন\",\n    confirming: \"হচ্ছে...\",\n    modalTitle: \"পার্সেল বুক করুন\",\n    manualTracking: \"ম্যানুয়াল ট্র্যাকিং\",\n    steadfast: \"Steadfast\",\n    manual: \"ম্যানুয়াল\",\n    noCredentials: \"Steadfast API Key সেট করা নেই। Settings → Courier-এ যান।\",\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `বুকড! Consignment: ${id}`,\n    errorMsg: \"বুকিং ব্যর্থ হয়েছে।\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Book Parcel\",\n    search: \"Order no / phone\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders ready to book. (Need confirmed / processing status)\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    customer: \"Customer\",\n    address: \"Address\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    courier: \"Courier\",\n    book: \"Book\",\n    booking: \"Booking...\",\n    booked: \"Booked ✓\",\n    codAmount: \"COD Amount (৳)\",\n    note: \"Note\",\n    trackingId: \"Tracking ID\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    confirm: \"Confirm\",\n    confirming: \"Processing...\",\n    modalTitle: \"Book Parcel\",\n    manualTracking: \"Manual Tracking\",\n    steadfast: \"Steadfast\",\n    manual: \"Manual\",\n    noCredentials: \"Steadfast API Key not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.\",\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `Booked! Consignment: ${id}`,\n    errorMsg: \"Booking failed.\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\n  customer_phone: string; customer_address: string | null;\n  customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\n  total: string; status: string;\n};\n\ntype BookForm = { courier: \"steadfast\" | \"manual\"; cod_amount: string; note: string; tracking_id: string };\n\nexport default function BookParcelPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<BookForm>({ courier: \"steadfast\", cod_amount: \"\", note: \"\", tracking_id: \"\" });\n  const [booking, setBooking] = useState(false);\n  const [bookResult, setBookResult] = useState<{ success: boolean; msg: string } | null>(null);\n  const [bookedIds, setBookedIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\n\n  const fetchReady = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"20\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/ready?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchReady(); }, [fetchReady]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\n\n  const openModal = (o: Order) => {\n    setModal(o);\n    setForm({ courier: \"steadfast\", cod_amount: String(Math.round(Number(o.total))), note: \"\", tracking_id: \"\" });\n    setBookResult(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleBook = async () => {\n    if (!modal) return;\n    setBooking(true);\n    setBookResult(null);\n    try {\n      const body: Record<string, unknown> = {\n        courier: form.courier,\n        cod_amount: Number(form.cod_amount),\n        note: form.note,\n      };\n      if (form.courier === \"manual\") body.tracking_id = form.tracking_id;\n\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/book/${modal.id}`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify(body),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const id = data.consignment_id ? String(data.consignment_id) : (form.tracking_id || \"saved\");\n        setBookResult({ success: true, msg: txt.successMsg(id) });\n        setBookedIds(prev => new Set([...prev, modal.id]));\n        setTimeout(() => { setModal(null); void fetchReady(); }, 1500);\n      } else {\n        setBookResult({ success: false, msg: data.message ?? txt.errorMsg });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setBooking(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"book-parcel\" defaultExpandedKey=\"courier\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n        <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"টি অর্ডার রেডি\" : \"orders ready\"}</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.customer}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.address}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.book}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{o.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                  {[o.customer_address, o.customer_district, o.customer_thana].filter(Boolean).join(\", \") || \"—\"}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  {bookedIds.has(o.id) ? (\n                    <span className=\"rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-400\">{txt.booked}</span>\n                  ) : (\n                    <button onClick={() => openModal(o)}\n                      className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n                      {txt.book}\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Book modal */}\n      {modal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\" onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setModal(null)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\">{txt.modalTitle}</h3>\n            <p className=\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{modal.order_number} — {modal.customer_name ?? modal.customer_phone}</p>\n\n            {bookResult && (\n              <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm ${bookResult.success ? \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\" : \"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\"}`}>\n                {bookResult.msg}\n              </div>\n            )}\n\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courier}</span>\n                <select value={form.courier} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, courier: e.target.value as \"steadfast\"|\"manual\" }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"steadfast\">{txt.steadfast}</option>\n                  <option value=\"manual\">{txt.manual}</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              {form.courier === \"manual\" ? (\n                <label>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.trackingId}</span>\n                  <input value={form.tracking_id} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tracking_id: e.target.value }))}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              ) : (\n                <label>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.codAmount}</span>\n                  <input type=\"number\" value={form.cod_amount} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, cod_amount: e.target.value }))}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              )}\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.note}</span>\n                <input value={form.note} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setModal(null)} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={handleBook} disabled={booking}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {booking ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Book parcel page done\"","explanation":"Write Book Parcel page","goal":"Create book parcel page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"a76e8f27-08b3-440b-a24d-c4bd08167587","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:28:34.502Z","parentId":"44415ccb-ced9-47c2-928a-d9c91a1cf26d"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"a09f4f7d-eaf8-4a96-beb0-213182af96c4","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01FT6BXPbBJjabNKzgucF5dG","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\": \"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {\\n  booked:       \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  in_transit:   \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  delivered:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  returned:     \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  partial_delivered: \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:    \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"পার্সেল ট্র্যাক করুন\\\",\\n    search: \\\"অর্ডার নম্বর / ফোন\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"কোনো ট্র্যাকিং রেকর্ড নেই।\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"গ্রাহক\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"কুরিয়ার\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    refresh: \\\"রিফ্রেশ\\\",\\n    refreshing: \\\"চেক হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Track Parcels\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Order no / phone\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"No booked orders yet.\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"Customer\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"Courier\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"Tracking ID\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    refresh: \\\"Refresh\\\",\\n    refreshing: \\\"Checking...\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\\n  customer_phone: string; courier_name: string | null;\\n  courier_tracking_id: string | null; courier_status: string | null;\\n  total: string;\\n};\\n\\nexport default function TrackPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState<number | null>(null);\\n\\n  const fetchBooked = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"20\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/booked?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [page, search, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchBooked(); }, [fetchBooked]);\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\\n\\n  const refreshOrder = async (orderId: number) => {\\n    setRefreshing(orderId);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/track/${orderId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        const newStatus = d.data?.delivery_status ?? d.data?.status;\\n        if (newStatus) {\\n          setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, courier_status: newStatus } : o));\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setRefreshing(null);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"track-parcel\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"courier\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input type=\\\"text\\\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n        <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"টি পার্সেল\\\" : \\\"parcels\\\"}</p>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.customer}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.courier}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.trackingId}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.courierStatus}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.actions}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\\\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{o.order_number}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{o.customer_name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</p>\\n                  <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs capitalize\\\">{o.courier_name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell font-mono text-xs\\\">{o.courier_tracking_id ?? \\\"—\\\"}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">\\n                  {o.courier_status ? (\\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLES[o.courier_status] ?? \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\"}`}>\\n                      {o.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \\\" \\\")}\\n                    </span>\\n                  ) : \\\"—\\\"}\\n                </td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  {o.courier_name === \\\"steadfast\\\" ? (\\n                    <button onClick={() => void refreshOrder(o.id)} disabled={refreshing === o.id}\\n                      className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] disabled:opacity-50\\\">\\n                      {refreshing === o.id ? txt.refreshing : txt.refresh}\\n                    </button>\\n                  ) : (\\n                    <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">—</span>\\n                  )}\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"পরে\\\" : \\\"Next\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Track page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write Track Parcels page\", \"goal\": \"Create track page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"ab4eeec4-5184-4f94-9116-abd215cf7427","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:29:13.784Z","parentId":"28354717-c6c0-414c-b106-d15955a8bdd0"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01FT6BXPbBJjabNKzgucF5dG","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {\n  booked:       \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  in_transit:   \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  delivered:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  returned:     \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  partial_delivered: \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n  cancelled:    \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\",\n};\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"পার্সেল ট্র্যাক করুন\",\n    search: \"অর্ডার নম্বর / ফোন\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noOrders: \"কোনো ট্র্যাকিং রেকর্ড নেই।\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    customer: \"গ্রাহক\",\n    courier: \"কুরিয়ার\",\n    trackingId: \"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\",\n    courierStatus: \"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    actions: \"অ্যাকশন\",\n    refresh: \"রিফ্রেশ\",\n    refreshing: \"চেক হচ্ছে...\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Track Parcels\",\n    search: \"Order no / phone\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noOrders: \"No booked orders yet.\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    customer: \"Customer\",\n    courier: \"Courier\",\n    trackingId: \"Tracking ID\",\n    courierStatus: \"Status\",\n    actions: \"Actions\",\n    refresh: \"Refresh\",\n    refreshing: \"Checking...\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\n  customer_phone: string; courier_name: string | null;\n  courier_tracking_id: string | null; courier_status: string | null;\n  total: string;\n};\n\nexport default function TrackPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState<number | null>(null);\n\n  const fetchBooked = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"20\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/booked?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchBooked(); }, [fetchBooked]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\n\n  const refreshOrder = async (orderId: number) => {\n    setRefreshing(orderId);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/track/${orderId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        const newStatus = d.data?.delivery_status ?? d.data?.status;\n        if (newStatus) {\n          setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, courier_status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setRefreshing(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"track-parcel\" defaultExpandedKey=\"courier\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n        <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"টি পার্সেল\" : \"parcels\"}</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.customer}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.courier}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.trackingId}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.courierStatus}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{o.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs capitalize\">{o.courier_name ?? \"—\"}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell font-mono text-xs\">{o.courier_tracking_id ?? \"—\"}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  {o.courier_status ? (\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLES[o.courier_status] ?? \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\"}`}>\n                      {o.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \" \")}\n                    </span>\n                  ) : \"—\"}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  {o.courier_name === \"steadfast\" ? (\n                    <button onClick={() => void refreshOrder(o.id)} disabled={refreshing === o.id}\n                      className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] disabled:opacity-50\">\n                      {refreshing === o.id ? txt.refreshing : txt.refresh}\n                    </button>\n                  ) : (\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">—</span>\n                  )}\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Track page done\"","explanation":"Write Track Parcels page","goal":"Create track page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"2ddaea01-7b9a-4c11-9e7d-51d72fb99692","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:29:13.854Z","parentId":"f47ec62c-43f3-43c1-8dea-e0f9846348d2"}

\"cat > /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\\n\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport pathaoStoreId: \\\"Store ID\\\",\\n    redxTitle: \\\"RedX API\\\",\\n    redxApiKey: \\\"API Key\\\",\\n    saveSuccess: \\\"সেটিং সেভ হয়েছে!\\\",\\n    saveError: \\\"সেভ ব্যর্থ হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    testSuccess: \\\"Steadfast কানেকশন সফল।\\\",\\n    testError: \\\"কানেকশন ব্যর্থ।\\\",\\n    none: \\\"নির্বাচন করুন\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Courier Settings\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n    test: \\\"Test Connection\\\",\\n    testing: \\\"Testing...\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    defaultCourier: \\\"Default Courier\\\",\\n    steadfastTitle: \\\"Steadfast API\\\",\\n    steadfastApiKey: \\\"API Key\\\",\\n    steadfastSecretKey: \\\"Secret Key\\\",\\n    pathaoTitle: \\\"Pathao API\\\",\\n    pathaoClientId: \\\"Client ID\\\",\\n    pathaoClientSecret: \\\"Client Secret\\\",\\n    pathaoStoreId: \\\"Store ID\\\",\\n    redxTitle: \\\"RedX API\\\",\\n    redxApiKey: \\\"API Key\\\",\\n    saveSuccess: \\\"Settings saved!\\\",\\n    saveError: \\\"Failed to save.\\\",\\n    testSuccess: \\\"Steadfast connection successful.\\\",\\n    testError: \\\"Connection failed.\\\",\\n    none: \\\"Select\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype Form = {\\n  default_courier: string;\\n  steadfast_api_key: string; steadfast_secret_key: string;\\n  pathao_client_id: string; pathao_client_secret: string; pathao_store_id: string;\\n  redx_api_key: string;\\n};\\n\\nconst EMPTY_FORM: Form = {\\n  default_courier: \\\"\\\", steadfast_api_key: \\\"\\\", steadfast_secret_key: \\\"\\\",\\n  pathao_client_id: \\\"\\\", pathao_client_secret: \\\"\\\", pathao_store_id: \\\"\\\", redx_api_key: \\\"\\\",\\n};\\n\\nexport default function CourierSettingsPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<Form>(EMPTY_FORM);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n  const [testing, setTesting] = useState(false);\\n  const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: \\\"success\\\"|\\\"error\\\"; text: string } | null>(null);\\n\\n  const set = (field: keyof Form, value: string) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: value }));\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    void (async () => {\\n      setLoading(true);\\n      try {\\n        const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/settings`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n        if (res.ok) {\\n          const d = await res.json();\\n          if (d.data) setForm({ ...EMPTY_FORM, ...d.data });\\n        }\\n      } finally {\\n        setLoading(false);\\n      }\\n    })();\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    setSaving(true); setMessage(null);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/settings`, {\\n        method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify(form),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        setMessage({ type: \\\"success\\\", text: txt.saveSuccess });\\n        if (d.data) setForm({ ...EMPTY_FORM, ...d.data });\\n      } else {\\n        setMessage({ type: \\\"error\\\", text: d.message ?? txt.saveError });\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleTest = async () => {\\n    setTesting(true); setMessage(null);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/settings/test`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok && d.success) {\\n        const balance = d.data?.current_balance !== undefined ? ` (Balance: ৳${d.data.current_balance})` : \\\"\\\";\\n        setMessage({ type: \\\"success\\\", text: txt.testSuccess + balance });\\n      } else {\\n        setMessage({ type: \\\"error\\\", text: d.message ?? txt.testError });\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setTesting(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"settings-courier\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"settings\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {loading ? (\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-8 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</div>\\n      ) : (\\n        <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 max-w-xl\\\">\\n\\n          {message && (\\n            <div className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm ${message.type === \\\"success\\\" ? \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\\\"}`}>\\n              {message.text}\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n\\n          {/* Default courier */}\\n          <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.defaultCourier}</h3>\\n            <select value={form.default_courier} onChange={e => set(\\\"default_courier\\\", e.target.value)}\\n              className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n              <option value=\\\"\\\">{txt.none}</option>\\n              <option value=\\\"steadfast\\\">Steadfast</option>\\n              <option value=\\\"pathao\\\">Pathao</option>\\n              <option value=\\\"redx\\\">RedX</option>\\n              <option value=\\\"manual\\\">Manual</option>\\n            </select>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {/* Steadfast */}\\n          <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.steadfastTitle}</h3>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.steadfastApiKey}</span>\\n                <input value={form.steadfast_api_key} onChange={e => set(\\\"steadfast_api_key\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  placeholder=\\\"API Key\\\"\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.steadfastSecretKey}</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"password\\\" value={form.steadfast_secret_key} onChange={e => set(\\\"steadfast_secret_key\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                  placeholder=\\\"Secret Key\\\"\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {/* Pathao */}\\n          <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.pathaoTitle}</h3>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              {([\\\"pathao_client_id\\\", \\\"pathao_client_secret\\\", \\\"pathao_store_id\\\"] as const).map((field) => (\\n                <label key={field}>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                    {field === \\\"pathao_client_id\\\" ? txt.pathaoClientId : field === \\\"pathao_client_secret\\\" ? txt.pathaoClientSecret : txt.pathaoStoreId}\\n                  </span>\\n                  <input value={form[field]} onChange={e => set(field, e.target.value)}\\n                    type={field === \\\"pathao_client_secret\\\" ? \\\"password\\\" : \\\"text\\\"}\\n                    className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              ))}\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {/* RedX */}\\n          <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.redxTitle}</h3>\\n            <label>\\n              <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.redxApiKey}</span>\\n              <input value={form.redx_api_key} onChange={e => set(\\\"redx_api_key\\\", e.target.value)}\\n                className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n            </label>\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {/* Actions */}\\n          <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap gap-3\\\">\\n            <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n              {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n            </button>\\n            <button onClick={() => void handleTest()} disabled={testing}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n              {testing ? txt.testing : txt.test}\\n            </button>\\n          </div>\\n\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\nENDOFFILE\\necho \\\"Courier settings page done\\\"\", \"explanation\": \"Write Courier Settings page\", \"goal\": \"Create courier settings page\", \"mode\": \"sync\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"d571340d-37e6-497d-8b6c-d8b913911486","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:29:55.248Z","parentId":"107b2767-555f-4ea9-94f7-69922cb2c4d9"}

{\n        setMessage({ type: \"error\", text: d.message ?? txt.saveError });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleTest = async () => {\n    setTesting(true); setMessage(null);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/settings/test`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok && d.success) {\n        const balance = d.data?.current_balance !== undefined ? ` (Balance: ৳${d.data.current_balance})` : \"\";\n        setMessage({ type: \"success\", text: txt.testSuccess + balance });\n      } else {\n        setMessage({ type: \"error\", text: d.message ?? txt.testError });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setTesting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"settings-courier\" defaultExpandedKey=\"settings\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-8 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</div>\n      ) : (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4 max-w-xl\">\n\n          {message && (\n            <div className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm ${message.type === \"success\" ? \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\" : \"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\"}`}>\n              {message.text}\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Default courier */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.defaultCourier}</h3>\n            <select value={form.default_courier} onChange={e => set(\"default_courier\", e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n              <option value=\"\">{txt.none}</option>\n              <option value=\"steadfast\">Steadfast</option>\n              <option value=\"pathao\">Pathao</option>\n              <option value=\"redx\">RedX</option>\n              <option value=\"manual\">Manual</option>\n            </select>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Steadfast */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.steadfastTitle}</h3>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.steadfastApiKey}</span>\n                <input value={form.steadfast_api_key} onChange={e => set(\"steadfast_api_key\", e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"API Key\"\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.steadfastSecretKey}</span>\n                <input type=\"password\" value={form.steadfast_secret_key} onChange={e => set(\"steadfast_secret_key\", e.target.value)}\n                  placeholder=\"Secret Key\"\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Pathao */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.pathaoTitle}</h3>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              {([\"pathao_client_id\", \"pathao_client_secret\", \"pathao_store_id\"] as const).map((field) => (\n                <label key={field}>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                    {field === \"pathao_client_id\" ? txt.pathaoClientId : field === \"pathao_client_secret\" ? txt.pathaoClientSecret : txt.pathaoStoreId}\n                  </span>\n                  <input value={form[field]} onChange={e => set(field, e.target.value)}\n                    type={field === \"pathao_client_secret\" ? \"password\" : \"text\"}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* RedX */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.redxTitle}</h3>\n            <label>\n              <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.redxApiKey}</span>\n              <input value={form.redx_api_key} onChange={e => set(\"redx_api_key\", e.target.value)}\n                className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            </label>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Actions */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-3\">\n            <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\n              className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n              {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={() => void handleTest()} disabled={testing}\n              className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)] disabled:opacity-60\">\n              {testing ? txt.testing : txt.test}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\necho \"Courier settings page done\"","explanation":"Write Courier Settings page","goal":"Create courier settings page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"28175206-0e56-42eb-80a9-1ae822fd64da","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:29:55.306Z","parentId":"42b19c45-9e9a-4310-8693-c0f39315a357"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"2e4e37a7-8ea1-46da-bcd9-3bd3297adf1b","content":"Courier Integration সম্পন্ন — commit `b69eebc` ✅\n\n**যা হয়েছে:**\n\n**Backend:**\n- `courier_settings` table — per-user Steadfast + Pathao + RedX credentials\n- `CourierSetting` model — `masked()` হেল্পার (API key সরাসরি expose হয় না)\n- `SteadfastService` — `createOrder`, `getStatus`, `getBalance`\n- `CourierController` — 7টি route:\n  - `GET /courier/settings` — সেটিং দেখুন (masked)\n  - `PUT /courier/settings` — সেটিং সেভ করুন\n  - `POST /courier/settings/test` — Steadfast connection test + balance check\n  - `GET /courier/ready` — বুক করার জন্য ready অর্ডারের লিস্ট\n  - `POST /courier/book/{order}` — Steadfast বা Manual বুকিং\n  - `GET /courier/booked` — বুকড অর্ডারের লিস্ট\n  - `GET /courier/track/{order}` — Steadfast থেকে live status refresh\n\n**Frontend:**\n- [/dashboard/courier](frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx) — Pending অর্ডার লিস্ট + Book modal (COD amount, note, courier selector)\n- [/dashboard/courier/track](frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx) — বুকড অর্ডার + per-row status refresh (color-coded badges)\n- [/dashboard/settings/courier](frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier/page.tsx) — Steadfast / Pathao / RedX credential form + Test Connection button","toolRequests":[]},"id":"7124f1b3-87b5-4b93-93ad-eb1fabadfe26","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:31:01.733Z","parentId":"16f88b3b-555c-42b3-a8d8-16e034377fd1"}

The `show` endpoint returns:\n- Full order with `items` and `statusLogs.changedByUser`\n- Order fields: order_number, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_address, customer_district, customer_thana, source, source_ref, status, payment_method, payment_status, subtotal, shipping_charge, discount, total, notes, fraud_score, risk_level, courier_name, courier_tracking_id, courier_status, courier_charge\n- items: id, order_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price, total, sku, variant_info\n\n\n- statusLogs with old_status, new_status, note, changed_by, created_at, and the user who made the change\n\nThe page layout needs to display the order header with number, status, and action buttons, followed by customer details, the line items, payment breakdown, courier tracking information, and a status timeline showing how the order progressed through different states.\n\nI'll also need modals for editing customer and payment information, plus inline controls for changing the status. Let me check what else might be in the folder structure."},"id":"b25055f0-e638-4baf-b653-cff1b9e1cd77","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:36:58.487Z","parentId":"5939a6f8-c2a8-4769-b5b6-91d055f2f338"}
