\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/[id]/page.tsx\", \"content\": \"\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \\\"next/navigation\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\n// ── Status helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst ORDER_STATUSES = [\\\"pending\\\", \\\"confirmed\\\", \\\"processing\\\", \\\"shipped\\\", \\\"delivered\\\", \\\"cancelled\\\", \\\"returned\\\"] as const;\\ntype OrderStatus = (typeof ORDER_STATUSES)[number];\\n\\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  pending:    \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  confirmed:  \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  processing: \\\"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\\\",\\n  shipped:    \\\"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\\\",\\n  delivered:  \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:  \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  returned:   \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst PAYMENT_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  due:     \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  partial: \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  paid:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst RISK_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  low:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  medium: \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  high:   \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst COURIER_STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  booked:            \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  in_transit:        \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  delivered:         \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  returned:          \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  partial_delivered: \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:         \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\n// ── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\ntype OrderItem = {\\n  id: number; product_name: string; sku: string | null;\\n  quantity: number; unit_price: string; total: string;\\n  variant_info: Record<string, string> | null;\\n};\\n\\ntype StatusLog = {\\n  id: number; old_status: string | null; new_status: string;\\n  note: string | null; created_at: string;\\n  changed_by_user: { name: string } | null;\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; status: OrderStatus;\\n  customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string;\\n  customer_address: string | null; customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\\n  source: string | null; source_ref: string | null;\\n  payment_method: string | null; payment_status: string;\\n  subtotal: string; shipping_charge: string; discount: string; total: string;\\n  notes: string | null; fraud_score: number; risk_level: string;\\n  courier_name: string | null; courier_tracking_id: string | null;\\n  courier_status: string | null; courier_charge: string | null;\\n  created_at: string; updated_at: string;\\n  items: OrderItem[]; status_logs: StatusLog[];\\n};\\n\\n// ── Translations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    notFound: \\\"অর্ডার পাওয়া যায়নি।\\\",\\n    back: \\\"← ফিরে যান\\\",\\n    editOrder: \\\"সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    changeStatus: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    bookCourier: \\\"কুরিয়ার বুক করুন\\\",\\n    deleteOrder: \\\"মুছুন\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"এই অর্ডার মুছে ফেলবেন?\\\",\\n    orderInfo: \\\"অর্ডার তথ্য\\\",\\n    customerInfo: \\\"গ্রাহক তথ্য\\\",\\n    items: \\\"পণ্য তালিকা\\\",\\n    paymentSummary: \\\"পেমেন্ট সারসংক্ষেপ\\\",\\n    courierInfo: \\\"কুরিয়ার তথ্য\\\",\\n    statusTimeline: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস টাইমলাইন\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    date: \\\"তারিখ\\\",\\n    source: \\\"সোর্স\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    riskLevel: \\\"ঝুঁকি স্তর\\\",\\n    fraudScore: \\\"ফ্রড স্কোর\\\",\\n    name: \\\"নাম\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"ফোন\\\",\\n    address: \\\"ঠিকানা\\\",\\n    district: \\\"জেলা\\\",\\n    thana: \\\"থানা\\\",\\n    product: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"পরিমাণ\\\",\\n    unitPrice: \\\"একক মূল্য\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"সাবটোটাল\\\",\\n    shipping: \\\"শিপিং চার্জ\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"ছাড়\\\",\\n    grandTotal: \\\"সর্বমোট\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"কুরিয়ার\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    courierCharge: \\\"কুরিয়ার চার্জ\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"নোট\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সেভ করুন\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সেভ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    newStatus: \\\"নতুন স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    statusNote: \\\"নোট (ঐচ্ছিক)\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"নিশ্চিত করুন\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    deleteSuccess: \\\"অর্ডার মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    updateSuccess: \\\"অর্ডার আপডেট হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    statusUpdated: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    noCourier: \\\"কুরিয়ার বুক করা হয়নি\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"কোনো পণ্য নেই\\\",\\n    noLogs: \\\"কোনো স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন নেই\\\",\\n    variant: \\\"ভেরিয়েন্ট\\\",\\n    unknown: \\\"অজানা\\\",\\n    by: \\\"দ্বারা\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Order Detail\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    notFound: \\\"Order not found.\\\",\\n    back: \\\"← Back\\\",\\n    editOrder: \\\"Edit\\\",\\n    changeStatus: \\\"Change Status\\\",\\n    bookCourier: \\\"Book Courier\\\",\\n    deleteOrder: \\\"Delete\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"Delete this order?\\\",\\n    orderInfo: \\\"Order Info\\\",\\n    customerInfo: \\\"Customer Info\\\",\\n    items: \\\"Items\\\",\\n    paymentSummary: \\\"Payment Summary\\\",\\n    courierInfo: \\\"Courier Info\\\",\\n    statusTimeline: \\\"Status Timeline\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    date: \\\"Date\\\",\\n    source: \\\"Source\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    riskLevel: \\\"Risk Level\\\",\\n    fraudScore: \\\"Fraud Score\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Name\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"Phone\\\",\\n    address: \\\"Address\\\",\\n    district: \\\"District\\\",\\n    thana: \\\"Thana\\\",\\n    product: \\\"Product\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"Qty\\\",\\n    unitPrice: \\\"Unit Price\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"Subtotal\\\",\\n    shipping: \\\"Shipping\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"Discount\\\",\\n    grandTotal: \\\"Grand Total\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"Payment Method\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"Payment Status\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"Courier\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"Tracking ID\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"Courier Status\\\",\\n    courierCharge: \\\"Courier Charge\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"Notes\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    newStatus: \\\"New Status\\\",\\n    statusNote: \\\"Note (optional)\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"Confirm\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"Processing...\\\",\\n    deleteSuccess: \\\"Order deleted.\\\",\\n    updateSuccess: \\\"Order updated.\\\",\\n    statusUpdated: \\\"Status updated.\\\",\\n    noCourier: \\\"No courier booked\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"No items\\\",\\n    noLogs: \\\"No status changes\\\",\\n    variant: \\\"Variant\\\",\\n    unknown: \\\"Unknown\\\",\\n    by: \\\"by\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport default function OrderDetailPage() {\\n  const params = useParams();\\n  const router = useRouter();\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n  const orderId = params.id as string;\\n\\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [toast, setToast] = useState<{ type: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"error\\\"; msg: string } | null>(null);\\n\\n  // modals\\n  const [editOpen, setEditOpen] = useState(false);\\n  const [statusOpen, setStatusOpen] = useState(false);\\n  const [deleteOpen, setDeleteOpen] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // edit form\\n  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({\\n    customer_name: \\\"\\\", customer_phone: \\\"\\\", customer_address: \\\"\\\",\\n    customer_district: \\\"\\\", customer_thana: \\\"\\\",\\n    payment_method: \\\"\\\", payment_status: \\\"\\\",\\n    shipping_charge: \\\"\\\", discount: \\\"\\\", notes: \\\"\\\",\\n  });\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // status form\\n  const [statusForm, setStatusForm] = useState({ status: \\\"\\\" as OrderStatus | \\\"\\\", note: \\\"\\\" });\\n  const [changingStatus, setChangingStatus] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // deleting\\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const showToast = (type: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"error\\\", msg: string) => {\\n    setToast({ type, msg });\\n    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 3000);\\n  };\\n\\n  const fetchOrder = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${orderId}`, {\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setOrder(d.data);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [orderId, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchOrder(); }, [fetchOrder]);\\n\\n  const openEdit = () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setEditForm({\\n      customer_name: order.customer_name ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_phone: order.customer_phone,\\n      customer_address: order.customer_address ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_district: order.customer_district ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_thana: order.customer_thana ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      payment_method: order.payment_method ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      payment_status: order.payment_status,\\n      shipping_charge: order.shipping_charge,\\n      discount: order.discount,\\n      notes: order.notes ?? \\\"\\\",\\n    });\\n    setEditOpen(true);\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          ...editForm,\\n          shipping_charge: Number(editForm.shipping_charge),\\n          discount: Number(editForm.discount),\\n        }),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.updateSuccess);\\n        setEditOpen(false);\\n        await fetchOrder();\\n      } else {\\n        showToast(\\\"error\\\", d.message ?? \\\"Error\\\");\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleStatusChange = async () => {\\n    if (!order || !statusForm.status) return;\\n    setChangingStatus(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}/status`, {\\n        method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ status: statusForm.status, note: statusForm.note }),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.statusUpdated);\\n        setStatusOpen(false);\\n        await fetchOrder();\\n      } else {\\n        showToast(\\\"error\\\", d.message ?? \\\"Error\\\");\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setChangingStatus(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setDeleting(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.deleteSuccess);\\n        setTimeout(() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/orders\\\"), 1000);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setDeleting(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) =>\\n    new Date(iso).toLocaleString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-GB\\\", {\\n      dateStyle: \\\"medium\\\", timeStyle: \\\"short\\\",\\n    });\\n\\n  // ── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  if (loading) {\\n    return (\\n      <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</div>\\n      </UserShell>\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!order) {\\n    return (\\n      <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notFound}</div>\\n      </UserShell>\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Toast */}\\n      {toast && (\\n        <div className={`fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm shadow-xl ${\\n          toast.type === \\\"success\\\" ? \\\"bg-emerald-500 text-white\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500 text-white\\\"\\n        }`}>{toast.msg}</div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* Top bar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\\\">\\n        <button onClick={() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/orders\\\")}\\n          className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\\\">{txt.back}</button>\\n\\n        <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\\\">\\n          <button onClick={openEdit}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n            {txt.editOrder}\\n          </button>\\n          <button onClick={() => { setStatusForm({ status: order.status, note: \\\"\\\" }); setStatusOpen(true); }}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n            {txt.changeStatus}\\n          </button>\\n          {!order.courier_tracking_id && (\\n            <button onClick={() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/courier\\\")}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n              {txt.bookCourier}\\n            </button>\\n          )}\\n          <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(true)}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\">\\n            {txt.deleteOrder}\\n          </button>\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Main grid */}\\n      <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n\\n        {/* Order Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.orderInfo}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.orderNo}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{order.order_number}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.date}</dt>\\n            <dd>{fmtDate(order.created_at)}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.status}</dt>\\n            <dd>\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[order.status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.status}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.source}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"capitalize\\\">{order.source ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            {order.source_ref && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">Ref</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"truncate\\\">{order.source_ref}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.riskLevel}</dt>\\n            <dd>\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${RISK_STYLE[order.risk_level] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.risk_level}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fraudScore}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.fraud_score}</dd>\\n\\n            {order.notes && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"col-span-1 break-words\\\">{order.notes}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Customer Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.customerInfo}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.name}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.phone}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"font-mono\\\">{order.customer_phone}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.address}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_address ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.district}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_district ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.thana}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_thana ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Items */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.items}</h3>\\n          {order.items.length === 0 ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noItems}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n              <table className=\\\"w-full text-xs\\\">\\n                <thead>\\n                  <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4\\\">{txt.product}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{txt.qty}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{txt.unitPrice}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n                  </tr>\\n                </thead>\\n                <tbody>\\n                  {order.items.map(item => (\\n                    <tr key={item.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\\\">\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4\\\">\\n                        <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{item.product_name}</p>\\n                        {item.sku && <p className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">SKU: {item.sku}</p>}\\n                        {item.variant_info && Object.entries(item.variant_info).map(([k, v]) => (\\n                          <p key={k} className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{k}: {v}</p>\\n                        ))}\\n                      </td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{item.quantity}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">৳{Number(item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(item.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                    </tr>\\n                  ))}\\n                </tbody>\\n              </table>\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Payment Summary */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.paymentSummary}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.subtotal}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">৳{Number(order.subtotal).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shipping}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">৳{Number(order.shipping_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            {Number(order.discount) > 0 && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount}</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"text-right text-emerald-400\\\">-৳{Number(order.discount).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)]\\\">{txt.grandTotal}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 text-right font-bold\\\">৳{Number(order.total).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentMethod}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right capitalize\\\">{order.payment_method ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentStatus}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${PAYMENT_STYLE[order.payment_status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.payment_status}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Courier Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.courierInfo}</h3>\\n          {!order.courier_name ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noCourier}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n              <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courier}</dt>\\n              <dd className=\\\"capitalize\\\">{order.courier_name}</dd>\\n\\n              <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.trackingId}</dt>\\n              <dd className=\\\"font-mono\\\">{order.courier_tracking_id ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n              {order.courier_status && (\\n                <>\\n                  <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courierStatus}</dt>\\n                  <dd>\\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${COURIER_STATUS_STYLE[order.courier_status] ?? \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\"}`}>\\n                      {order.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \\\" \\\")}\\n                    </span>\\n                  </dd>\\n                </>\\n              )}\\n\\n              {order.courier_charge && (\\n                <>\\n                  <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courierCharge}</dt>\\n                  <dd>৳{Number(order.courier_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n                </>\\n              )}\\n            </dl>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Status Timeline */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.statusTimeline}</h3>\\n          {order.status_logs.length === 0 ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noLogs}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <ol className=\\\"relative ml-3 border-l border-[var(--border)]\\\">\\n              {[...order.status_logs].reverse().map((log, i) => (\\n                <li key={log.id} className={`mb-4 ml-4 ${i === 0 ? \\\"opacity-100\\\" : \\\"opacity-75\\\"}`}>\\n                  <span className={`absolute -left-1.5 mt-1 h-3 w-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[var(--surface)] ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \\\"bg-zinc-400\\\"}`} />\\n                  <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-2\\\">\\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                      {log.new_status}\\n                    </span>\\n                    {log.old_status && (\\n                      <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">← {log.old_status}</span>\\n                    )}\\n                    <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                      {fmtDate(log.created_at)}\\n                      {log.changed_by_user?.name && ` · ${txt.by} ${log.changed_by_user.name}`}\\n                    </span>\\n                  </div>\\n                  {log.note && <p className=\\\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{log.note}</p>}\\n                </li>\\n              ))}\\n            </ol>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* ── Edit Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {editOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setEditOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"my-8 w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.editOrder}</h3>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\\\">\\n              {/* Customer fields */}\\n              {([\\n                [\\\"customer_name\\\",    txt.name],\\n                [\\\"customer_phone\\\",   txt.phone],\\n                [\\\"customer_address\\\", txt.address],\\n                [\\\"customer_district\\\",txt.district],\\n                [\\\"customer_thana\\\",   txt.thana],\\n              ] as [keyof typeof editForm, string][]).map(([field, label]) => (\\n                <label key={field} className={field === \\\"customer_address\\\" ? \\\"col-span-2\\\" : \\\"\\\"}>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{label}</span>\\n                  <input value={editForm[field]}\\n                    onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\\n                    className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              ))}\\n\\n              {/* Payment method */}\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\\n                <select value={editForm.payment_method}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_method: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"cod\\\">COD</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"online\\\">Online</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"bkash\\\">bKash</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              {/* Payment status */}\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\\n                <select value={editForm.payment_status}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_status: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"due\\\">Due</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"partial\\\">Partial</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"paid\\\">Paid</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              {/* Shipping + discount */}\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shipping} (৳)</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={editForm.shipping_charge}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, shipping_charge: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount} (৳)</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={editForm.discount}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, discount: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n\\n              {/* Notes */}\\n              <label className=\\\"col-span-2\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</span>\\n                <textarea value={editForm.notes} rows={2}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setEditOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* ── Status Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {statusOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setStatusOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.changeStatus}</h3>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.newStatus}</span>\\n                <select value={statusForm.status}\\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, status: e.target.value as OrderStatus }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  {ORDER_STATUSES.map(s => (\\n                    <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>\\n                  ))}\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.statusNote}</span>\\n                <input value={statusForm.note}\\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setStatusOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleStatusChange()} disabled={changingStatus || !statusForm.status}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {changingStatus ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* ── Delete Confirm ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {deleteOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setDeleteOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <p className=\\\"mb-5 text-sm\\\">{txt.confirmDelete} <span className=\\\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{order.order_number}</span></p>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleDelete()} disabled={deleting}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {deleting ? txt.confirming : txt.deleteOrder}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\\n\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"ffcc69cb-7025-4dad-b969-d4528b2fc805","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:38:36.650Z","parentId":"456c1c7c-390e-44ec-942a-6b40bef38530"}

{"type":"assistant.turn_start","data":{"turnId":"6"},"id":"6d9dab27-64ee-44b2-b9d1-e09bd1230958","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:38:36.650Z","parentId":"660be134-ab76-4d4d-9272-c062d50c6924"}
{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01JN8cbyDd5Gha4aV7PmuHdV","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/[id]/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\n// ── Status helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nconst ORDER_STATUSES = [\"pending\", \"confirmed\", \"processing\", \"shipped\", \"delivered\", \"cancelled\", \"returned\"] as const;\ntype OrderStatus = (typeof ORDER_STATUSES)[number];\n\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  pending:    \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  confirmed:  \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  processing: \"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\",\n  shipped:    \"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\",\n  delivered:  \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  cancelled:  \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  returned:   \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n};\n\nconst PAYMENT_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  due:     \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  partial: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  paid:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n};\n\nconst RISK_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  low:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n};\n\nconst COURIER_STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  booked:            \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  in_transit:        \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  delivered:         \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  returned:          \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  partial_delivered: \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n  cancelled:         \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\",\n};\n\n// ── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ntype OrderItem = {\n  id: number; product_name: string; sku: string | null;\n  quantity: number; unit_price: string; total: string;\n  variant_info: Record<string, string> | null;\n};\n\ntype StatusLog = {\n  id: number; old_status: string | null; new_status: string;\n  note: string | null; created_at: string;\n  changed_by_user: { name: string } | null;\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; status: OrderStatus;\n  customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string;\n  customer_address: string | null; customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\n  source: string | null; source_ref: string | null;\n  payment_method: string | null; payment_status: string;\n  subtotal: string; shipping_charge: string; discount: string; total: string;\n  notes: string | null; fraud_score: number; risk_level: string;\n  courier_name: string | null; courier_tracking_id: string | null;\n  courier_status: string | null; courier_charge: string | null;\n  created_at: string; updated_at: string;\n  items: OrderItem[]; status_logs: StatusLog[];\n};\n\n// ── Translations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    notFound: \"অর্ডার পাওয়া যায়নি।\",\n    back: \"← ফিরে যান\",\n    editOrder: \"সম্পাদনা\",\n    changeStatus: \"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\",\n    bookCourier: \"কুরিয়ার বুক করুন\",\n    deleteOrder: \"মুছুন\",\n    confirmDelete: \"এই অর্ডার মুছে ফেলবেন?\",\n    orderInfo: \"অর্ডার তথ্য\",\n    customerInfo: \"গ্রাহক তথ্য\",\n    items: \"পণ্য তালিকা\",\n    paymentSummary: \"পেমেন্ট সারসংক্ষেপ\",\n    courierInfo: \"কুরিয়ার তথ্য\",\n    statusTimeline: \"স্ট্যাটাস টাইমলাইন\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    date: \"তারিখ\",\n    source: \"সোর্স\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    riskLevel: \"ঝুঁকি স্তর\",\n    fraudScore: \"ফ্রড স্কোর\",\n    name: \"নাম\",\n    phone: \"ফোন\",\n    address: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    district: \"জেলা\",\n    thana: \"থানা\",\n    product: \"পণ্য\",\n    qty: \"পরিমাণ\",\n    unitPrice: \"একক মূল্য\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    subtotal: \"সাবটোটাল\",\n    shipping: \"শিপিং চার্জ\",\n    discount: \"ছাড়\",\n    grandTotal: \"সর্বমোট\",\n    paymentMethod: \"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\",\n    paymentStatus: \"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    courier: \"কুরিয়ার\",\n    trackingId: \"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\",\n    courierStatus: \"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    courierCharge: \"কুরিয়ার চার্জ\",\n    notes: \"নোট\",\n    save: \"সেভ করুন\",\n    saving: \"সেভ হচ্ছে...\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    newStatus: \"নতুন স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    statusNote: \"নোট (ঐচ্ছিক)\",\n    confirm: \"নিশ্চিত করুন\",\n    confirming: \"হচ্ছে...\",\n    deleteSuccess: \"অর্ডার মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\",\n    updateSuccess: \"অর্ডার আপডেট হয়েছে।\",\n    statusUpdated: \"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন হয়েছে।\",\n    noCourier: \"কুরিয়ার বুক করা হয়নি\",\n    noItems: \"কোনো পণ্য নেই\",\n    noLogs: \"কোনো স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন নেই\",\n    variant: \"ভেরিয়েন্ট\",\n    unknown: \"অজানা\",\n    by: \"দ্বারা\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Order Detail\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    notFound: \"Order not found.\",\n    back: \"← Back\",\n    editOrder: \"Edit\",\n    changeStatus: \"Change Status\",\n    bookCourier: \"Book Courier\",\n    deleteOrder: \"Delete\",\n    confirmDelete: \"Delete this order?\",\n    orderInfo: \"Order Info\",\n    customerInfo: \"Customer Info\",\n    items: \"Items\",\n    paymentSummary: \"Payment Summary\",\n    courierInfo: \"Courier Info\",\n    statusTimeline: \"Status Timeline\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    date: \"Date\",\n    source: \"Source\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    riskLevel: \"Risk Level\",\n    fraudScore: \"Fraud Score\",\n    name: \"Name\",\n    phone: \"Phone\",\n    address: \"Address\",\n    district: \"District\",\n    thana: \"Thana\",\n    product: \"Product\",\n    qty: \"Qty\",\n    unitPrice: \"Unit Price\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    subtotal: \"Subtotal\",\n    shipping: \"Shipping\",\n    discount: \"Discount\",\n    grandTotal: \"Grand Total\",\n    paymentMethod: \"Payment Method\",\n    paymentStatus: \"Payment Status\",\n    courier: \"Courier\",\n    trackingId: \"Tracking ID\",\n    courierStatus: \"Courier Status\",\n    courierCharge: \"Courier Charge\",\n    notes: \"Notes\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    newStatus: \"New Status\",\n    statusNote: \"Note (optional)\",\n    confirm: \"Confirm\",\n    confirming: \"Processing...\",\n    deleteSuccess: \"Order deleted.\",\n    updateSuccess: \"Order updated.\",\n    statusUpdated: \"Status updated.\",\n    noCourier: \"No courier booked\",\n    noItems: \"No items\",\n    noLogs: \"No status changes\",\n    variant: \"Variant\",\n    unknown: \"Unknown\",\n    by: \"by\",\n  },\n};\n\n// ── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nexport default function OrderDetailPage() {\n  const params = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n  const orderId = params.id as string;\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [toast, setToast] = useState<{ type: \"success\" | \"error\"; msg: string } | null>(null);\n\n  // modals\n  const [editOpen, setEditOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [statusOpen, setStatusOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteOpen, setDeleteOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // edit form\n  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({\n    customer_name: \"\", customer_phone: \"\", customer_address: \"\",\n    customer_district: \"\", customer_thana: \"\",\n    payment_method: \"\", payment_status: \"\",\n    shipping_charge: \"\", discount: \"\", notes: \"\",\n  });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  // status form\n  const [statusForm, setStatusForm] = useState({ status: \"\" as OrderStatus | \"\", note: \"\" });\n  const [changingStatus, setChangingStatus] = useState(false);\n\n  // deleting\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const showToast = (type: \"success\" | \"error\", msg: string) => {\n    setToast({ type, msg });\n    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 3000);\n  };\n\n  const fetchOrder = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${orderId}`, {\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setOrder(d.data);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [orderId, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchOrder(); }, [fetchOrder]);\n\n  const openEdit = () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setEditForm({\n      customer_name: order.customer_name ?? \"\",\n      customer_phone: order.customer_phone,\n      customer_address: order.customer_address ?? \"\",\n      customer_district: order.customer_district ?? \"\",\n      customer_thana: order.customer_thana ?? \"\",\n      payment_method: order.payment_method ?? \"\",\n      payment_status: order.payment_status,\n      shipping_charge: order.shipping_charge,\n      discount: order.discount,\n      notes: order.notes ?? \"\",\n    });\n    setEditOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          ...editForm,\n          shipping_charge: Number(editForm.shipping_charge),\n          discount: Number(editForm.discount),\n        }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.updateSuccess);\n        setEditOpen(false);\n        await fetchOrder();\n      } else {\n        showToast(\"error\", d.message ?? \"Error\");\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleStatusChange = async () => {\n    if (!order || !statusForm.status) return;\n    setChangingStatus(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}/status`, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ status: statusForm.status, note: statusForm.note }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.statusUpdated);\n        setStatusOpen(false);\n        await fetchOrder();\n      } else {\n        showToast(\"error\", d.message ?? \"Error\");\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setChangingStatus(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setDeleting(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.deleteSuccess);\n        setTimeout(() => router.push(\"/dashboard/orders\"), 1000);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) =>\n    new Date(iso).toLocaleString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-GB\", {\n      dateStyle: \"medium\", timeStyle: \"short\",\n    });\n\n  // ── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</div>\n      </UserShell>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!order) {\n    return (\n      <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notFound}</div>\n      </UserShell>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Toast */}\n      {toast && (\n        <div className={`fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm shadow-xl ${\n          toast.type === \"success\" ? \"bg-emerald-500 text-white\" : \"bg-red-500 text-white\"\n        }`}>{toast.msg}</div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Top bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\">\n        <button onClick={() => router.push(\"/dashboard/orders\")}\n          className=\"text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\">{txt.back}</button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\">\n          <button onClick={openEdit}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n            {txt.editOrder}\n          </button>\n          <button onClick={() => { setStatusForm({ status: order.status, note: \"\" }); setStatusOpen(true); }}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n            {txt.changeStatus}\n          </button>\n          {!order.courier_tracking_id && (\n            <button onClick={() => router.push(\"/dashboard/courier\")}\n              className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n              {txt.bookCourier}\n            </button>\n          )}\n          <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(true)}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\">\n            {txt.deleteOrder}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Main grid */}\n      <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n\n        {/* Order Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.orderInfo}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.orderNo}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\">{order.order_number}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.date}</dt>\n            <dd>{fmtDate(order.created_at)}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.status}</dt>\n            <dd>\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[order.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.status}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.source}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"capitalize\">{order.source ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            {order.source_ref && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">Ref</dt>\n                <dd className=\"truncate\">{order.source_ref}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.riskLevel}</dt>\n            <dd>\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${RISK_STYLE[order.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.risk_level}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fraudScore}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.fraud_score}</dd>\n\n            {order.notes && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</dt>\n                <dd className=\"col-span-1 break-words\">{order.notes}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Customer Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.customerInfo}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.name}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.phone}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"font-mono\">{order.customer_phone}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.address}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_address ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.district}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_district ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.thana}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_thana ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Items */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.items}</h3>\n          {order.items.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noItems}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n              <table className=\"w-full text-xs\">\n                <thead>\n                  <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4\">{txt.product}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\">{txt.qty}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\">{txt.unitPrice}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n                  </tr>\n                </thead>\n                <tbody>\n                  {order.items.map(item => (\n                    <tr key={item.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\">\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4\">\n                        <p className=\"font-medium\">{item.product_name}</p>\n                        {item.sku && <p className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">SKU: {item.sku}</p>}\n                        {item.variant_info && Object.entries(item.variant_info).map(([k, v]) => (\n                          <p key={k} className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{k}: {v}</p>\n                        ))}\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\">{item.quantity}</td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\">৳{Number(item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(item.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                    </tr>\n                  ))}\n                </tbody>\n              </table>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Payment Summary */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.paymentSummary}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.subtotal}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">৳{Number(order.subtotal).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shipping}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">৳{Number(order.shipping_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            {Number(order.discount) > 0 && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount}</dt>\n                <dd className=\"text-right text-emerald-400\">-৳{Number(order.discount).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n\n            <dt className=\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)]\">{txt.grandTotal}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 text-right font-bold\">৳{Number(order.total).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentMethod}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right capitalize\">{order.payment_method ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentStatus}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${PAYMENT_STYLE[order.payment_status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.payment_status}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Courier Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.courierInfo}</h3>\n          {!order.courier_name ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noCourier}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n              <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courier}</dt>\n              <dd className=\"capitalize\">{order.courier_name}</dd>\n\n              <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.trackingId}</dt>\n              <dd className=\"font-mono\">{order.courier_tracking_id ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n              {order.courier_status && (\n                <>\n                  <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courierStatus}</dt>\n                  <dd>\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${COURIER_STATUS_STYLE[order.courier_status] ?? \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\"}`}>\n                      {order.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \" \")}\n                    </span>\n                  </dd>\n                </>\n              )}\n\n              {order.courier_charge && (\n                <>\n                  <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courierCharge}</dt>\n                  <dd>৳{Number(order.courier_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n                </>\n              )}\n            </dl>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Status Timeline */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.statusTimeline}</h3>\n          {order.status_logs.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noLogs}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <ol className=\"relative ml-3 border-l border-[var(--border)]\">\n              {[...order.status_logs].reverse().map((log, i) => (\n                <li key={log.id} className={`mb-4 ml-4 ${i === 0 ? \"opacity-100\" : \"opacity-75\"}`}>\n                  <span className={`absolute -left-1.5 mt-1 h-3 w-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[var(--surface)] ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \"bg-zinc-400\"}`} />\n                  <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-2\">\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                      {log.new_status}\n                    </span>\n                    {log.old_status && (\n                      <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">← {log.old_status}</span>\n                    )}\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                      {fmtDate(log.created_at)}\n                      {log.changed_by_user?.name && ` · ${txt.by} ${log.changed_by_user.name}`}\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                  {log.note && <p className=\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{log.note}</p>}\n                </li>\n              ))}\n            </ol>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* ── Edit Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {editOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setEditOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"my-8 w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.editOrder}</h3>\n\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n              {/* Customer fields */}\n              {([\n                [\"customer_name\",    txt.name],\n                [\"customer_phone\",   txt.phone],\n                [\"customer_address\", txt.address],\n                [\"customer_district\",txt.district],\n                [\"customer_thana\",   txt.thana],\n              ] as [keyof typeof editForm, string][]).map(([field, label]) => (\n                <label key={field} className={field === \"customer_address\" ? \"col-span-2\" : \"\"}>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{label}</span>\n                  <input value={editForm[field]}\n                    onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              ))}\n\n              {/* Payment method */}\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\n                <select value={editForm.payment_method}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_method: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"cod\">COD</option>\n                  <option value=\"online\">Online</option>\n                  <option value=\"bkash\">bKash</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              {/* Payment status */}\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\n                <select value={editForm.payment_status}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_status: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"due\">Due</option>\n                  <option value=\"partial\">Partial</option>\n                  <option value=\"paid\">Paid</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              {/* Shipping + discount */}\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shipping} (৳)</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={editForm.shipping_charge}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, shipping_charge: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount} (৳)</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={editForm.discount}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, discount: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n\n              {/* Notes */}\n              <label className=\"col-span-2\">\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</span>\n                <textarea value={editForm.notes} rows={2}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setEditOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── Status Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {statusOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setStatusOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.changeStatus}</h3>\n\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.newStatus}</span>\n                <select value={statusForm.status}\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, status: e.target.value as OrderStatus }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  {ORDER_STATUSES.map(s => (\n                    <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.statusNote}</span>\n                <input value={statusForm.note}\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setStatusOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleStatusChange()} disabled={changingStatus || !statusForm.status}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {changingStatus ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── Delete Confirm ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {deleteOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setDeleteOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <p className=\"mb-5 text-sm\">{txt.confirmDelete} <span className=\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\">{order.order_number}</span></p>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleDelete()} disabled={deleting}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {deleting ? txt.confirming : txt.deleteOrder}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\n"}},"id":"a561335d-52c4-4ecc-9e39-3252d5b21d81","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:38:36.744Z","parentId":"6d9dab27-64ee-44b2-b9d1-e09bd1230958"}
