Status helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst ORDER_STATUSES = [\\\"pending\\\", \\\"confirmed\\\", \\\"processing\\\", \\\"shipped\\\", \\\"delivered\\\", \\\"cancelled\\\", \\\"returned\\\"] as const;\\ntype OrderStatus = (typeof ORDER_STATUSES)[number];\\n\\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  pending:    \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  confirmed:  \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  processing: \\\"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\\\",\\n  shipped:    \\\"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\\\",\\n  delivered:  \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:  \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  returned:   \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst PAYMENT_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  due:     \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  partial: \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  paid:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst RISK_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  low:    \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  medium: \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  high:   \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst COURIER_STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  booked:            \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  in_transit:        \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  delivered:         \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  returned:          \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  partial_delivered: \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:         \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\n// ── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\ntype OrderItem = {\\n  id: number; product_name: string; sku: string | null;\\n  quantity: number; unit_price: string; total: string;\\n  variant_info: Record<string, string> | null;\\n};\\n\\ntype StatusLog = {\\n  id: number; old_status: string | null; new_status: string;\\n  note: string | null; created_at: string;\\n  changed_by_user: { name: string } | null;\\n};\\n\\ntype Order = {\\n  id: number; order_number: string; status: OrderStatus;\\n  customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string;\\n  customer_address: string | null; customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\\n  source: string | null; source_ref: string | null;\\n  payment_method: string | null; payment_status: string;\\n  subtotal: string; shipping_charge: string; discount: string; total: string;\\n  notes: string | null; fraud_score: number; risk_level: string;\\n  courier_name: string | null; courier_tracking_id: string | null;\\n  courier_status: string | null; courier_charge: string | null;\\n  created_at: string; updated_at: string;\\n  items: OrderItem[]; status_logs: StatusLog[];\\n};\\n\\n// ── Translations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    notFound: \\\"অর্ডার পাওয়া যায়নি।\\\",\\n    back: \\\"← ফিরে যান\\\",\\n    editOrder: \\\"সম্পাদনা\\\",\\n    changeStatus: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\\\",\\n    bookCourier: \\\"কুরিয়ার বুক করুন\\\",\\n    deleteOrder: \\\"মুছুন\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"এই অর্ডার মুছে ফেলবেন?\\\",\\n    orderInfo: \\\"অর্ডার তথ্য\\\",\\n    customerInfo: \\\"গ্রাহক তথ্য\\\",\\n    items: \\\"পণ্য তালিকা\\\",\\n    paymentSummary: \\\"পেমেন্ট সারসংক্ষেপ\\\",\\n    courierInfo: \\\"কুরিয়ার তথ্য\\\",\\n    statusTimeline: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস টাইমলাইন\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    date: \\\"তারিখ\\\",\\n    source: \\\"সোর্স\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    riskLevel: \\\"ঝুঁকি স্তর\\\",\\n    fraudScore: \\\"ফ্রড স্কোর\\\",\\n    name: \\\"নাম\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"ফোন\\\",\\n    address: \\\"ঠিকানা\\\",\\n    district: \\\"জেলা\\\",\\n    thana: \\\"থানা\\\",\\n    product: \\\"পণ্য\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"পরিমাণ\\\",\\n    unitPrice: \\\"একক মূল্য\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"সাবটোটাল\\\",\\n    shipping: \\\"শিপিং চার্জ\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"ছাড়\\\",\\n    grandTotal: \\\"সর্বমোট\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"কুরিয়ার\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    courierCharge: \\\"কুরিয়ার চার্জ\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"নোট\\\",\\n    save: \\\"সেভ করুন\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"সেভ হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    newStatus: \\\"নতুন স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    statusNote: \\\"নোট (ঐচ্ছিক)\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"নিশ্চিত করুন\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    deleteSuccess: \\\"অর্ডার মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    updateSuccess: \\\"অর্ডার আপডেট হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    statusUpdated: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন হয়েছে।\\\",\\n    noCourier: \\\"কুরিয়ার বুক করা হয়নি\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"কোনো পণ্য নেই\\\",\\n    noLogs: \\\"কোনো স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন নেই\\\",\\n    variant: \\\"ভেরিয়েন্ট\\\",\\n    unknown: \\\"অজানা\\\",\\n    by: \\\"দ্বারা\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Order Detail\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    notFound: \\\"Order not found.\\\",\\n    back: \\\"← Back\\\",\\n    editOrder: \\\"Edit\\\",\\n    changeStatus: \\\"Change Status\\\",\\n    bookCourier: \\\"Book Courier\\\",\\n    deleteOrder: \\\"Delete\\\",\\n    confirmDelete: \\\"Delete this order?\\\",\\n    orderInfo: \\\"Order Info\\\",\\n    customerInfo: \\\"Customer Info\\\",\\n    items: \\\"Items\\\",\\n    paymentSummary: \\\"Payment Summary\\\",\\n    courierInfo: \\\"Courier Info\\\",\\n    statusTimeline: \\\"Status Timeline\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    date: \\\"Date\\\",\\n    source: \\\"Source\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    riskLevel: \\\"Risk Level\\\",\\n    fraudScore: \\\"Fraud Score\\\",\\n    name: \\\"Name\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"Phone\\\",\\n    address: \\\"Address\\\",\\n    district: \\\"District\\\",\\n    thana: \\\"Thana\\\",\\n    product: \\\"Product\\\",\\n    qty: \\\"Qty\\\",\\n    unitPrice: \\\"Unit Price\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    subtotal: \\\"Subtotal\\\",\\n    shipping: \\\"Shipping\\\",\\n    discount: \\\"Discount\\\",\\n    grandTotal: \\\"Grand Total\\\",\\n    paymentMethod: \\\"Payment Method\\\",\\n    paymentStatus: \\\"Payment Status\\\",\\n    courier: \\\"Courier\\\",\\n    trackingId: \\\"Tracking ID\\\",\\n    courierStatus: \\\"Courier Status\\\",\\n    courierCharge: \\\"Courier Charge\\\",\\n    notes: \\\"Notes\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Save\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Saving...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    newStatus: \\\"New Status\\\",\\n    statusNote: \\\"Note (optional)\\\",\\n    confirm: \\\"Confirm\\\",\\n    confirming: \\\"Processing...\\\",\\n    deleteSuccess: \\\"Order deleted.\\\",\\n    updateSuccess: \\\"Order updated.\\\",\\n    statusUpdated: \\\"Status updated.\\\",\\n    noCourier: \\\"No courier booked\\\",\\n    noItems: \\\"No items\\\",\\n    noLogs: \\\"No status changes\\\",\\n    variant: \\\"Variant\\\",\\n    unknown: \\\"Unknown\\\",\\n    by: \\\"by\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport default function OrderDetailPage() {\\n  const params = useParams();\\n  const router = useRouter();\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n  const orderId = params.id as string;\\n\\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [toast, setToast] = useState<{ type: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"error\\\"; msg: string } | null>(null);\\n\\n  // modals\\n  const [editOpen, setEditOpen] = useState(false);\\n  const [statusOpen, setStatusOpen] = useState(false);\\n  const [deleteOpen, setDeleteOpen] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // edit form\\n  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({\\n    customer_name: \\\"\\\", customer_phone: \\\"\\\", customer_address: \\\"\\\",\\n    customer_district: \\\"\\\", customer_thana: \\\"\\\",\\n    payment_method: \\\"\\\", payment_status: \\\"\\\",\\n    shipping_charge: \\\"\\\", discount: \\\"\\\", notes: \\\"\\\",\\n  });\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // status form\\n  const [statusForm, setStatusForm] = useState({ status: \\\"\\\" as OrderStatus | \\\"\\\", note: \\\"\\\" });\\n  const [changingStatus, setChangingStatus] = useState(false);\\n\\n  // deleting\\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const showToast = (type: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"error\\\", msg: string) => {\\n    setToast({ type, msg });\\n    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 3000);\\n  };\\n\\n  const fetchOrder = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${orderId}`, {\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setOrder(d.data);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  }, [orderId, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchOrder(); }, [fetchOrder]);\\n\\n  const openEdit = () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setEditForm({\\n      customer_name: order.customer_name ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_phone: order.customer_phone,\\n      customer_address: order.customer_address ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_district: order.customer_district ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      customer_thana: order.customer_thana ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      payment_method: order.payment_method ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      payment_status: order.payment_status,\\n      shipping_charge: order.shipping_charge,\\n      discount: order.discount,\\n      notes: order.notes ?? \\\"\\\",\\n    });\\n    setEditOpen(true);\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleSave = async () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          ...editForm,\\n          shipping_charge: Number(editForm.shipping_charge),\\n          discount: Number(editForm.discount),\\n        }),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.updateSuccess);\\n        setEditOpen(false);\\n        await fetchOrder();\\n      } else {\\n        showToast(\\\"error\\\", d.message ?? \\\"Error\\\");\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setSaving(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleStatusChange = async () => {\\n    if (!order || !statusForm.status) return;\\n    setChangingStatus(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}/status`, {\\n        method: \\\"PUT\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ status: statusForm.status, note: statusForm.note }),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.statusUpdated);\\n        setStatusOpen(false);\\n        await fetchOrder();\\n      } else {\\n        showToast(\\\"error\\\", d.message ?? \\\"Error\\\");\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setChangingStatus(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\\n    if (!order) return;\\n    setDeleting(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        showToast(\\\"success\\\", txt.deleteSuccess);\\n        setTimeout(() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/orders\\\"), 1000);\\n      }\\n    } finally {\\n      setDeleting(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) =>\\n    new Date(iso).toLocaleString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-GB\\\", {\\n      dateStyle: \\\"medium\\\", timeStyle: \\\"short\\\",\\n    });\\n\\n  // ── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  if (loading) {\\n    return (\\n      <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</div>\\n      </UserShell>\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!order) {\\n    return (\\n      <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notFound}</div>\\n      </UserShell>\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"all-orders\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Toast */}\\n      {toast && (\\n        <div className={`fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm shadow-xl ${\\n          toast.type === \\\"success\\\" ? \\\"bg-emerald-500 text-white\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500 text-white\\\"\\n        }`}>{toast.msg}</div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* Top bar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\\\">\\n        <button onClick={() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/orders\\\")}\\n          className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\\\">{txt.back}</button>\\n\\n        <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\\\">\\n          <button onClick={openEdit}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n            {txt.editOrder}\\n          </button>\\n          <button onClick={() => { setStatusForm({ status: order.status, note: \\\"\\\" }); setStatusOpen(true); }}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n            {txt.changeStatus}\\n          </button>\\n          {!order.courier_tracking_id && (\\n            <button onClick={() => router.push(\\\"/dashboard/courier\\\")}\\n              className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\\\">\\n              {txt.bookCourier}\\n            </button>\\n          )}\\n          <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(true)}\\n            className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\\\">\\n            {txt.deleteOrder}\\n          </button>\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Main grid */}\\n      <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n\\n        {/* Order Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.orderInfo}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.orderNo}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{order.order_number}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.date}</dt>\\n            <dd>{fmtDate(order.created_at)}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.status}</dt>\\n            <dd>\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[order.status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.status}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.source}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"capitalize\\\">{order.source ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            {order.source_ref && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">Ref</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"truncate\\\">{order.source_ref}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.riskLevel}</dt>\\n            <dd>\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${RISK_STYLE[order.risk_level] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.risk_level}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.fraudScore}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.fraud_score}</dd>\\n\\n            {order.notes && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"col-span-1 break-words\\\">{order.notes}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Customer Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.customerInfo}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.name}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_name ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.phone}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"font-mono\\\">{order.customer_phone}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.address}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_address ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.district}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_district ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.thana}</dt>\\n            <dd>{order.customer_thana ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Items */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.items}</h3>\\n          {order.items.length === 0 ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noItems}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n              <table className=\\\"w-full text-xs\\\">\\n                <thead>\\n                  <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4\\\">{txt.product}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{txt.qty}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{txt.unitPrice}</th>\\n                    <th className=\\\"pb-2 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n                  </tr>\\n                </thead>\\n                <tbody>\\n                  {order.items.map(item => (\\n                    <tr key={item.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\\\">\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4\\\">\\n                        <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">{item.product_name}</p>\\n                        {item.sku && <p className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">SKU: {item.sku}</p>}\\n                        {item.variant_info && Object.entries(item.variant_info).map(([k, v]) => (\\n                          <p key={k} className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{k}: {v}</p>\\n                        ))}\\n                      </td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{item.quantity}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">৳{Number(item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                      <td className=\\\"py-2 text-right font-semibold\\\">৳{Number(item.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                    </tr>\\n                  ))}\\n                </tbody>\\n              </table>\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Payment Summary */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.paymentSummary}</h3>\\n          <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.subtotal}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">৳{Number(order.subtotal).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shipping}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">৳{Number(order.shipping_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            {Number(order.discount) > 0 && (\\n              <>\\n                <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount}</dt>\\n                <dd className=\\\"text-right text-emerald-400\\\">-৳{Number(order.discount).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)]\\\">{txt.grandTotal}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 text-right font-bold\\\">৳{Number(order.total).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentMethod}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right capitalize\\\">{order.payment_method ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n            <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentStatus}</dt>\\n            <dd className=\\\"text-right\\\">\\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${PAYMENT_STYLE[order.payment_status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                {order.payment_status}\\n              </span>\\n            </dd>\\n          </dl>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Courier Info */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.courierInfo}</h3>\\n          {!order.courier_name ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noCourier}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <dl className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\\\">\\n              <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courier}</dt>\\n              <dd className=\\\"capitalize\\\">{order.courier_name}</dd>\\n\\n              <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.trackingId}</dt>\\n              <dd className=\\\"font-mono\\\">{order.courier_tracking_id ?? \\\"—\\\"}</dd>\\n\\n              {order.courier_status && (\\n                <>\\n                  <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courierStatus}</dt>\\n                  <dd>\\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${COURIER_STATUS_STYLE[order.courier_status] ?? \\\"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\\\"}`}>\\n                      {order.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \\\" \\\")}\\n                    </span>\\n                  </dd>\\n                </>\\n              )}\\n\\n              {order.courier_charge && (\\n                <>\\n                  <dt className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.courierCharge}</dt>\\n                  <dd>৳{Number(order.courier_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\\n                </>\\n              )}\\n            </dl>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Status Timeline */}\\n        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\\\">\\n          <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.statusTimeline}</h3>\\n          {order.status_logs.length === 0 ? (\\n            <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noLogs}</p>\\n          ) : (\\n            <ol className=\\\"relative ml-3 border-l border-[var(--border)]\\\">\\n              {[...order.status_logs].reverse().map((log, i) => (\\n                <li key={log.id} className={`mb-4 ml-4 ${i === 0 ? \\\"opacity-100\\\" : \\\"opacity-75\\\"}`}>\\n                  <span className={`absolute -left-1.5 mt-1 h-3 w-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[var(--surface)] ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \\\"bg-zinc-400\\\"}`} />\\n                  <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-2\\\">\\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                      {log.new_status}\\n                    </span>\\n                    {log.old_status && (\\n                      <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">← {log.old_status}</span>\\n                    )}\\n                    <span className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n                      {fmtDate(log.created_at)}\\n                      {log.changed_by_user?.name && ` · ${txt.by} ${log.changed_by_user.name}`}\\n                    </span>\\n                  </div>\\n                  {log.note && <p className=\\\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{log.note}</p>}\\n                </li>\\n              ))}\\n            </ol>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* ── Edit Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {editOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setEditOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"my-8 w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.editOrder}</h3>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\\\">\\n              {([\\n                [\\\"customer_name\\\",    txt.name],\\n                [\\\"customer_phone\\\",   txt.phone],\\n                [\\\"customer_address\\\", txt.address],\\n                [\\\"customer_district\\\",txt.district],\\n                [\\\"customer_thana\\\",   txt.thana],\\n              ] as [keyof typeof editForm, string][]).map(([field, label]) => (\\n                <label key={field} className={field === \\\"customer_address\\\" ? \\\"col-span-2\\\" : \\\"\\\"}>\\n                  <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{label}</span>\\n                  <input value={editForm[field]}\\n                    onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\\n                    className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              ))}\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\\n                <select value={editForm.payment_method}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_method: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"cod\\\">COD</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"online\\\">Online</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"bkash\\\">bKash</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\\n                <select value={editForm.payment_status}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_status: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <option value=\\\"due\\\">Due</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"partial\\\">Partial</option>\\n                  <option value=\\\"paid\\\">Paid</option>\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.shipping} (৳)</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={editForm.shipping_charge}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, shipping_charge: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.discount} (৳)</span>\\n                <input type=\\\"number\\\" min=\\\"0\\\" value={editForm.discount}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, discount: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n\\n              <label className=\\\"col-span-2\\\">\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.notes}</span>\\n                <textarea value={editForm.notes} rows={2}\\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setEditOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* ── Status Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {statusOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setStatusOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.changeStatus}</h3>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.newStatus}</span>\\n                <select value={statusForm.status}\\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, status: e.target.value as OrderStatus }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n                  {ORDER_STATUSES.map(s => (\\n                    <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>\\n                  ))}\\n                </select>\\n              </label>\\n\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.statusNote}</span>\\n                <input value={statusForm.note}\\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setStatusOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleStatusChange()} disabled={changingStatus || !statusForm.status}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {changingStatus ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n\\n      {/* ── Delete Confirm ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\\n      {deleteOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setDeleteOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <p className=\\\"mb-5 text-sm\\\">{txt.confirmDelete} <span className=\\\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{order.order_number}</span></p>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleDelete()} disabled={deleting}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {deleting ? txt.confirming : txt.deleteOrder}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"f4a0a71b-8ec9-4cf4-a2a9-055944418e33","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:40:23.735Z","parentId":"60f17396-16e3-4602-8369-78732010310a"}

getStoredLocale, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nexport default function Page() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell\n      activeKey=\"all-orders\"\n      defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: \"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\", en: \"Order Detail\" }}\n    >\n      <ModulePlaceholder\n        icon=\"📋\"\n        titleBn=\"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\"\n        titleEn=\"Order Detail\"\n        descBn=\"অর্ডারের সম্পূর্ণ তথ্য, স্ট্যাটাস টাইমলাইন, ফ্রড স্কোর এবং কুরিয়ার ট্র্যাকিং।\"\n        descEn=\"Complete order information, status timeline, fraud score and courier tracking.\"\n        phase=\"Phase 1\"\n        locale={locale}\n      />\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}","newString":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\n// ── Status helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nconst ORDER_STATUSES = [\"pending\", \"confirmed\", \"processing\", \"shipped\", \"delivered\", \"cancelled\", \"returned\"] as const;\ntype OrderStatus = (typeof ORDER_STATUSES)[number];\n\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  pending:    \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  confirmed:  \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  processing: \"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\",\n  shipped:    \"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\",\n  delivered:  \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  cancelled:  \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  returned:   \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n};\n\nconst PAYMENT_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  due:     \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  partial: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  paid:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n};\n\nconst RISK_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  low:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n};\n\nconst COURIER_STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  booked:            \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  in_transit:        \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  delivered:         \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  returned:          \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  partial_delivered: \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n  cancelled:         \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\",\n};\n\n// ── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ntype OrderItem = {\n  id: number; product_name: string; sku: string | null;\n  quantity: number; unit_price: string; total: string;\n  variant_info: Record<string, string> | null;\n};\n\ntype StatusLog = {\n  id: number; old_status: string | null; new_status: string;\n  note: string | null; created_at: string;\n  changed_by_user: { name: string } | null;\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; status: OrderStatus;\n  customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string;\n  customer_address: string | null; customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null;\n  source: string | null; source_ref: string | null;\n  payment_method: string | null; payment_status: string;\n  subtotal: string; shipping_charge: string; discount: string; total: string;\n  notes: string | null; fraud_score: number; risk_level: string;\n  courier_name: string | null; courier_tracking_id: string | null;\n  courier_status: string | null; courier_charge: string | null;\n  created_at: string; updated_at: string;\n  items: OrderItem[]; status_logs: StatusLog[];\n};\n\n// ── Translations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"অর্ডার বিস্তারিত\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    notFound: \"অর্ডার পাওয়া যায়নি।\",\n    back: \"← ফিরে যান\",\n    editOrder: \"সম্পাদনা\",\n    changeStatus: \"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন\",\n    bookCourier: \"কুরিয়ার বুক করুন\",\n    deleteOrder: \"মুছুন\",\n    confirmDelete: \"এই অর্ডার মুছে ফেলবেন?\",\n    orderInfo: \"অর্ডার তথ্য\",\n    customerInfo: \"গ্রাহক তথ্য\",\n    items: \"পণ্য তালিকা\",\n    paymentSummary: \"পেমেন্ট সারসংক্ষেপ\",\n    courierInfo: \"কুরিয়ার তথ্য\",\n    statusTimeline: \"স্ট্যাটাস টাইমলাইন\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    date: \"তারিখ\",\n    source: \"সোর্স\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    riskLevel: \"ঝুঁকি স্তর\",\n    fraudScore: \"ফ্রড স্কোর\",\n    name: \"নাম\",\n    phone: \"ফোন\",\n    address: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    district: \"জেলা\",\n    thana: \"থানা\",\n    product: \"পণ্য\",\n    qty: \"পরিমাণ\",\n    unitPrice: \"একক মূল্য\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    subtotal: \"সাবটোটাল\",\n    shipping: \"শিপিং চার্জ\",\n    discount: \"ছাড়\",\n    grandTotal: \"সর্বমোট\",\n    paymentMethod: \"পেমেন্ট পদ্ধতি\",\n    paymentStatus: \"পেমেন্ট স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    courier: \"কুরিয়ার\",\n    trackingId: \"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\",\n    courierStatus: \"কুরিয়ার স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    courierCharge: \"কুরিয়ার চার্জ\",\n    notes: \"নোট\",\n    save: \"সেভ করুন\",\n    saving: \"সেভ হচ্ছে...\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    newStatus: \"নতুন স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    statusNote: \"নোট (ঐচ্ছিক)\",\n    confirm: \"নিশ্চিত করুন\",\n    confirming: \"হচ্ছে...\",\n    deleteSuccess: \"অর্ডার মুছে ফেলা হয়েছে।\",\n    updateSuccess: \"অর্ডার আপডেট হয়েছে।\",\n    statusUpdated: \"স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন হয়েছে।\",\n    noCourier: \"কুরিয়ার বুক করা হয়নি\",\n    noItems: \"কোনো পণ্য নেই\",\n    noLogs: \"কোনো স্ট্যাটাস পরিবর্তন নেই\",\n    variant: \"ভেরিয়েন্ট\",\n    unknown: \"অজানা\",\n    by: \"দ্বারা\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Order Detail\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    notFound: \"Order not found.\",\n    back: \"← Back\",\n    editOrder: \"Edit\",\n    changeStatus: \"Change Status\",\n    bookCourier: \"Book Courier\",\n    deleteOrder: \"Delete\",\n    confirmDelete: \"Delete this order?\",\n    orderInfo: \"Order Info\",\n    customerInfo: \"Customer Info\",\n    items: \"Items\",\n    paymentSummary: \"Payment Summary\",\n    courierInfo: \"Courier Info\",\n    statusTimeline: \"Status Timeline\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    date: \"Date\",\n    source: \"Source\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    riskLevel: \"Risk Level\",\n    fraudScore: \"Fraud Score\",\n    name: \"Name\",\n    phone: \"Phone\",\n    address: \"Address\",\n    district: \"District\",\n    thana: \"Thana\",\n    product: \"Product\",\n    qty: \"Qty\",\n    unitPrice: \"Unit Price\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    subtotal: \"Subtotal\",\n    shipping: \"Shipping\",\n    discount: \"Discount\",\n    grandTotal: \"Grand Total\",\n    paymentMethod: \"Payment Method\",\n    paymentStatus: \"Payment Status\",\n    courier: \"Courier\",\n    trackingId: \"Tracking ID\",\n    courierStatus: \"Courier Status\",\n    courierCharge: \"Courier Charge\",\n    notes: \"Notes\",\n    save: \"Save\",\n    saving: \"Saving...\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    newStatus: \"New Status\",\n    statusNote: \"Note (optional)\",\n    confirm: \"Confirm\",\n    confirming: \"Processing...\",\n    deleteSuccess: \"Order deleted.\",\n    updateSuccess: \"Order updated.\",\n    statusUpdated: \"Status updated.\",\n    noCourier: \"No courier booked\",\n    noItems: \"No items\",\n    noLogs: \"No status changes\",\n    variant: \"Variant\",\n    unknown: \"Unknown\",\n    by: \"by\",\n  },\n};\n\n// ── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nexport default function OrderDetailPage() {\n  const params = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n  const orderId = params.id as string;\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [toast, setToast] = useState<{ type: \"success\" | \"error\"; msg: string } | null>(null);\n\n  // modals\n  const [editOpen, setEditOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [statusOpen, setStatusOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteOpen, setDeleteOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // edit form\n  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({\n    customer_name: \"\", customer_phone: \"\", customer_address: \"\",\n    customer_district: \"\", customer_thana: \"\",\n    payment_method: \"\", payment_status: \"\",\n    shipping_charge: \"\", discount: \"\", notes: \"\",\n  });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  // status form\n  const [statusForm, setStatusForm] = useState({ status: \"\" as OrderStatus | \"\", note: \"\" });\n  const [changingStatus, setChangingStatus] = useState(false);\n\n  // deleting\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const showToast = (type: \"success\" | \"error\", msg: string) => {\n    setToast({ type, msg });\n    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 3000);\n  };\n\n  const fetchOrder = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${orderId}`, {\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setOrder(d.data);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [orderId, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchOrder(); }, [fetchOrder]);\n\n  const openEdit = () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setEditForm({\n      customer_name: order.customer_name ?? \"\",\n      customer_phone: order.customer_phone,\n      customer_address: order.customer_address ?? \"\",\n      customer_district: order.customer_district ?? \"\",\n      customer_thana: order.customer_thana ?? \"\",\n      payment_method: order.payment_method ?? \"\",\n      payment_status: order.payment_status,\n      shipping_charge: order.shipping_charge,\n      discount: order.discount,\n      notes: order.notes ?? \"\",\n    });\n    setEditOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          ...editForm,\n          shipping_charge: Number(editForm.shipping_charge),\n          discount: Number(editForm.discount),\n        }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.updateSuccess);\n        setEditOpen(false);\n        await fetchOrder();\n      } else {\n        showToast(\"error\", d.message ?? \"Error\");\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleStatusChange = async () => {\n    if (!order || !statusForm.status) return;\n    setChangingStatus(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}/status`, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ status: statusForm.status, note: statusForm.note }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.statusUpdated);\n        setStatusOpen(false);\n        await fetchOrder();\n      } else {\n        showToast(\"error\", d.message ?? \"Error\");\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setChangingStatus(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\n    if (!order) return;\n    setDeleting(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/orders/${order.id}`, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        showToast(\"success\", txt.deleteSuccess);\n        setTimeout(() => router.push(\"/dashboard/orders\"), 1000);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) =>\n    new Date(iso).toLocaleString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-GB\", {\n      dateStyle: \"medium\", timeStyle: \"short\",\n    });\n\n  // ── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</div>\n      </UserShell>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!order) {\n    return (\n      <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n        pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notFound}</div>\n      </UserShell>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"all-orders\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Toast */}\n      {toast && (\n        <div className={`fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm shadow-xl ${\n          toast.type === \"success\" ? \"bg-emerald-500 text-white\" : \"bg-red-500 text-white\"\n        }`}>{toast.msg}</div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Top bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\">\n        <button onClick={() => router.push(\"/dashboard/orders\")}\n          className=\"text-sm text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\">{txt.back}</button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\">\n          <button onClick={openEdit}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n            {txt.editOrder}\n          </button>\n          <button onClick={() => { setStatusForm({ status: order.status, note: \"\" }); setStatusOpen(true); }}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n            {txt.changeStatus}\n          </button>\n          {!order.courier_tracking_id && (\n            <button onClick={() => router.push(\"/dashboard/courier\")}\n              className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n              {txt.bookCourier}\n            </button>\n          )}\n          <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(true)}\n            className=\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10\">\n            {txt.deleteOrder}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Main grid */}\n      <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n\n        {/* Order Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.orderInfo}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.orderNo}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\">{order.order_number}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.date}</dt>\n            <dd>{fmtDate(order.created_at)}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.status}</dt>\n            <dd>\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[order.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.status}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.source}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"capitalize\">{order.source ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            {order.source_ref && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">Ref</dt>\n                <dd className=\"truncate\">{order.source_ref}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.riskLevel}</dt>\n            <dd>\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${RISK_STYLE[order.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.risk_level}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.fraudScore}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.fraud_score}</dd>\n\n            {order.notes && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</dt>\n                <dd className=\"col-span-1 break-words\">{order.notes}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Customer Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.customerInfo}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.name}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.phone}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"font-mono\">{order.customer_phone}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.address}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_address ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.district}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_district ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.thana}</dt>\n            <dd>{order.customer_thana ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Items */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.items}</h3>\n          {order.items.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noItems}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n              <table className=\"w-full text-xs\">\n                <thead>\n                  <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4\">{txt.product}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\">{txt.qty}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\">{txt.unitPrice}</th>\n                    <th className=\"pb-2 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n                  </tr>\n                </thead>\n                <tbody>\n                  {order.items.map(item => (\n                    <tr key={item.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\">\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4\">\n                        <p className=\"font-medium\">{item.product_name}</p>\n                        {item.sku && <p className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">SKU: {item.sku}</p>}\n                        {item.variant_info && Object.entries(item.variant_info).map(([k, v]) => (\n                          <p key={k} className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{k}: {v}</p>\n                        ))}\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\">{item.quantity}</td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\">৳{Number(item.unit_price).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                      <td className=\"py-2 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(item.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                    </tr>\n                  ))}\n                </tbody>\n              </table>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Payment Summary */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.paymentSummary}</h3>\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.subtotal}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">৳{Number(order.subtotal).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shipping}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">৳{Number(order.shipping_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            {Number(order.discount) > 0 && (\n              <>\n                <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount}</dt>\n                <dd className=\"text-right text-emerald-400\">-৳{Number(order.discount).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n              </>\n            )}\n\n            <dt className=\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)]\">{txt.grandTotal}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"border-t border-[var(--border)] pt-2 text-right font-bold\">৳{Number(order.total).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentMethod}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right capitalize\">{order.payment_method ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n            <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentStatus}</dt>\n            <dd className=\"text-right\">\n              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${PAYMENT_STYLE[order.payment_status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                {order.payment_status}\n              </span>\n            </dd>\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Courier Info */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.courierInfo}</h3>\n          {!order.courier_name ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noCourier}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-xs\">\n              <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courier}</dt>\n              <dd className=\"capitalize\">{order.courier_name}</dd>\n\n              <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.trackingId}</dt>\n              <dd className=\"font-mono\">{order.courier_tracking_id ?? \"—\"}</dd>\n\n              {order.courier_status && (\n                <>\n                  <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courierStatus}</dt>\n                  <dd>\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${COURIER_STATUS_STYLE[order.courier_status] ?? \"bg-zinc-500/15 text-zinc-400\"}`}>\n                      {order.courier_status.replace(/_/g, \" \")}\n                    </span>\n                  </dd>\n                </>\n              )}\n\n              {order.courier_charge && (\n                <>\n                  <dt className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courierCharge}</dt>\n                  <dd>৳{Number(order.courier_charge).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n                </>\n              )}\n            </dl>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Status Timeline */}\n        <div className=\"catv-panel p-4 md:col-span-2\">\n          <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.statusTimeline}</h3>\n          {order.status_logs.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noLogs}</p>\n          ) : (\n            <ol className=\"relative ml-3 border-l border-[var(--border)]\">\n              {[...order.status_logs].reverse().map((log, i) => (\n                <li key={log.id} className={`mb-4 ml-4 ${i === 0 ? \"opacity-100\" : \"opacity-75\"}`}>\n                  <span className={`absolute -left-1.5 mt-1 h-3 w-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[var(--surface)] ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \"bg-zinc-400\"}`} />\n                  <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-2\">\n                    <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[log.new_status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                      {log.new_status}\n                    </span>\n                    {log.old_status && (\n                      <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">← {log.old_status}</span>\n                    )}\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                      {fmtDate(log.created_at)}\n                      {log.changed_by_user?.name && ` · ${txt.by} ${log.changed_by_user.name}`}\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                  {log.note && <p className=\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{log.note}</p>}\n                </li>\n              ))}\n            </ol>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* ── Edit Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {editOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setEditOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"my-8 w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.editOrder}</h3>\n\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n              {([\n                [\"customer_name\",    txt.name],\n                [\"customer_phone\",   txt.phone],\n                [\"customer_address\", txt.address],\n                [\"customer_district\",txt.district],\n                [\"customer_thana\",   txt.thana],\n              ] as [keyof typeof editForm, string][]).map(([field, label]) => (\n                <label key={field} className={field === \"customer_address\" ? \"col-span-2\" : \"\"}>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{label}</span>\n                  <input value={editForm[field]}\n                    onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, [field]: e.target.value }))}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              ))}\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentMethod}</span>\n                <select value={editForm.payment_method}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_method: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"cod\">COD</option>\n                  <option value=\"online\">Online</option>\n                  <option value=\"bkash\">bKash</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentStatus}</span>\n                <select value={editForm.payment_status}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, payment_status: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"due\">Due</option>\n                  <option value=\"partial\">Partial</option>\n                  <option value=\"paid\">Paid</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.shipping} (৳)</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={editForm.shipping_charge}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, shipping_charge: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.discount} (৳)</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" min=\"0\" value={editForm.discount}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, discount: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n\n              <label className=\"col-span-2\">\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.notes}</span>\n                <textarea value={editForm.notes} rows={2}\n                  onChange={e => setEditForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setEditOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} disabled={saving}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── Status Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {statusOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setStatusOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.changeStatus}</h3>\n\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.newStatus}</span>\n                <select value={statusForm.status}\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, status: e.target.value as OrderStatus }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  {ORDER_STATUSES.map(s => (\n                    <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.statusNote}</span>\n                <input value={statusForm.note}\n                  onChange={e => setStatusForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setStatusOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleStatusChange()} disabled={changingStatus || !statusForm.status}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {changingStatus ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── Delete Confirm ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {deleteOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setDeleteOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <p className=\"mb-5 text-sm\">{txt.confirmDelete} <span className=\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)]\">{order.order_number}</span></p>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setDeleteOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleDelete()} disabled={deleting}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-red-500 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {deleting ? txt.confirming : txt.deleteOrder}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}"}},"id":"7b4fbf06-8b87-414e-a053-6ef0b2993185","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:40:24.456Z","parentId":"bd060c69-fd28-413d-b67e-f51276a1d1bb"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"9247b55a-1f22-46dd-ae02-6b8c80576aaf","content":"Order Detail সম্পন্ন — commit `0020557` ✅\n\n[frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/[id]/page.tsx](frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/[id]/page.tsx) এ যা আছে:\n\n**6টি সেকশন:**\n- **Order Info** — order_number, date, status badge, source, risk_level, fraud_score, notes\n- **Customer Info** — name, phone, address, district, thana\n- **Items table** — product_name, SKU, variant_info, qty, unit price, line total\n- **Payment Summary** — subtotal → shipping → discount → grand total, payment method + status badge\n- **Courier Info** — courier_name, tracking_id, courier_status badge, courier_charge (বা \"No courier booked\")\n- **Status Timeline** — reversed chronological log, color-coded dot, old→new status, timestamp, user name, note\n\n**Action buttons (top bar):**\n- **Edit** → modal: customer info, payment method/status, shipping/discount, notes\n- **Change Status** → modal: status select + note → `PUT /orders/{id}/status`\n- **Book Courier** → booked না থাকলে দেখায়, `/dashboard/courier`-এ নিয়ে যায়\n- **Delete** → confirm dialog → delete → redirect to orders list","toolRequests":[]},"id":"f751fbef-f9e2-4063-96f5-a0f038f14c63","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:41:39.047Z","parentId":"7d6555af-f784-4c45-9182-3ae27c440fb4"}

Let me check the current state of Phase 1 modules based on the conversation history and the SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md.\n\nFrom the context summary and what I know:\n\n**Phase 1 modules:**\n1. **Product Management** ✅ Complete (backend + frontend)\n2. **Order Management** ✅ Complete (backend + frontend + order detail page)\n3. **Fraud Check** - needs checking\n4. **Customer CRM** ✅ Complete (backend + frontend)\n5. **Courier Integration** ✅ Complete (done this session, though it was Phase 2)\n\n\n6. \nNow I'm reviewing what's still incomplete for Phase 1 — there are a few stub pages and database tables that need to be built out, including the fraud checker and blacklist pages, their corresponding backend controllers and database schemas, plus the customer detail page that's still a placeholder."},"id":"2bd227c7-8cd2-45a0-ab80-7e02356578fc","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:48:39.398Z","parentId":"4e5643cc-40c3-4107-b387-efcd84299c7e"}

Fraud Check + Blacklist remaining.\"},{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md\",\"oldString\":\"## 12. Next Step Decision\\n\\nবর্তমান সিদ্ধান্ত: Phase 1 দিয়ে শুরু করব।\\n\\n**প্রস্তাবিত প্রথম module implementation order:**\\n\\n1. **Product Management** (backend + frontend) — orders-এর আগে products দরকার\\n2. **Order Management** (backend + frontend) — core business flow\\n3. **Fraud Check** (backend + frontend) — order create-এ embedded\\n4. **Customer CRM** (backend + frontend) — orders থেকে auto-populate\\n\\nএই 4টি Phase 1 module complete হলে একটি functional MVP পাওয়া যাবে।\",\"newString\":\"## 12. Phase 1 — Current Progress\\n\\n### ✅ সম্পন্ন (Completed)\\n\\n| Module | Backend | Frontend | Commit |\\n|---|---|---|---|\\n| Product Management | ✅ ProductController, CategoryController | ✅ /products, /products/categories, /products/stock | `7a16e3c` |\\n| Order Management | ✅ OrderController (CRUD, status, bulk, stats) | ✅ /orders, /orders/create, /orders/[id] | `7a16e3c` → `0020557` |\\n| Customer CRM | ✅ CustomerController (6 routes, syncFromOrder) | ✅ /customers, /customers/[id], /customers/vip, /customers/risky | `669d310` |\\n| Courier Integration | ✅ CourierController, SteadfastService, courier_settings migration | ✅ /courier, /courier/track, /settings/courier | `b69eebc` |\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 🔲 বাকি (Remaining in Phase 1)\\n\\n#### P1-A: Fake Order / Fraud Detection\\n\\n**Backend কাজ:**\\n- [ ] Migration: `customer_fraud_profiles` table\\n  ```\\n  id, user_id, phone, total_orders, delivered_count, cancelled_count,\\n  return_count, fraud_score (0-100), risk_level, last_updated\\n  ```\\n- [ ] Migration: `customer_blacklist` table\\n  ```\\n  id, user_id, phone, reason, blocked_at\\n  ```\\n- [ ] `FraudController.php` — routes:\\n  ```\\n  POST /api/fraud/check-phone      ← score একটি ফোন নম্বর\\n  GET  /api/fraud/blacklist         ← ব্লাকলিস্ট\\n  POST /api/fraud/blacklist         ← ব্লাকলিস্টে যোগ করুন\\n  DELETE /api/fraud/blacklist/{id}  ← সরান\\n  ```\\n- [ ] Fraud score algorithm (order history থেকে computed):\\n  ```\\n  +30  ফোনে 3+ অর্ডার এবং return rate > 40%\\n  +20  cancel rate > 40%\\n  +15  2+ বার same phone অন্য user-এর কাছেও returned\\n  -20  সফল delivery (trust signal)\\n  Score 0–30 → low, 31–60 → medium, 61+ → high\\n  ```\\n- [ ] Auto-fraud-score on order create (OrderController::store() এ hook)\\n\\n**Frontend কাজ:**\\n- [ ] `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check/page.tsx` — phone search + fraud score card\\n  - Phone input → API call → স্কোর + risk badge + order history\\n  - Bulk check (paste multiple phones)\\n  - \\\"Blacklist\\\" বাটন\\n- [ ] `/dashboard/orders/blacklist/page.tsx` — blacklisted phones list\\n  - Table: phone, reason, date, remove button\\n  - Add to blacklist modal\\n\\n---\\n\\n#### P1-B: Dashboard Home (stat cards)\\n\\n**Frontend কাজ:**\\n- [ ] `/dashboard/page.tsx` — এখনো placeholder\\n  - Today's orders, revenue, pending count, high-risk count\\n  - Quick actions: Create Order, Book Parcel\\n  - Recent orders mini-list\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Phase 1 সম্পন্ন হলে MVP হবে:\\n- ✅ পণ্য যোগ করা যাবে\\n- ✅ অর্ডার নেওয়া যাবে (manual + create wizard)\\n- ✅ কাস্টমার অটো-ট্র্যাক হবে\\n- ✅ Steadfast কুরিয়ার বুক করা যাবে\\n- 🔲 ফেক অর্ডার ধরা যাবে (Fraud Check)\\n- 🔲 ড্যাশবোর্ড হোম (stats overview)\\n\\n---\\n\\n### পরবর্তী কাজের অর্ডার (Recommended)\\n\\n1. **Fraud Check** — `FraudController` + `/fraud-check` + `/blacklist` pages\\n2. **Dashboard Home** — stat cards + shortcuts\\n3. **Phase 2** শুরু → SMS Automation, Accounting\"}]}","type":"function"}]},"id":"d254f0a1-dd41-4d7e-b549-15bac5879db9","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:49:43.659Z","parentId":"92e88d0e-058f-4202-bf3e-4c670a5012a2"}

Fraud Check + Blacklist remaining."},{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/SAAS_MODULE_CONTEXT.md","oldString":"## 12. Next Step Decision\n\nবর্তমান সিদ্ধান্ত: Phase 1 দিয়ে শুরু করব।\n\n**প্রস্তাবিত প্রথম module implementation order:**\n\n1. **Product Management** (backend + frontend) — orders-এর আগে products দরকার\n2. **Order Management** (backend + frontend) — core business flow\n3. **Fraud Check** (backend + frontend) — order create-এ embedded\n4. **Customer CRM** (backend + frontend) — orders থেকে auto-populate\n\nএই 4টি Phase 1 module complete হলে একটি functional MVP পাওয়া যাবে।","newString":"## 12. Phase 1 — Current Progress\n\n### ✅ সম্পন্ন (Completed)\n\n| Module | Backend | Frontend | Commit |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| Product Management | ✅ ProductController, CategoryController | ✅ /products, /products/categories, /products/stock | `7a16e3c` |\n| Order Management | ✅ OrderController (CRUD, status, bulk, stats) | ✅ /orders, /orders/create, /orders/[id] | `7a16e3c` → `0020557` |\n| Customer CRM | ✅ CustomerController (6 routes, syncFromOrder) | ✅ /customers, /customers/[id], /customers/vip, /customers/risky | `669d310` |\n| Courier Integration | ✅ CourierController, SteadfastService, courier_settings migration | ✅ /courier, /courier/track, /settings/courier | `b69eebc` |\n\n---\n\n### 🔲 বাকি (Remaining in Phase 1)\n\n#### P1-A: Fake Order / Fraud Detection\n\n**Backend কাজ:**\n- [ ] Migration: `customer_fraud_profiles` table\n  ```\n  id, user_id, phone, total_orders, delivered_count, cancelled_count,\n  return_count, fraud_score (0-100), risk_level, last_updated\n  ```\n- [ ] Migration: `customer_blacklist` table\n  ```\n  id, user_id, phone, reason, blocked_at\n  ```\n- [ ] `FraudController.php` — routes:\n  ```\n  POST /api/fraud/check-phone      ← score একটি ফোন নম্বর\n  GET  /api/fraud/blacklist         ← ব্লাকলিস্ট\n  POST /api/fraud/blacklist         ← ব্লাকলিস্টে যোগ করুন\n  DELETE /api/fraud/blacklist/{id}  ← সরান\n  ```\n- [ ] Fraud score algorithm (order history থেকে computed):\n  ```\n  +30  ফোনে 3+ অর্ডার এবং return rate > 40%\n  +20  cancel rate > 40%\n  +15  2+ বার same phone অন্য user-এর কাছেও returned\n  -20  সফল delivery (trust signal)\n  Score 0–30 → low, 31–60 → medium, 61+ → high\n  ```\n- [ ] Auto-fraud-score on order create (OrderController::store() এ hook)\n\n**Frontend কাজ:**\n- [ ] `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check/page.tsx` — phone search + fraud score card\n  - Phone input → API call → স্কোর + risk badge + order history\n  - Bulk check (paste multiple phones)\n  - \"Blacklist\" বাটন\n- [ ] `/dashboard/orders/blacklist/page.tsx` — blacklisted phones list\n  - Table: phone, reason, date, remove button\n  - Add to blacklist modal\n\n---\n\n#### P1-B: Dashboard Home (stat cards)\n\n**Frontend কাজ:**\n- [ ] `/dashboard/page.tsx` — এখনো placeholder\n  - Today's orders, revenue, pending count, high-risk count\n  - Quick actions: Create Order, Book Parcel\n  - Recent orders mini-list\n\n---\n\n### Phase 1 সম্পন্ন হলে MVP হবে:\n- ✅ পণ্য যোগ করা যাবে\n- ✅ অর্ডার নেওয়া যাবে (manual + create wizard)\n- ✅ কাস্টমার অটো-ট্র্যাক হবে\n- ✅ Steadfast কুরিয়ার বুক করা যাবে\n- 🔲 ফেক অর্ডার ধরা যাবে (Fraud Check)\n- 🔲 ড্যাশবোর্ড হোম (stats overview)\n\n---\n\n### পরবর্তী কাজের অর্ডার (Recommended)\n\n1. **Fraud Check** — `FraudController` + `/fraud-check` + `/blacklist` pages\n2. **Dashboard Home** — stat cards + shortcuts\n3. **Phase 2** শুরু → SMS Automation, Accounting"}]}},"id":"83a4b01a-6e57-4caf-bb52-f008dafad34e","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:49:43.720Z","parentId":"130e8520-6319-47d9-ab00-63bfce9581d2"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"09586643-57da-48d7-8528-58c5f5d5fd91","content":"**Phase 1 — বাকি কাজ:**\n\n### ✅ সম্পন্ন (4/6)\n| Module | Status |\n|---|---|\n| Product Management | ✅ Backend + Frontend |\n| Order Management | ✅ Backend + Frontend + Detail page |\n| Customer CRM | ✅ Backend + Frontend |\n| Courier Integration | ✅ Backend + Frontend |\n\n---\n\n### 🔲 বাকি (2টি)\n\n**P1-A: Fraud Check + Blacklist**\n- Backend: `customer_fraud_profiles` + `customer_blacklist` migration\n- Backend: `FraudController.php` — `check-phone`, `blacklist` CRUD\n- Fraud score algorithm (order history থেকে compute: return rate, cancel rate)\n- Auto-score hook on `OrderController::store()`\n- Frontend: `/dashboard/orders/fraud-check` — phone search + score card + bulk check\n- Frontend: `/dashboard/orders/blacklist` — blocked phones list + add/remove\n\n**P1-B: Dashboard Home**\n- Frontend: `/dashboard/page.tsx` — today's orders, revenue, pending count, high-risk count + quick action buttons + recent orders mini-list\n\nএই 2টি শেষ হলে Phase 1 MVP সম্পূর্ণ হবে।","toolRequests":[]},"id":"f8971269-c2f6-4954-9ffe-e44f25c0bef5","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:50:04.572Z","parentId":"f3bfd6f1-0071-4353-aae2-6005afd1a193"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"4cb17943-49d0-48b3-bcca-cf5ccf8c0e76","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_018eYupvCJFLzdoMXfV8qxkt","name":"multi_replace_string_in_file","arguments":"{\"explanation\": \"Fill fraud profiles and blacklist migrations\", \"replacements\": [{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/database/migrations/2026_05_02_185125_create_customer_fraud_profiles_table.php\",\"oldString\":\"        Schema::create('customer_fraud_profiles', function (Blueprint $table) {\\n            $table->id();\\n            $table->timestamps();\\n        });\",\"newString\":\"        Schema::create('customer_fraud_profiles', function (Blueprint $table) {\\n            $table->id();\\n            $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id');\\n            $table->string('phone', 20);\\n            $table->integer('total_orders')->default(0);\\n            $table->integer('delivered_count')->default(0);\\n            $table->integer('cancelled_count')->default(0);\\n            $table->integer('return_count')->default(0);\\n            $table->integer('fraud_score')->default(0); // 0-100\\n            $table->string('risk_level', 20)->default('low'); // low/medium/high\\n            $table->timestamp('last_updated')->nullable();\\n            $table->timestamps();\\n            $table->unique(['user_id', 'phone']);\\n            $table->index(['user_id', 'risk_level']);\\n            $table->foreign('user_id')->references('id')->on('users')->onDelete('cascade');\\n        });\"},{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/database/migrations/2026_05_02_185125_create_customer_blacklist_table.php\",\"oldString\":\"        Schema::create('customer_blacklist', function (Blueprint $table) {\\n            $table->id();\\n            $table->timestamps();\\n        });\",\"newString\":\"        Schema::create('customer_blacklist', function (Blueprint $table) {\\n            $table->id();\\n            $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id');\\n            $table->string('phone', 20);\\n            $table->string('reason')->nullable();\\n            $table->timestamp('blocked_at')->useCurrent();\\n            $table->timestamps();\\n            $table->unique(['user_id', 'phone']);\\n            $table->index('user_id');\\n            $table->foreign('user_id')->references('id')->on('users')->onDelete('cascade');\\n        });\"}]}","type":"function"}]},"id":"e7783630-6b30-48cd-902b-85df730eb046","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:51:41.514Z","parentId":"5bc2e7eb-d7f1-4f57-9821-841dea5c3a1a"}
