{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_018eYupvCJFLzdoMXfV8qxkt","toolName":"multi_replace_string_in_file","arguments":{"explanation":"Fill fraud profiles and blacklist migrations","replacements":[{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/database/migrations/2026_05_02_185125_create_customer_fraud_profiles_table.php","oldString":"        Schema::create('customer_fraud_profiles', function (Blueprint $table) {\n            $table->id();\n            $table->timestamps();\n        });","newString":"        Schema::create('customer_fraud_profiles', function (Blueprint $table) {\n            $table->id();\n            $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id');\n            $table->string('phone', 20);\n            $table->integer('total_orders')->default(0);\n            $table->integer('delivered_count')->default(0);\n            $table->integer('cancelled_count')->default(0);\n            $table->integer('return_count')->default(0);\n            $table->integer('fraud_score')->default(0); // 0-100\n            $table->string('risk_level', 20)->default('low'); // low/medium/high\n            $table->timestamp('last_updated')->nullable();\n            $table->timestamps();\n            $table->unique(['user_id', 'phone']);\n            $table->index(['user_id', 'risk_level']);\n            $table->foreign('user_id')->references('id')->on('users')->onDelete('cascade');\n        });"},{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/database/migrations/2026_05_02_185125_create_customer_blacklist_table.php","oldString":"        Schema::create('customer_blacklist', function (Blueprint $table) {\n            $table->id();\n            $table->timestamps();\n        });","newString":"        Schema::create('customer_blacklist', function (Blueprint $table) {\n            $table->id();\n            $table->unsignedBigInteger('user_id');\n            $table->string('phone', 20);\n            $table->string('reason')->nullable();\n            $table->timestamp('blocked_at')->useCurrent();\n            $table->timestamps();\n            $table->unique(['user_id', 'phone']);\n            $table->index('user_id');\n            $table->foreign('user_id')->references('id')->on('users')->onDelete('cascade');\n        });"}]}},"id":"b0f924bb-e970-47f1-87a5-395d4052072a","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:51:41.561Z","parentId":"5761ca33-8f54-4e11-bd5d-ab9a275b0f46"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"eb9256dd-1fc1-45ee-a8a3-35be15344bef","content":"Now create the FraudController: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01DR8DxqU3CLfQy1ieTW46id","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/FraudController.php\", \"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Api;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Http\\\\Controllers\\\\Controller;\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\Order;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Facades\\\\DB;\\n\\nclass FraudController extends Controller\\n{\\n    // ── Compute fraud score for a phone number ────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function checkPhone(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'phone' => 'required|string|max:20',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $result = $this->computeScore(auth()->id(), $data['phone']);\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Bulk check multiple phones ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function bulkCheck(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'phones'   => 'required|array|min:1|max:100',\\n            'phones.*' => 'required|string|max:20',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $results = [];\\n        foreach ($data['phones'] as $phone) {\\n            $results[] = $this->computeScore(auth()->id(), $phone);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $results]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Blacklist ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function blacklist(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n        $query  = DB::table('customer_blacklist')->where('user_id', $userId);\\n\\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\\n            $query->where('phone', 'like', '%' . $request->search . '%');\\n        }\\n\\n        $perPage  = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\\n        $total    = $query->count();\\n        $page     = max(1, (int) ($request->page ?? 1));\\n        $items    = $query->orderByDesc('blocked_at')\\n            ->offset(($page - 1) * $perPage)\\n            ->limit($perPage)\\n            ->get();\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => $items,\\n            'meta'    => [\\n                'total'        => $total,\\n                'current_page' => $page,\\n                'last_page'    => max(1, (int) ceil($total / $perPage)),\\n            ],\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function addBlacklist(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $data = $request->validate([\\n            'phone'  => 'required|string|max:20',\\n            'reason' => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n        ]);\\n\\n        $userId = auth()->id();\\n\\n        $existing = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\\n            ->where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->where('phone', $data['phone'])\\n            ->first();\\n\\n        if ($existing) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Phone already blacklisted.'], 422);\\n        }\\n\\n        $id = DB::table('customer_blacklist')->insertGetId([\\n            'user_id'    => $userId,\\n            'phone'      => $data['phone'],\\n            'reason'     => $data['reason'] ?? null,\\n            'blocked_at' => now(),\\n            'created_at' => now(),\\n            'updated_at' => now(),\\n        ]);\\n\\n        return response()->json([\\n            'success' => true,\\n            'data'    => DB::table('customer_blacklist')->find($id),\\n        ], 201);\\n    }\\n\\n    public function removeBlacklist(int $id): JsonResponse\\n    {\\n        $deleted = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\\n            ->where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n            ->where('id', $id)\\n            ->delete();\\n\\n        if (! $deleted) {\\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Not found.'], 404);\\n        }\\n\\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Removed from blacklist.']);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Core scoring logic ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function computeScore(int $userId, string $phone): array\\n    {\\n        $phone = preg_replace('/\\\\D/', '', $phone);\\n\\n        // Get all orders for this phone by this user\\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->where('customer_phone', 'like', '%' . substr($phone, -10))\\n            ->get(['id', 'status', 'risk_level', 'fraud_score', 'created_at', 'order_number', 'total']);\\n\\n        $total     = $orders->count();\\n        $delivered = $orders->where('status', 'delivered')->count();\\n        $cancelled = $orders->where('status', 'cancelled')->count();\\n        $returned  = $orders->where('status', 'returned')->count();\\n\\n        $score = 0;\\n\\n        if ($total >= 3) {\\n            $returnRate  = $total > 0 ? ($returned / $total) : 0;\\n            $cancelRate  = $total > 0 ? ($cancelled / $total) : 0;\\n            $deliverRate = $total > 0 ? ($delivered / $total) : 0;\\n\\n            if ($returnRate > 0.40)  $score += 30;\\n            if ($cancelRate > 0.40)  $score += 20;\\n            if ($returned >= 2)      $score += 15;\\n            if ($deliverRate >= 0.7) $score -= 20;\\n        } elseif ($total >= 1) {\\n            if ($returned >= 1)  $score += 15;\\n            if ($cancelled >= 1) $score += 10;\\n            if ($delivered >= 1) $score -= 10;\\n        }\\n\\n        // Phone format check\\n        if (strlen($phone) !== 11 || ! str_starts_with($phone, '0')) {\\n            $score += 5;\\n        }\\n\\n        // Blacklisted?\\n        $isBlacklisted = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\\n            ->where('user_id', $userId)\\n            ->where('phone', 'like', '%' . substr($phone, -10))\\n            ->exists();\\n\\n        if ($isBlacklisted) $score += 40;\\n\\n        $score = max(0, min(100, $score));\\n\\n        $riskLevel = match (true) {\\n            $score >= 61 => 'high',\\n            $score >= 31 => 'medium',\\n            default      => 'low',\\n        };\\n\\n        // Upsert fraud profile\\n        DB::table('customer_fraud_profiles')->updateOrInsert(\\n            ['user_id' => $userId, 'phone' => $phone],\\n            [\\n                'total_orders'    => $total,\\n                'delivered_count' => $delivered,\\n                'cancelled_count' => $cancelled,\\n                'return_count'    => $returned,\\n                'fraud_score'     => $score,\\n                'risk_level'      => $riskLevel,\\n                'last_updated'    => now(),\\n                'updated_at'      => now(),\\n            ]\\n        );\\n\\n        return [\\n            'phone'          => $phone,\\n            'fraud_score'    => $score,\\n            'risk_level'     => $riskLevel,\\n            'is_blacklisted' => $isBlacklisted,\\n            'stats'          => compact('total', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'returned'),\\n            'orders'         => $orders->values(),\\n        ];\\n    }\\n}\\n\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"1ed54e1e-ed1d-463c-9e85-e0bf283c389c","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:52:13.540Z","parentId":"f8356171-1f2a-4f5b-b869-2a03cc41397e"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01DR8DxqU3CLfQy1ieTW46id","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/FraudController.php","content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api;\n\nuse App\\Http\\Controllers\\Controller;\nuse App\\Models\\Order;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\JsonResponse;\nuse Illuminate\\Http\\Request;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\DB;\n\nclass FraudController extends Controller\n{\n    // ── Compute fraud score for a phone number ────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function checkPhone(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'phone' => 'required|string|max:20',\n        ]);\n\n        $result = $this->computeScore(auth()->id(), $data['phone']);\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Bulk check multiple phones ────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function bulkCheck(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'phones'   => 'required|array|min:1|max:100',\n            'phones.*' => 'required|string|max:20',\n        ]);\n\n        $results = [];\n        foreach ($data['phones'] as $phone) {\n            $results[] = $this->computeScore(auth()->id(), $phone);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $results]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Blacklist ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function blacklist(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n        $query  = DB::table('customer_blacklist')->where('user_id', $userId);\n\n        if ($request->filled('search')) {\n            $query->where('phone', 'like', '%' . $request->search . '%');\n        }\n\n        $perPage  = min((int) ($request->per_page ?? 20), 100);\n        $total    = $query->count();\n        $page     = max(1, (int) ($request->page ?? 1));\n        $items    = $query->orderByDesc('blocked_at')\n            ->offset(($page - 1) * $perPage)\n            ->limit($perPage)\n            ->get();\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => $items,\n            'meta'    => [\n                'total'        => $total,\n                'current_page' => $page,\n                'last_page'    => max(1, (int) ceil($total / $perPage)),\n            ],\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    public function addBlacklist(Request $request): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $data = $request->validate([\n            'phone'  => 'required|string|max:20',\n            'reason' => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n        ]);\n\n        $userId = auth()->id();\n\n        $existing = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\n            ->where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('phone', $data['phone'])\n            ->first();\n\n        if ($existing) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Phone already blacklisted.'], 422);\n        }\n\n        $id = DB::table('customer_blacklist')->insertGetId([\n            'user_id'    => $userId,\n            'phone'      => $data['phone'],\n            'reason'     => $data['reason'] ?? null,\n            'blocked_at' => now(),\n            'created_at' => now(),\n            'updated_at' => now(),\n        ]);\n\n        return response()->json([\n            'success' => true,\n            'data'    => DB::table('customer_blacklist')->find($id),\n        ], 201);\n    }\n\n    public function removeBlacklist(int $id): JsonResponse\n    {\n        $deleted = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\n            ->where('user_id', auth()->id())\n            ->where('id', $id)\n            ->delete();\n\n        if (! $deleted) {\n            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Not found.'], 404);\n        }\n\n        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Removed from blacklist.']);\n    }\n\n    // ── Core scoring logic ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function computeScore(int $userId, string $phone): array\n    {\n        $phone = preg_replace('/\\D/', '', $phone);\n\n        // Get all orders for this phone by this user\n        $orders = Order::where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('customer_phone', 'like', '%' . substr($phone, -10))\n            ->get(['id', 'status', 'risk_level', 'fraud_score', 'created_at', 'order_number', 'total']);\n\n        $total     = $orders->count();\n        $delivered = $orders->where('status', 'delivered')->count();\n        $cancelled = $orders->where('status', 'cancelled')->count();\n        $returned  = $orders->where('status', 'returned')->count();\n\n        $score = 0;\n\n        if ($total >= 3) {\n            $returnRate  = $total > 0 ? ($returned / $total) : 0;\n            $cancelRate  = $total > 0 ? ($cancelled / $total) : 0;\n            $deliverRate = $total > 0 ? ($delivered / $total) : 0;\n\n            if ($returnRate > 0.40)  $score += 30;\n            if ($cancelRate > 0.40)  $score += 20;\n            if ($returned >= 2)      $score += 15;\n            if ($deliverRate >= 0.7) $score -= 20;\n        } elseif ($total >= 1) {\n            if ($returned >= 1)  $score += 15;\n            if ($cancelled >= 1) $score += 10;\n            if ($delivered >= 1) $score -= 10;\n        }\n\n        // Phone format check\n        if (strlen($phone) !== 11 || ! str_starts_with($phone, '0')) {\n            $score += 5;\n        }\n\n        // Blacklisted?\n        $isBlacklisted = DB::table('customer_blacklist')\n            ->where('user_id', $userId)\n            ->where('phone', 'like', '%' . substr($phone, -10))\n            ->exists();\n\n        if ($isBlacklisted) $score += 40;\n\n        $score = max(0, min(100, $score));\n\n        $riskLevel = match (true) {\n            $score >= 61 => 'high',\n            $score >= 31 => 'medium',\n            default      => 'low',\n        };\n\n        // Upsert fraud profile\n        DB::table('customer_fraud_profiles')->updateOrInsert(\n            ['user_id' => $userId, 'phone' => $phone],\n            [\n                'total_orders'    => $total,\n                'delivered_count' => $delivered,\n                'cancelled_count' => $cancelled,\n                'return_count'    => $returned,\n                'fraud_score'     => $score,\n                'risk_level'      => $riskLevel,\n                'last_updated'    => now(),\n                'updated_at'      => now(),\n            ]\n        );\n\n        return [\n            'phone'          => $phone,\n            'fraud_score'    => $score,\n            'risk_level'     => $riskLevel,\n            'is_blacklisted' => $isBlacklisted,\n            'stats'          => compact('total', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'returned'),\n            'orders'         => $orders->values(),\n        ];\n    }\n}\n"}},"id":"c9a9e167-f5f7-4d84-a321-c063abc12cf6","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:52:13.751Z","parentId":"d4858c96-de65-475e-b182-2e4a0068b763"}

created_at: string }[];\\n};\\n\\nexport default function FraudCheckPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token const [addingBl, setAddingBl] = useState(false);\\n  const [blMsg, setBlMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);\\n\\n  const [bulkInput, setBulkInput] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [bulkChecking, setBulkChecking] = useState(false);\\n  const [bulkResults, setBulkResults] = useState<FraudResult[]>([]);\\n\\n  const handleCheck = async () => {\\n    if (!phone.trim()) return;\\n    setChecking(true); setResult(null); setBlMsg(null);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/check-phone`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": }\\n    } finally { setChecking(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleBulk = async () => {\\n    const phones = bulkInput.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").map(p => p.trim()).filter(Boolean);\\n    if (!phones.length) return;\\n    setBulkChecking(true); setBulkResults([]);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/bulk-check`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { setBulkResults(d.data ?? []); }\\n    } finally { setBulkChecking(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleAddBlacklist = async (ph: string) => {\\n    setAddingBl(true); setBlMsg(null);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phone: ph }),\\n      });\\n      const d = await res.json();\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        setBlMsg(txt.blacklistSuccess);\\n        if (result && result.phone === ph) setResult({ ...result, is_blacklisted: true });\\n      } else {\\n        setBlMsg(d.message ?? \\\"Error\\\");\\n      }\\n    } finally { setAddingBl(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) => new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-GB\\\");\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"fraud-check\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3\\\">\\n\\n        {/* Left: Single check + bulk */}\\n        <div className=\\\"flex flex-col gap-4\\\">\\n\\n          {/* Single phone check */}\\n          <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.pageTitle}</h3>\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <input value={phone} onChange={e => setPhone(e.target.value)}\\n                onKeyDown={e => e.key === \\\"Enter\\\" && void handleCheck()}\\n                placeholder={txt.phonePlaceholder}\\n                className=\\\"flex-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleCheck()} disabled={checking || !phone.trim()}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {checking ? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                    <span className=\\\"font-mono\\\">{r.phone}</span>\\n                    <div className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2\\\">\\n                      <span className=\\\"font-bold\\\">{r.fraud_score}</span>\\n                      <span className=\\\"capitalize\\\">{r.risk_level}</span>\\n                      {r.is_blacklisted && <span>⛔</span>}\\n                    </div>\\n                  </div>\\n                ))}\\n              </div>\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* Right: Result detail */}\\n        <div className=\\\"lg:col-span-2\\\">\\n          {!result ? (\\n                      <p className=\\\"text-xs font-semibold\\\">{blMsg}</p>\\n                    ) : (\\n                      <button onClick={() => void handleAddBlacklist(result.phone)} disabled={addingBl}\\n                        className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-current px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-white/10 disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                        {addingBl ? txt.adding : txt.addBlacklist}\\n                      </button>\\n                    )}\\n                  </div>\\n                )}\\n              </div>\\n\\n              {/* Order history */}\\n              <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n                <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.orderHistory}</h3>\\n                {result.orders.length === 0 ? (\\n                  <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noOrders}</p>\\n                ) : (\\n                  <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n                    <table className=\\\"w-full text-xs\\\">\\n                      <thead>\\n                        <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n                          <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4\\\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\\n                          <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4\\\">{txt.status}</th>\\n                          <th className=\\\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n                          <th className=\\\"pb-2 text-right\\\">{txt.date}</th>\\n                        </tr>\\n                      </thead>\\n                      <tbody>\\n                        {result.orders.map(o => (\\n                          <tr key={o.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\\\">\\n                            <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 font-mono text-[var(--accent)]\\\">{o.order_number}</td>\\n                            <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4\\\">\\n                              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[o.status] ?? \\\"\\\"}`}>\\n                                {o.status}\\n                              </span>\\n                            </td>\\n                            <td className=\\\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\\\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\\n                            <td className=\\\"py-2 text-right text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\\n                          </tr>\\n                        ))}\\n                      </tbody>\\n                    </table>\\n                  </div>\\n                )}\\n              </div>\\n            </div>\\n          )}\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\", \"oldString\": \"\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport ModulePlaceholder from \\\"@/components/module-placeholder\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"f87e3e3d-4ea0-4d20-9cc3-299980538708","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:54:12.320Z","parentId":"1666aa5e-282d-4c5a-a562-c34807cd11a6"}

client\";\n\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst RISK_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  low:    \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30\",\n  medium: \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/30\",\n  high:   \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400 border-red-500/30\",\n};\n\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  pending:    \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  confirmed:  \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  processing: \"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\",\n  shipped:    \"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\",\n  delivered:  \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  cancelled:  \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  returned:   \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n};\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"ফ্রড চেক\",\n    phonePlaceholder: \"ফোন নম্বর লিখুন (01XXXXXXXXX)\",\n    check: \"চেক করুন\",\n    checking: \"চেক হচ্ছে...\",\n    bulkTitle: \"বাল্ক চেক\",\n    bulkPlaceholder: \"একাধিক ফোন নম্বর লিখুন (প্রতি লাইনে একটি)\",\n    bulkCheck: \"সব চেক করুন\",\n    bulkChecking: \"চেক হচ্ছে...\",\n    addBlacklist: \"ব্ল্যাকলিস্টে যোগ করুন\",\n    adding: \"যোগ হচ্ছে...\",\n    blacklistSuccess: \"ব্ল্যাকলিস্টে যোগ করা হয়েছে\",\n    fraudScore: \"ফ্রড স্কোর\",\n    riskLevel: \"ঝুঁকি স্তর\",\n    totalOrders: \"মোট অর্ডার\",\n    delivered: \"ডেলিভারি\",\n    cancelled: \"বাতিল\",\n    returned: \"রিটার্ন\",\n    blacklisted: \"⛔ ব্ল্যাকলিস্টেড\",\n    orderHistory: \"অর্ডার ইতিহাস\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    date: \"তারিখ\",\n    noOrders: \"কোনো অর্ডার নেই\",\n    enterPhone: \"একটি ফোন নম্বর দিয়ে চেক শুরু করুন\",\n    bulkResults: \"বাল্ক ফলাফল\",\n    phone: \"ফোন\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Fraud Check\",\n    phonePlaceholder: \"Enter phone (01XXXXXXXXX)\",\n    check: \"Check\",\n    checking: \"Checking...\",\n    bulkTitle: \"Bulk \"Adding...\",\n    blacklistSuccess: \"Added to blacklist\",\n    fraudScore: \"Fraud Score\",\n    riskLevel: \"Risk Level\",\n    totalOrders: \"Total Orders\",\n    delivered: \"Delivered\",\n    cancelled: \"Cancelled\",\n    returned: \"Returned\",\n    blacklisted: \"⛔ Blacklisted\",\n    orderHistory: \"Order History\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    date: \"Date\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders\",\n    enterPhone: \"Enter a phone number to start checking\",\n    bulkResults: \"Bulk Results\",\n    phone: \"Phone\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype FraudResult = {\n  phone: string; fraud_score: number; risk_level: string; is_blacklisted: boolean;\n  stats: { total: number; delivered: number; cancelled: number; returned: number };\n  orders: { id: number; order_number: string; status: string; total: string; created_at: string }[];\n};\n\nexport default function FraudCheckPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState(\"\");\n  const [checking, setChecking] = useState(false);\n  const [result, setResult] = useState<FraudResult | null>(null);\n  const [addingBl, setAddingBl] = useState(false);\n  const [blMsg, setBlMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  const [bulkInput, setBulkInput] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bulkChecking, setBulkChecking] = useState(false);\n  const [bulkResults, setBulkResults] = useState<FraudResult[]>([]);\n\n  const handleCheck = async () => {\n    if (!phone.trim()) return;\n    setChecking(true); setResult(null); setBlMsg(null);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/check-phone`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phone: phone.trim() }),\n      });\n      if (res.ok) { const d = await res.json(); setResult(d.data); }\n    } finally { setChecking(false); }\n  };\n\n  const handleBulk = async () => {\n    const phones = bulkInput.split(\"\\n\").map(p => p.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n    if (!phones.length) return;\n    setBulkChecking(true); setBulkResults([]);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/bulk-check`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phones }),\n      });\n      if (res.ok) { const d = await res.json(); setBulkResults(d.data ?? []); }\n    } finally { setBulkChecking(false); }\n  };\n\n  const handleAddBlacklist = async (ph: string) => {\n    setAddingBl(true); setBlMsg(null);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phone: ph }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setBlMsg(txt.blacklistSuccess);\n        if (result && result.phone === ph) setResult({ ...result, is_blacklisted: true });\n      } else {\n        setBlMsg(d.message ?? \"Error\");\n      }\n    } finally { setAddingBl(false); }\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) => new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-GB\");\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"fraud-check\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      <div className=\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3\">\n\n        {/* Left: Single check + bulk */}\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-4\">\n\n          {/* Single phone check */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.pageTitle}</h3>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <input value={phone} onChange={e => setPhone(e.target.value)}\n                onKeyDown={e => e.key === \"Enter\" && void handleCheck()}\n                placeholder={txt.phonePlaceholder}\n                className=\"flex-1 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              <button onClick={() => void handleCheck()} disabled={checking || !phone.trim()}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {checking ? txt.checking : txt.check}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Bulk check */}\n          <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.bulkTitle}</h3>\n            <textarea value={bulkInput} onChange={e => setBulkInput(e.target.value)} rows={5}\n              placeholder={txt.bulkPlaceholder}\n              className=\"mb-3 w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n            <button onClick={() => void handleBulk()} disabled={bulkChecking || !bulkInput.trim()}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n              {bulkChecking ? txt.bulkChecking : txt.bulkCheck}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Bulk results */}\n          {bulkResults.length > 0 && (\n            <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n              <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.bulkResults}</h3>\n              <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-2\">\n                {bulkResults.map(r => (\n                  <div key={r.phone}\n                    className={`flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border px-3 py-2 text-xs ${RISK_STYLE[r.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                    <span className=\"font-mono\">{r.phone}</span>\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                      <span className=\"font-bold\">{r.fraud_score}</span>\n                      <span className=\"capitalize\">{r.risk_level}</span>\n                      {r.is_blacklisted && <span>⛔</span>}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                ))}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Right: Result detail */}\n        <div className=\"lg:col-span-2\">\n          {!result ? (\n            <div className=\"catv-panel flex h-40 items-center justify-center text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">\n              {txt.enterPhone}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-4\">\n\n              {/* Score card */}\n              <div className={`catv-panel border p-5 ${RISK_STYLE[result.risk_level] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3\">\n                  <div>\n                    <p className=\"font-mono text-lg font-bold\">{result.phone}</p>\n                    {result.is_blacklisted && (\n                      <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs font-semibold\">{txt.blacklisted}</p>\n                    )}\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"text-right\">\n                    <p className=\"text-4xl font-black\">{result.fraud_score}</p>\n                    <p className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">{txt.fraudScore}</p>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <div className=\"mt-4 grid grid-cols-4 gap-3 text-center text-xs\">\n                  {[\n                    [txt.totalOrders, result.stats.total],\n                    [txt.delivered, result.stats.delivered],\n                    [txt.cancelled, result.stats.cancelled],\n                    [txt.returned, result.stats.returned],\n                  ].map(([label, val]) => (\n                    <div key={String(label)} className=\"rounded-xl bg-white/5 py-2\">\n                      <p className=\"text-lg font-bold\">{val}</p>\n                      <p className=\"text-[10px] opacity-80\">{label}</p>\n                    </div>\n                  ))}\n                </div>\n\n                {!result.is_blacklisted && (\n                  <div className=\"mt-4\">\n                    {blMsg ? (\n                      <p className=\"text-xs font-semibold\">{blMsg}</p>\n                    ) : (\n                      <button onClick={() => void handleAddBlacklist(result.phone)} disabled={addingBl}\n                        className=\"rounded-xl border border-current px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-white/10 disabled:opacity-60\">\n                        {addingBl ? txt.adding : txt.addBlacklist}\n                      </button>\n                    )}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n\n              {/* Order history */}\n              <div className=\"catv-panel p-4\">\n                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.orderHistory}</h3>\n                {result.orders.length === 0 ? (\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noOrders}</p>\n                ) : (\n                  <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n                    <table className=\"w-full text-xs\">\n                      <thead>\n                        <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n                          <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n                          <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4\">{txt.status}</th>\n                          <th className=\"pb-2 pr-4 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n                          <th className=\"pb-2 text-right\">{txt.date}</th>\n                        </tr>\n                      </thead>\n                      <tbody>\n                        {result.orders.map(o => (\n                          <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)]/50\">\n                            <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 font-mono text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                            <td className=\"py-2 pr-4\">\n                              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[o.status] ?? \"\"}`}>\n                                {o.status}\n                              </span>\n                            </td>\n                            <td className=\"py-2 pr-4 text-right\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                            <td className=\"py-2 text-right text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(o.created_at)}</td>\n                          </tr>\n                        ))}\n                      </tbody>\n                    </table>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}","oldString":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport ModulePlaceholder from \"@/components/module-placeholder\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";"}},"id":"0ae13499-8f38-4fe8-a295-44ce0fc83ba5","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:54:12.388Z","parentId":"85de1ed5-8e89-42b2-9740-119d2415f878"}

\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/orders/blacklist/page.tsx\", \"newString\": \"\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \\\"@/lib/dashboard-client\\\";\\n\\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst t = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"ব্ল্যাকলিস্ট\\\",\\n    search: \\\"ফোন নম্বর খুঁজুন\\\",\\n    add: \\\"যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"লোড হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    noData: \\\"ব্ল্যাকলিস্টে কোনো নম্বর নেই।\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"ফোন নম্বর\\\",\\n    reason: \\\"কারণ\\\",\\n    date: \\\"তারিখ\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"অ্যাকশন\\\",\\n    remove: \\\"সরান\\\",\\n    removing: \\\"সরানো হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    modalTitle: \\\"ব্ল্যাকলিস্টে যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    phonePlaceholder: \\\"01XXXXXXXXX\\\",\\n    reasonPlaceholder: \\\"কারণ (ঐচ্ছিক)\\\",\\n    save: \\\"যোগ করুন\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"হচ্ছে...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"বাতিল\\\",\\n    confirmRemove: \\\"এই নম্বর ব্ল্যাকলিস্ট থেকে সরাবেন?\\\",\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Blacklist\\\",\\n    search: \\\"Search phone\\\",\\n    add: \\\"Add\\\",\\n    loading: \\\"Loading...\\\",\\n    noData: \\\"No numbers in blacklist.\\\",\\n    phone: \\\"Phone\\\",\\n    reason: \\\"Reason\\\",\\n    date: \\\"Date\\\",\\n    actions: \\\"Actions\\\",\\n    remove: \\\"Remove\\\",\\n    removing: \\\"Removing...\\\",\\n    modalTitle: \\\"Add to Blacklist\\\",\\n    phonePlaceholder: \\\"01XXXXXXXXX\\\",\\n    reasonPlaceholder: \\\"Reason (optional)\\\",\\n    save: \\\"Add\\\",\\n    saving: \\\"Adding...\\\",\\n    cancel: \\\"Cancel\\\",\\n    confirmRemove: \\\"Remove this number from blacklist?\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\ntype BLEntry = { id: number; phone: string; reason: string | null; blocked_at: string };\\n\\nexport default function BlacklistPage() {\\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [items, setItems] = useState<BLEntry[]>([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\\n\\n  const [addOpen, setAddOpen] = useState(false);\\n  const [addForm, setAddForm] = useState({ phone: \\\"\\\", reason: \\\"\\\" });\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\n\\n  const [removingId, setRemovingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\\n\\n  const fetchList = useCallback(async () => {\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    try {\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \\\"20\\\" });\\n      if (search) params.set(\\\"search\\\", search);\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        const d = await res.json();\\n        setItems(d.data ?? []);\\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\\n      }\\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\\n  }, [page, search, token]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchList(); }, [fetchList]);\\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\\n\\n  const handleAdd = async () => {\\n    if (!addForm.phone.trim()) return;\\n    setSaving(true);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist`, {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phone: addForm.phone.trim(), reason: addForm.reason || null }),\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) {\\n        setAddOpen(false);\\n        setAddForm({ phone: \\\"\\\", reason: \\\"\\\" });\\n        await fetchList();\\n      }\\n    } finally { setSaving(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const handleRemove = async (id: number) => {\\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmRemove)) return;\\n    setRemovingId(id);\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist/${id}`, {\\n        method: \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n      });\\n      if (res.ok) await fetchList();\\n    } finally { setRemovingId(null); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) => new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en-GB\\\");\\n\\n  return (\\n    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"blacklist\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"orders\\\"\\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n\\n      {/* Toolbar */}\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\\\">\\n        <input type=\\\"text\\\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\\n          placeholder={txt.search}\\n          className=\\\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n        <p className=\\\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{total} {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"টি নম্বর\\\" : \\\"numbers\\\"}</p>\\n        <button onClick={() => setAddOpen(true)}\\n          className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white\\\">\\n          + {txt.add}\\n        </button>\\n      </div>\\n\\n      <div className=\\\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n        <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n          <thead>\\n            <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\\\">\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.phone}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.reason}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.date}</th>\\n              <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.actions}</th>\\n            </tr>\\n          </thead>\\n          <tbody>\\n            {loading ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\\n            ) : items.length === 0 ? (\\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noData}</td></tr>\\n            ) : items.map(item => (\\n              <tr key={item.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 font-mono font-semibold text-red-400\\\">{item.phone}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{item.reason ?? \\\"—\\\"}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{fmtDate(item.blocked_at)}</td>\\n                <td className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">\\n                  <button onClick={() => void handleRemove(item.id)} disabled={removingId === item.id}\\n                    className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 disabled:opacity-50\\\">\\n                    {removingId === item.id ? txt.removing : txt.remove}\\n                  </button>\\n                </td>\\n              </tr>\\n            ))}\\n          </tbody>\\n        </table>\\n\\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আগে\\\" : \\\"Prev\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n              <span className=\\\"text-xs self-center\\\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\\\">\\n                {locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"পরে\\\" : \\\"Next\\\"}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n      </div>\\n\\n      {/* Add modal */}\\n      {addOpen && (\\n        <div className=\\\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setAddOpen(false)}>\\n          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\\\">\\n            <h3 className=\\\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\\\">{txt.modalTitle}</h3>\\n            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.phone}</span>\\n                <input value={addForm.phone} onChange={e => setAddForm(f => ({ ...f, phone: e.target.value }))}\\n                  placeholder={txt.phonePlaceholder}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n              <label>\\n                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.reason}</span>\\n                <input value={addForm.reason} onChange={e => setAddForm(f => ({ ...f, reason: e.target.value }))}\\n                  placeholder={txt.reasonPlaceholder}\\n                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            </div>\\n            <div className=\\\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\\\">\\n              <button onClick={() => setAddOpen(false)}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.cancel}</button>\\n              <button onClick={() => void handleAdd()} disabled={saving || !addForm.phone.trim()}\\n                className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\\n              </button>\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      )}\\n    </UserShell>\\n  );\\n}\", \"oldString\": \"\\\"use client\\\";\\n\\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\nimport UserShell from \\\"@/components/user-shell\\\";\\nimport ModulePlaceholder from \\\"@/components/module-placeholder\\\";\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"b5f304fd-b5cf-40fa-86fd-7eaa414cf0e2","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:55:06.226Z","parentId":"d750c41c-d929-43dd-bab5-69e9b54a7f53"}

phone: string; reason: string | null; blocked_at: string };\n\nexport default function BlacklistPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [items, setItems] = useState<BLEntry[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n\n  const [addOpen, setAddOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [addForm, setAddForm] = useState({ phone: \"\", reason: \"\" });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  const [removingId, setRemovingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n\n  const fetchList = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"20\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setItems(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  }, [page, search, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchList(); }, [fetchList]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\n\n  const handleAdd = async () => {\n    if (!addForm.phone.trim()) return;\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ phone: addForm.phone.trim(), reason: addForm.reason || null }),\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setAddOpen(false);\n        setAddForm({ phone: \"\", reason: \"\" });\n        await fetchList();\n      }\n    } finally { setSaving(false); }\n  };\n\n  const handleRemove = async (id: number) => {\n    if (!confirm(txt.confirmRemove)) return;\n    setRemovingId(id);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/fraud/blacklist/${id}`, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n      });\n      if (res.ok) await fetchList();\n    } finally { setRemovingId(null); }\n  };\n\n  const fmtDate = (iso: string) => new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en-GB\");\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"blacklist\" defaultExpandedKey=\"orders\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      {/* Toolbar */}\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n        <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {locale === \"bn\" ? \"টি নম্বর\" : \"numbers\"}</p>\n        <button onClick={() => setAddOpen(true)}\n          className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white\">\n          + {txt.add}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.phone}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.reason}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.date}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.actions}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : items.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noData}</td></tr>\n            ) : items.map(item => (\n              <tr key={item.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono font-semibold text-red-400\">{item.phone}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{item.reason ?? \"—\"}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{fmtDate(item.blocked_at)}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  <button onClick={() => void handleRemove(item.id)} disabled={removingId === item.id}\n                    className=\"rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 disabled:opacity-50\">\n                    {removingId === item.id ? txt.removing : txt.remove}\n                  </button>\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"আগে\" : \"Prev\"}\n              </button>\n              <span className=\"text-xs self-center\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n              <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n                className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">\n                {locale === \"bn\" ? \"পরে\" : \"Next\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Add modal */}\n      {addOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setAddOpen(false)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-4 text-base font-bold\">{txt.modalTitle}</h3>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.phone}</span>\n                <input value={addForm.phone} onChange={e => setAddForm(f => ({ ...f, phone: e.target.value }))}\n                  placeholder={txt.phonePlaceholder}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.reason}</span>\n                <input value={addForm.reason} onChange={e => setAddForm(f => ({ ...f, reason: e.target.value }))}\n                  placeholder={txt.reasonPlaceholder}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setAddOpen(false)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.cancel}</button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleAdd()} disabled={saving || !addForm.phone.trim()}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {saving ? txt.saving : txt.save}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}","oldString":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport ModulePlaceholder from \"@/components/module-placeholder\";"}},"id":"958e4bea-f8e8-4e8a-bf83-0059b8d094ae","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:55:06.288Z","parentId":"b0006efc-0a63-41f4-abf2-aca836f7ffdd"}

(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \\\"/api\\\").replace(/\\\\/$/, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nconst text = {\\n  bn: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"বিজনেস ড্যাশবোর্ড\\\",\\n    pageSubtitle: \\\"আপনার ব্যবসার সম্পূর্ণ চিত্র এক জায়গায়।\\\",\\n    welcome: \\\"স্বাগতম\\\",\\n    todayAt: \\\"আজকের সারসংক্ষেপ\\\",\\n    shortcuts: \\\"দ্রুত অ্যাক্সেস\\\",\\n    recentOrders: \\\"সাম্প্রতিক অর্ডার\\\",\\n    viewAll: \\\"সব দেখুন →\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"কোনো অর্ডার নেই\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"অর্ডার নং\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"গ্রাহক\\\",\\n    status: \\\"স্ট্যাটাস\\\",\\n    total: \\\"মোট\\\",\\n    shortcutItems: [\\n      { label: \\\"নতুন অর্ডার তৈরি\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/create\\\", icon: \\\"➕\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"ফ্রড চেক করুন\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\\\", icon: \\\"🔍\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"পার্সেল বুক করুন\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/courier\\\", icon: \\\"🚚\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"SMS পাঠান\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/products\\\", icon: \\\"📦\\\" },\\n    ],\\n  },\\n  en: {\\n    pageTitle: \\\"Business Dashboard\\\",\\n    pageSubtitle: \\\"Your complete business overview in one place.\\\",\\n    welcome: \\\"Welcome\\\",\\n    todayAt: \\\"Today's Summary\\\",\\n    shortcuts: \\\"Quick Access\\\",\\n    recentOrders: \\\"Recent Orders\\\",\\n    viewAll: \\\"View All →\\\",\\n    noOrders: \\\"No orders yet\\\",\\n    orderNo: \\\"Order #\\\",\\n    customer: \\\"Customer\\\",\\n    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n    total: \\\"Total\\\",\\n    shortcutItems: [\\n      { label: \\\"Create New Order\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/create\\\", icon: \\\"➕\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"Fraud Check\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\\\", icon: \\\"🔍\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"Book Parcel\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/courier\\\", icon: \\\"🚚\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"Send SMS\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/sms/send\\\", icon: \\\"✉️\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"View Customers\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/customers\\\", icon: \\\"👥\\\" },\\n      { label: \\\"Products\\\", href: \\\"/dashboard/products\\\", icon: \\\"📦\\\" },\\n    ],\\n  },\\n};\\n\\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\\n  pending:    \\\"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\\\",\\n  confirmed:  \\\"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\\\",\\n  processing: \\\"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\\\",\\n  shipped:    \\\"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\\\",\\n  delivered:  \\\"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\\\",\\n  cancelled:  \\\"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\\\",\\n  returned:   \\\"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\\\",\\n};\\n\\ntype OrderStats = {\\n  total: number; today: number; pending: number; confirmed: number;\\n  delivered: number; cancelled: number; returned: number;\\n  high_risk: number; total_revenue: string;\\n};\\ntype CustomerStats = { total: number; vip: number; blocked: number };\\ntype ProductStats  = { total: number; low_stock: number; out_of_stock: number };\\ntype RecentOrder   = { id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string; status: string; total: string };\\n\\nexport default function UserDashboardPage() {\\n  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n  const [userName, setUserName] = useState<string>(\\\"\\\");\\n  const token = getStoredToken();\\n\\n  const [orderStats,   setOrderStats]   = useState<OrderStats | null>(null);\\n  const [customerStats,setCustomerStats]= useState<CustomerStats | null>(null);\\n  const [productStats, setProductStats] = useState<ProductStats | null>(null);\\n  const [recentOrders, setRecentOrders] = useState<RecentOrder[]>([]);\\n  const [loadingStats, setLoadingStats] = useState(true);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const stored = getStoredUser();\\n    if (stored?.name) setUserName(stored.name);\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const handleStorage = () => setLocale(getStoredLocale());\\n    window.addEventListener(\\\"storage\\\", handleStorage);\\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\\\"storage\\\", handleStorage);\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => {\\n    const headers = { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };\\n    void (async () => {\\n      setLoadingStats(true);\\n      try {\\n        const [oRes, cRes, pRes, rRes] = await Promise.all([\\n          fetch(`${API}/orders/stats`,     { headers }),\\n          fetch(`${API}/customers/stats`,  { headers }),\\n          fetch(`${API}/products/stats`,   { headers }),\\n          fetch(`${API}/orders?per_page=5`, { headers }),\\n        ]);\\n        if (oRes.ok) { const d = await oRes.json(); setOrderStats(d.data); }\\n        if (cRes.ok) { const d = await cRes.json(); setCustomerStats(d.data); }\\n        if (pRes.ok) { const d = await pRes.json(); setProductStats(d.data); }\\n        if (rRes.ok) { const d = await rRes.json(); setRecentOrders(d.data ?? []); }\\n      } finally { setLoadingStats(false); }\\n    })();\\n  }, [token]);\\n\\n  const t = useMemo(() => text[locale], [locale]);\\n\\n  const fmt = (n: number | string | null | undefined) =>\\n    n == null ? \\\"—\\\" : Number(n).toLocaleString(locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"bn-BD\\\" : \\\"en\\\");\\n\\n  const cards = [\\n    { label: locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আজকের অর্ডার\\\" : \\\"Today's Orders\\\",   value: fmt(orderStats?.today),        hint: locale === \\\"bn\\\" ? \\\"আজ\\\" : \\\"today\\\",            color: \\\"bg-[#0f7c7b]\\\" },\\n    { label: locale === \\\"bn\\\" client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, getStoredUser, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst text = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"বিজনেস ড্যাশবোর্ড\",\n    pageSubtitle: \"আপনার ব্যবসার সম্পূর্ণ চিত্র এক জায়গায়।\",\n    welcome: \"স্বাগতম\",\n    todayAt: \"আজকের সারসংক্ষেপ\",\n    shortcuts: \"দ্রুত অ্যাক্সেস\",\n    recentOrders: \"সাম্প্রতিক অর্ডার\",\n    viewAll: \"সব দেখুন →\",\n    noOrders: \"কোনো অর্ডার নেই\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    customer: \"গ্রাহক\",\n    status: \"স্ট্যাটাস\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    shortcutItems: [\n      { label: \"নতুন অর্ডার তৈরি\", href: \"/dashboard/orders/create\", icon: \"➕\" },\n      { label: \"ফ্রড চেক করুন\", href: \"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\", icon: \"🔍\" },\n      { label: \"পার্সেল বুক করুন\", href: \"/dashboard/courier\", icon: \"🚚\" },\n      { label: \"SMS পাঠান\", href: \"/dashboard/sms/send\", icon: \"✉️\" },\n      { label: \"কাস্টমার দেখুন\", href: \"/dashboard/customers\", icon: \"👥\" },\n      { label: \"পণ্য ব্যবস্থাপনা\", href: \"/dashboard/products\", icon: \"📦\" },\n    ],\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Business Dashboard\",\n    pageSubtitle: \"Your complete business overview in one place.\",\n    welcome: \"Welcome\",\n    todayAt: \"Today's Summary\",\n    shortcuts: \"Quick Access\",\n    recentOrders: \"Recent Orders\",\n    viewAll: \"View All →\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders yet\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    customer: \"Customer\",\n    status: \"Status\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    shortcutItems: [\n      { label: \"Create New Order\", href: \"/dashboard/orders/create\", icon: \"➕\" },\n      { label: \"Fraud Check\", href: \"/dashboard/orders/fraud-check\", icon: \"🔍\" },\n      { label: \"Book Parcel\", href: \"/dashboard/courier\", icon: \"🚚\" },\n      { label: \"Send SMS\", href: \"/dashboard/sms/send\", icon: \"✉️\" },\n      { label: \"View Customers\", href: \"/dashboard/customers\", icon: \"👥\" },\n      { label: \"Products\", href: \"/dashboard/products\", icon: \"📦\" },\n    ],\n  },\n};\n\nconst STATUS_STYLE: Record<string, string> = {\n  pending:    \"bg-yellow-500/15 text-yellow-400\",\n  confirmed:  \"bg-blue-500/15 text-blue-400\",\n  processing: \"bg-indigo-500/15 text-indigo-400\",\n  shipped:    \"bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400\",\n  delivered:  \"bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400\",\n  cancelled:  \"bg-red-500/15 text-red-400\",\n  returned:   \"bg-orange-500/15 text-orange-400\",\n};\n\ntype OrderStats = {\n  total: number; today: number; pending: number; confirmed: number;\n  delivered: number; cancelled: number; returned: number;\n  high_risk: number; total_revenue: string;\n};\ntype CustomerStats = { total: number; vip: number; blocked: number };\ntype ProductStats  = { total: number; low_stock: number; out_of_stock: number };\ntype RecentOrder   = { id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null; customer_phone: string; status: string; total: string };\n\nexport default function UserDashboardPage() {\n  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const [userName, setUserName] = useState<string>(\"\");\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [orderStats,   setOrderStats]   = useState<OrderStats | null>(null);\n  const [customerStats,setCustomerStats]= useState<CustomerStats | null>(null);\n  const [productStats, setProductStats] = useState<ProductStats | null>(null);\n  const [recentOrders, setRecentOrders] = useState<RecentOrder[]>([]);\n  const [loadingStats, setLoadingStats] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const stored = getStoredUser();\n    if (stored?.name) setUserName(stored.name);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleStorage = () => setLocale(getStoredLocale());\n    window.addEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorage);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"storage\", handleStorage);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const headers = { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };\n    void (async () => {\n      setLoadingStats(true);\n      try {\n        const [oRes, cRes, pRes, rRes] = await Promise.all([\n          fetch(`${API}/orders/stats`,     { headers }),\n          fetch(`${API}/customers/stats`,  { headers }),\n          fetch(`${API}/products/stats`,   { headers }),\n          fetch(`${API}/orders?per_page=5`, { headers }),\n        ]);\n        if (oRes.ok) { const d = await oRes.json(); setOrderStats(d.data); }\n        if (cRes.ok) { const d = await cRes.json(); setCustomerStats(d.data); }\n        if (pRes.ok) { const d = await pRes.json(); setProductStats(d.data); }\n        if (rRes.ok) { const d = await rRes.json(); setRecentOrders(d.data ?? []); }\n      } finally { setLoadingStats(false); }\n    })();\n  }, [token]);\n\n  const t = useMemo(() => text[locale], [locale]);\n\n  const fmt = (n: number | string | null | undefined) =>\n    n == null ? \"—\" : Number(n).toLocaleString(locale === \"bn\" ? \"bn-BD\" : \"en\");\n\n  const cards = [\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"আজকের অর্ডার\" : \"Today's Orders\",   value: fmt(orderStats?.today),        hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"আজ\" : \"today\",            color: \"bg-[#0f7c7b]\" },\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"মোট অর্ডার\" : \"Total Orders\",        value: fmt(orderStats?.total),        hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"সর্বমোট\" : \"all time\",    color: \"bg-[#2f7ec1]\" },\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"পেন্ডিং\" : \"Pending\",                value: fmt(orderStats?.pending),      hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"অপেক্ষারত\" : \"awaiting\",  color: \"bg-[#ff7a59]\" },\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"হাই রিস্ক\" : \"High Risk\",            value: fmt(orderStats?.high_risk),    hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"সন্দেহজনক\" : \"suspicious\", color: \"bg-[#c0392b]\" },\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"কাস্টমার\" : \"Customers\",             value: fmt(customerStats?.total),     hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"মোট\" : \"total\",            color: \"bg-[#8e44ad]\" },\n    { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"মোট রাজস্ব\" : \"Total Revenue\",       value: \"৳\" + fmt(orderStats?.total_revenue), hint: locale === \"bn\" ? \"ডেলিভারি থেকে\" : \"from delivered\", color: \"bg-[#27ae60]\" },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell\n      activeKey=\"dashboard\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: text.bn.pageTitle, en: text.en.pageTitle }}\n      pageSubtitle={{ bn: text.bn.pageSubtitle, en: text.en.pageSubtitle }}\n    >\n      {/* Welcome */}\n      <section className=\"catv-panel p-4 sm:p-5\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold sm:text-xl\">\n          {t.welcome}{userName ? `, ${userName}` : \"\"} 👋\n        </h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{t.pageSubtitle}</p>\n      </section>\n\n      {/* Stat cards */}\n      <section className=\"mt-4\">\n        <h3 className=\"mb-3 px-1 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--muted)]\">{t.todayAt}</h3>\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3\">\n          {cards.map(card => (\n            <article key={card.label} className={`${card.color} rounded-2xl p-4 text-white shadow-md`}>\n              <p className=\"text-xs font-semibold text-white/90\">{card.label}</p>\n              <p className={`mt-2 text-2xl font-bold ${loadingStats ? \"opacity-40\" : \"\"}`}>{card.value}</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-white/80\">{card.hint}</p>\n            </article>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      {/* Product + Customer mini stats */}\n      {(productStats || customerStats) && (\n        <section className=\"mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-4\">\n          {productStats && [\n            { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"মোট পণ্য\" : \"Total Products\",   value: fmt(productStats.total) },\n            { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"কম স্টক\" : \"Low Stock\",          value: fmt(productStats.low_stock) },\n          ].map(s => (\n            <div key={s.label} className=\"catv-panel p-3 text-center\">\n              <p className=\"text-xl font-bold text-[var(--accent)]\">{s.value}</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{s.label}</p>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n          {customerStats && [\n            { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"VIP কাস্টমার\" : \"VIP Customers\",  value: fmt(customerStats.vip) },\n            { label: locale === \"bn\" ? \"ব্লক করা\" : \"Blocked\",            value: fmt(customerStats.blocked) },\n          ].map(s => (\n            <div key={s.label} className=\"catv-panel p-3 text-center\">\n              <p className=\"text-xl font-bold text-[var(--accent)]\">{s.value}</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-0.5 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{s.label}</p>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </section>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Quick shortcuts */}\n      <section className=\"catv-panel mt-4 p-4 sm:p-5\">\n        <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-base font-semibold\">{t.shortcuts}</h3>\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-3\">\n          {t.shortcutItems.map(item => (\n            <Link key={item.href} href={item.href}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface-soft)] px-3 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[var(--surface)] hover:border-[var(--accent)]\">\n              <span className=\"text-lg\">{item.icon}</span>\n              <span className=\"leading-tight\">{item.label}</span>\n            </Link>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      {/* Recent orders */}\n      <section className=\"catv-panel mt-4 overflow-x-auto\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{t.recentOrders}</h3>\n          <Link href=\"/dashboard/orders\" className=\"text-xs text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\">{t.viewAll}</Link>\n        </div>\n        <table className=\"w-full text-xs\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"text-left text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-2\">{t.orderNo}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-2 hidden md:table-cell\">{t.customer}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-2\">{t.status}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-2 text-right\">{t.total}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {recentOrders.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={4} className=\"px-4 py-6 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{t.noOrders}</td></tr>\n            ) : recentOrders.map(o => (\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-t border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5\">\n                  <Link href={`/dashboard/orders/${o.id}`} className=\"font-mono font-semibold text-[var(--accent)] hover:underline\">\n                    {o.order_number}\n                  </Link>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5 hidden md:table-cell\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{o.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5\">\n                  <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-semibold ${STATUS_STYLE[o.status] ?? \"\"}`}>{o.status}</span>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </section>\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}","oldString":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredUser, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";"}},"id":"563a447f-7ee4-4d0a-91f1-50b40d3eb1ea","timestamp":"2026-05-02T18:56:11.384Z","parentId":"0036dc32-6093-407a-ac28-3acfaa6ab676"}
