{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"847c8273-7b19-4868-b4f5-f8eeb150297c","content":"এখন existing courier pages দেখি: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01GSGcZpDBaBDLqBV55ZtjDH","name":"list_dir","arguments":"{\"path\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"Now I need to understand what features we need to implement:\n\nFrom the Pathao API doc:\n1. **Authentication**: Issue token (OAuth 2.0 with `client_id`, `client_secret`, `username`, `password`)\n2. **Refresh Token**: Use refresh_token to get new access_token\n3. **Create Store**: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/stores`\n4. **Get Stores**: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/stores`\n5. **Create Order**: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/orders`\n6. **Create Bulk Order**: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/orders/bulk`\n\n\n7. **Get Order Info**: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/orders/{consignment_id}/info`\n8. **Get Cities**: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/city-list`\n9. **Get Zones**: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/cities/{city_id}/zone-list`\n10. **Get Areas**: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/zones/{zone_id}/area-list`\n11. **Price Calculation**: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/merchant/price-plan`\n\nI can see that the cities, zones, and areas endpoints are already implemented in the existing code.\n\nLooking at what's already there, the `PathaoLocationService` handles location data, and `bookOrder` and `trackOrder` currently only support Steadfast but not Pathao. The settings already have the necessary Pathao credentials stored. So I need to build out a complete `PathaoService` that handles authentication with token caching and refresh, store management, order creation for both single and bulk operations, and order tracking.\n\nThen I'll update the `CourierController` to add endpoints for booking Pathao orders, retrieving and creating stores, calculating prices, testing the connection, and modify the existing `book()` and `trackOrder()` methods to support Pathao as a courier option. I also need to extend the `CourierSetting` model to persist the access token, refresh token, and expiration timestamp, plus add a migration to store these fields in the database.\n\nFor the frontend, I'm planning the Book Parcel page with a store selector, delivery type options, item classification, weight input, special instructions, price preview, and a booking button that hits the Pathao API. The Track Orders page will display booked Pathao orders with their consignment IDs and status updates. I'll also need a settings page to test the Pathao connection and a separate page to manage Pathao stores. Let me check the existing frontend structure first to match the current patterns."},"id":"ba9119b8-003b-40c0-a227-c5aaf80d807e","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:25:08.660Z","parentId":"2cb4c0e6-bc45-429b-8a24-5937fc349050"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"d299f568-5072-49aa-b1a5-83b36d673a7f","content":"Settings courier page দেখি:  ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01M3ShJocBXhnx9UwJy2kMMG","name":"file_search","arguments":"{\"query\": \"frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier*\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"Now I have a clear picture of what needs to be implemented. Let me plan the full implementation:\n\n**API Endpoints available from Pathao:**\n1. Auth: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/issue-token` (password + refresh_token grants)\n2. Stores: GET/POST `/aladdin/api/v1/stores`\n3. Create Order: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/orders`\n4. Create Bulk Order: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/orders/bulk`\n5. Order Info: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/orders/{consignment_id}/info`\n\n\n6. Cities: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/city-list`\n7. Zones: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/cities/{city_id}/zone-list`\n8. Areas: GET `/aladdin/api/v1/zones/{zone_id}/area-list`\n9. Price: POST `/aladdin/api/v1/merchant/price-plan`\n\nFor the backend, I need to add database columns to store the Pathao credentials and token information, then build out the service layer to handle authentication and all these API calls.\n\nOn the controller side, I'm adding methods to book shipments, fetch available stores and pricing, test the connection, and integrate Pathao into the existing order tracking and booking flows.\n\nThe frontend needs Pathao as a courier option in the booking interface with conditional fields that appear when it's selected.\n\nNow I'm checking what fields already exist on the courier settings page so I don't duplicate anything."},"id":"f9561bc8-314b-441f-bc69-864a856f302b","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:25:52.421Z","parentId":"21c33d84-0a63-4e31-bc1c-0fc689011ef9"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"38bfe499-c556-4058-8a87-33e37ee886c4","content":"সব কিছু বুঝেছি। এখন সম্পূর্ণ Pathao implementation শুরু করি: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01TZMu3Jt1PNCrKZf9ThEntT","name":"manage_todo_list","arguments":"{\"todoList\": [{\"id\":1,\"title\":\"DB Migration - pathao token fields\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":2,\"title\":\"PathaoService.php - full API service\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":3,\"title\":\"CourierSetting model - add fields\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":4,\"title\":\"CourierController - pathao booking/tracking/stores/price\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":5,\"title\":\"Routes - add new pathao endpoints\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":6,\"title\":\"Frontend - Settings page pathao credentials\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":7,\"title\":\"Frontend - Book Parcel page Pathao support\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":8,\"title\":\"Frontend - Track page Pathao support\",\"status\":\"not-started\"},{\"id\":9,\"title\":\"Build & Deploy\",\"status\":\"not-started\"}]}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"Now I have everything I need to understand. Let me plan the full implementation:\n\n**Backend Changes:**\n1. **Migration**: Add `pathao_username`, `pathao_password`, `pathao_access_token`, `pathao_refresh_token`, `pathao_token_expires_at` to `courier_settings`\n2. **PathaoService.php**: Complete service with token management + all API calls\n3. **CourierController.php**: Add pathao booking, tracking, stores, price calculation\n4. **CourierSetting model**: Add new fillable fields\n5. **Routes**: Add pathao-specific routes\n\n\n6. **Frontend Changes**: Add Pathao credentials to settings page, integrate Pathao option in the booking form, and display Pathao consignment IDs in tracking\n\nNow I'm starting the implementation with the database migration...\n\nWriting migration code...\n\nFor the PathaoService, I need to handle token management with methods to fetch or issue new tokens, refresh expired ones, and interact with Pathao's store endpoints.\n\nNow I'm adding the order management methods to the service—creating orders, retrieving order details, and calculating shipping prices through Pathao's API.\n\nFor the controller, I'm setting up endpoints to book Pathao shipments, manage stores, check pricing, and test the connection, while also updating the existing booking and tracking methods to support Pathao as a courier option.\n\nOn the frontend, I'll add Pathao as a selectable courier option in the parcel booking interface.\n\nWhen Pathao is selected, I need to display fields for store selection, delivery type, item details, and special instructions, plus a price calculator button that shows the estimated cost. The tracking page can link to Pathao tracking, and the settings page needs authentication fields with a connection test button."},"id":"c5717720-d68a-406f-a213-a697c29d65c6","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:26:50.473Z","parentId":"ebef6e96-3053-42e4-a349-9cd1291c7cbe"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"c7f18667-63d8-4a4b-9b5f-3fa909766770","content":"এখন PathaoService তৈরি করি: ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01EMz7L9hRjXp3kAGbUbze2g","name":"create_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\": \"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Services/PathaoService.php\", \"content\": \"<?php\\n\\nnamespace App\\\\Services;\\n\\nuse App\\\\Models\\\\CourierSetting;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Carbon;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Facades\\\\Http;\\nuse Illuminate\\\\Support\\\\Facades\\\\Log;\\n\\nclass PathaoService\\n{\\n    const BASE_URL = 'https://api-hermes.pathao.com';\\n    const TOKEN_ENDPOINT = '/aladdin/api/v1/issue-token';\\n\\n    // ── Token Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Get a valid access token for the user. Issues or refreshes automatically.\\n     */\\n    public function getToken(int $userId): ?string\\n    {\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', $userId)->first();\\n\\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->pathao_client_id || ! $settings->pathao_client_secret) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        // If we have a valid token that hasn't expired (with 5-minute buffer), use it\\n        if ($settings->pathao_access_token && $settings->pathao_token_expires_at) {\\n            $expiresAt = Carbon::parse($settings->pathao_token_expires_at);\\n            if ($expiresAt->gt(now()->addMinutes(5))) {\\n                return $settings->pathao_access_token;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Try to refresh using refresh_token\\n        if ($settings->pathao_refresh_token) {\\n            $result = $this->issueTokenFromRefresh(\\n                $settings->pathao_client_id,\\n                $settings->pathao_client_secret,\\n                $settings->pathao_refresh_token\\n            );\\n            if ($result) {\\n                $this->saveTokens($settings, $result);\\n                return $result['access_token'];\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Issue new token using username/password\\n        if (! $settings->pathao_username || ! $settings->pathao_password) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        $result = $this->issueTokenFromPassword(\\n            $settings->pathao_client_id,\\n            $settings->pathao_client_secret,\\n            $settings->pathao_username,\\n            $settings->pathao_password\\n        );\\n\\n        if ($result) {\\n            $this->saveTokens($settings, $result);\\n            return $result['access_token'];\\n        }\\n\\n        return null;\\n    }\\n\\n    private function issueTokenFromPassword(string $clientId, string $clientSecret, string $username, string $password): ?array\\n    {\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::post(self::BASE_URL . self::TOKEN_ENDPOINT, [\\n                'client_id'     => $clientId,\\n                'client_secret' => $clientSecret,\\n                'grant_type'    => 'password',\\n                'username'      => $username,\\n                'password'      => $password,\\n            ]);\\n\\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($response->json()['access_token'])) {\\n                return $response->json();\\n            }\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            Log::error('Pathao token issue failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\\n        }\\n        return null;\\n    }\\n\\n    private function issueTokenFromRefresh(string $clientId, string $clientSecret, string $refreshToken): ?array\\n    {\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::post(self::BASE_URL . self::TOKEN_ENDPOINT, [\\n                'client_id'     => $clientId,\\n                'client_secret' => $clientSecret,\\n                'grant_type'    => 'refresh_token',\\n                'refresh_token' => $refreshToken,\\n            ]);\\n\\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($response->json()['access_token'])) {\\n                return $response->json();\\n            }\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            Log::error('Pathao token refresh failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\\n        }\\n        return null;\\n    }\\n\\n    private function saveTokens(CourierSetting $settings, array $tokenData): void\\n    {\\n        $expiresIn    = (int) ($tokenData['expires_in'] ?? 432000);\\n        $expiresAt    = now()->addSeconds($expiresIn);\\n\\n        $settings->update([\\n            'pathao_access_token'    => $tokenData['access_token'],\\n            'pathao_refresh_token'   => $tokenData['refresh_token'] ?? $settings->pathao_refresh_token,\\n            'pathao_token_expires_at'=> $expiresAt,\\n        ]);\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Store Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Get all stores for the merchant.\\n     */\\n    public function getStores(int $userId): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured or invalid.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/stores');\\n            $data = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $data['data']['data'] ?? []];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $data['message'] ?? 'Failed to fetch stores.'];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Create a new Pathao store.\\n     */\\n    public function createStore(int $userId, array $data): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/stores', $data);\\n            $body = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Store created.'];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to create store.', 'errors' => $body['errors'] ?? null];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Order Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Create a single Pathao order.\\n     */\\n    public function createOrder(int $userId, array $orderData): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/orders', $orderData);\\n            $body = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($body['data']['consignment_id'])) {\\n                return [\\n                    'success'         => true,\\n                    'consignment_id'  => $body['data']['consignment_id'],\\n                    'order_status'    => $body['data']['order_status'] ?? 'Pending',\\n                    'delivery_fee'    => $body['data']['delivery_fee'] ?? null,\\n                    'message'         => $body['message'] ?? 'Order created.',\\n                ];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to create order.', 'errors' => $body['errors'] ?? null, 'raw' => $body];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Create bulk Pathao orders.\\n     */\\n    public function createBulkOrders(int $userId, array $orders): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/orders/bulk', [\\n                'orders' => $orders,\\n            ]);\\n            $body = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return ['success' => true, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Bulk order request accepted.'];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Bulk order failed.', 'raw' => $body];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Get order info / tracking status by consignment ID.\\n     */\\n    public function getOrderInfo(int $userId, string $consignmentId): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \\\"/aladdin/api/v1/orders/{$consignmentId}/info\\\");\\n            $body = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to fetch order info.'];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Price Calculation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Calculate delivery price for a parcel.\\n     */\\n    public function calculatePrice(int $userId, array $data): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/merchant/price-plan', $data);\\n            $body = $response->json();\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body];\\n            }\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Price calculation failed.'];\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Location Lists ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    public function getCities(int $userId): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return [];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/city-list');\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\\n            }\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            Log::error('Pathao getCities failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\\n        }\\n        return [];\\n    }\\n\\n    public function getZones(int $userId, int $cityId): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return [];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \\\"/aladdin/api/v1/cities/{$cityId}/zone-list\\\");\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\\n            }\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            Log::error('Pathao getZones failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\\n        }\\n        return [];\\n    }\\n\\n    public function getAreas(int $userId, int $zoneId): array\\n    {\\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\\n        if (! $token) return [];\\n\\n        try {\\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \\\"/aladdin/api/v1/zones/{$zoneId}/area-list\\\");\\n            if ($response->successful()) {\\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\\n            }\\n        } catch (\\\\Exception $e) {\\n            Log::error('Pathao getAreas failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\\n        }\\n        return [];\\n    }\\n\\n    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n    /**\\n     * Check if user has Pathao credentials configured.\\n     */\\n    public function hasCredentials(int $userId): bool\\n    {\\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', $userId)->first();\\n        return $settings\\n            && $settings->pathao_client_id\\n            && $settings->pathao_client_secret\\n            && $settings->pathao_username\\n            && $settings->pathao_password;\\n    }\\n}\\n\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"29c83309-1378-4caf-bab5-f087ff8feacb","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:29:26.660Z","parentId":"027cd662-a259-40a2-a44a-03afcff95035"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01EMz7L9hRjXp3kAGbUbze2g","toolName":"create_file","arguments":{"filePath":"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Services/PathaoService.php","content":"<?php\n\nnamespace App\\Services;\n\nuse App\\Models\\CourierSetting;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Carbon;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Http;\nuse Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Log;\n\nclass PathaoService\n{\n    const BASE_URL = 'https://api-hermes.pathao.com';\n    const TOKEN_ENDPOINT = '/aladdin/api/v1/issue-token';\n\n    // ── Token Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    /**\n     * Get a valid access token for the user. Issues or refreshes automatically.\n     */\n    public function getToken(int $userId): ?string\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', $userId)->first();\n\n        if (! $settings || ! $settings->pathao_client_id || ! $settings->pathao_client_secret) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        // If we have a valid token that hasn't expired (with 5-minute buffer), use it\n        if ($settings->pathao_access_token && $settings->pathao_token_expires_at) {\n            $expiresAt = Carbon::parse($settings->pathao_token_expires_at);\n            if ($expiresAt->gt(now()->addMinutes(5))) {\n                return $settings->pathao_access_token;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Try to refresh using refresh_token\n        if ($settings->pathao_refresh_token) {\n            $result = $this->issueTokenFromRefresh(\n                $settings->pathao_client_id,\n                $settings->pathao_client_secret,\n                $settings->pathao_refresh_token\n            );\n            if ($result) {\n                $this->saveTokens($settings, $result);\n                return $result['access_token'];\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Issue new token using username/password\n        if (! $settings->pathao_username || ! $settings->pathao_password) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        $result = $this->issueTokenFromPassword(\n            $settings->pathao_client_id,\n            $settings->pathao_client_secret,\n            $settings->pathao_username,\n            $settings->pathao_password\n        );\n\n        if ($result) {\n            $this->saveTokens($settings, $result);\n            return $result['access_token'];\n        }\n\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private function issueTokenFromPassword(string $clientId, string $clientSecret, string $username, string $password): ?array\n    {\n        try {\n            $response = Http::post(self::BASE_URL . self::TOKEN_ENDPOINT, [\n                'client_id'     => $clientId,\n                'client_secret' => $clientSecret,\n                'grant_type'    => 'password',\n                'username'      => $username,\n                'password'      => $password,\n            ]);\n\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($response->json()['access_token'])) {\n                return $response->json();\n            }\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            Log::error('Pathao token issue failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private function issueTokenFromRefresh(string $clientId, string $clientSecret, string $refreshToken): ?array\n    {\n        try {\n            $response = Http::post(self::BASE_URL . self::TOKEN_ENDPOINT, [\n                'client_id'     => $clientId,\n                'client_secret' => $clientSecret,\n                'grant_type'    => 'refresh_token',\n                'refresh_token' => $refreshToken,\n            ]);\n\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($response->json()['access_token'])) {\n                return $response->json();\n            }\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            Log::error('Pathao token refresh failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private function saveTokens(CourierSetting $settings, array $tokenData): void\n    {\n        $expiresIn    = (int) ($tokenData['expires_in'] ?? 432000);\n        $expiresAt    = now()->addSeconds($expiresIn);\n\n        $settings->update([\n            'pathao_access_token'    => $tokenData['access_token'],\n            'pathao_refresh_token'   => $tokenData['refresh_token'] ?? $settings->pathao_refresh_token,\n            'pathao_token_expires_at'=> $expiresAt,\n        ]);\n    }\n\n    // ── Store Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    /**\n     * Get all stores for the merchant.\n     */\n    public function getStores(int $userId): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured or invalid.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/stores');\n            $data = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $data['data']['data'] ?? []];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $data['message'] ?? 'Failed to fetch stores.'];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Create a new Pathao store.\n     */\n    public function createStore(int $userId, array $data): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/stores', $data);\n            $body = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Store created.'];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to create store.', 'errors' => $body['errors'] ?? null];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ── Order Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    /**\n     * Create a single Pathao order.\n     */\n    public function createOrder(int $userId, array $orderData): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/orders', $orderData);\n            $body = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful() && isset($body['data']['consignment_id'])) {\n                return [\n                    'success'         => true,\n                    'consignment_id'  => $body['data']['consignment_id'],\n                    'order_status'    => $body['data']['order_status'] ?? 'Pending',\n                    'delivery_fee'    => $body['data']['delivery_fee'] ?? null,\n                    'message'         => $body['message'] ?? 'Order created.',\n                ];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to create order.', 'errors' => $body['errors'] ?? null, 'raw' => $body];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Create bulk Pathao orders.\n     */\n    public function createBulkOrders(int $userId, array $orders): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/orders/bulk', [\n                'orders' => $orders,\n            ]);\n            $body = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return ['success' => true, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Bulk order request accepted.'];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Bulk order failed.', 'raw' => $body];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get order info / tracking status by consignment ID.\n     */\n    public function getOrderInfo(int $userId, string $consignmentId): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \"/aladdin/api/v1/orders/{$consignmentId}/info\");\n            $body = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Failed to fetch order info.'];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ── Price Calculation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    /**\n     * Calculate delivery price for a parcel.\n     */\n    public function calculatePrice(int $userId, array $data): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured.'];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->post(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/merchant/price-plan', $data);\n            $body = $response->json();\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return ['success' => true, 'data' => $body['data'] ?? $body];\n            }\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $body['message'] ?? 'Price calculation failed.'];\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ── Location Lists ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    public function getCities(int $userId): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return [];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . '/aladdin/api/v1/city-list');\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\n            }\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            Log::error('Pathao getCities failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n        return [];\n    }\n\n    public function getZones(int $userId, int $cityId): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return [];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \"/aladdin/api/v1/cities/{$cityId}/zone-list\");\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\n            }\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            Log::error('Pathao getZones failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n        return [];\n    }\n\n    public function getAreas(int $userId, int $zoneId): array\n    {\n        $token = $this->getToken($userId);\n        if (! $token) return [];\n\n        try {\n            $response = Http::withToken($token)->get(self::BASE_URL . \"/aladdin/api/v1/zones/{$zoneId}/area-list\");\n            if ($response->successful()) {\n                return $response->json()['data']['data'] ?? [];\n            }\n        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n            Log::error('Pathao getAreas failed: ' . $e->getMessage());\n        }\n        return [];\n    }\n\n    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    /**\n     * Check if user has Pathao credentials configured.\n     */\n    public function hasCredentials(int $userId): bool\n    {\n        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', $userId)->first();\n        return $settings\n            && $settings->pathao_client_id\n            && $settings->pathao_client_secret\n            && $settings->pathao_username\n            && $settings->pathao_password;\n    }\n}\n"}},"id":"b52bd7e5-7760-4a22-aaea-0f56bbf337ab","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:29:26.765Z","parentId":"13af90b2-3a70-43c4-b031-4ece3c8e4f8e"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"eb8221f3-bb93-4c6b-957f-49797cda7e40","content":"এখন CourierController-এ পুরো Pathao সাপোর্ট যোগ করি:  ","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_011EkuRyy8h1AdRCFgeDef26","name":"apply_patch","arguments":"{\"explanation\": \"Add PathaoService import and full Pathao support to CourierController\", \"input\": \"*** Begin Patch\\n*** Update File: /var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php\\n@@use App\\\\Services\\\\PathaoLocationService;\\n use App\\\\Services\\\\SteadfastService;\\n+use App\\\\Services\\\\PathaoService;\\n use Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\JsonResponse;\\n use Illuminate\\\\Http\\\\Request;\\n@@    public function testConnection(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n         $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n         if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n             return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n         }\\n\\n         $service = new SteadfastService();\\n         $result  = $service->getBalance($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\\n\\n         $ok = isset($result['status']) && $result['status'] == 200;\\n         return response()->json([\\n             'success' => $ok,\\n             'data'    => $result,\\n             'message' => $ok ? 'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\\n         ]);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    public function testPathaoConnection(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $svc = new PathaoService();\\n+        if (! $svc->hasCredentials(auth()->id())) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+        $token = $svc->getToken(auth()->id());\\n+        if (! $token) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Failed to get Pathao access token. Check your credentials.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+        $stores = $svc->getStores(auth()->id());\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => true,\\n+            'message' => 'Pathao connection successful.',\\n+            'data'    => ['store_count' => count($stores['data'] ?? [])],\\n+        ]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    // ── Pathao Stores ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n+\\n+    public function pathaoStores(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $svc    = new PathaoService();\\n+        $result = $svc->getStores(auth()->id());\\n+        return response()->json($result, $result['success'] ? 200 : 422);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function createPathaoStore(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $data = $request->validate([\\n+            'name'             => 'required|string|min:3|max:50',\\n+            'contact_name'     => 'required|string|min:3|max:50',\\n+            'contact_number'   => 'required|string|size:11',\\n+            'secondary_contact'=> 'nullable|string|size:11',\\n+            'address'          => 'required|string|min:15|max:120',\\n+            'city_id'          => 'required|integer',\\n+            'zone_id'          => 'required|integer',\\n+            'area_id'          => 'required|integer',\\n+        ]);\\n+        $svc    = new PathaoService();\\n+        $result = $svc->createStore(auth()->id(), $data);\\n+        return response()->json($result, $result['success'] ? 200 : 422);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    // ── Price Calculation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n+\\n+    public function pathaoPrice(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $data = $request->validate([\\n+            'store_id'       => 'required|integer',\\n+            'item_type'      => 'required|integer|in:1,2',\\n+            'delivery_type'  => 'required|integer|in:48,12',\\n+            'item_weight'    => 'required|numeric|min:0.5|max:10',\\n+            'recipient_city' => 'required|integer',\\n+            'recipient_zone' => 'required|integer',\\n+        ]);\\n+        $svc    = new PathaoService();\\n+        $result = $svc->calculatePrice(auth()->id(), $data);\\n+        return response()->json($result, $result['success'] ? 200 : 422);\\n+    }\\n\\n     // ── Book Parcel ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n     public function book(Request $request, int $orderId): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n         $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\\n\\n         $data = $request->validate([\\n             'courier'       => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\\n             'cod_amount'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\\n             'note'          => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n             'tracking_id'   => 'nullable|string|max:100', // for manual entry\\n+            // Pathao-specific\\n+            'store_id'             => 'nullable|integer',\\n+            'delivery_type'        => 'nullable|integer|in:48,12',\\n+            'item_type'            => 'nullable|integer|in:1,2',\\n+            'item_weight'          => 'nullable|numeric|min:0.5|max:10',\\n+            'item_description'     => 'nullable|string|max:250',\\n+            'special_instruction'  => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n         ]);\\n\\n         $courier = $data['courier'] ?? 'steadfast';\\n@@         if ($courier === 'steadfast') {\\n             return $this->bookSteadfast($order, $data);\\n         }\\n\\n+        if ($courier === 'pathao') {\\n+            return $this->bookPathao($order, $data);\\n+        }\\n+\\n         return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Courier not supported yet.'], 422);\\n     }\\n@@    // ── Track ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n     public function trackOrder(int $orderId): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n         $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\\n\\n         if (! $order->courier_tracking_id) {\\n             return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'No tracking ID.'], 422);\\n         }\\n-        if ($order->courier_name !== 'steadfast') {\\n+        if ($order->courier_name === 'pathao') {\\n+            $svc    = new PathaoService();\\n+            $result = $svc->getOrderInfo(auth()->id(), $order->courier_tracking_id);\\n+            if ($result['success'] && isset($result['data']['order_status_slug'])) {\\n+                $order->update(['courier_status' => $result['data']['order_status_slug']]);\\n+            }\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result['data'] ?? [], 'order' => $order->fresh()]);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        if ($order->courier_name !== 'steadfast') {\\n             return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => ['status' => $order->courier_status], 'message' => 'Manual tracking.']);\\n         }\\n*** End Patch\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"64ef082b-bd5c-4c45-85fc-8896aec32a39","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:30:21.162Z","parentId":"66c265e9-ec5a-4323-b3f5-5b97860498af"}

'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\n         ]);\n     }\n+\n+    public function testPathaoConnection(): JsonResponse\n+    {\n+        $svc = new PathaoService();\n+        if (! $svc->hasCredentials(auth()->id())) {\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao credentials not configured. Go to Settings → Courier.'], 422);\n+        }\n+        $token = $svc->getToken(auth()->id());\n+        if (! $token) {\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Failed to get Pathao access token. 200 : 422);\n+    }\n+\n+    public function createPathaoStore(Request $request): JsonResponse\n+    {\n+        $data = $request->validate([\n+            'name'             => 'required|string|min:3|max:50',\n+            'contact_name'     => 'required|string|min:3|max:50',\n+            'contact_number'   => 'required|string|size:11',\n+            'secondary_contact'=> 'nullable|string|size:11',\n+            'address'          => 'required|string|min:15|max:120',\n+            'city_id'          => 'required|integer',\n+            'zone_id'          => 'required|integer',\n+            'area_id'          => 'required|integer',\n+        ]);\n+        $svc    = new PathaoService();\n+        $result = $svc->createStore(auth()->id(), $data);\n+        return response()->json($result, $result['success'] ? 200 : 422);\n+    }\n+\n+    // ── Price Calculation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+    public function pathaoPrice(Request $request): JsonResponse\n+    {\n+        $data = $request->validate([\n+            'store_id'       => 'required|integer',\n+            'item_type'      => 'required|integer|in:1,2',\n+            'delivery_type'  => 'required|integer|in:48,12',\n+            'item_weight'    => 'required|numeric|min:0.5|max:10',\n+            'recipient_city' => 'required|integer',\n+            'recipient_zone' => 'required|integer',\n+        ]);\n+        $svc    = new PathaoService();\n+        $result = $svc->calculatePrice(auth()->id(), $data);\n+        return response()->json($result, $result['success'] ? 200 : 422);\n+    }\n\n     // ── Book Parcel ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n     public function book(Request $request, int $orderId): JsonResponse\n     {\n         $order = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())->findOrFail($orderId);\n\n         $data = $request->validate([\n             'courier'       => 'nullable|in:steadfast,pathao,redx,manual',\n             'cod_amount'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',\n             'note'          => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n             'tracking_id'   => 'nullable|string|max:100', // for manual entry\n+            // Pathao-specific\n+            'store_id'             => 'nullable|integer',\n+            'delivery_type'        => 'nullable|integer|in:48,12',\n+            'item_type'            => 'nullable|integer|in:1,2',\n+            'item_weight'          => 'nullable|numeric|min:0.5|max:10',\n+            'item_description'     => 'nullable|string|max:250',\n+            'special_instruction'  => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n         ]);\n\n         $courier = $data['courier'] ?? ($order->customer_district . ', ' . $order->customer_thana),\\n             'cod_amount'        => $data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total,\\n             'note'              => $data['note'] ?? $order->notes ?? '',\\n         ]);\\n\\n         // Steadfast returns consignment_id on success\\n         if (isset($result['consignment']['consignment_id'])) {\\n             $consignmentId = $result['consignment']['consignment_id'];\\n             $order->update([\\n                 'courier_name'        => 'steadfast',\\n                 'courier_tracking_id' => (string) $consignmentId,\\n                 'courier_status'      => 'booked',\\n                 'courier_charge'      => $result['consignment']['current_status'] ?? null,\\n                 'status'              => 'processing',\\n             ]);\\n             return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $order, 'consignment_id' => $consignmentId]);\\n         }\\n\\n         return response()->json([\\n             'success' => false,\\n             'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Steadfast booking failed.',\\n             'raw'     => $result,\\n         ], 422);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    private function bookPathao(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $svc      = new PathaoService();\\n+        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n+\\n+        $storeId = $data['store_id'] ?? ($settings->pathao_store_id ?? null);\\n+        if (! $storeId) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao store_id is required. Configure it in Settings → Courier.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        // Build address from available fields\\n+        $address = $order->customer_address ?? '';\\n+        if ($order->customer_district) $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_district;\\n+        if ($order->customer_thana)    $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_thana;\\n+        if ($order->customer_area)     $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_area;\\n+        $address = trim($address, ', ');\\n+\\n+        // Pathao requires address 10–220 characters\\n+        if (strlen($address) < 10) {\\n+            $address = ($address ?: ($order->customer_district ?? 'Bangladesh')) . ', Bangladesh';\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $payload = [\\n+            'store_id'             => (int) $storeId,\\n+            'merchant_order_id'    => $order->order_number,\\n+            'recipient_name'       => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\\n+            'recipient_phone'      => $order->customer_phone,\\n+            'recipient_address'    => substr($address, 0, 220),\\n+            'delivery_type'        => $data['delivery_type'] ?? 48,\\n+            'item_type'            => $data['item_type'] ?? 2,\\n+            'item_quantity'        => 1,\\n+            'item_weight'          => $data['item_weight'] ?? 0.5,\\n+            'amount_to_collect'    => (int) ($data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total),\\n+        ];\\n+\\n+        // Optional location IDs (from order's Pathao fields)\\n+        if ($order->pathao_city_id) $payload['recipient_city'] = $order->pathao_city_id;\\n+        if ($order->pathao_zone_id) $payload['recipient_zone'] = $order->pathao_zone_id;\\n+        if ($order->pathao_area_id) $payload['recipient_area'] = $order->pathao_area_id;\\n+\\n+        if (! empty($data['special_instruction'])) $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['special_instruction'];\\n+        if (! empty($data['item_description']))     $payload['item_description']    = $data['item_description'];\\n+        if (! empty($data['note']))                 $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['note'];\\n+\\n+        $result = $svc->createOrder(auth()->id(), $payload);\\n+\\n+        if ($result['success']) {\\n+            $order->update([\\n+                'courier_name'        => 'pathao',\\n+                'courier_tracking_id' => $result['consignment_id'],\\n+                'courier_status'      => strtolower($result['order_status'] ?? 'booked'),\\n+                'courier_charge'      => $result['delivery_fee'] ?? null,\\n+                'status'              => 'processing',\\n+            ]);\\n+            return response()->json([\\n+                'success'        => true,\\n+                'data'           => $order->fresh(),\\n+                'consignment_id' => $result['consignment_id'],\\n+                'delivery_fee'   => $result['delivery_fee'] ?? null,\\n+                'message'        => $result['message'] ?? 'Pathao order booked.',\\n+            ]);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => false,\\n+            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Pathao booking failed.',\\n+            'errors'  => $result['errors'] ?? null,\\n+            'raw'     => $result['raw'] ?? null,\\n+        ], 422);\\n+    }\\n*** End Patch\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"64eb997b-ed43-4abe-ab81-9ea0dfe5d94f","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:30:43.463Z","parentId":"990d5a00-0401-4b42-ac28-30a9c64b6d45"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"94fe8cbb-7cbf-4143-b947-ba5e17208991","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01YK5bdBVF8ZJEyJqwkrnsFp","name":"apply_patch","arguments":"{\"explanation\": \"Add Pathao routes for stores, price calculation and test connection\", \"input\": \"*** Begin Patch\\n*** Update File: /var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/routes/api.php\\n@@        Route::get('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'getSettings']);\\n         Route::put('/settings', [CourierController::class, 'saveSettings']);\\n         Route::post('/settings/test', [CourierController::class, 'testConnection']);\\n+        Route::post('/settings/test-pathao', [CourierController::class, 'testPathaoConnection']);\\n         Route::get('/ready', [CourierController::class, 'readyToBook']);\\n         Route::get('/booked', [CourierController::class, 'booked']);\\n         Route::post('/book/{order}', [CourierController::class, 'book']);\\n         Route::get('/track/{order}', [CourierController::class, 'trackOrder']);\\n         // Pathao location dropdowns\\n         Route::get('/locations/cities', [CourierController::class, 'cities']);\\n         Route::get('/locations/zones/{cityId}', [CourierController::class, 'zones']);\\n         Route::get('/locations/areas/{zoneId}', [CourierController::class, 'areas']);\\n+        // Pathao stores & price\\n+        Route::get('/pathao/stores', [CourierController::class, 'pathaoStores']);\\n+        Route::post('/pathao/stores', [CourierController::class, 'createPathaoStore']);\\n+        Route::post('/pathao/price', [CourierController::class, 'pathaoPrice']);\\n*** End Patch\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"17c37d04-1a0f-42a1-a7af-c5dd2c465981","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:31:10.605Z","parentId":"7de6fe67-4bf1-4549-9414-fbd502c1b7ac"}
