{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"toolu_bdrk_01UExeZiihwaeUbXQU1pp4Q5","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"cat > /tmp/courier_page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\nimport { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n\nconst API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n\nconst t = {\n  bn: {\n    pageTitle: \"পার্সেল বুক করুন\",\n    search: \"অর্ডার নম্বর / ফোন\",\n    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    noOrders: \"বুক করার মতো কোনো অর্ডার নেই। (confirmed / processing স্ট্যাটাস দরকার)\",\n    orderNo: \"অর্ডার নং\",\n    customer: \"গ্রাহক\",\n    address: \"ঠিকানা\",\n    total: \"মোট\",\n    book: \"বুক করুন\",\n    booking: \"বুকিং হচ্ছে...\",\n    booked: \"বুকড ✓\",\n    codAmount: \"COD পরিমাণ (৳)\",\n    note: \"নোট / বিশেষ নির্দেশনা\",\n    trackingId: \"ট্র্যাকিং আইডি\",\n    cancel: \"বাতিল\",\n    confirm: \"নিশ্চিত করুন\",\n    confirming: \"হচ্ছে...\",\n    modalTitle: \"পার্সেল বুক করুন\",\n    steadfast: \"Steadfast\",\n    pathao: \"Pathao\",\n    manual: \"ম্যানুয়াল\",\n    courier: \"কুরিয়ার সার্ভিস\",\n    store: \"পার্সেল পিকআপ স্টোর\",\n    selectStore: \"স্টোর নির্বাচন করুন\",\n    loadingStores: \"স্টোর লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n    deliveryType: \"ডেলিভারি ধরন\",\n    normalDelivery: \"Normal Delivery\",\n    onDemandDelivery: \"On Demand\",\n    itemType: \"আইটেম ধরন\",\n    document: \"ডকুমেন্ট\",\n    parcel: \"পার্সেল\",\n    itemWeight: \"ওজন (KG)\",\n    itemDescription: \"আইটেম বিবরণ (ঐচ্ছিক)\",\n    calcPrice: \"ডেলিভারি চার্জ হিসাব\",\n    calculating: \"হিসাব হচ্ছে...\",\n    deliveryFee: \"ডেলিভারি ফি\",\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `বুকড! Consignment: ${id}`,\n    errorMsg: \"বুকিং ব্যর্থ হয়েছে।\",\n    noStoreWarning: \"Pathao Store পাওয়া যায়নি। Settings → Courier-এ credentials সেট করুন।\",\n    prev: \"আগে\",\n    next: \"পরে\",\n    ordersReady: \"টি অর্ডার রেডি\",\n  },\n  en: {\n    pageTitle: \"Book Parcel\",\n    search: \"Order no / phone\",\n    loading: \"Loading...\",\n    noOrders: \"No orders ready to book. (Need confirmed / processing status)\",\n    orderNo: \"Order #\",\n    customer: \"Customer\",\n    address: \"Address\",\n    total: \"Total\",\n    book: \"Book\",\n    booking: \"Booking...\",\n    booked: \"Booked ✓\",\n    codAmount: \"COD Amount (৳)\",\n    note: \"Note / Special Instruction\",\n    trackingId: \"Tracking ID\",\n    cancel: \"Cancel\",\n    confirm: \"Confirm\",\n    confirming: \"Processing...\",\n    modalTitle: \"Book Parcel\",\n    steadfast: \"Steadfast\",\n    pathao: \"Pathao\",\n    manual: \"Manual\",\n    courier: \"Courier Service\",\n    store: \"Pickup Store\",\n    selectStore: \"Select store\",\n    loadingStores: \"Loading stores...\",\n    deliveryType: \"Delivery Type\",\n    normalDelivery: \"Normal Delivery\",\n    onDemandDelivery: \"On Demand\",\n    itemType: \"Item Type\",\n    document: \"Document\",\n    parcel: \"Parcel\",\n    itemWeight: \"Weight (KG)\",\n    itemDescription: \"Item Description (optional)\",\n    calcPrice: \"Calculate Delivery Charge\",\n    calculating: \"Calculating...\",\n    deliveryFee: \"Delivery Fee\",\n    successMsg: (id: string) => `Booked! Consignment: ${id}`,\n    errorMsg: \"Booking failed.\",\n    noStoreWarning: \"No Pathao store found. Configure credentials in Settings → Courier.\",\n    prev: \"Prev\",\n    next: \"Next\",\n    ordersReady: \"orders ready\",\n  },\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: number; order_number: string; customer_name: string | null;\n  customer_phone: string; customer_address: string | null;\n  customer_district: string | null; customer_thana: string | null; customer_area: string | null;\n  pathao_city_id: number | null; pathao_zone_id: number | null; pathao_area_id: number | null;\n  total: string; status: string;\n};\n\ntype PathaoStore = { store_id: number; store_name: string; store_address: string; is_active: number };\n\ntype BookForm = {\n  courier: \"steadfast\" | \"pathao\" | \"manual\";\n  cod_amount: string;\n  note: string;\n  tracking_id: string;\n  store_id: string;\n  delivery_type: \"48\" | \"12\";\n  item_type: \"1\" | \"2\";\n  item_weight: string;\n  item_description: string;\n};\n\nexport default function BookParcelPage() {\n  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n  const token = getStoredToken();\n\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [lastPage, setLastPage] = useState(1);\n  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);\n\n  const [modal, setModal] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<BookForm>({\n    courier: \"pathao\", cod_amount: \"\", note: \"\", tracking_id: \"\",\n    store_id: \"\", delivery_type: \"48\", item_type: \"2\", item_weight: \"0.5\", item_description: \"\",\n  });\n  const [booking, setBooking] = useState(false);\n  const [bookResult, setBookResult] = useState<{ success: boolean; msg: string } | null>(null);\n  const [bookedIds, setBookedIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\n\n  const [pathaoStores, setPathaoStores] = useState<PathaoStore[]>([]);\n  const [loadingStores, setLoadingStores] = useState(false);\n  const [storesFetched, setStoresFetched] = useState(false);\n  const [priceResult, setPriceResult] = useState<{ fee: number; final: number } | null>(null);\n  const [calculatingPrice, setCalculatingPrice] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchReady = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: \"20\" });\n      if (search) params.set(\"search\", search);\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/ready?${params}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        setOrders(d.data ?? []);\n        setTotal(d.meta?.total ?? 0);\n        setLastPage(d.meta?.last_page ?? 1);\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [page, search, token]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { void fetchReady(); }, [fetchReady]);\n  useEffect(() => { setPage(1); }, [search]);\n\n  const fetchPathaoStores = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (storesFetched) return;\n    setLoadingStores(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/pathao/stores`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const d = await res.json();\n        const active = (d.data ?? []).filter((s: PathaoStore) => s.is_active);\n        setPathaoStores(active);\n        if (active.length > 0) {\n          setForm(f => ({ ...f, store_id: String(active[0].store_id) }));\n        }\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setLoadingStores(false);\n      setStoresFetched(true);\n    }\n  }, [storesFetched, token]);\n\n  const openModal = (o: Order) => {\n    setModal(o);\n    setForm({\n      courier: \"pathao\", cod_amount: String(Math.round(Number(o.total))), note: \"\", tracking_id: \"\",\n      store_id: pathaoStores.length > 0 ? String(pathaoStores[0].store_id) : \"\",\n      delivery_type: \"48\", item_type: \"2\", item_weight: \"0.5\", item_description: \"\",\n    });\n    setBookResult(null);\n    setPriceResult(null);\n    void fetchPathaoStores();\n  };\n\n  const calculatePathaoPrice = async () => {\n    if (!modal || !form.store_id) return;\n    if (!modal.pathao_city_id || !modal.pathao_zone_id) return;\n    setCalculatingPrice(true);\n    setPriceResult(null);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/pathao/price`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          store_id: Number(form.store_id),\n          item_type: Number(form.item_type),\n          delivery_type: Number(form.delivery_type),\n          item_weight: Number(form.item_weight),\n          recipient_city: modal.pathao_city_id,\n          recipient_zone: modal.pathao_zone_id,\n        }),\n      });\n      const d = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok && d.success) {\n        setPriceResult({ fee: d.data.price, final: d.data.final_price });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setCalculatingPrice(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleBook = async () => {\n    if (!modal) return;\n    setBooking(true);\n    setBookResult(null);\n    try {\n      const body: Record<string, unknown> = {\n        courier: form.courier,\n        cod_amount: Number(form.cod_amount),\n        note: form.note,\n      };\n\n      if (form.courier === \"manual\") {\n        body.tracking_id = form.tracking_id;\n      } else if (form.courier === \"pathao\") {\n        if (form.store_id) body.store_id = Number(form.store_id);\n        body.delivery_type = Number(form.delivery_type);\n        body.item_type = Number(form.item_type);\n        body.item_weight = Number(form.item_weight);\n        if (form.item_description) body.item_description = form.item_description;\n        if (form.note) body.special_instruction = form.note;\n      }\n\n      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/book/${modal.id}`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n        body: JSON.stringify(body),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const id = data.consignment_id ? String(data.consignment_id) : (form.tracking_id || \"saved\");\n        const feeMsg = data.delivery_fee ? ` | Fee: ৳${data.delivery_fee}` : \"\";\n        setBookResult({ success: true, msg: txt.successMsg(id) + feeMsg });\n        setBookedIds(prev => new Set([...prev, modal.id]));\n        setTimeout(() => { setModal(null); void fetchReady(); }, 2000);\n      } else {\n        const errMsg = data.errors\n          ? Object.values(data.errors as Record<string, string[]>).flat().join(\", \")\n          : (data.message ?? txt.errorMsg);\n        setBookResult({ success: false, msg: errMsg });\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setBooking(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <UserShell activeKey=\"book-parcel\" defaultExpandedKey=\"courier\"\n      pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 p-3\">\n        <input type=\"text\" value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={txt.search}\n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[180px] rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n        <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{total} {txt.ordersReady}</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"catv-panel overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs text-[var(--muted)] uppercase\">\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3\">{txt.customer}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\">{txt.address}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.total}</th>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">{txt.book}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\n            ) : orders.map(o => (\n              <tr key={o.id} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent)]\">{o.order_number}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\n                  <p className=\"font-medium\">{o.customer_name ?? \"—\"}</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{o.customer_phone}</p>\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n                  {[o.customer_address, o.customer_district, o.customer_thana, o.customer_area].filter(Boolean).join(\", \") || \"—\"}\n                </td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right font-semibold\">৳{Number(o.total).toLocaleString()}</td>\n                <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\n                  {bookedIds.has(o.id) ? (\n                    <span className=\"rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-400\">{txt.booked}</span>\n                  ) : (\n                    <button onClick={() => openModal(o)}\n                      className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white hover:opacity-90\">\n                      {txt.book}\n                    </button>\n                  )}\n                </td>\n              </tr>\n            ))}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n        {lastPage > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 border-t border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-3\">\n            <button disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}\n              className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">{txt.prev}</button>\n            <span className=\"text-xs\">{page}/{lastPage}</span>\n            <button disabled={page === lastPage} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}\n              className=\"rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-1 text-xs disabled:opacity-40\">{txt.next}</button>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {modal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4\"\n          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setModal(null)}>\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-lg rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl overflow-y-auto max-h-[90vh]\">\n            <h3 className=\"mb-1 text-base font-bold\">{txt.modalTitle}</h3>\n            <p className=\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{modal.order_number} — {modal.customer_name ?? modal.customer_phone}</p>\n\n            {bookResult && (\n              <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm ${bookResult.success ? \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\" : \"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\"}`}>\n                {bookResult.msg}\n              </div>\n            )}\n\n            <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.courier}</span>\n                <select value={form.courier}\n                  onChange={e => { setForm(f => ({ ...f, courier: e.target.value as BookForm[\"courier\"] })); setPriceResult(null); if (e.target.value === \"pathao\") void fetchPathaoStores(); }}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <option value=\"pathao\">{txt.pathao}</option>\n                  <option value=\"steadfast\">{txt.steadfast}</option>\n                  <option value=\"manual\">{txt.manual}</option>\n                </select>\n              </label>\n\n              {form.courier === \"manual\" && (\n                <label>\n                  <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.trackingId}</span>\n                  <input value={form.tracking_id} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tracking_id: e.target.value }))}\n                    className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                </label>\n              )}\n\n              {form.courier === \"pathao\" && (\n                <>\n                  <label>\n                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.store}</span>\n                    <select value={form.store_id} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, store_id: e.target.value }))}\n                      disabled={loadingStores}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm disabled:opacity-50\">\n                      <option value=\"\">{loadingStores ? txt.loadingStores : txt.selectStore}</option>\n                      {pathaoStores.map(s => (\n                        <option key={s.store_id} value={s.store_id}>{s.store_name}</option>\n                      ))}\n                    </select>\n                    {storesFetched && !loadingStores && pathaoStores.length === 0 && (\n                      <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-amber-400\">{txt.noStoreWarning}</p>\n                    )}\n                  </label>\n\n                  <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n                    <label>\n                      <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.deliveryType}</span>\n                      <select value={form.delivery_type} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, delivery_type: e.target.value as \"48\"|\"12\" }))}\n                        className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                        <option value=\"48\">{txt.normalDelivery}</option>\n                        <option value=\"12\">{txt.onDemandDelivery}</option>\n                      </select>\n                    </label>\n                    <label>\n                      <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.itemType}</span>\n                      <select value={form.item_type} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, item_type: e.target.value as \"1\"|\"2\" }))}\n                        className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                        <option value=\"2\">{txt.parcel}</option>\n                        <option value=\"1\">{txt.document}</option>\n                      </select>\n                    </label>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <label>\n                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.itemWeight} (0.5–10 KG)</span>\n                    <input type=\"number\" step=\"0.5\" min=\"0.5\" max=\"10\" value={form.item_weight}\n                      onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, item_weight: e.target.value }))}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                  </label>\n\n                  {modal.pathao_city_id && modal.pathao_zone_id && form.store_id && (\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n                      <button type=\"button\" onClick={() => void calculatePathaoPrice()} disabled={calculatingPrice}\n                        className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent)] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)]/10 disabled:opacity-60\">\n                        {calculatingPrice ? txt.calculating : txt.calcPrice}\n                      </button>\n                      {priceResult && (\n                        <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-400\">\n                          {txt.deliveryFee}: ৳{priceResult.final}\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n\n                  <label>\n                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.itemDescription}</span>\n                    <input value={form.item_description} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, item_description: e.target.value }))}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n                  </label>\n                </>\n              )}\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.codAmount}</span>\n                <input type=\"number\" value={form.cod_amount} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, cod_amount: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n\n              <label>\n                <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.note}</span>\n                <input value={form.note} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))}\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setModal(null)}\n                className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">\n                {txt.cancel}\n              </button>\n              <button onClick={() => void handleBook()} disabled={booking}\n                className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n                {booking ? txt.confirming : txt.confirm}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </UserShell>\n  );\n}\nENDOFFILE\ncp /tmp/courier_page.tsx /var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx\necho \"done\"","explanation":"Replace Book Parcel page with Pathao-enabled version","goal":"Update courier page","mode":"sync"}},"id":"9a7aa7eb-7a22-4d8c-9aaa-5c3bf510b069","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:34:40.349Z","parentId":"cacf7a3a-34d9-4f62-ac6b-53d849f42ef8"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"b8a0575a-ec0b-434d-b872-8043cb41c1e0","content":"চমৎকার — তুমি ব্রাউজার লগইন শেয়ার করার পর আমি Pathao Merchant API ডক দেখে **end-to-end integration** করে দিয়েছি ✅\n\n## কী কী ইমপ্লিমেন্ট করেছি\n\nPathao API doc অনুযায়ী core ফিচারগুলো যোগ করা হয়েছে:\n\n- OAuth token flow (password + refresh token)\n- Store list fetch\n- Store create API support\n- Price calculation API\n- Single order booking (Pathao)\n- Tracking/status refresh (Pathao consignment info)\n\nএগুলোর সাথে existing flow (Steadfast/manual) আগের মতোই কাজ করবে।\n\n## Backend changes\n\n- নতুন সার্ভিস: `backend/app/Services/PathaoService.php`\n  - token issue/refresh\n  - token persist (DB)\n  - stores, create store\n  - create order, bulk order hook\n  - order info (tracking)\n  - price calculation\n\n- `backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php`\n  - `testPathaoConnection()`\n  - `pathaoStores()`\n  - `createPathaoStore()`\n  - `pathaoPrice()`\n  - `book()`-এ Pathao payload support\n  - `trackOrder()`-এ Pathao status refresh support\n  - settings validation-এ `pathao_username`, `pathao_password` যোগ\n\n- `backend/app/Models/CourierSetting.php`\n  - Pathao username/password + token fields fillable করা\n  - sensitive fields mask update\n\n- নতুন migration:\n  - `backend/database/migrations/2026_05_03_102705_add_pathao_token_fields_to_courier_settings.php`\n  - fields:\n    - `pathao_username`\n    - `pathao_password`\n    - `pathao_access_token`\n    - `pathao_refresh_token`\n    - `pathao_token_expires_at`\n\n- routes (`backend/routes/api.php`) add:\n  - `POST /api/courier/settings/test-pathao`\n  - `GET /api/courier/pathao/stores`\n  - `POST /api/courier/pathao/stores`\n  - `POST /api/courier/pathao/price`\n\n## Frontend changes\n\n- `frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier/page.tsx`\n  - Pathao username/password input\n  - “Test Pathao” button\n  - connection result message\n\n- `frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx`\n  - booking modal-এ courier selector: Pathao / Steadfast / Manual\n  - Pathao store dropdown\n  - delivery type, item type, weight, item description\n  - calculate delivery charge button\n  - Pathao booking payload send\n\n- `frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx`\n  - Pathao order status refresh support\n  - status parsing (`order_status_slug`)\n\n## Verification\n\n- PHP syntax check: ✅\n- Frontend build: ✅\n- Frontend service restart: ✅ (`hybrid-stack-frontend`)\n- DB migration run: ✅\n\n## Commit\n\n- `90ffc0c` — `feat: implement full Pathao courier API integration`\n\n## Updated todo list\n\n- [x] DB Migration - pathao token fields  \n- [x] PathaoService.php - full API service  \n- [x] CourierSetting model - add fields  \n- [x] CourierController - pathao booking/tracking/stores/price  \n- [x] Routes - add new pathao endpoints  \n- [x] Frontend - Settings page pathao credentials  \n- [x] Frontend - Book Parcel page Pathao support  \n- [x] Frontend - Track page Pathao support  \n- [x] Build & Deploy  \n\n---\n\nএকটা গুরুত্বপূর্ণ সিকিউরিটি নোট: তুমি চ্যাটে credential শেয়ার করেছো, তাই নিরাপত্তার জন্য Pathao password rotate করা ভালো হবে।  \nচাইলে next step-এ আমি **bulk order booking UI** আর **Create Store UI form**-টাও full production-grade করে দিয়ে দেই।","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""},"id":"823b26d5-6419-442d-9d8e-a056f3950729","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:39:15.252Z","parentId":"c8f616d5-f09c-489a-8e1b-5cdb4c3c25cc"}

false, 'message' => 'Courier not supported yet.'], 422);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    public function bookBulk(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $data = $request->validate([\\n+            'courier'            => 'required|in:pathao',\\n+            'order_ids'          => 'required|array|min:2|max:200',\\n+            'order_ids.*'        => 'integer',\\n+            'store_id'           => 'nullable|integer',\\n+            'delivery_type'      => 'nullable|integer|in:48,12',\\n+            'item_type'          => 'nullable|integer|in:1,2',\\n+            'item_weight'        =>   => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n+        ]);\\n+\\n+        $orders = Order::where('user_id', auth()->id())\\n+            ->whereIn('id', $data['order_ids'])\\n+            ->whereIn('status', ['confirmed', 'processing'])\\n+            ->whereNull('courier_tracking_id')\\n+            ->get();\\n+\\n+        if ($orders->isEmpty()) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'No eligible orders found for bulk booking.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $results = [];\\n+        $successCount = 0;\\n+        $failedCount  = 0;\\n+\\n+        foreach ($orders as $order) {\\n+            $result = $this->bookPathaoAndPersist($order, $data);\\n+            $results[] = [\\n+                'order_id'       => $order->id,\\n+                'order_number'   => $order->order_number,\\n+                'success'        => $result['success'],\\n+                'consignment_id' => $result['consignment_id'] ?? null,\\n+                'message'        => $result['message'] ?? null,\\n+            ];\\n+\\n+            if ($result['success']) {\\n+                $successCount++;\\n+            } else {\\n+                $failedCount++;\\n+            }\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => $successCount > 0,\\n+            'message' => \\\"Bulk booking completed. Success: {$successCount}, Failed: {$failedCount}\\\",\\n+            'data'    => [\\n+                'total'    => $orders->count(),\\n+                'success'  => $successCount,\\n+                'failed'   => $failedCount,\\n+                'results'  => $results,\\n+            ],\\n+        ], $successCount > 0 ? 200 : 422);\\n+    }\\n@@\\n     private function bookPathao(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n-        $svc      = new PathaoService();\\n-        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n-\\n-        $storeId = $data['store_id'] ?? 'Pathao order booked.',\\n+            ]);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => false,\\n+            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Pathao booking failed.',\\n+            'errors'  => $result['errors'] ?? null,\\n+            'raw'     => $result['raw'] ?? null,\\n+        ], 422);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    private function bookPathaoAndPersist(Order $order, array $data): array\\n+    {\\n+        $svc      = new PathaoService();\\n+        $payload  = $this->buildPathaoPayload($order, $data);\\n+\\n+        if (! $payload['success']) {\\n+            return $payload;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $result = $svc->createOrder(auth()->id(), $payload['payload']);\\n+\\n+        if ($result['success']) {\\n+            $order->update([\\n+                'courier_name'        => 'pathao',\\n+                'courier_tracking_id' => $result['consignment_id'],\\n+                'courier_status'      => strtolower($result['order_status'] ?? 'booked'),\\n+                'courier_charge'      => $result['delivery_fee'] ?? null,\\n+                'status'              => 'processing',\\n+            ]);\\n+            return $result;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return [\\n+            'success' => false,\\n+            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Pathao booking failed.',\\n+            'errors'  => $result['errors'] ?? null,\\n+            'raw'     => $result['raw'] ?? null,\\n+        ];\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    private function buildPathaoPayload(Order $order, array $data): array\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n+\\n+        $storeId = $data['store_id'] ?? ($settings->pathao_store_id ?? null);\\n+        if (! $storeId) {\\n+            return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao store_id is required. Configure it in Settings → Courier.'];\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $address = $order->customer_address ?? '';\\n+        if ($order->customer_district) $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_district;\\n+        if ($order->customer_thana)    $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_thana;\\n+        if ($order->customer_area)     $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_area;\\n+        $address = trim($address, ', ');\\n+\\n+        if (strlen($address) < 10) {\\n+            $address = ($address ?: ($order->customer_district ?? 'Bangladesh')) . ', Bangladesh';\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $payload = [\\n+            'store_id'             => (int) $storeId,\\n+            'merchant_order_id'    => $order->order_number,\\n+            'recipient_name'       => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\\n+            'recipient_phone'      => $order->customer_phone,\\n+            'recipient_address'    => substr($address, 0, 220),\\n+            'delivery_type'        => $data['delivery_type'] ?? 48,\\n+            'item_type'            => $data['item_type'] ?? 2,\\n+            'item_quantity'        => 1,\\n+            'item_weight'          => $data['item_weight'] ?? 0.5,\\n+            'amount_to_collect'    => (int) ($data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total),\\n+        ];\\n+\\n+        if ($order->pathao_city_id) $payload['recipient_city'] = $order->pathao_city_id;\\n+        if ($order->pathao_zone_id) $payload['recipient_zone'] = $order->pathao_zone_id;\\n+        if ($order->pathao_area_id) $payload['recipient_area'] = $order->pathao_area_id;\\n+\\n+        if (! empty($data['special_instruction'])) $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['special_instruction'];\\n+        if (! empty($data['item_description']))    $payload['item_description']    = $data['item_description'];\\n+        if (! empty($data['note']))                $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['note'];\\n+\\n+        return ['success' => true, 'payload' => $payload];\\n+    }\\n*** End Patch\"}","type":"function"}]},"id":"05f002ca-d86d-4f88-ae3b-04646c9ddf68","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:42:57.741Z","parentId":"81c354a7-9f39-4364-98c7-0de8d101a674"}

($settings->pathao_store_id ?? null);\n+        if (! $storeId) {\n+            return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Pathao store_id is required. Configure it in Settings → Courier.'];\n+        }\n+\n+        $address = $order->customer_address ?? '';\n+        if ($order->customer_district) $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_district;\n+        if ($order->customer_thana)    $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_thana;\n+        if ($order->customer_area)     $address .= ', ' . $order->customer_area;\n+        $address = trim($address, ', ');\n+\n+        if (strlen($address) < 10) {\n+            $address = ($address ?: ($order->customer_district ?? 'Bangladesh')) . ', Bangladesh';\n+        }\n+\n+        $payload = [\n+            'store_id'             => (int) $storeId,\n+            'merchant_order_id'    => $order->order_number,\n+            'recipient_name'       => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\n+            'recipient_phone'      => $order->customer_phone,\n+            'recipient_address'    => substr($address, 0, 220),\n+            'delivery_type'        => $data['delivery_type'] ?? 48,\n+            'item_type'            => $data['item_type'] ?? 2,\n+            'item_quantity'        => 1,\n+            'item_weight'          => $data['item_weight'] ?? 0.5,\n+            'amount_to_collect'    => (int) ($data['cod_amount'] ?? $order->total),\n+        ];\n+\n+        if ($order->pathao_city_id) $payload['recipient_city'] = $order->pathao_city_id;\n+        if ($order->pathao_zone_id) $payload['recipient_zone'] = $order->pathao_zone_id;\n+        if ($order->pathao_area_id) $payload['recipient_area'] = $order->pathao_area_id;\n+\n+        if (! empty($data['special_instruction'])) $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['special_instruction'];\n+        if (! empty($data['item_description']))    $payload['item_description']    = $data['item_description'];\n+        if (! empty($data['note']))                $payload['special_instruction'] = $data['note'];\n+\n+        return ['success' => true, 'payload' => $payload];\n+    }\n*** End Patch"}},"id":"b3c7157a-02f8-4302-a07b-6afa8c968392","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:42:58.423Z","parentId":"b68a544d-807a-438c-a5b9-32d09f093f6b"}

Success: ${s}, Failed: ${f}`,\\n+    minTwoOrders: \\\"Select at least 2 orders for bulk booking.\\\",\\n     successMsg: (id: string) => `Booked! Consignment: ${id}`,\\n@@\\n type BookForm = {\\n@@\\n   item_description: string;\\n };\\n+\\n+type BulkForm = {\\n+  store_id: string;\\n+  delivery_type: \\\"48\\\" | \\\"12\\\";\\n+  item_type: \\\"1\\\" | \\\"2\\\";\\n+  item_weight: string;\\n+  item_description: string;\\n+  note: string;\\n+};\\n@@\\n   const [bookedIds, setBookedIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\\n+  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\\n+  const [bulkModal, setBulkModal] = useState(false);\\n+  const [bulkBooking, setBulkBooking] = useState(false);\\n+  const [bulkResult, setBulkResult] = useState<{ success: boolean; msg: string } | null>(null);\\n@@\\n   const [storesFetched, setStoresFetched] = useState(false);\\n@@\\n   const [calculatingPrice, setCalculatingPrice] = useState(false);\\n+  const [bulkForm, setBulkForm] = useState<BulkForm>({\\n+    store_id: \\\"\\\", delivery_type: \\\"48\\\", item_type: \\\"2\\\", item_weight: \\\"0.5\\\", item_description: \\\"\\\", note: \\\"\\\",\\n+  });\\n@@\\n       if (res.ok) {\\n         const d = await res.json();\\n         setOrders(d.data ?? []).map((o: Order) => o.id));\\n+        setSelectedIds(prev => new Set([...prev].filter(id => visibleIds.has(id))));\\n       }\\n@@\\n   const openModal = (o: Order) => {\\n@@\\n     void fetchPathaoStores();\\n   };\\n+\\n+  const toggleSelect = (orderId: number, checked: boolean) => {\\n+    setSelectedIds(prev => {\\n+      const next = new Set(prev);\\n+      if (checked) next.add(orderId); else next.delete(orderId);\\n+      return next;\\n+    });\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const toggleSelectAllVisible = (checked: boolean) => {\\n+    setSelectedIds(prev => {\\n+      const next = new Set(prev);\\n+      const visible = orders.filter(o => !bookedIds.has(o.id)).map(o => o.id);\\n+      visible.forEach(id => checked ? next.add(id) : next.delete(id));\\n+      return next;\\n+    });\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const openBulkModal = () => {\\n+    if (selectedIds.size < 2) {\\n+      setBulkResult({ success: false, msg: txt.minTwoOrders });\\n+      return;\\n+    }\\n+    setBulkResult(null);\\n+    setBulkForm({\\n+      store_id: pathaoStores.length > 0 ? String(pathaoStores[0].store_id) : \\\"\\\",\\n+      delivery_type: \\\"48\\\",\\n+      item_type: \\\"2\\\",\\n+      item_weight: \\\"0.5\\\",\\n+      item_description: \\\"\\\",\\n+      note: \\\"\\\",\\n+    });\\n+    setBulkModal(true);\\n+    void fetchPathaoStores();\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const handleBulkBook = async () => {\\n+    if (selectedIds.size < 2) return;\\n+    setBulkBooking(true);\\n+    setBulkResult(null);\\n+    try {\\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/book/bulk`, {\\n+        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n+        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n+        body: JSON.stringify({\\n+          courier: \\\"pathao\\\",\\n+          order_ids: Array.from(selectedIds),\\n+          store_id: bulkForm.store_id ? []).filter((r: { success: boolean; order_id: number }) => r.success).map((r: { success: boolean; order_id: number }) => r.order_id);\\n+        setBookedIds(prev => new Set([...prev, ...successIds]));\\n+        setSelectedIds(prev => {\\n+          const next = new Set(prev);\\n+          successIds.forEach((id: number) => next.delete(id));\\n+          return next;\\n+        });\\n+        setBulkResult({ success: true, msg: txt.bulkSuccess(d.data.success ?? 0, d.data.failed ?? 0) });\\n+        setTimeout(() => { setBulkModal(false); void fetchReady(); }, 1800);\\n+      } else {\\n+        setBulkResult({ success: false, msg: d.message ?? txt.errorMsg });\\n+      }\\n+    } finally {\\n+      setBulkBooking(false);\\n+    }\\n+  };\\n@@\\n       <div            className=\\\"h-4 w-4\\\"\\n+                />\\n+              </th>\\n               <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.orderNo}</th>\\n               <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3\\\">{txt.customer}</th>\\n               <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 hidden md:table-cell\\\">{txt.address}</th>\\n               <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.total}</th>\\n               <th className=\\\"px-4 py-3 text-right\\\">{txt.book}</th>\\n@@\\n             {loading ? (\\n-              <tr><td colSpan={5} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\\\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\\n+              <tr><td colSpan={6} className=\\\"px-4 py-10 text-center text-[var(--muted)] text-xs\\\">{txt.noOrders}</td></tr>\\n             ) : orders.map(o => (\\n               <tr key={o.id} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] type=\\\"checkbox\\\"\\n+                      checked={selectedIds.has(o.id)}\\n+                      onChange={e => toggleSelect(o.id, e.target.checked)}\\n+                      className=\\\"h-4 bg-black/60 p-4\\\"\\n+          onClick={e => e.target === e.currentTarget && setBulkModal(false)}>\\n+          <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-xl rounded-2xl bg-[var(--surface)] p-6 shadow-xl text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{selectedIds.size} {txt.selectedCount}</p>\\n+            <p className=\\\"mb-4 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.bulkHint}</p>\\n+\\n+            {bulkResult && (\\n+              <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm ${bulkResult.success ? \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\\\"}`}>\\n+                {bulkResult.msg}\\n+              </div>\\n+            )}\\n+\\n+            <div className=\\\"grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n+              <label className=\\\"sm:col-span-2\\\">\\n+                <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.store}</span>\\n+                <select value={bulkForm.store_id} onChange={e => setBulkForm(f => ({ ...f, store_id: e.target.value }))}\\n+                  disabled={loadingStores}\\n+                  className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm disabled:opacity-50\\\">\\n+                  <option value=\\\"\\\">{loadingStores ? txt.loadingStores : txt.selectStore}</option>\\n+                  {pathaoStores.map(s => <option key={s.store_id} onClick={() => setBulkModal(false)}\\n+                className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">\\n+                {txt.cancel}\\n+ []);\n+      }\n+    } finally {\n+      setLoadingStores(false);\n+    }\n+  };\n+\n+  const fetchCities = async () => {\n+    setLocationLoading(prev => ({ ...prev, cities: true }));\n+    try {\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/locations/cities`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+      const d = await res.json();\n+      if (res.ok) {\n+        setCities((d.data ?? (\n+                <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noStores}</p>\n+              ) : (\n+                <div className=\"grid gap-2\">\n+                  {stores.map(s => (\n+                    <div key={s.store_id} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2\">\n+                      <p className=\"text-sm font-medium\">{s.store_name} <span className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">#{s.store_id}</span></p>\n+                      <p className=\"text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{s.store_address}</p>\n+                    </div>\n+                  ))}\n+                </div>\n+              )}\n+            </div>\n+          </div>\n*** End Patch"}},"id":"b0e760a7-b100-4c74-9c81-8934a5fe4ed0","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:44:27.154Z","parentId":"81ed1849-19b8-4fcc-831e-9a88555260da"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"04794e2c-bfc6-42ac-a6e9-066bf32df803","content":"Done boss — **bulk order booking UI** + **Create Store UI form** দুটোই production-grade করে live deploy করে দিলাম ✅\n\n## কী কী যোগ হলো\n\n### Bulk Order Booking (Pathao)\n\n- Backend-এ নতুন bulk endpoint:\n  - `POST /api/courier/book/bulk`\n- Route যোগ করা হয়েছে: `backend/routes/api.php`\n- `CourierController`-এ:\n  - `bookBulk()` method\n  - shared helper logic তৈরি করেছি যাতে single + bulk booking consistent হয়:\n    - `bookPathaoAndPersist()`\n    - `buildPathaoPayload()`\n- Bulk booking response-এ per-order result (success/fail + consignment/message) পাচ্ছো।\n\n### Book Parcel UI (multi-select + bulk modal)\n\n`frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx` এ:\n\n- table-এ checkbox selection (single + select all)\n- toolbar-এ `Bulk Book (N)` action button\n- bulk booking modal:\n  - store select\n  - delivery type\n  - item type\n  - item weight\n  - item description\n  - note/special instruction\n- success/fail summary message\n- success হওয়া order auto-mark booked + refresh\n\n---\n\n### Create Store UI (Pathao)\n\n`frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier/page.tsx` এ:\n\n- নতুন **Create Pathao Store** form:\n  - store name\n  - contact name\n  - contact number\n  - secondary number\n  - address\n  - city/zone/area dropdown (cascading)\n- API submit: `POST /api/courier/pathao/stores`\n- নিচে “Your Pathao Stores” list + refresh button\n- validation/error/success friendly messaging added\n\n---\n\n## Verification\n\n- Code সমস্যা চেক: `No errors found`\n- PHP syntax: clean ✅\n- Frontend build: successful ✅\n- Frontend service restart: successful ✅\n\n---\n\n## Commit\n\n- `888f6fb` — `feat: add production-grade bulk booking and Pathao store creation UI`\n\n---\n\n## Updated checklist (completed)\n\n- Add bulk booking backend endpoint ✅  \n- Add bulk book API route ✅  \n- Build bulk booking UI ✅  \n- Build create store form UI ✅  \n- Run error/build validation ✅  \n- Commit and deploy restart ✅  \n\nচাইলে next step-এ আমি bulk booking modal-এ **per-order retry panel** আর **CSV থেকে bulk order pick** option-ও যোগ করে দিতে পারি।","toolRequests":[]},"id":"289dd6fe-f236-4c3c-bdad-9a5f3b9e646f","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:45:45.391Z","parentId":"296d2b1e-ab5c-4722-8bb8-926e526c6b45"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"785c3c73-a7bb-4451-8805-1f47ab4b8d84","content":"সুন্দর রিকোয়েস্ট — কাজটা করে দিয়েছি ✅  \n`dashboard/settings/courier` পেজে এখন **আলাদা আলাদা courier tab system** আছে।\n\n## কী পরিবর্তন করেছি\n\n`frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/courier/page.tsx` এ:\n\n- নতুন tabs যোগ:\n  - `Steadfast`\n  - `Pathao`\n  - `RedX`\n  - `Manual`\n- state যোগ: `activeTab`\n- প্রতি tab-এ শুধু ওই courier-এর settings/panel দেখাবে:\n  - **Steadfast tab** → API key + secret key\n  - **Pathao tab** → client creds + username/password + Create Store form + store list\n  - **RedX tab** → RedX API key\n  - **Manual tab** → credentials লাগে না, explanatory note\n- action buttons tab-aware:\n  - `Save` সব tab-এ available\n  - `Test Connection` শুধু Steadfast tab-এ\n  - `Test Pathao` শুধু Pathao tab-এ\n\n## Verification\n\n- file error check: ✅ no errors\n- production build: ✅ success\n- frontend service restart: ✅ done\n\n## Commit\n\n- `f008960` — `feat: add per-courier tabs in settings page`\n\n## Updated checklist (final)\n\n- [x] Add courier tab state and labels  \n- [x] Render per-courier tab panels  \n- [x] Adjust action buttons by active tab  \n- [x] Run build and finalize  \n\nচাইলে next step-এ tab-এর সাথে **unsaved changes warning** আর **tab-specific save button label** (যেমন “Save Pathao Settings”) add করে দিতে পারি।","toolRequests":[]},"id":"2f2f9666-1d03-45ef-b8cb-bd093ab753f9","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:51:13.016Z","parentId":"8b0b27b1-70c7-44dc-9fc1-9f70a903bab4"}
{"type":"assistant.turn_end","data":{"turnId":"9"},"id":"67daa1af-adb3-4d3d-8f8c-14ab4bb7c537","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:51:13.016Z","parentId":"2f2f9666-1d03-45ef-b8cb-bd093ab753f9"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"call_Wyvc7MlVZGMFWXKywBuUZpDn","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport requests,re\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\nurl='https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub'\nhtml=requests.get(url,timeout=30).text\nsoup=BeautifulSoup(html,'html.parser')\ntext='\\n'.join(soup.stripped_strings)\nfor pat in [r'/api/v1/[^\\s\\\"\\']+', r'/create_[a-z_]+', r'/status_[a-z_]+', r'/get_[a-z_]+', r'/bulk_[a-z_]+']:\n    found=sorted(set(re.findall(pat,text)))\n    if found:\n        print('\\nPATTERN',pat)\n        for x in found:\n            print(x)\nPY","explanation":"Extract candidate Steadfast API endpoints from the published documentation text","goal":"Identify Steadfast endpoints","mode":"sync"}},"id":"1b05b49a-3216-4d4c-b712-b321088615ab","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:54:42.491Z","parentId":"b0e3e660-bf6e-420e-8ef6-517bc774861b"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"ecea8f7b-f280-4586-a793-cf9dfc400700","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_2EMdSKVoMGalvKw8UEsMgBoV","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"python3 - <<'PY'\\nimport requests,re\\nfrom html.parser import HTMLParser\\nclass P(HTMLParser):\\n    def __init__(self):\\n        super().__init__(); self.parts=[]\\n    def handle_data(self, d):\\n        s=d.strip()\\n        if s: self.parts.append(s)\\nurl='https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub'\\nhtml=requests.get(url,timeout=30).text\\np=P(); p.feed(html)\\ntext='\\\\n'.join(p.parts)\\npatterns=[r'https?://[^\\\\s]+', r'/api/v1/[^\\\\s,;]+', r'/(?:create|get|status|cancel|bulk|print|balance)[A-Za-z0-9_/-]*']\\nfor pat in patterns:\\n    found=sorted(set(re.findall(pat,text)))\\n    print('\\\\nPATTERN',pat,'COUNT',len(found))\\n    for x in found[:200]:\\n        print(x)\\nPY\",\"explanation\":\"Parse the Steadfast documentation HTML and extract URLs/endpoints with built-in HTML parser\",\"goal\":\"Identify Steadfast endpoints\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"**Considering parsing methods**\n\nI think I can't use Beautiful Soup (bs4) here, so I might want to look into using regex to strip tags. Maybe grep could work as well? But then again, using Perl could be an option too. However, it seems like the built-in html.parser might make things easier. So, it might be a good idea to create a subclass of html.parser for what I'm trying to achieve."},"id":"92b3d60e-e489-4203-aa68-a49e2c865fec","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:54:51.235Z","parentId":"5c99439b-d2dc-41eb-bf4c-ed57e71043dc"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"call_2EMdSKVoMGalvKw8UEsMgBoV","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport requests,re\nfrom html.parser import HTMLParser\nclass P(HTMLParser):\n    def __init__(self):\n        super().__init__(); self.parts=[]\n    def handle_data(self, d):\n        s=d.strip()\n        if s: self.parts.append(s)\nurl='https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub'\nhtml=requests.get(url,timeout=30).text\np=P(); p.feed(html)\ntext='\\n'.join(p.parts)\npatterns=[r'https?://[^\\s]+', r'/api/v1/[^\\s,;]+', r'/(?:create|get|status|cancel|bulk|print|balance)[A-Za-z0-9_/-]*']\nfor pat in patterns:\n    found=sorted(set(re.findall(pat,text)))\n    print('\\nPATTERN',pat,'COUNT',len(found))\n    for x in found[:200]:\n        print(x)\nPY","explanation":"Parse the Steadfast documentation HTML and extract URLs/endpoints with built-in HTML parser","goal":"Identify Steadfast endpoints","mode":"sync"}},"id":"332195de-adc0-4757-a4f6-2d1a2ec47791","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:54:51.287Z","parentId":"245ff110-8242-4b24-b33c-6fd87bcd778e"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"1f83c224-e107-42cd-aa29-01fb4e247527","content":"ডক থেকে endpoints ধরা গেছে—এখন আমি প্রতিটা endpoint-এর request/response/context টেনে আনছি, যাতে “সব feature” implementation-এ কিছু বাদ না যায়।","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_ZXfrp9fdEwMecUFOvOV6KHj2","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"python3 - <<'PY'\\nimport requests,re\\nfrom html.parser import HTMLParser\\nclass P(HTMLParser):\\n    def __init__(self):\\n        super().__init__(); self.parts=[]\\n    def handle_data(self, d):\\n        s=' '.join(d.split())\\n        if s: self.parts.append(s)\\nhtml=requests.get('https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub',timeout=30).text\\np=P(); p.feed(html)\\nparts=p.parts\\nkeywords=['create_order','bulk-order','create_return_request','get_return_requests','get_balance','status_by_cid','status_by_invoice','status_by_trackingcode','Api-Key','Secret-Key','recipient_name','tracking_code','consignment_id','return']\\nfor i,s in enumerate(parts):\\n    if any(k in s for k in keywords):\\n        start=max(0,i-8); end=min(len(parts),i+18)\\n        print('\\\\n--- BLOCK',i,'---')\\n        for j in range(start,end):\\n            print(parts[j])\\nPY\",\"explanation\":\"Extract surrounding documentation text for each Steadfast endpoint and parameter section\",\"goal\":\"Capture Steadfast API details\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"**Gathering endpoint documentation**\n\nI need to enhance the documentation around endpoints. I'll consider using text parsing and grep to find relevant lines. Saving the extracted content to a file sounds like a good idea, too. I want to focus on printing lines that contain specific keywords and possibly headings to ensure I get the most pertinent information. {"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"call_ZXfrp9fdEwMecUFOvOV6KHj2","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport requests,re\nfrom html.parser import HTMLParser\nclass P(HTMLParser):\n    def __init__(self):\n        super().__init__(); self.parts=[]\n    def handle_data(self, d):\n        s=' '.join(d.split())\n        if s: self.parts.append(s)\nhtml=requests.get('https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub',timeout=30).text\np=P(); p.feed(html)\nparts=p.parts\nkeywords=['create_order','bulk-order','create_return_request','get_return_requests','get_balance','status_by_cid','status_by_invoice','status_by_trackingcode','Api-Key','Secret-Key','recipient_name','tracking_code','consignment_id','return']\nfor i,s in enumerate(parts):\n    if any(k in s for k in keywords):\n        start=max(0,i-8); end=min(len(parts),i+18)\n        print('\\n--- BLOCK',i,'---')\n        for j in range(start,end):\n            print(parts[j])\nPY","explanation":"Extract surrounding documentation text for each Steadfast endpoint and parameter section","goal":"Capture Steadfast API details","mode":"sync"}},"id":"caf61823-3aba-4be3-a5a0-ead4812c3d19","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:55:04.231Z","parentId":"9db085cc-093e-4759-bb1e-e8bbb7769683"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"c0b8bcc9-d991-48c1-b0e7-7148ebc64abe","content":"ডক অনুযায়ী Steadfast-এর feature list পরিষ্কার হয়েছে: order create, bulk create, 3 ধরনের status lookup, balance, return request(s), payment(s), আর police stations। এখন codebase-এ এগুলোর জন্য backend+UI কোথায় বসবে সেটা দেখে full coverage যোগ করছি।","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_BRg7HpfPscEoXOHcUeOrW3IJ","name":"read_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/performance/page.tsx\",\"startLine\":1,\"endLine\":420}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_bcQ1ZzTu9Ud0F6UwrXvEBIBb","name":"read_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/track/page.tsx\",\"startLine\":1,\"endLine\":260}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_jzrLjHf74WBMsG9zXh6QVbMb","name":"grep_search","arguments":"{\"query\":\"activeKey=\\\\\\\"courier|book-parcel|track-parcel|performance\",\"isRegexp\":true,\"includePattern\":\"frontend/src/**\",\"maxResults\":50}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_Uh71ax4qIyWchWly8B6aVIFX","name":"read_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Services/SteadfastService.php\",\"startLine\":1,\"endLine\":260}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"**Considering API integration**\n\nI need to think about adding more fields for order creation and possibly for payments related to police stations. It seems like I could use a simple GET request for obtaining return requests and payment documents without parameters. Considering that there’s documentation available, I'll look at implementing various endpoints like create_order, status checks, and return requests. Plus, I should explore existing performance pages and how I can integrate those with test balances and the user request for implementing all Steadfast features.**Exploring API integration**\n\nI think it’s essential to add backend APIs and possibly create a frontend under the courier performance section. There may be an opportunity to develop a centralized control center for this. I should definitely inspect the current performance page to understand how to enhance it further. By doing this, I can ensure we're optimizing the user experience while also effectively managing the performance aspects of the courier system. This could lead to better overall functionality."},"id":"797c8616-a32c-40c1-aafd-b026aace8321","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:55:40.349Z","parentId":"2361a250-4501-40a2-b12f-75feea20e911"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"2e717a3c-46ee-483c-b134-65275ff2e0f4","content":"Current gap map clear: Steadfast-এ এখন শুধু single create + CID status + balance আছে। এখন আমি service/controller/routes expand করে bulk create, invoice/tracking lookup, returns, payments, police stations—সব backend feature যোগ করছি।","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_MJDHuPCT7jfMl9TqOjBR1Y6F","name":"grep_search","arguments":"{\"query\":\"courier_tracking_id|courier_name|courier_status|courier_charge\",\"isRegexp\":false,\"includePattern\":\"backend/app/Models/Order.php\"}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_N3Hf4xKRE7XSpsgD1f2h6wRa","name":"read_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Models/Order.php\",\"startLine\":1,\"endLine\":220}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_QldBIQRqs927sxO21nLOkFoO","name":"grep_search","arguments":"{\"query\":\"book/bulk|steadfast\",\"isRegexp\":false,\"includePattern\":\"frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx\"}","type":"function"},{"toolCallId":"call_OF5KU0lz6QUC9gOsNL0qQq6t","name":"read_file","arguments":"{\"filePath\":\"/var/www/hybrid-stack/frontend/src/components/user-shell.tsx\",\"startLine\":160,\"endLine\":200}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"**Evaluating order response enhancements**\n\nI need to consider how to improve the create_order response and the bulk response. It seems we might have enough information for a single return request. I’ll implement generic wrappers for handling payments and police station data. We should add backend endpoints and a performance page with tabs for balance, payments, returns, police stations, and status lookups. The booking page should support both single and bulk orders for steadfast, as our current bulk implementation is only for Pathao. Let's aim to add this feature!**Expanding on steadfast functionality**\n\nI’m considering whether to expand the system to include steadfast and manual options. I might use the courier performance page as a hub for steadfast since there's already a placeholder for it. I’ll implement tabs for Overview, Payments, Return Requests, and Police Stations, with actions like creating return requests and refreshing lists.\n\nFor backend routes, I’ll need various GET and POST requests for status and return requests. I’ll also evaluate if orders need both a courier_tracking_id and tracking_code. Maybe I can store the consignment ID in courier_tracking_id and the tracking code in notes, if necessary.**Considering tracking options**\n\nI’m thinking that we could potentially use invoice and tracking code APIs ad hoc through the UI without needing to store them. It seems practical to implement separate lookup forms for this purpose. This way, users can easily access tracking information as needed, rather than having it saved permanently. It could streamline the process and keep things tidy. Let’s see how this plan develops!"},"id":"076e4426-56be-4167-82e5-caecc549c513","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:55:58.722Z","parentId":"4e797074-3314-4886-b400-1f22c4d441e3"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"c12d645e-0887-4216-9d77-5811cd872ac7","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_9TfrTrifHvotpJzPZLqxnKT5","name":"apply_patch","arguments":"{\"explanation\":\"Add complete Steadfast API endpoints and bulk booking support in CourierController\",\"input\":\"*** Begin Patch\\n*** Update File: /var/www/hybrid-stack/backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php\\n@@\\n class CourierController extends Controller\\n {\\n+    private function getSteadfastSettings(): ?CourierSetting\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n+\\n+        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n+            return null;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return $settings;\\n+    }\\n+\\n     // ── Pathao Location Dropdowns ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n@@\\n     public function testConnection(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n-        $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n-        if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n             return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n         }\\n@@\\n         return response()->json([\\n             'success' => $ok,\\n             'data'    => $result,\\n             'message' => $ok ? 'Connection successful.' : ($result['message'] ?? 'Connection failed.'),\\n         ]);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    // ── Steadfast Utilities ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastBalance(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->getBalance($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => isset($result['status']) ? (int) $result['status'] === 200 : ! empty($result),\\n+            'data'    => $result,\\n+        ]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastStatusByConsignment(string $id): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        return $this->steadfastStatusLookup('consignment', $id);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastStatusByInvoice(string $invoice): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        return $this->steadfastStatusLookup('invoice', $invoice);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastStatusByTracking(string $trackingCode): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        return $this->steadfastStatusLookup('tracking', $trackingCode);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    private function steadfastStatusLookup(string $type, string $value): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = match ($type) {\\n+            'invoice'     => $service->getStatusByInvoice($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $value),\\n+            'tracking'    => $service->getStatusByTrackingCode($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $value),\\n+            default       => $service->getStatus($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $value),\\n+        };\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => isset($result['status']) ? (int) $result['status'] === 200 : ! empty($result),\\n+            'data'    => $result,\\n+        ], isset($result['status']) && (int) $result['status'] !== 200 ? 422 : 200);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastReturnRequests(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->getReturnRequests($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastReturnRequest(int|string $id): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->getReturnRequest($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $id);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function createSteadfastReturnRequest(Request $request): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $data = $request->validate([\\n+            'consignment_id' => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n+            'invoice'        => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n+            'tracking_code'  => 'nullable|string|max:100',\\n+            'reason'         => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n+        ]);\\n+\\n+        if (empty($data['consignment_id']) && empty($data['invoice']) && empty($data['tracking_code'])) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Provide consignment ID, invoice, or tracking code.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->createReturnRequest($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $data);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json([\\n+            'success' => ! empty($result),\\n+            'data'    => $result,\\n+            'message' => $result['message'] ?? 'Return request submitted.',\\n+        ], isset($result['status']) && (int) $result['status'] !== 200 ? 422 : 200);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastPayments(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->getPayments($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastPayment(int|string $paymentId): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $result = $service->getPayment($settings->steadfast_api_key, $settings->steadfast_secret_key, $paymentId);\\n+\\n+        return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    public function steadfastPoliceStations(): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! Success: {$successCount}, Failed: {$failedCount}\\\",\\n@@\\n         ], $successCount > 0 ? 200 : 422);\\n     }\\n+\\n+    private function bookSteadfastBulk(array $orders, array $data): JsonResponse\\n+    {\\n+        $settings = $this->getSteadfastSettings();\\n+        if (! $settings) {\\n+            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast credentials not configured.'], 422);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $service = new SteadfastService();\\n+        $items = array_map(function (Order $order) use ($data, $service) {\\n+            return $service->formatBulkItem([\\n+                'invoice'           => $order->order_number,\\n+                'recipient_name'    => $order->customer_name ?? $order->customer_phone,\\n+                'recipient_phone'   => $order->customer_phone,\\n+                'recipient_address' => $order->customer_address ?? trim(implode(', ', array_filter([$order->customer_district, $order->customer_thana, $order->customer_area]))),\\n+                'cod_amount'        => $order->total,\\n+                'note'              => $data['note'] ?? $order->notes ??   createReturn: \\\"রিটার্ন রিকোয়েস্ট তৈরি\\\",\\n+    identifier: \\\"Consignment / Invoice / Tracking\\\",\\n+    reason: \\\"কারণ (ঐচ্ছিক)\\\",\\n+    createBtn: \\\"রিকোয়েস্ট পাঠান\\\",\\n+ searchPolice: \\\"থানা/স্টেশন সার্চ\\\",\\n+  },\\n+  en: {\\n+    pageTitle: \\\"Steadfast Control Center\\\",\\n+    subtitle: \\\"Balance, tracking, return, payment and police station tools for  lookupBy: \\\"Lookup by\\\",\\n+    consignment: \\\"Consignment ID\\\",\\n+    invoice: \\\"Invoice\\\",\\n+    tracking: \\\"Tracking Code\\\",\\n+    lookupValue: \\\"Lookup value\\\",\\n+    lookupBtn: \\\"Check status\\\",\\n+    checking: \\\"Checking...\\\",\\n+    noResult: \\\"No result found.\\\",\\n+    deliveryStatus: \\\"Delivery Status\\\",\\n+    createReturn: \\\"Create Return Request\\\",\\n+    identifier: \\\"Consignment / Invoice / Tracking\\\",\\n+    reason: \\\"Reason (optional)\\\",\\n+    createBtn: \\\"Submit request\\\",\\n+    creating: \\\"Submitting...\\\",\\n+    returnRequests: \\\"Return Requests\\\",\\n+    payments: \\\"Payments\\\",\\n+    paymentId: \\\"Payment ID\\\",\\n+    fetchPayment: \\\"View details\\\",\\n+    policeStations: \\\"Police Stations\\\",\\n+    search: \\\"Search\\\",\\n+    noData: \\\"No data found.\\\",\\n+    messageLoadError: \\\"Failed to load data.\\\",\\n+    successReturn: \\\"Return request submitted.\\\",\\n+    details: \\\"Details\\\",\\n+    amount: \\\"Amount\\\",\\n+    status: \\\"Status\\\",\\n+    createdAt: \\\"Created\\\",\\n+    searchPolice: \\\"Search police station\\\",\\n+  },\\n+};\\n+\\n+type TabKey = \\\"overview\\\" | \\\"returns\\\" | \\\"payments\\\" | \\\"police\\\";\\n+type LookupMode = \\\"consignment\\\" | \\\"invoice\\\" | \\\"tracking\\\";\\n+\\n+function getListData(data: unknown): unknown[] {\\n+  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\\n+  if (data && typeof data === \\\"object\\\") {\\n+    const record = data as Record<string, unknown>;\\n+    if (Array.isArray(record.data)) return record.data;\\n+    if (Array.isArray(record.items)) return record.items;\\n+  }\\n+  return [];\\n+}\\n+\\n+function stringify(value: unknown): string {\\n+  if (value === null || value === undefined) return \\\"—\\\";\\n+  if (typeof value === \\\"object\\\") return JSON.stringify(value);\\n+  return String(value);\\n+}\\n+\\n+export default function Page() {\\n+  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\\n+  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\\n+  const token = getStoredToken();\\n+\\n+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\\\"overview\\\");\\n+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\n+  const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"error\\\"; text: string } | null>(null);\\n+\\n+  const [balance, setBalance] = useState<number | null>(null);\\n+  const [lookupMode, setLookupMode] = useState<LookupMode>(\\\"consignment\\\");\\n+  const [lookupValue, setLookupValue] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n+  const [lookupLoading, setLookupLoading] = useState(false);\\n+  const [lookupResult,
