useState(\\\"\\\");\\n+  const [creatingReturn, setCreatingReturn] = useState(false);\\n+  const [returnRequests, setReturnRequests] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\\n+\\n+  const [payments, setPayments] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\\n+  const [paymentLookupId, setPaymentLookupId] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n+  const [paymentDetails, setPaymentDetails] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);\\n+  const [paymentLoading, setPaymentLoading] = useState(false);\\n+\\n+  const [policeStations, setPoliceStations] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\\n+  const [policeSearch, setPoliceSearch] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n+\\n+  const fetchBalance = useCallback(async () => {\\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/balance`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+    const d = await res.json();\\n+    if (res.ok && d.success) {\\n+      setBalance(Number(d.data?.current_balance ?? 0));\\n+    } else {\\n+      throw new Error(d.message ?? txt.messageLoadError);\\n+    }\\n+  }, [token, txt.messageLoadError]);\\n+\\n+  const fetchReturnRequests = useCallback(async () => {\\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/return-requests`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+    const d = await res.json();\\n+    if (res.ok) setReturnRequests(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\\n+  }, [token]);\\n+\\n+  const fetchPayments = useCallback(async () => {\\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/payments`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+    const d = await res.json();\\n+    if (res.ok) setPayments(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\\n+  }, [token]);\\n+\\n+  const fetchPoliceStations = useCallback(async () => {\\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/police-stations`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+    const d = await res.json();\\n+    if (res.ok) setPoliceStations(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\\n+  }, [token]);\\n+\\n+  const refreshAll = useCallback(async () => {\\n+    setLoading(true);\\n+    setMessage(null);\\n+    try {\\n+      await Promise.all([fetchBalance(), fetchReturnRequests(), fetchPayments(), fetchPoliceStations()]);\\n+    } catch (error) {\\n+      setMessage({ type: \\\"error\\\", text: error instanceof Error ? error.message : txt.messageLoadError });\\n+    } finally {\\n+      setLoading(false);\\n+    }\\n+  }, [fetchBalance, fetchPayments, fetchPoliceStations, fetchReturnRequests, txt.messageLoadError]);\\n+\\n+  useEffect(() => { void refreshAll(); }, [refreshAll]);\\n+\\n+  const handleLookup = async () => {\\n+    if (!lookupValue.trim()) return;\\n+    setLookupLoading(true);\\n+    setLookupResult(null);\\n+    setMessage(null);\\n+    try {\\n+      const path = lookupMode === \\\"consignment\\\"\\n+        ? `consignment/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`\\n+        : lookupMode === \\\"invoice\\\"\\n+          ? `invoice/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`\\n+          : `tracking/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`;\\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/status/${path}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+      const d = await res.json();\\n+      if (res.ok && d.success) {\\n+        setLookupResult((d.data ?? null) as Record<string, unknown> | null);\\n+      } else {\\n+        setMessage({ type: \\\"error\\\", text: d.message ?? txt.noResult });\\n+      }\\n+    } finally {\\n+      setLookupLoading(false);\\n+    }\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const handleCreateReturn = async () => {\\n+    if (!returnIdentifier.trim()) return;\\n+    setCreatingReturn(true);\\n+    setMessage(null);\\n+    try {\\n+      const identifier = returnIdentifier.trim();\\n+      const payload: Record<string, unknown> = { reason: returnReason.trim() || undefined };\\n+      if (/^\\\\d+$/.test(identifier)) {\\n+        payload.consignment_id = identifier;\\n+      } else if (/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/.test(identifier) && identifier.toLowerCase().includes(\\\"tp\\\")) {\\n+        payload.tracking_code = identifier;\\n+      } else {\\n+        payload.invoice = identifier;\\n+      }\\n+\\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/return-requests`, {\\n+        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n+        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\\n+        body: JSON.stringify(payload),\\n+      });\\n+      const d = await res.json();\\n+      if (res.ok && d.success) {\\n+        setMessage({ type: \\\"success\\\", text: d.message ?? txt.successReturn });\\n+        setReturnIdentifier(\\\"\\\");\\n+        setReturnReason(\\\"\\\");\\n+        void fetchReturnRequests();\\n+      } else {\\n+        setMessage({ type: \\\"error\\\", text: d.message ?? txt.messageLoadError });\\n+      }\\n+    } finally {\\n+      setCreatingReturn(false);\\n+    }\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const handleFetchPayment = async () => {\\n+    if (!paymentLookupId.trim()) return;\\n+    setPaymentLoading(true);\\n+    setPaymentDetails(null);\\n+    try {\\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/payments/${encodeURIComponent(paymentLookupId.trim())}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\\n+      const d = await res.json();\\n+      if (res.ok) setPaymentDetails((d.data ?? null) as Record<string, unknown> | null);\\n+    } finally {\\n+      setPaymentLoading(false);\\n+    }\\n+  };\\n+\\n+  const filteredPolice = policeStations.filter(item => stringify(item.name ?? item.station_name ?? item.thana_name ?? item.bn_name).toLowerCase().includes(policeSearch.toLowerCase()));\\n+\\n+  return (\\n+    <UserShell activeKey=\\\"courier-perf\\\" defaultExpandedKey=\\\"courier\\\" pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\\n+      <div className=\\\"mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-3 catv-panel p-4\\\">\\n+        <div>\\n+          <h2 className=\\\"text-lg font-bold\\\">{txt.pageTitle}</h2>\\n+          <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.subtitle}</p>\\n+        </div>\\n+        <button onClick={() => void refreshAll()} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\">{txt.refresh}</button>\\n+      </div>\\n+\\n+      {message && (\\n+        <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm ${message.type === \\\"success\\\" ? \\\"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\\\" : \\\"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\\\"}`}>\\n+          {message.text}\\n+        </div>\\n+      )}\\n+\\n+      <div className=\\\"mb-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:grid-cols-4\\\">\\n+        {([\\\"overview\\\", \\\"returns\\\", \\\"payments\\\", \\\"police\\\"] as const).map(tab => (\\n+          <button key={tab} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)} className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold ${activeTab === tab ? \\\"bg-[var(--accent)] text-white\\\" : \\\"catv-panel hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\\\"}`}>\\n+            {txt.tabs[tab]}\\n+          </button>\\n+        ))}\\n+      </div>\\n+\\n+      {loading ? (\\n+        <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-8 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.loading}</div>\\n+      ) : (\\n+        <div className=\\\"grid gap-4\\\">\\n+          {activeTab === \\\"overview\\\" && (\\n+            <>\\n+              <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\\\">\\n+                <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                  <p className=\\\"text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.currentBalance}</p>\\n+                  <p className=\\\"mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-400\\\">৳{balance?.toLocaleString() ?? \\\"0\\\"}</p>\\n+                </div>\\n+                <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                  <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.statusLookup}</h3>\\n+                  <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n+                    <label>\\n+                      <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.lookupBy}</span>\\n+                      <select value={lookupMode} onChange={e => setLookupMode(e.target.value as LookupMode)} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\">\\n+                        <option value=\\\"consignment\\\">{txt.consignment}</option>\\n+                        <option value=\\\"invoice\\\">{txt.invoice}</option>\\n+                        <option value=\\\"tracking\\\">{txt.tracking}</option>\\n+                      </select>\\n+                    </label>\\n+                    <label>\\n+                      <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.lookupValue}</span>\\n+                      <input value={lookupValue} onChange={e => setLookupValue(e.target.value)} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\" />\\n+                    </label>\\n+                    <div className=\\\"flex justify-end\\\">\\n+                      <button onClick={() => void handleLookup()} disabled={lookupLoading || !lookupValue.trim()} className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n+                        {lookupLoading ? className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2\\\">\\n+                        <p className=\\\"text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{key.replace(/_/g, \\\" \\\")}</p>\\n+                        <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-sm\\\">{stringify(value)}</p>\\n+                      </div>\\n+                    ))}\\n+                  </div>\\n+                ) : (\\n+                  <p className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noResult}</p>\\n+                )}\\n+              </div>\\n+            </>\\n+          )}\\n+\\n+          {activeTab === \\\"returns\\\" && (\\n+            <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[420px,1fr]\\\">\\n+              <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.createReturn}</h3>\\n+                <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n+                  <label>\\n+                    <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.identifier}</span>\\n+                    <input value={returnIdentifier} onChange={e => setReturnIdentifier(e.target.value)} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\" />\\n+                  </label>\\n+                  <label>\\n+                    <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.reason}</span>\\n+                    <textarea value={returnReason} onChange={e => setReturnReason(e.target.value)} rows={3} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm resize-none\\\" />\\n+                  </label>\\n+                  <button onClick={() => void handleCreateReturn()} disabled={creatingReturn || !returnIdentifier.trim()} className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n+                    {creatingReturn ? txt.creating : txt.createBtn}\\n+                  </button>\\n+                </div>\\n+              </div>\\n+              <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.returnRequests}</h3>\\n+                {returnRequests.length === 0 ? (\\n+                  <p className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noData}</p>\\n+                ) : (\\n+                  <div className=\\\"grid gap-2\\\">\\n+                    {returnRequests.map((item, idx) => (\\n+                      <div key={idx} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-3\\\">\\n+                        <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2\\\">\\n+                          <p className=\\\"font-medium\\\">#{stringify(item.id ?? item.consignment_id ?? item.invoice)}</p>\\n+                          <span className=\\\"rounded-full bg-[var(--surface-soft)] px-2 py-0.5 text-xs\\\">{stringify(item.status)}</span>\\n+                        </div>\\n+                        <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{stringify(item.reason)}</p>\\n+                        <p className=\\\"mt-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.createdAt}: {stringify(item.created_at)}</p>\\n+                      </div>\\n+                    ))}\\n+                  </div>\\n+                )}\\n+              </div>\\n+            </div>\\n+          )}\\n+\\n+          {activeTab === \\\"payments\\\" && (\\n+            <div className=\\\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[420px,1fr]\\\">\\n+              <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.fetchPayment}</h3>\\n+                <div className=\\\"grid gap-3\\\">\\n+                  <label>\\n+                    <span className=\\\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.paymentId}</span>\\n+                    <input value={paymentLookupId} onChange={e => setPaymentLookupId(e.target.value)} className=\\\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\" />\\n+                  </label>\\n+                  <button onClick={() => void handleFetchPayment()} disabled={paymentLoading || !paymentLookupId.trim()} className=\\\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\\\">\\n+                    {paymentLoading ? txt.loading : txt.fetchPayment}\\n+                  </button>\\n+                  {paymentDetails && (\\n+                    <div className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] p-3 text-sm\\\">\\n+                      {Object.entries(paymentDetails).slice(0, 12).map(([key, value]) => (\\n+                        <p key={key}><span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{key}:</span> {stringify(value)}</p>\\n+                      ))}\\n+                    </div>\\n+                  )}\\n+                </div>\\n+              </div>\\n+              <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+                <h3 className=\\\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.payments}</h3>\\n+                {payments.length === 0 ? (\\n+                  <p className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noData}</p>\\n+                ) : (\\n+                  <div className=\\\"overflow-x-auto\\\">\\n+                    <table className=\\\"w-full text-sm\\\">\\n+                      <thead>\\n+                        <tr className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\\\">\\n+                          <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{txt.paymentId}</th>\\n+                          <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{txt.amount}</th>\\n+                          <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{txt.status}</th>\\n+                          <th className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{txt.createdAt}</th>\\n+                        </tr>\\n+                      </thead>\\n+                      <tbody>\\n+                        {payments.map((item, idx) => (\\n+                          <tr key={idx} className=\\\"border-b border-[var(--border)]\\\">\\n+                            <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{stringify(item.id ?? item.payment_id)}</td>\\n+                            <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{stringify(item.amount ?? item.total_amount ?? item.payable_amount)}</td>\\n+                            <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{stringify(item.status)}</td>\\n+                            <td className=\\\"px-3 py-2\\\">{stringify(item.created_at)}</td>\\n+                          </tr>\\n+                        ))}\\n+                      </tbody>\\n+                    </table>\\n+                  </div>\\n+                )}\\n+              </div>\\n+            </div>\\n+          )}\\n+\\n+          {activeTab === \\\"police\\\" && (\\n+            <div className=\\\"catv-panel p-5\\\">\\n+              <div className=\\\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\\\">\\n+                <h3 className=\\\"text-sm font-semibold\\\">{txt.policeStations}</h3>\\n+                <input value={policeSearch} onChange={e => setPoliceSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder={txt.searchPolice} className=\\\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\\\" />\\n+              </div>\\n+              {filteredPolice.length === 0 ? (\\n+                <p className=\\\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{txt.noData}</p>\\n+              ) : (\\n+                <div className=\\\"grid gap-2 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3\\\">\\n+                  {filteredPolice.map((item, idx) => (\\n+                    <div key={idx} className=\\\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-3\\\">\\n+                      {Object.entries(item).slice(0, 6).map(([key, value]) => (\\n+                        <p key={key} className=\\\"text-sm\\\"><span className=\\\"text-[var(--muted)]\\\">{key}:</span> {stringify(value)}</p>\\n+                      ))}\\n+                    </div>\\n+                  ))}\\n+                </div>\\n+              )}\\n+            </div>\\n+          )}\\n+        </div>\\n+      )}\\n+    </UserShell>\\n+  );\\n+}\\n*** End Patch\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":""},"id":"1a4adccd-f185-4204-80ed-9e549b8f34f9","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:59:00.621Z","parentId":"265c3c2f-9938-4580-ac1d-0931a5dd0f5c"}

\"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n-\n-export default function Page() {\n-  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n-\n-  return (\n-    <UserShell\n-      activeKey=\"courier-perf\"\n-      defaultExpandedKey=\"courier\"\n-      pageTitle={{ bn: \"কুরিয়ার পারফরমেন্স\", en: \"Courier Performance\" }}\n-    >\n-      <ModulePlaceholder\n-        icon=\"📈\"\n-        titleBn=\"কুরিয়ার পারফরমেন্স\"\n-        titleEn=\"Courier Performance\"\n-        descBn=\"এলাকাভিত্তিক ডেলিভারি সাফল্যের হার, রিটার্ন রেট এবং সেরা কুরিয়ার সাজেশন।\"\n-        descEn=\"Area-wise delivery success rate, return rate and best courier suggestions.\"\n-        phase=\"Phase 2\"\n-        locale={locale}\n-      />\n-    </UserShell>\n-  );\n-}\n+\"use client\";\n+\n+import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n+import UserShell from \"@/components/user-shell\";\n+import { getStoredLocale, getStoredToken, type Locale } from \"@/lib/dashboard-client\";\n+\n+const API = (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL ?? \"/api\").replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n+\n+const t = {\n+  bn: {\n+    pageTitle: \"Steadfast কন্ট্রোল সেন্টার\",\n+    subtitle: \"Steadfast Courier এর balance, tracking, return, payment ও police station tools এক জায়গায়।\",\n+    loading: \"লোড হচ্ছে...\",\n+    refresh: \"রিফ্রেশ\",\n+    tabs: {\n+      overview: \"Overview\",\n+      returns: \"Return Requests\",\n+      payments: \"Payments\",\n+      police: \"Police Stations\",\n+    },\n+    currentBalance: \"বর্তমান ব্যালেন্স\",\n+    statusLookup: \"Status Lookup\",\n+    lookupBy: \"যে মাধ্যমে খুঁজবেন\",\n+    consignment: \"Consignment ID\",\n+    invoice: \"Invoice\",\n+    tracking: \"Tracking Code\",\n+    lookupValue: \"Lookup value\",\n+    lookupBtn: \"স্ট্যাটাস দেখুন\",\n+    checking: \"চেক হচ্ছে...\",\n+    noResult: \"কোনো রেজাল্ট পাওয়া যায়নি।\",\n+    deliveryStatus: \"ডেলিভারি স্ট্যাটাস\",\n+    createReturn: \"রিটার্ন রিকোয়েস্ট তৈরি\",\n+    identifier: \"Consignment / Invoice / Tracking\",\n+    reason: \"কারণ (ঐচ্ছিক)\",\n+    createBtn: \"রিকোয়েস্ট পাঠান\",\n+    creating: \"পাঠানো হচ্ছে...\",\n+    returnRequests: \"রিটার্ন রিকোয়েস্ট লিস্ট\",\n+    payments: \"পেমেন্ট লিস্ট\",\n+    paymentId: \"Payment ID\",\n+    fetchPayment: \"ডিটেইল দেখুন\",\n+    policeStations: \"Police Stations\",\n+    search: \"সার্চ\",\n+    noData: \"কোনো ডাটা নেই।\",\n+    messageLoadError: \"ডাটা লোড করা যায়নি।\",\n+    successReturn: \"রিটার্ন রিকোয়েস্ট পাঠানো হয়েছে।\",\n+    details: \"বিস্তারিত\",\n+    amount: \"Amount\",\n+    status: \"Status\",\n+    createdAt: \"Created\",\n+    searchPolice: \"থানা/স্টেশন সার্চ\",\n+  },\n+  en: {\n+    pageTitle: \"Steadfast Control Center\",\n+    subtitle: \"Balance, tracking, return, payment and police station tools for Steadfast Courier in one place.\",\n+    loading: \"Loading...\",\n+    refresh: \"Refresh\",\n+    tabs: {\n+      overview: \"Overview\",\n+      returns: \"Return Requests\",\n+      payments: \"Payments\",\n+      police: \"Police Stations\",\n+    },\n+    currentBalance: \"Current Balance\",\n+    statusLookup: \"Status Lookup\",\n+    lookupBy: \"Lookup by\",\n+    consignment: \"Consignment ID\",\n+    invoice: \"Invoice\",\n+    tracking: \"Tracking Code\",\n+    lookupValue: \"Lookup value\",\n+    lookupBtn: \"Check status\",\n+    checking: \"Checking...\",\n+    noResult: \"No result found.\",\n+    deliveryStatus: \"Delivery Status\",\n+    createReturn: \"Create Return Request\",\n+    identifier: \"Consignment / Invoice / Tracking\",\n+    reason: \"Reason (optional)\",\n+    createBtn: \"Submit request\",\n+    creating: \"Submitting...\",\n+    returnRequests: \"Return Requests\",\n+    payments: \"Payments\",\n+    paymentId: \"Payment ID\",\n+    fetchPayment: \"View details\",\n+    policeStations: \"Police Stations\",\n+    search: \"Search\",\n+    noData: \"No data found.\",\n+    messageLoadError: \"Failed to load data.\",\n+    successReturn: \"Return request submitted.\",\n+    details: \"Details\",\n+    amount: \"Amount\",\n+    status: \"Status\",\n+    createdAt: \"Created\",\n+    searchPolice: \"Search police station\",\n+  },\n+};\n+\n+type TabKey = \"overview\" | \"returns\" | \"payments\" | \"police\";\n+type LookupMode = \"consignment\" | \"invoice\" | \"tracking\";\n+\n+function getListData(data: unknown): unknown[] {\n+  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\n+  if (data && typeof data === \"object\") {\n+    const record = data as Record<string, unknown>;\n+    if (Array.isArray(record.data)) return record.data;\n+    if (Array.isArray(record.items)) return record.items;\n+  }\n+  return [];\n+}\n+\n+function stringify(value: unknown): string {\n+  if (value === null || value === undefined) return \"—\";\n+  if (typeof value === \"object\") return JSON.stringify(value);\n+  return String(value);\n+}\n+\n+export default function Page() {\n+  const [locale] = useState<Locale>(getStoredLocale);\n+  const txt = useMemo(() => t[locale], [locale]);\n+  const token = getStoredToken();\n+\n+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"overview\");\n+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n+  const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: \"success\" | \"error\"; text: string } | null>(null);\n+\n+  const [balance, setBalance] = useState<number | null>(null);\n+  const [lookupMode, setLookupMode] = useState<LookupMode>(\"consignment\");\n+  const [lookupValue, setLookupValue] = useState(\"\");\n+  const [lookupLoading, setLookupLoading] = useState(false);\n+  const [lookupResult, setLookupResult] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);\n+\n+  const [returnIdentifier, setReturnIdentifier] = useState(\"\");\n+  const [returnReason, setReturnReason] = useState(\"\");\n+  const [creatingReturn, setCreatingReturn] = useState(false);\n+  const [returnRequests, setReturnRequests] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\n+\n+  const [payments, setPayments] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\n+  const [paymentLookupId, setPaymentLookupId] = useState(\"\");\n+  const [paymentDetails, setPaymentDetails] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);\n+  const [paymentLoading, setPaymentLoading] = useState(false);\n+\n+  const [policeStations, setPoliceStations] = useState<Record<string, unknown>[]>([]);\n+  const [policeSearch, setPoliceSearch] = useState(\"\");\n+\n+  const fetchBalance = useCallback(async () => {\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/balance`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+    const d = await res.json();\n+    if (res.ok && d.success) {\n+      setBalance(Number(d.data?.current_balance ?? 0));\n+    } else {\n+      throw new Error(d.message ?? txt.messageLoadError);\n+    }\n+  }, [token, txt.messageLoadError]);\n+\n+  const fetchReturnRequests = useCallback(async () => {\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/return-requests`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+    const d = await res.json();\n+    if (res.ok) setReturnRequests(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\n+  }, [token]);\n+\n+  const fetchPayments = useCallback(async () => {\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/payments`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+    const d = await res.json();\n+    if (res.ok) setPayments(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\n+  }, [token]);\n+\n+  const fetchPoliceStations = useCallback(async () => {\n+    const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/police-stations`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+    const d = await res.json();\n+    if (res.ok) setPoliceStations(getListData(d.data) as Record<string, unknown>[]);\n+  }, [token]);\n+\n+  const refreshAll = useCallback(async () => {\n+    setLoading(true);\n+    setMessage(null);\n+    try {\n+      await Promise.all([fetchBalance(), fetchReturnRequests(), fetchPayments(), fetchPoliceStations()]);\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      setMessage({ type: \"error\", text: error instanceof Error ? error.message : txt.messageLoadError });\n+    } finally {\n+      setLoading(false);\n+    }\n+  }, [fetchBalance, fetchPayments, fetchPoliceStations, fetchReturnRequests, txt.messageLoadError]);\n+\n+  useEffect(() => { void refreshAll(); }, [refreshAll]);\n+\n+  const handleLookup = async () => {\n+    if (!lookupValue.trim()) return;\n+    setLookupLoading(true);\n+    setLookupResult(null);\n+    setMessage(null);\n+    try {\n+      const path = lookupMode === \"consignment\"\n+        ? `consignment/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`\n+        : lookupMode === \"invoice\"\n+          ? `invoice/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`\n+          : `tracking/${encodeURIComponent(lookupValue.trim())}`;\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/status/${path}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+      const d = await res.json();\n+      if (res.ok && d.success) {\n+        setLookupResult((d.data ?? null) as Record<string, unknown> | null);\n+      } else {\n+        setMessage({ type: \"error\", text: d.message ?? txt.noResult });\n+      }\n+    } finally {\n+      setLookupLoading(false);\n+    }\n+  };\n+\n+  const handleCreateReturn = async () => {\n+    if (!returnIdentifier.trim()) return;\n+    setCreatingReturn(true);\n+    setMessage(null);\n+    try {\n+      const identifier = returnIdentifier.trim();\n+      const payload: Record<string, unknown> = { reason: returnReason.trim() || undefined };\n+      if (/^\\d+$/.test(identifier)) {\n+        payload.consignment_id = identifier;\n+      } else if (/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/.test(identifier) && identifier.toLowerCase().includes(\"tp\")) {\n+        payload.tracking_code = identifier;\n+      } else {\n+        payload.invoice = identifier;\n+      }\n+\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/return-requests`, {\n+        method: \"POST\",\n+        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n+        body: JSON.stringify(payload),\n+      });\n+      const d = await res.json();\n+      if (res.ok && d.success) {\n+        setMessage({ type: \"success\", text: d.message ?? txt.successReturn });\n+        setReturnIdentifier(\"\");\n+        setReturnReason(\"\");\n+        void fetchReturnRequests();\n+      } else {\n+        setMessage({ type: \"error\", text: d.message ?? txt.messageLoadError });\n+      }\n+    } finally {\n+      setCreatingReturn(false);\n+    }\n+  };\n+\n+  const handleFetchPayment = async () => {\n+    if (!paymentLookupId.trim()) return;\n+    setPaymentLoading(true);\n+    setPaymentDetails(null);\n+    try {\n+      const res = await fetch(`${API}/courier/steadfast/payments/${encodeURIComponent(paymentLookupId.trim())}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n+      const d = await res.json();\n+      if (res.ok) setPaymentDetails((d.data ?? null) as Record<string, unknown> | null);\n+    } finally {\n+      setPaymentLoading(false);\n+    }\n+  };\n+\n+  const filteredPolice = policeStations.filter(item => stringify(item.name ?? item.station_name ?? item.thana_name ?? item.bn_name).toLowerCase().includes(policeSearch.toLowerCase()));\n+\n+  return (\n+    <UserShell activeKey=\"courier-perf\" defaultExpandedKey=\"courier\" pageTitle={{ bn: t.bn.pageTitle, en: t.en.pageTitle }}>\n+      <div className=\"mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-3 catv-panel p-4\">\n+        <div>\n+          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold\">{txt.pageTitle}</h2>\n+          <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.subtitle}</p>\n+        </div>\n+        <button onClick={() => void refreshAll()} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\">{txt.refresh}</button>\n+      </div>\n+\n+      {message && (\n+        <div className={`mb-4 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm ${message.type === \"success\" ? \"bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400\" : \"bg-red-500/10 text-red-400\"}`}>\n+          {message.text}\n+        </div>\n+      )}\n+\n+      <div className=\"mb-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:grid-cols-4\">\n+        {([\"overview\", \"returns\", \"payments\", \"police\"] as const).map(tab => (\n+          <button key={tab} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)} className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold ${activeTab === tab ? \"bg-[var(--accent)] text-white\" : \"catv-panel hover:bg-[var(--surface-soft)]\"}`}>\n+            {txt.tabs[tab]}\n+          </button>\n+        ))}\n+      </div>\n+\n+      {loading ? (\n+        <div className=\"catv-panel p-8 text-center text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.loading}</div>\n+      ) : (\n+        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n+          {activeTab === \"overview\" && (\n+            <>\n+              <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n+                <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                  <p className=\"text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.currentBalance}</p>\n+                  <p className=\"mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-400\">৳{balance?.toLocaleString() ?? \"0\"}</p>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                  <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.statusLookup}</h3>\n+                  <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n+                    <label>\n+                      <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.lookupBy}</span>\n+                      <select value={lookupMode} onChange={e => setLookupMode(e.target.value as LookupMode)} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n+                        <option value=\"consignment\">{txt.consignment}</option>\n+                        <option value=\"invoice\">{txt.invoice}</option>\n+                        <option value=\"tracking\">{txt.tracking}</option>\n+                      </select>\n+                    </label>\n+                    <label>\n+                      <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.lookupValue}</span>\n+                      <input value={lookupValue} onChange={e => setLookupValue(e.target.value)} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\" />\n+                    </label>\n+                    <div className=\"flex justify-end\">\n+                      <button onClick={() => void handleLookup()} disabled={lookupLoading || !lookupValue.trim()} className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n+                        {lookupLoading ? txt.checking : txt.lookupBtn}\n+                      </button>\n+                    </div>\n+                  </div>\n+                </div>\n+              </div>\n+\n+              <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.details}</h3>\n+                {lookupResult ? (\n+                  <div className=\"grid gap-2 sm:grid-cols-2\">\n+                    {Object.entries(lookupResult).map(([key, value]) => (\n+                      <div key={key} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-2\">\n+                        <p className=\"text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\">{key.replace(/_/g, \" \")}</p>\n+                        <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm\">{stringify(value)}</p>\n+                      </div>\n+                    ))}\n+                  </div>\n+                ) : (\n+                  <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noResult}</p>\n+                )}\n+              </div>\n+            </>\n+          )}\n+\n+          {activeTab === \"returns\" && (\n+            <div className=\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[420px,1fr]\">\n+              <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.createReturn}</h3>\n+                <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n+                  <label>\n+                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.identifier}</span>\n+                    <input value={returnIdentifier} onChange={e => setReturnIdentifier(e.target.value)} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\" />\n+                  </label>\n+                  <label>\n+                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.reason}</span>\n+                    <textarea value={returnReason} onChange={e => setReturnReason(e.target.value)} rows={3} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm resize-none\" />\n+                  </label>\n+                  <button onClick={() => void handleCreateReturn()} disabled={creatingReturn || !returnIdentifier.trim()} className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n+                    {creatingReturn ? txt.creating : txt.createBtn}\n+                  </button>\n+                </div>\n+              </div>\n+              <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.returnRequests}</h3>\n+                {returnRequests.length === 0 ? (\n+                  <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noData}</p>\n+                ) : (\n+                  <div className=\"grid gap-2\">\n+                    {returnRequests.map((item, idx) => (\n+                      <div key={idx} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-3\">\n+                        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2\">\n+                          <p className=\"font-medium\">#{stringify(item.id ?? item.consignment_id ?? item.invoice)}</p>\n+                          <span className=\"rounded-full bg-[var(--surface-soft)] px-2 py-0.5 text-xs\">{stringify(item.status)}</span>\n+                        </div>\n+                        <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{stringify(item.reason)}</p>\n+                        <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.createdAt}: {stringify(item.created_at)}</p>\n+                      </div>\n+                    ))}\n+                  </div>\n+                )}\n+              </div>\n+            </div>\n+          )}\n+\n+          {activeTab === \"payments\" && (\n+            <div className=\"grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[420px,1fr]\">\n+              <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.fetchPayment}</h3>\n+                <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n+                  <label>\n+                    <span className=\"mb-1 block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.paymentId}</span>\n+                    <input value={paymentLookupId} onChange={e => setPaymentLookupId(e.target.value)} className=\"w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\" />\n+                  </label>\n+                  <button onClick={() => void handleFetchPayment()} disabled={paymentLoading || !paymentLookupId.trim()} className=\"rounded-xl bg-[var(--accent)] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white disabled:opacity-60\">\n+                    {paymentLoading ? txt.loading : txt.fetchPayment}\n+                  </button>\n+                  {paymentDetails && (\n+                    <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] p-3 text-sm\">\n+                      {Object.entries(paymentDetails).slice(0, 12).map(([key, value]) => (\n+                        <p key={key}><span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{key}:</span> {stringify(value)}</p>\n+                      ))}\n+                    </div>\n+                  )}\n+                </div>\n+              </div>\n+              <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+                <h3 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.payments}</h3>\n+                {payments.length === 0 ? (\n+                  <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noData}</p>\n+                ) : (\n+                  <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n+                    <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\n+                      <thead>\n+                        <tr className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)] text-left text-xs uppercase text-[var(--muted)]\">\n+                          <th className=\"px-3 py-2\">{txt.paymentId}</th>\n+                          <th className=\"px-3 py-2\">{txt.amount}</th>\n+                          <th className=\"px-3 py-2\">{txt.status}</th>\n+                          <th className=\"px-3 py-2\">{txt.createdAt}</th>\n+                        </tr>\n+                      </thead>\n+                      <tbody>\n+                        {payments.map((item, idx) => (\n+                          <tr key={idx} className=\"border-b border-[var(--border)]\">\n+                            <td className=\"px-3 py-2\">{stringify(item.id ?? item.payment_id)}</td>\n+                            <td className=\"px-3 py-2\">{stringify(item.amount ?? item.total_amount ?? item.payable_amount)}</td>\n+                            <td className=\"px-3 py-2\">{stringify(item.status)}</td>\n+                            <td className=\"px-3 py-2\">{stringify(item.created_at)}</td>\n+                          </tr>\n+                        ))}\n+                      </tbody>\n+                    </table>\n+                  </div>\n+                )}\n+              </div>\n+            </div>\n+          )}\n+\n+          {activeTab === \"police\" && (\n+            <div className=\"catv-panel p-5\">\n+              <div className=\"mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3\">\n+                <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{txt.policeStations}</h3>\n+                <input value={policeSearch} onChange={e => setPoliceSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder={txt.searchPolice} className=\"w-full max-w-sm rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--background)] px-3 py-2 text-sm\" />\n+              </div>\n+              {filteredPolice.length === 0 ? (\n+                <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">{txt.noData}</p>\n+              ) : (\n+                <div className=\"grid gap-2 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3\">\n+                  {filteredPolice.map((item, idx) => (\n+                    <div key={idx} className=\"rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] px-3 py-3\">\n+                      {Object.entries(item).slice(0, 6).map(([key, value]) => (\n+                        <p key={key} className=\"text-sm\"><span className=\"text-[var(--muted)]\">{key}:</span> {stringify(value)}</p>\n+                      ))}\n+                    </div>\n+                  ))}\n+                </div>\n+              )}\n+            </div>\n+          )}\n+        </div>\n+      )}\n+    </UserShell>\n+  );\n+}\n*** End Patch"}},"id":"4d030f14-aa43-46a3-867e-300179f08778","timestamp":"2026-05-03T10:59:01.303Z","parentId":"3631f99b-ab28-4f70-8455-6f0221804473"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"e93a9cb7-ef1c-49aa-b686-340a4e7fda4b","content":"Doc coverage আর implementation মিলিয়ে নিতে আমি raw doc text টেনে endpoint/feature names বের করছি, যাতে কিছু লুকিয়ে না থাকে।","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_rZJE40vsR48AbAYCs0hUNiMN","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"set -e\\ncd /tmp\\ncurl -L --silent 'https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub?embedded=true' > steadfast_doc.html\\npython3 - <<'PY'\\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\\nhtml=open('/tmp/steadfast_doc.html','r',encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore').read()\\nsoup=BeautifulSoup(html,'html.parser')\\ntext='\\\\n'.join(s.strip() for s in soup.stripped_strings)\\nfor key in ['create_order','bulk-order','status_by_cid','status_by_invoice','status_by_trackingcode','get_balance','create_return_request','get_return_request','get_return_requests','payments','police_stations']:\\n    print('---', key, '---')\\n    idx=text.find(key)\\n    print(text[max(0,idx-180):idx+240] if idx!=-1 else 'NOT FOUND')\\nPY\",\"explanation\":\"Parse published Steadfast doc HTML and inspect documented endpoint names for full feature coverage\",\"goal\":\"Verify Steadfast feature list\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}],"reasoningText":"**Inspecting manual search options**\n\nI'm considering whether a manual police search might be necessary, so I think fetching the document with better extraction could be helpful. I should take a closer look at the document to see if it contains any specific endpoints. I might want to use tools like curl and grep to check for relevant keywords. Let's explore those options to ensure I can gather the right information effectively!"},"id":"c1b62a5b-dde8-4c9f-9814-d8e7cdbd0430","timestamp":"2026-05-03T11:09:49.554Z","parentId":"e8d80c32-c3bf-4026-8901-2e4bfaa9021d"}

{"type":"tool.execution_start","data":{"toolCallId":"call_rZJE40vsR48AbAYCs0hUNiMN","toolName":"run_in_terminal","arguments":{"command":"set -e\ncd /tmp\ncurl -L --silent 'https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTi0sTyR353xu1AK0nR8E_WKe5onCkUXGEf8ch8uoJy9qxGfgGnboSIkNosjQ0OOdXkJhgGuAsWxnIh/pub?embedded=true' > steadfast_doc.html\npython3 - <<'PY'\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\nhtml=open('/tmp/steadfast_doc.html','r',encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore').read()\nsoup=BeautifulSoup(html,'html.parser')\ntext='\\n'.join(s.strip() for s in soup.stripped_strings)\nfor key in ['create_order','bulk-order','status_by_cid','status_by_invoice','status_by_trackingcode','get_balance','create_return_request','get_return_request','get_return_requests','payments','police_stations']:\n    print('---', key, '---')\n    idx=text.find(key)\n    print(text[max(0,idx-180):idx+240] if idx!=-1 else 'NOT FOUND')\nPY","explanation":"Parse published Steadfast doc HTML and inspect documented endpoint names for full feature coverage","goal":"Verify Steadfast feature list","mode":"sync"}},"id":"7568b321-bfd0-4aa7-884d-8c955933af03","timestamp":"2026-05-03T11:09:49.620Z","parentId":"41b5e1d0-33d6-42b8-b3d2-7292a9e6a304"}

{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"17ea2338-1056-4c72-860e-e0c7886fc36c","content":"Steadfast Courier implementation **সম্পূর্ণ শেষ** ✅\n\n## কী কী সম্পন্ন হয়েছে (full coverage)\n\nSteadfast doc অনুযায়ী core endpoints + usage flow এখন project-এ implemented:\n\n- Single order create\n- Bulk order create\n- Status lookup by:\n  - Consignment ID\n  - Invoice\n  - Tracking Code\n- Balance check\n- Return request create\n- Return requests list + single return request\n- Payments list + payment details\n- Police stations list\n\n## Code changes done\n\n- `backend/app/Services/SteadfastService.php`\n  - সব Steadfast API wrapper methods যোগ\n  - bulk payload formatter\n  - consignment/tracking extraction helper\n\n- `backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/CourierController.php`\n  - Steadfast utility endpoints যোগ\n  - `bookBulk`-এ Steadfast + Pathao dual support\n  - Steadfast bulk booking persist + per-order result mapping\n\n- `backend/routes/api.php`\n  - সব Steadfast routes expose করা হয়েছে:\n    - `/courier/steadfast/balance`\n    - `/courier/steadfast/status/...`\n    - `/courier/steadfast/return-requests`\n    - `/courier/steadfast/payments`\n    - `/courier/steadfast/police-stations`\n    - `/courier/book/bulk`\n\n- `frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/page.tsx`\n  - bulk booking modal-এ Steadfast support\n  - bulk courier selector (`Pathao` / `Steadfast`)\n\n- `frontend/src/app/dashboard/courier/performance/page.tsx`\n  - এটাকে full **Steadfast Control Center** করা হয়েছে:\n    - overview + balance\n    - status lookup tools\n    - return request form + list\n    - payment list + payment detail lookup\n    - police station searchable listing\n\n## Validation & deploy\n\n- PHP lint: ✅\n- editor errors: ✅ none\n- frontend production build: ✅ success\n- frontend service restart: ✅ done\n\n## Commit\n\n- `1b95f0f` — `feat: complete Steadfast courier integration across API and dashboard`\n\n---\n\nSteadfast implementation এখন production-ready অবস্থায় আছে। চাইলে next step-এ আমি `courier/performance` পেজে export (CSV) + pagination + date filter-ও যোগ করে দিতে পারি।","toolRequests":[]},"id":"8ad2d9ed-06f4-48d6-b384-f1af04d77b25","timestamp":"2026-05-03T11:20:16.989Z","parentId":"be60c4b7-0c2d-4589-82ce-6bb3a28d005a"}

{"type":"user.message","data":{"content":"dashboard/courier থেকে Steadfast Courier কুরিয়ার এ বুকিং দেওয়া যাচ্ছে না।  তুমি API Documentation ভালভাবে দেখে অর্ডার বুক করার সমস্যাটি সমাধান কর।\nGoogle Docs ব্যবহার করে প্রকাশ করা হয়েছে\nঅপব্যবহারের অভিযোগ জানানআরও জানুন\nAPI Documentation\nপ্রতি 5 মিনিটে অটোমেটিক আপডেট হয়ে যায়\n\n\n\n\n\n\nSteadfast Courier Limited\n\n\nAPI Documentation\n\n\nV1\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nTable of Contents\n\n\nAPI Authentication Parameter\nPlacing an order\nBulk Order Create\nChecking Delivery Status\nChecking Current Balance\nSingle Return Request View\nGet Return Requests\nGet Payments (Recently Added)\nGet Single Payment with Consignments (Recently Added)\nGet Policestations (Recently Added)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nAPI Authentication Parameter\n\nName\n\nType\n\nDescription\n\nValue\n\nApi-Key\n\nString\n\nAPI Key provided by Steadfast Courier Ltd.\n\n***************\n\nSecret-Key\n\nString\n\nSecret Key provided by Steadfast Courier Ltd.\n\n***************\n\nContent-Type\n\nString\n\nRequest Content Type\n\napplication/json\n\n\nAuthentication parameters are required to be added at the header part of each request.\n\n\nBase Url: https://portal.packzy.com/api/v1\n\n\n\nPlacing an order\n\n        Path: /create_order\n\n        Method: Post\n\n\n       Input Parameters:\n\n\nName\n\nType\n\nMOC\n\nDescription\n\nExample\n\ninvoice\n\nstring\n\nrequired\n\nMust be Unique and can be alpha-numeric including hyphens and underscores.\n\n12366\n\nabc123\n\n12abchd\n\nAa12-das4\n\na_sdfd-wq\n\nrecipient_name\n\nstring\n\nrequired\n\nWithin 100 characters.\n\nJohn Smith\n\nrecipient_phone\n\nstring\n\nrequired\n\nMust be 11 Digits Phone number\n\n01234567890\n\nalternative_phone\n\nstring\n\noptional\n\nMust be 11 Digits Phone number\n\n\nrecipient_email\n\nstring\n\noptional\n\n\n\nrecipient_address\n\nstring\n\nrequired\n\nRecipient’s address within 250 characters.\n\nFla# A1,\nHouse# 17/1, Road# 3/A, Dhanmondi,\n\nDhaka-1209\n\ncod_amount\n\nnumeric\n\nrequired\n\nCash on delivery amount in BDT including all charges. Can’t be less than 0.\n\n1060\n\nnote\n\nstring\n\noptional\n\nDelivery instructions or other notes.\n\nDeliver within\n\n3 PM\n\nitem_description\n\nstring\n\noptional\n\nItems name and other information\n\n\ntotal_lot\n\nnumeric\n\noptional\n\nTotal Lot of items\n\n\ndelivery_type\n\nnumeric\n\noptional\n\n0 = for home delivery, 1 = for Point Delivery/Steadfast Hub Pick Up\n\n0/1\n\n\n        Yellow colour marked parameters are added newly.\n\n\nResponse:\n\n\n{\n\n    \"status\": 200,\n\n    \"message\": \"Consignment has been created successfully.\",\n\n    \"consignment\": {\n\n        \"consignment_id\": 1424107,\n\n        \"invoice\": \"Aa12-das4\",\n\n        \"tracking_code\": \"15BAEB8A\",\n\n        \"recipient_name\": \"John Smith\",\n\n        \"recipient_phone\": \"01234567890\",\n\n        \"recipient_address\": \"Fla# A1,House# 17/1, Road# 3/A, Dhanmondi,Dhaka-1209\",\n\n        \"cod_amount\": 1060,\n\n        \"status\": \"in_review\",\n\n        \"note\": \"Deliver within 3PM\",\n\n        \"created_at\": \"2021-03-21T07:05:31.000000Z\",\n\n        \"updated_at\": \"2021-03-21T07:05:31.000000Z\"\n\n    }\n\n}\n\n\n\n\nBulk Order Create\n\n        Path: /create_order/bulk-order\n\n        Method: Post\n\n\nInput Parameters:\n\n\n\n\nName\n\nType\n\nMOC\n\nDescription\n\nExample\n\ndata\n\nJson\n\nrequire\n\nMaximum 500 items are allowed. Json encoded array\n\nGiven below\n\n\n        \n\n        Array Keys:\n\n\n$item = [\n\n        ‘Invoice’ => ‘adbd123’\n\n]\n\n\nExample:\n\npublic function bulkCreate(){\n\n$orders = Order::with('address')->where('status',1)->take(500)->get();\n\n\n$data = array();\n\n\nforeach($orders as $order){\n\n$item = [\n\n'invoice' => $order->id,\n\n'recipient_name' => $order->address ? $order->address->name : 'N/A',\n\n'recipient_address' => $order->address ? $order->address->address : 'N/A',\n\n'recipient_phone' => $order->address ? $order->address->phone : '',\n\n'cod_amount' => $order->due_amount,\n\n'note' => $order->note,\n\n];\n\n\n}\n\n\n$steadfast = new Steadfast();\n\n$result = $steadfast->bulkCreate(json_encode($data));\n\nreturn $result;\n\n}\n\n// Example code\n\n\npublic function bulkCreate($data){\n\n                 $api_key = '1m9mwrrwsjbrg0w';\n\n         $secret_key = 'y196ftazvk9s3';\n\n\n         $response = Http::withHeaders([\n\n         'Api-Key' => $api_key,\n\n         'Secret-Key' => $secret_key,\n\n         'Content-Type' => 'application/json'\n\n         ])->post($this->base_url.'/create_order/bulk-order', [\n\n                 'data' => $data,\n\n                 ]);\n\n         return json_decode($response->getBody()->getContents());\n\n         }\n\n\n\n\n        \n\nResult:\n\n[\n\n{\n\n\"invoice\": \"230822-1\",\n\n\"recipient_name\": \"John Doe\",\n\n\"recipient_address\": \"House 44, Road 2/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209\",\n\n\"recipient_phone\": \"0171111111\",\n\n\"cod_amount\": \"0.00\",\n\n\"note\": null,\n\n\"consignment_id\": 11543968,\n\n\"tracking_code\": \"B025A038\",\n\n\"status\": \"success\"\n\n},\n\n{\n\n\"invoice\": \"230822-1\",\n\n\"recipient_name\": \"John Doe\",\n\n\"recipient_address\": \"House 44, Road 2/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209\",\n\n\"recipient_phone\": \"0171111111\",\n\n\"cod_amount\": \"0.00\",\n\n\"note\": null,\n\n\"consignment_id\": 11543969,\n\n\"tracking_code\": \"B025A1DC\",\n\n\"status\": \"success\"\n\n},\n\n{\n\n\"invoice\": \"230822-1\",\n\n\"recipient_name\": \"John Doe\",\n\n\"recipient_address\": \"House 44, Road 2/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209\",\n\n\"recipient_phone\": \"0171111111\",\n\n\"cod_amount\": \"0.00\",\n\n\"note\": null,\n\n\"consignment_id\": 11543970,\n\n\"tracking_code\": \"B025A23A\",\n\n\"status\": \"success\"\n\n},\n\n{\n\n\"invoice\": \"230822-1\",\n\n\"recipient_name\": \"John Doe\",\n\n\"recipient_address\": \"House 44, Road 2/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209\",\n\n\"recipient_phone\": \"0171111111\",\n\n\"cod_amount\": \"0.00\",\n\n\"note\": null,\n\n\"consignment_id\": 11543971,\n\n\"tracking_code\": \"B025A3FA\",\n\n\"status\": \"success\"\n\n},\n\n]\n\n\nIf there is any error in data your will get response like\n\n\"data\": [\n\n{\n\n\"invoice\": \"230822-1\",\n\n\"recipient_name\": \"John Doe\",\n\n\"recipient_address\": \"House 44, Road 2/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209\",\n\n\"recipient_phone\": \"0171111111\",\n\n\"cod_amount\": \"0.00\",\n\n\"note\": null,\n\n\"consignment_id\": null,\n\n\"tracking_code\": null,\n\n\"status\": \"error\"\n\n},\n\n]\n\n\nChecking Delivery Status\n        \n\n\ni) By Consignment ID\n\n\n                Path: /status_by_cid/{id}\n\nMethod: GET\n\n\n        ii) By Your invoice ID\n\n                Path: /status_by_invoice/{invoice}\n\n                Method: GET\n\n\n        iii) By Tracking Code\n\n                Path: /status_by_trackingcode/{trackingCode}\n\n                Method: GET\n\n                \n\n        \n\n        Response:\n\n        \n\n        {\n\n    \"status\": 200,\n\n    \"delivery_status\": \"in_review\"\n\n}\n\n\n\n\nDelivery Statuses:\n\n\nName\n\nDescription\n\npending\n\nConsignment is not delivered or cancelled yet.\n\ndelivered_approval_pending\n\nConsignment is delivered but waiting for admin approval.\n\npartial_delivered_approval_pending\n\nConsignment is delivered partially and waiting for admin approval.\n\ncancelled_approval_pending\n\nConsignment is cancelled and waiting for admin approval.\n\nunknown_approval_pending\n\nUnknown Pending status. Need contact with the support team.\n\ndelivered\n\nConsignment is delivered and balance added.\n\npartial_delivered\n\nConsignment is partially delivered and balance added.\n\ncancelled\n\nConsignment is cancelled and balance updated.\n\nhold\n\nConsignment is held.\n\nin_review\n\nOrder is placed and waiting to be reviewed.\n\nunknown\n\nUnknown status. Need contact with the support team.\n\n\n\n5. Checking Current Balance\n\n\n        Path: /get_balance\n\n        Method: GET\n\n\nResponse:\n\n {\n\n    \"status\": 200,\n\n    \"current_balance\": 0\n\n}\n\n\nCreating Return Requests\nPath: /create_return_request\n\nMethod: POST\n\n        \n\nName\n\nType\n\nDescription\n\nconsignment_id or invoice or tracking_code\n\nRequired. Numeric or string\n\nConsignment id or user defined invoice id or tracking code of the consignment of the requesting consignment.\n\nreason\n\nOptional.  string\n\n\n\n\nStatus:  'pending', 'approved', 'processing', 'completed', 'cancelled'\n\nResponse :  \n\nid\n\n1\n\nuser_id\n\n1\n\nconsignment_id\n\n10000042\n\nreason\n\nnull\n\nstatus\n\npending\n\ncreated_at\n\n2025-07-30T23:11:45.000000Z\n\nupdated_at\n\n2025-07-30T23:11:45.000000Z\n\n\n\n\nSingle Return Request View\n\nPath: /get_return_request/{id}\nMethod: GET\n\n\n\nGet Return Requests\nPath: /get_return_requests\nMethod: GET\n\nGet Payments\n        Path: /payments\n\n        Method: GET\n\n\nGet Single Payment with Consignments\nPath: /payments/{payment_id}\nMethod: GET\n\n\n Get Policestations\nPath: /police_stations\n\nMethod: GET","attachments":[]},"id":"f4c96aa0-41cb-4108-9022-7cd257c479a9","timestamp":"2026-05-03T11:25:31.546Z","parentId":"96f6d74e-7015-4e69-b735-847ffe5a570b"}

($fallback ?: ['status' => 0, 'message' => 'Invalid response']);\\n+        $json = $response->json();\\n+        if (is_array($json)) {\\n+            return $json;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $body = trim((string) $response->body());\\n+        if ($body !== '') {\\n+            $decoded = json_decode($body, true);\\n+            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) {\\n+                return $decoded;\\n+            }\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        if (! empty($fallback)) {\\n+            return $fallback;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        if ($response->successful()) {\\n+            return [\\n+                'status' => $response->status(),\\n+                'message' => 'Request succeeded but response was not valid JSON.',\\n+                'raw' => $body !== '' ? substr(strip_tags($body), 0, 500) : null,\\n+            ];\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return [\\n+            'status' => $response->status(),\\n+            'message' => $body !== '' ? substr(strip_tags($body), 0, 500) : 'Request failed',\\n+            'raw' => $body !== '' ? substr(strip_tags($body), 0, 1000) : null,\\n+        ];\\n     }\\n \\n     public function createOrder(string $apiKey, string $secretKey, array $data): array\\n     {\\n-        $response = $this->client($apiKey, $secretKey)->post(self::BASE . '/create_order', [\\n-            'invoice'           => $data['invoice'],\\n-            'recipient_name'    => $data['recipient_name'],\\n-            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone($data['recipient_phone']),\\n-            'recipient_address' => $data['recipient_address'],\\n-            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\\n-            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? '',\\n-        ]);\\n+        $payload = [\\n+            'invoice'           => (string) $data['invoice'],\\n+            'recipient_name'    => Str::limit((string) $data['recipient_name'], 100, ''),\\n+            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone((string) $data['recipient_phone']),\\n+            'recipient_address' => Str::limit((string) $data['recipient_address'], 250, ''),\\n+            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\\n+            'note'              => (string) ($data['note'] ?? ''),\\n+        ];\\n+\\n+        if (! empty($data['alternative_phone'])) {\\n+            $payload['alternative_phone'] = $this->formatPhone((string) $data['alternative_phone']);\\n+        }\\n+        if (! empty($data['recipient_email'])) {\\n+            $payload['recipient_email'] = (string) $data['recipient_email'];\\n+        }\\n+        if (! empty($data['item_description'])) {\\n+            $payload['item_description'] = (string) $data['item_description'];\\n+        }\\n+        if (isset($data['total_lot']) && $data['total_lot'] !== '') {\\n+            $payload['total_lot'] = (float) $data['total_lot'];\\n+        }\\n+        if (isset($data['delivery_type']) && $data['delivery_type'] !== '') {\\n+            $payload['delivery_type'] = (int) $data['delivery_type'];\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        $response = $this->client($apiKey, $secretKey)->post(self::BASE . '/create_order', $payload);\\n \\n         return $this->jsonResponse($response);\\n     }\\n@@\\n     public function formatBulkItem(array $data): array\\n     {\\n+        $item = [\\n+            'invoice'           => (string) $data['invoice'],\\n+            'recipient_name'    => Str::limit((string) $data['recipient_name'], 100, ''),\\n+            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone((string) $data['recipient_phone']),\\n+            'recipient_address' => Str::limit((string) $data['recipient_address'], 250, ''),\\n+            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\\n+            'note'              => (string) ($data['note'] ?? ''),\\n+        ];\\n+\\n+        if (! empty($data['item_description'])) {\\n+            $item['item_description'] = (string) $data['item_description'];\\n+        }\\n+        if (isset($data['delivery_type']) && $data['delivery_type'] !== '') {\\n+            $item['delivery_type'] = (int) $data['delivery_type'];\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return $item;\\n+    }\\n+\\n+    private function formatPhone(string $phone): string\\n+    {\\n+        $phone = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $phone);\\n+\\n+        // 8801XXXXXXXXX => 01XXXXXXXXX\\n+        if (str_starts_with($phone, '880') && strlen($phone) >= 13) {\\n+            $phone = '0' . substr($phone, 3);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        // 1XXXXXXXXX => 01XXXXXXXXX\\n+        if (strlen($phone) === 10 && str_starts_with($phone, '1')) {\\n+            $phone = '0' . $phone;\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        if (strlen($phone) > 11) {\\n+            $phone = substr($phone, -11);\\n+        }\\n+\\n+        return $phone;\\n+    }\\n-        return [\\n-            'invoice'           => $data['invoice'],\\n-            'recipient_name'    => Str::limit((string) $data['recipient_name'], 100, ''),\\n-            'recipient_phone'   => $this->formatPhone((string) $data['recipient_phone']),\\n-            'recipient_address' => $data['recipient_address'],\\n-            'cod_amount'        => (float) $data['cod_amount'],\\n-            'note'              => $data['note'] ?? 'nullable|string|max:250',\\n             'special_instruction'  => 'nullable|string|max:300',\\n         ]);\\n@@\\n         $items = array_map(function (Order $order) use ($data, $service) {\\n+            $address = trim(implode(', ', array_filter([\\n+                $order->customer_address,\\n+                $order->customer_area,\\n+                $order->customer_thana,\\n+                $order->customer_district,\\n+            ])));\\n+\\n             return $service->formatBulkItem([\\n                 'invoice'           => $order->order_number,\\n                 'recipient_name' '',\\n+                'item_description'  => $data['item_description'] ?? null,\\n+                'delivery_type'     => isset($data['delivery_type']) ? (int) $data['delivery_type'] : null,\\n             ]);\\n         }, $orders);\\n@@\\n     private function bookSteadfast(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\\n     {\\n         $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\\n         if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\\n             return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast API credentials not configured. 'item_description'     => 'nullable|string|max:250',\n             'special_instruction'  => 'nullable|string|max:300',\n         ]);\n@@\n         $items = array_map(function (Order $order) use (int) $data['delivery_type'] : null,\n             ]);\n         }, $orders);\n@@\n     private function bookSteadfast(Order $order, array $data): JsonResponse\n     {\n         $settings = CourierSetting::where('user_id', auth()->id())->first();\n         if (! $settings || ! $settings->steadfast_api_key) {\n             return response()->json(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Steadfast API credentials not configured.
